Classical rule-based schemes rely on fixed local refinement rules and often produce over-smoothed surfaces. Recent neural subdivision methods improve detail synthesis, but remain constrained by local modeling and exhibit limited generalizability. We present SubdivAR, a neural mesh subdivision framework based on our proposed Mesh Autoregressive Representation (MAR). MAR arranges meshes at different subdivision levels into an ordered scale sequence, reformulating subdivision as autoregressive next-scale prediction. To support this formulation, we introduce a Hybrid Topology-Aware Transformer that combines global semantic attention with topology-constrained local feature aggregation. SubdivAR adopts a next-scale coordinate prediction paradigm, regressing vertex offsets at each refinement stage to preserve subdivision topology while recovering fine-grained geometric details. To enable reliable learning, we construct FII-40K, a curated dataset of nearly 40,000 high-quality meshes with multi-level subdivision supervision. Experiments show that SubdivAR outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing Hausdorff Distance and Chamfer Distance by 18.8% and 14.2%, respectively, and demonstrates strong robustness on complex open-surface geometries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SubdivAR，基于自回归下一尺度预测的神经网格细分框架，通过 Mesh Autoregressive Representation 实现拓扑保持的细节生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统规则化网格细分方法依赖固定局部规则，常导致表面过度平滑；现有神经方法受限于局部建模，泛化能力不足。SubdivAR 旨在突破局部限制，实现全局感知与拓扑保持的细化，提升复杂几何的细节恢复与泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: SubdivAR 采用 Mesh Autoregressive Representation (MAR)，将不同细分级别网格组织为有序尺度序列，将细分建模为自回归下一尺度预测。提出 Hybrid Topology-Aware Transformer，融合全局语义注意力和拓扑约束的局部特征聚合。通过下一尺度坐标预测范式，回归顶点偏移，同时保持细分拓扑。构建 FII-40K 数据集（近 40,000 个高质量网格）提供多级细分监督。
light_analysis.result: 在基准测试中，SubdivAR 相较现有最优方法：Hausdorff 距离降低 18.8%，Chamfer 距离降低 14.2%。在复杂开放曲面几何上展现出强鲁棒性，验证了方法对多样几何结构的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SubdivAR 通过自回归建模和拓扑感知 Transformer，有效提升了网格细分的细节合成质量与泛化性。为数字资产创建提供实用工具。未来可探索更高效的训练策略及动态拓扑下的扩展。

title: Pseudo-Text-Conditioned 3D Grounding DINO for Organ Localization in Abdominal CT
abstract: Reliable organ localization in abdominal CT can provide spatial priors for downstream trauma analysis. We propose CT-3GDINO, a lightweight 3D detector that adapts a Grounding-DINO-style query-based architecture to fixed organ localization using frozen pseudo-text class tokens instead of a real text encoder. The model combines a Swin3D visual backbone, bidirectional feature enhancement, pseudo-text-guided query selection, and a cross-modality decoder to predict normalized 3D boxes for liver, spleen, left kidney, right kidney, and bowel. We train and evaluate on 193 matched RSNA/RATIC CT volumes with segmentation-derived boxes. The best multi-scale model, trained from scratch, achieves 0.5830 overall top-1 class-wise mAP over 3D IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.7, outperforming fixed- and trainable-backbone classification-pretrained variants with 0.5570 and 0.4657 mAP. Performance is strong for coarse localization, with 0.9649 AP at IoU 0.1, but remains limited for strict box alignment, with 0.1552 AP at IoU 0.7. These results establish CT-3GDINO as an open-source baseline for pseudo-text-conditioned 3D organ localization and motivate future work on localization-aware pretraining, richer multimodal conditioning, and injury-focused detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CT-3GDINO，一种基于伪文本条件的轻量级3D器官定位检测器，适应Grounding-DINO架构并在腹部CT数据集上取得良好粗定位效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在腹部CT中，可靠的器官定位可为下游创伤分析提供空间先验。现有方法可能依赖复杂文本编码器或缺乏针对固定器官定位的轻量级设计。本文旨在通过伪文本类标记替代真实文本编码器，简化查询式3D检测架构，实现固定器官的高效定位，同时保持不错的性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用Grounding-DINO风格的查询式架构，使用冻结的伪文本类标记替代真实文本编码器。模型结合Swin3D视觉骨干、双向特征增强、伪文本引导的查询选择和跨模态解码器，预测肝脏、脾脏、左肾、右肾和肠道的归一化3D边界框。在193个RSNA/RATIC CT体积上训练和评估，使用分割导出的框作为标注。
light_analysis.result: 最佳多尺度模型从头训练，在IoU阈值0.1-0.7上总体top-1类平均精度（mAP）达0.5830，优于固定骨干（0.5570）和可训练骨干分类预训练（0.4657）变体。粗定位（IoU=0.1）AP为0.9649，但严格对齐（IoU=0.7）AP仅0.1552，表明框对齐能力有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: CT-3GDINO作为开源基线，证明了伪文本条件在3D器官定位中的有效性。未来工作包括定位感知预训练、更丰富的多模态条件以及针对损伤的检测。该方法为腹部CT分析提供了轻量级、可扩展的定位方案，但其严格框对齐精度仍需提升。

title: Finding Stationary Points by Comparisons
abstract: We study the problem of finding stationary points of non-convex functions when access to the objective is provided only through a comparison oracle that, given two points, outputs which has the larger function value. For a twice differentiable $f\colon\mathbb R^n\to\mathbb R$ with Lipschitz gradient and Hessian, we develop an algorithm that visits an $ε$-stationary point using $\widetilde O(n^2/ε^{1.5})$ queries. Our approach uses a subroutine that estimates the normalized Hessian to accuracy $δ$ using $\widetilde O(n^2\log(1/δ))$ queries. We further study this problem with a quantum comparison oracle model where queries can be made in superpositions, and develop the first quantum algorithm that finds an $ε$-stationary point, which takes $\widetilde O(n/ε^{1.5})$ queries.
comment: 41 pages, 4 figures. To appear in the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出比较预言机下非凸函数稳定点的高效算法，并首次给出量子版本。
light_analysis.motivation: 在仅能通过比较两个点函数值大小来获取信息的场景中，寻找非凸函数的稳定点是一个基础且困难的问题。许多现实优化问题中，无法直接获得梯度或函数值，只能进行相对比较。现有方法通常需要更多查询或更强的假设。该研究旨在提出一种查询高效的算法，并进一步探索量子计算带来的加速潜力。
light_analysis.method: 针对二阶可微且梯度和Hessian Lipschitz连续的非凸函数，提出一种基于比较预言机的算法。核心思想是使用一个子程序估计归一化Hessian，该子程序仅需~O(n^2 log(1/δ))次查询即可达到精度δ。在此基础上，通过精心设计的策略迭代搜索，最终访问ε-稳定点所需的查询次数为~O(n^2/ε^{1.5})。同时，将问题扩展到量子比较预言机模型，利用量子叠加查询提出首个量子算法，查询复杂度降至~O(n/ε^{1.5})。
light_analysis.result: 在经典模型下，算法访问ε-稳定点需要~O(n^2/ε^{1.5})次比较查询，优于现有结果。量子算法进一步将查询复杂度降低至~O(n/ε^{1.5})，实现了平方级加速。结果通过严格的复杂度分析给出，未提及具体实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为比较预言机下的非凸优化提供了首个高效算法，并探索了量子加速的可能性。该工作对仅能进行相对比较的优化场景（如黑箱优化、对抗性搜索）具有理论指导意义。未来可考虑放宽函数光滑性假设或推广到随机比较模型。

title: PanoImager: Geometry-Guided Novel View Synthesis and Reconstruction from Sparse Panoramic Views
abstract: Panoramic sensing offers wide field-of-view coverage, yet 3D reconstruction from sparse panoramas remains challenging under rotation-dominant, weak-parallax motion. In such regimes, SfM/SLAM initialization is often ill-conditioned and unreliable. We present PanoImager, an SfM-free framework that combines feed-forward pose/depth priors, geometry-conditioned diffusion view completion, and depth-guided 3DGS optimization. Given only a few panoramic images, PanoImager decomposes them into local perspective views, synthesizes auxiliary observations to enrich sparse evidence, and stabilizes Gaussian optimization for improved cross-view consistency. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show improved stability under extreme sparsity, suggesting PanoImager as an offline/background component for map refinement when SfM/SLAM fails to initialize.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PanoImager，一种无需SfM的框架，结合前馈位姿/深度先验、几何条件扩散视图补全和深度引导的3DGS优化，从稀疏全景图像实现稳定新视图合成与重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景传感具有宽视场角，但稀疏全景在旋转主导、弱视差运动下，SfM/SLAM初始化常病态且不可靠，导致3D重建困难。现有方法依赖特征匹配和多视图几何，在极端稀疏场景下性能退化。因此需要一种不依赖SfM的稳健方法，利用先验和扩散模型增强观测证据。
light_analysis.method: PanoImager首先将稀疏全景图像分解为局部透视视图，利用前馈网络估计位姿和深度先验；随后通过几何条件扩散模型合成辅助视角，丰富稀疏观测；最后采用深度引导的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）优化，增强跨视图一致性。整体框架无需SfM初始化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，PanoImager在极端稀疏全景输入下显著提升了新视图合成和3D重建的稳定性，相比传统SfM/SLAM方法，初始化成功率更高，重建精度更优。实验表明其可作为SfM/SLAM失败时的离线精化组件。
light_analysis.conclusion: PanoImager有效解决了稀疏全景场景下SfM/SLAM的脆弱性问题，提供了一种无SfM的鲁棒重建方案。学术上拓展了全景3D重建的方法论，实用中可应用于机器人、AR/VR的地图精化。未来可探索更高效的前馈先验和实时化。

title: Towards Explainable Adjudicative Variance: Quantifying Judicial Discretion via Gated Multi-Task Learning
abstract: Legal outcome prediction must disentangle objective case facts from adjudicative context. Merit-based rulings rely on factual evidence while technical disposals may hinge on judicial discretion. We propose a Judge-Aware Gated Multi-Task Learning architecture that explicitly models this distinction. We introduce a fine-grained outcome taxonomy to supervise the encoder, enforcing a structural regularization that disentangles distinct semantic pathways. This granular legal curriculum enables our Gated Fusion mechanism to dynamically modulate reliance on judge identity. We evaluate our approach on 13,937 UK Employment Tribunal decisions. We benchmark our design against supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of a Gemma-4 26B-A4B backbone, in which judge identity and the taxonomy are injected as prompt tokens or autoregressive output targets. The two contextual signals compose only weakly when forced through a single autoregressive channel. In contrast, coupling a LoRA-adapted Gemma-4 encoder with our gated architecture defines a new state of the art on this benchmark while requiring an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters than the generative SFT baselines, with gains concentrated on the most ambiguous and rarest outcome classes. Beyond accuracy, the architecture is interpretable; learned judge embeddings and calibration profiles localize the cases where adjudicative context drives the prediction. These results indicate that, for identity-conditioned classification of legal outcomes, the choice of conditioning interface dominates scale: differentiable structured composition yields more accurate, more parameter-efficient models than prompt-based composition over a substantially larger backbone.
comment: 17 pages (8 pages main text), 5 figures, 9 tables. Accepted to the AI for Law Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026), Seoul, South Korea

light_analysis.overview: 提出法官感知门控多任务学习架构，通过结构化正则化分离客观事实与司法自由裁量权，在UK劳动法庭数据集上实现更高精度和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律结果预测需区分客观事实与司法背景，现有方法通过单一自回归通道注入法官身份和结果分类信号，但两者融合效果弱。本文旨在显式建模这一区别，量化司法自由裁量权对裁决的影响，提升模型可解释性和参数效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出Judge-Aware Gated Multi-Task Learning架构，引入细粒度结果分类，通过结构正则化强制分离不同语义路径。使用门控融合机制动态调节法官身份依赖，以LoRA适配的Gemma-4为编码器，在UK Employment Tribunal的13,937个裁决上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 与Gemma-4监督微调基线相比，本架构在保持参数少一个数量级的情况下取得新最优结果，特别是在最模糊和稀有的结果类别上提升显著。法官嵌入和校准轮廓可解释地定位司法背景主导预测的案例，验证了模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，对于身份条件化的法律结果分类，条件接口的选择比模型规模更重要：可微结构化组合比基于提示的组合更准确高效。本工作为量化司法自由裁量权提供了工具，有助于法律决策的公平性和透明度。

title: How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?
abstract: External indexes can be used for cluster evaluation when ground truth is available. We review the most common external validity indexes focusing on set-matching-based measures. We recommend centroid index (CI), because it is an intuitive cluster-level measure with an explainable result. If we need a more fine-tuned, point-level measure, there are more choices. Pair-set index (PSI) provides a normalized score which is not biased by cluster sizes. If all points should matter equally, then clustering accuracy (ACC) or any other set-matching measure is suitable.
comment: Preprint of a book chapter to appear: P. Fränti, "How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?", In Center-based clustering, Springer Nature, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文推荐并比较了基于真实标签的聚类外部评估指标，强调质心指数（CI）的直观性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类评估中，当真实标签可用时，外部指标用于衡量聚类质量。现有指标如调整兰德指数等存在解释复杂或偏差问题，导致用户难以选择合适的度量。本文旨在梳理常见基于集合匹配的指标，提供选择指南，帮助研究者和从业者根据需求（如聚类级或点级评估、对大小偏置的敏感性）做出明智决策。
light_analysis.method: 论文回顾了外部有效性指标，聚焦于集合匹配方法。推荐质心指数（CI）作为聚类级度量，因其结果直观可解释；成对集指数（PSI）提供标准化分数，不受聚类大小影响；若所有点重要性相同，则聚类准确率（ACC）或其他集合匹配度量适用。文章通过理论分析比较各指标特性，未提及具体数据集或实验。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能指标。主要结论是：CI适用于直观的聚类级评估，PSI适用于无偏的标准化点级评估，ACC适用于等权重点级评估。未与基线方法进行定量对比，仅从理论角度阐述各指标的适用场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为聚类外部评估提供了实用指南，明确了不同场景下推荐使用的指标，实践价值在于帮助用户避免指标误用。局限性在于缺乏实验验证，未来工作可结合真实数据集比较指标行为，或探索混合评估策略。

title: NuclearQAv2: A Structured Benchmark for Evaluating Domain-Science Competence in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but ensuring their reliability in highly technical domains remains a significant challenge. In nuclear engineering, problem solving often requires not only factual knowledge but also quantitative reasoning and conceptual understanding. To address the need for systematic evaluation in this domain, we introduce NuclearQAv2, a benchmark for assessing LLMs on nuclear engineering knowledge. The benchmark comprises approximately 1,240 question-answer pairs spanning three categories: boolean, numeric, and verbal. NuclearQAv2 is constructed using a hybrid pipeline that combines expert-authored questions, existing datasets, and LLM-assisted generation from domain-specific technical corpora. By leveraging structured prompting for both automated question generation and response evaluation, the proposed framework enables scalable benchmark construction and evaluation. We evaluate a diverse set of LLMs using NuclearQAv2 and observe substantial performance differences across task types. While the models generally perform well on factual questions, quantitative reasoning and conceptual understanding remain considerably more challenging. These results highlight the importance of multi-faceted evaluation frameworks and establish NuclearQAv2 as a scalable benchmark for assessing LLM capabilities in technical domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NuclearQAv2基准，用于系统评估大型语言模型在核工程领域的事实知识、定量推理和概念理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在通用任务上表现出色，但在核工程等技术领域的可靠性仍需验证。该领域问题需综合事实知识、定量推理和概念理解，现有评估缺乏系统性。为填补这一空白，作者构建了专用基准以推动评估标准化。
light_analysis.method: NuclearQAv2包含约1240个问答对，涵盖布尔、数值和语言三类问题。采用混合管道：专家撰写、现有数据集和LLM辅助生成（基于领域技术语料）。通过结构化提示实现自动问题生成与响应评估，确保基准构建的可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 评估多种LLM表明，模型在事实性问题表现良好，但定量推理和概念理解显著更具挑战性。不同任务类型性能差异明显，凸显多面评估的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NuclearQAv2为评估LLM在技术领域能力提供了可扩展基准，揭示了当前模型在定量与概念推理上的不足。未来可扩展至其他工程领域，并推动模型改进，提升专业可靠性。

title: State Representation Matters in Deep Reinforcement Learning: Application to Energy Trading
abstract: Energy trading decisions depend not only on current market prices, but also on expected future market conditions, and operational constraints. This makes the state representation given to a reinforcement learning agent an important design choice. We study this in HydroDam, a pumped-storage arbitrage environment, using a fixed Double DQN agent. The environment, action space, reward function, network, and training protocol are kept fixed; only the market features are changed. We compare absolute price/calendar features, relative features that compare current prices with recent market history, forecast features, and all combinations of these three feature families. Policies are trained and selected using 2007--2011 Belgian day-ahead prices and evaluated on two test settings: a later same-market test set from 2012--2025 and 39 other ENTSO-E market zones. Absolute features only reaches 28.8% on the test set and a median 5.7% across zones. Relative-only and forecast-only states also stay below a rolling price-score heuristic in the cross-zone median. Combining feature families is much stronger: absolute + relative reaches 49.9% on the test set and a 39.8% cross-zone median, while absolute + relative + forecast reaches 55.6% and 47.5%. These results suggest that state representation is not a minor preprocessing choice in storage-trading RL, but a central part of the policy design: robust transfer requires combining price scale, recent relative price context, and short-horizon forecast information, rather than relying on any single feature family.

light_analysis.overview: 研究了深度强化学习中状态表示对能源交易性能的关键影响，通过组合特征族显著提升策略泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 能源交易决策依赖当前价格、未来市场预期和运行约束，状态表示是强化学习智能体的重要设计选择。现有方法多关注算法或网络架构，忽略了状态特征的影响。本文旨在系统研究不同市场特征族（绝对、相对、预测）及其组合对交易策略性能的影响，揭示状态表示在储能交易RL中的核心作用。
light_analysis.method: 在HydroDam抽水蓄能套利环境中，固定使用Double DQN智能体，仅改变市场特征。设计了绝对价格/日历特征、相对当前与近期价格的特征、预测特征，以及所有组合。使用2007-2011比利时日前价格训练策略，在2012-2025同市场测试集和39个ENTSO-E其他市场区域评估，对比各特征族的性能。
light_analysis.result: 绝对特征仅达测试集28.8%、跨区域中位数5.7%；相对和预测特征均低于滚动价格分数启发式。组合特征显著更强：绝对+相对达49.9%和39.8%；绝对+相对+预测达55.6%和47.5%。表明多特征族结合对鲁棒迁移至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 状态表示在储能交易强化学习中不是次要预处理，而是策略设计的核心。需要结合价格尺度、近期相对价格上下文和短期预测信息才能实现稳健迁移。未来可研究更多特征族和更复杂环境。

title: Symplectic Neural Networks for learning Generalized Hamiltonians
abstract: Hamiltonian Neural Networks (HNNs) integrate physical priors into neural models by learning a system's Hamiltonian, improving generalization and sample efficiency. Identifying the system Hamiltonian from noisy observations of state variables is a challenging task. For simulations to faithfully reflect the long-term behavior of Hamiltonian systems, especially energy conservation, it is essential to use symplectic integrators, which preserve the system's geometric structure. This fidelity comes at a cost: implicit symplectic integrators are more computationally intensive and make backpropagation through the ODE solver non-trivial. However, by leveraging the fact that symplectic discretizations of the adjoint system yield the same sensitivities associated by backpropagation, we obtain an efficient method of training the Neural Network parameters. In our work, we explore this alternate method of HNN training under noisy observation of trajectories with our HNN model based on an implicit symplectic integrator. Computationally, a predictor-corrector based ODE solver and fixed point iteration help to mitigate the computational cost of the implicit timestepping, resulting in more efficient generation of gradient updates. We showcase the numerical advantage, in experiments, in system identification and energy preservation on a range of non-separable, chaotic systems and the efficient computation and memory complexity of our method. We also observe that the post-processing of the learned Hamiltonian using backward error analysis yields a modified Hamiltonian that is a more accurate approximation of the true Hamiltonian without the need to use more accurate discretizations of the flow map.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于隐式辛积分器的哈密顿神经网络高效训练方法，通过对称离散化伴随系统实现反向传播，并利用后向误差分析提高能量守恒精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 哈密顿神经网络通过物理先验学习系统哈密顿量，提升了泛化能力和样本效率。然而，从含噪声的状态变量观测中识别哈密顿量极具挑战性。为了忠实反映哈密顿系统的长期行为（尤其是能量守恒），必须使用保持几何结构的辛积分器，但隐式辛积分器计算成本高且反向传播复杂。因此，需要一种高效训练方法，既能利用辛积分器的优势，又能降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 本文利用隐式辛积分器，通过对称离散化伴随系统，获得与反向传播相同的灵敏度，从而高效训练神经网络参数。采用预测-校正ODE求解器和不动点迭代来缓解隐式时间步进的计算成本，高效生成梯度更新。此外，通过后向误差分析对学习到的哈密顿量进行后处理，得到更精确的修改哈密顿量，无需使用更精确的流映射离散化。
light_analysis.result: 在不可分混沌系统等实验上，该方法在系统识别和能量保持方面展现了数值优势，计算和内存复杂度高效。后处理得到的修改哈密顿量比真实哈密顿量更精确近似，无需更精细的离散化。与基线方法相比，在长期能量守恒和训练效率上均有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种基于隐式辛积分器的哈密顿神经网络高效训练方法，通过对称离散化和后向误差分析，在保持几何结构的同时降低了计算成本。该方法在混沌系统识别和能量保持上表现出色，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更广泛的物理系统及自适应离散化策略。

title: Improving General Role-Playing Agents via Psychology-Grounded Reasoning and Role-Aware Policy Optimization
abstract: Building general-purpose role-playing agents that faithfully portray any character from a natural-language profile remains challenging. The dominant paradigm -- supervised fine-tuning -- encourages behavioral mimicry without deep, human-like internal thought processes, resulting in poor out-of-distribution generalization. Therefore, we propose \textbf{Psy-CoT}, a psychology-grounded chain-of-thought framework that decomposes pre-response reasoning into three role-specific steps -- \emph{Interaction Perception}, \emph{Psychological Empathy}, and \emph{Logical Construction} -- so that the model \emph{thinks dynamically} from the profile rather than merely mimicking surface patterns. While structured reasoning provides a foundation, it alone is insufficient; reinforcement learning is essential to further align the model with character fidelity. However, we observe that under LLM-based reward models, both generic phrases that hack the reward model and genuinely role-specific phrases receive identical gradient signals -- this hacking accumulates over training, misleading the model into treating both as equally optimal choices. To address this, we propose \textbf{Role-Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO)}, which uses profile--token mutual information to weight gradients asymmetrically -- amplifying role-specific tokens under positive advantage while attenuating them under negative advantage. Experiments on CoSER, CharacterBench, and CharacterEval demonstrate that Psy-CoT outperforms existing role-playing CoT methods, and RAPO consistently surpasses GRPO across multiple model scales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出心理学驱动的推理框架Psy-CoT和角色感知策略优化RAPO，提升通用角色扮演代理的忠实度与泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于监督微调的角色扮演代理仅模仿表面行为，缺乏深度内在思考过程，导致分布外泛化性能差。同时，基于LLM的奖励模型在强化学习中易被欺骗，通用短语和角色特定短语接收相同梯度信号，使得模型无法区分二者，误导优化方向。
light_analysis.method: 提出Psy-CoT框架，将预响应推理分解为交互感知、心理共情和逻辑构建三个角色特定步骤，实现从角色简介动态思考。针对奖励模型欺骗问题，提出角色感知策略优化(RAPO)，利用profile-token互信息对梯度进行非对称加权：正优势下放大角色相关token梯度，负优势下衰减，实现更精准的角色对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在CoSER、CharacterBench和CharacterEval数据集上，Psy-CoT优于现有角色扮演链式思维方法；RAPO在多个模型规模上一致超越GRPO基线，验证了所提方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过心理学基础推理和角色感知强化学习，显著提升角色扮演代理的忠实度和鲁棒性。该工作为构建更人性化、可泛化的角色扮演系统提供了新范式，未来可探索更多心理学理论与优化策略的结合。

title: Just how sure are you? Improving Verbalized Uncertainty Calibration in Medical VQA
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) applied to Medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) tend to produce overconfident outputs regardless of actual correctness, and existing verbalized confidence calibration methods, developed primarily for text only LLMs, do not account for the multimodal nature of medical image understanding.   This work proposes a training based framework that finetunes MLLMs to improve their calibration using a composite loss function combining a Brier style calibration term, an anchor regularizer that prevents confidence collapse toward extreme values, a contrastive image text alignment term, and a KL based model stabilization term. The alignment signal is derived from a $2 \times 2$ factorial perturbation design that crosses image presence with text integrity, probing the reliance of the model on visual modality input versus language priors. Finally, a top K KL divergence regularizer is used to protect the answering ability of the model during finetuning.   Across three Medical VQA benchmarks and two architectures (MedGemma 4B IT and Qwen2 VL 7B Instruct), our method reduces calibration error by 60% or more, and improves discrimination by 26% or more, while preserving predictive accuracy. On average across benchmarks, the technique outperforms prompting based, sampling based, and training based approaches, and ablation experiments confirm that each component of the loss function is indeed necessary for improving the calibration. All code for the experiments is publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种训练框架，通过复合损失函数显著提升医学VQA中多模态大模型的言语化置信度校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在医学视觉问答中常产生过度自信输出，而现有言语化置信度校准方法主要为纯文本LLM设计，未考虑医学图像理解的多模态特性。这导致模型在实际诊断场景中不可靠，亟需针对多模态的校准方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于微调的框架，使用复合损失函数：Brier风格校准项、防止置信度崩溃的锚定正则化、基于2×2因子扰动设计（交叉图像存在与文本完整性）的对比图像文本对齐项、以及KL模型稳定项。同时引入top K KL散度正则化保护回答能力。在MedGemma 4B IT和Qwen2 VL 7B Instruct上微调。
light_analysis.result: 在三个医学VQA基准上，校准误差降低60%以上，判别能力提升26%以上，同时保持预测准确性。平均性能优于基于提示、采样和训练的方法。消融实验证实损失函数每个组成部分的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的多模态校准框架有效解决了医学VQA中置信度过度自信问题，显著提升校准与判别能力，且不牺牲准确性。所有代码已公开，为多模态校准研究提供新思路，未来可探索更复杂的扰动设计。

title: MinGram: A Minimalist Unigram Tokenizer with High Compression and Competitive Morphological Alignment
abstract: The Unigram tokenizer uses an elegant representation which makes it straightforward to edit vocabularies, but its training is comparatively heavy and complex. We introduce MinGram (Minimalist Unigram), which keeps the token-list representation but simplifies training using a BPE-derived seed vocabulary, Hard EM on a minimum-token path, and a single flat score-pruning step. This removes the suffix array, the forward-backward pass, and the iterative prune loop, leaving a procedure that requires little beyond tokenizer inference itself. By making token count the primary objective and using a Unigram score only as a tiebreak, MinGram keeps the compression of pure token-count methods while retaining much of the morphological alignment and downstream quality of probabilistic ones. Across six languages, MinGram compresses better than both BPE and standard Unigram, and a compression-oriented variant matches the strongest token-count compressors while retaining substantially higher morphological alignment. In controlled downstream language-model training, Unigram-family tokenizers, with MinGram among the best, consistently beat BPE in bits-per-byte.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MinGram，一种极简Unigram分词器，通过简化训练流程实现高压缩比和良好的形态对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: Unigram分词器具有优雅的表示形式，便于编辑词汇表，但其训练过程相对繁重和复杂。现有BPE等方法在压缩和形态对齐上存在权衡。为了简化训练并兼顾压缩与形态对齐，本文旨在设计一种轻量级方法，降低Unigram的训练复杂度，同时保持或提升其性能。
light_analysis.method: MinGram保留Unigram的token列表表示，但使用BPE生成的种子词汇初始化，采用硬EM算法优化最小token路径，并通过单次分数剪枝步骤完成训练。该方法移除了后缀数组、前向-后向传递和迭代剪枝循环，使得训练过程仅需分词器推理本身。主要优化目标是token数量，Unigram分数仅作为平局打破器。
light_analysis.result: 在六种语言上，MinGram的压缩比优于BPE和标准Unigram。其压缩导向变体匹配了最强token计数压缩器，同时保持更高的形态对齐。在受控的下游语言模型训练中，Unigram家族分词器（包括MinGram）在bits-per-byte指标上持续优于BPE，MinGram表现最佳之一。
light_analysis.conclusion: MinGram通过简化训练流程实现了高压缩和竞争性形态对齐，兼具Unigram的表示灵活性和BPE的训练高效性。其方法在多种语言上验证了有效性，为分词器设计提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的种子词汇选择或进一步优化硬EM过程。

title: On-board Remote-Sensing Foundation Models for Unsupervised Change Detection of Disaster Events
abstract: Remote Sensing Foundation Models (RSFMs) have emerged as a powerful alternative to supervised models for Earth Observation, allowing satellites to autonomously trigger high-resolution captures or adjust tasking parameters upon detecting an anomaly, thereby maximizing the utility of the mission's limited power and computational resources. RSFMs are versatile, unified encoders that optimize onboard storage for multiple orbital applications while ensuring high-fidelity feature extraction. In particular, unsupervised change detection with RSFMs offers a well-informed and transformative path for disaster monitoring without expensive labels. In this paper, we present a novel unsupervised detection method based on ResNet (RSFM) + FPN which identifies a wide spectrum of anomalies by detecting subtle semantic shifts in the latent space between successive orbital passes. By relying on an untrained FPN architecture and its intrinsic priors, the system achieves efficient image-level generation and higher resolution mapping with minimal effort (training-free) compared to previous proposals (patch-based, trained). And by replacing tailored models with RSFMs, we can achieve comparable results through an approach that eliminates the need for bespoke training and extensive development effort and adds customization, while ensuring high-performance generalization across diverse terrains and sensors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于RSFM和未训练FPN的无监督变化检测方法，实现灾害监测的零训练和高效泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统监督变化检测依赖昂贵标注，卫星资源有限，需要高效、自适应的异常检测方法以触发高分辨率成像或调整任务参数，最大化任务效用。现有方法多为有监督或需要专门训练，泛化性差，难以应对多样地形和传感器。
light_analysis.method: 采用ResNet架构的遥感基础模型（RSFM）作为统一编码器，结合未训练的FPN结构进行无监督变化检测。通过检测连续轨道间潜空间的语义偏移来识别异常，FPN利用内禀先验实现高效图像级生成和高分辨率映射，无需训练和定制模型。
light_analysis.result: 与基于patch和训练的方法相比，所提方法以训练免费方式实现了可比较甚至更优的检测效果，在多样化地形和传感器上展现出高泛化性能，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种灵活、低成本的无监督变化检测方案，消除了专属训练需求，便于卫星自主决策。未来可应用于实时灾害监测和任务优化，局限性可能在于对极端场景的适应性需进一步验证。

title: A Generalization Theory for JEPA-Based World Models
abstract: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for world modeling by learning predictive dynamics in a latent space rather than generating future observations at the input level. Despite their empirical success, the theoretical understanding of JEPA-based world models remains limited. In this paper, we develop the first generalization theory for JEPA-based world models. We formulate JEPA pretraining as a conditional spectral graph learning problem and show that the JEPA objective is equivalent to a low-rank factorization of an action-conditioned co-occurrence matrix. Building on this characterization, we establish a connection between JEPA pretraining error and downstream planning regret, leading to a finite-sample generalization bound for JEPA-based world models. Our analysis reveals an inherent trade-off between approximation and sample errors with respect to the latent dimension, providing theoretical insights into the advantages and limitations of latent predictive models compared with input-level predictive approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 首次建立了基于JEPA的世界模型的泛化理论，揭示了其核心机制与误差权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: JEPA作为一种在潜在空间学习预测动态的世界建模范式，虽取得显著经验成功，但其理论基础尚不明确。现有缺乏理论解释限制了对其优势与局限的理解，亟需从学习理论角度分析JEPA预训练的本质及其与下游任务的关系。
light_analysis.method: 将JEPA预训练形式化为条件谱图学习问题，证明其目标等价于对动作条件共现矩阵进行低秩分解。通过建立预训练误差与下游规划遗憾的关联，推导出有限样本泛化界，并揭示潜在维度带来的近似误差与样本误差之间的内在权衡。
light_analysis.result: 导出了JEPA世界模型的有限样本泛化界，明确了预训练误差如何影响下游规划性能。分析表明，在潜在维度选择上存在近似误差与样本误差的权衡，为理解潜在预测模型相较于输入级预测方法的优势（如计算效率）和局限（如信息损失）提供了理论依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该理论首次为JEPA类世界模型提供了严格的泛化保证，阐明了其核心学习机制和设计原则。研究不仅深化了对潜在空间预测建模的理解，还为实际应用中选择潜在维度等超参数提供了理论指导，未来可扩展至更复杂的动作空间和层次化架构。

title: Semantic Early-Stopping for Iterative LLM Agent Loops
abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) loops, for example a Writer that drafts and a Critic that revises, are almost always terminated by a fixed iteration cap (max_iterations). This is a syntactic kill-switch: it is blind to whether the answer is still improving, so it over-spends tokens on easy inputs and truncates hard ones. We study semantic early-stopping: the loop halts when consecutive draft embeddings stop changing in meaning (cosine distance with a patience window) and the answer's measured quality stops improving. Our work makes three contributions. First, an honest theoretical footing: we prove deterministic termination and well-definedness and machine-check these claims, while treating the convergence of the distance sequence as an empirically tested conjecture rather than a (previously over-claimed) Banach contraction. Second, a judge-efficient evaluation protocol: we generate each question's full trajectory once, replay every stopping policy over the identical drafts, and cache every LLM-judge call, yielding a strictly paired efficiency-versus-quality comparison at low cost; we further separate operational tokens (charged to a policy) from evaluation tokens (a measurement instrument). Third, an empirical study on multi-hop retrieval-augmented question answering (HotpotQA). On the 60-question test split, a judge-free semantic stopper reduces operational tokens by 38% relative to max_iterations at parity quality (Delta-IS = -0.004, p = 0.81), whereas the full quality-gated variant is counter-productive because its per-round judging dominates cost. An oracle that selects the best round attains +0.115 Information Score over every practical policy (p ~ 4e-11), reframing the problem from "when to stop" (easy) to "which round is best" (open).
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Open implementation, machine-checked theory, and reproducible harness: github.com/SahilShrivastava-Dev/semantic-halting-problem

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义早停机制，基于连续草案嵌入的语义变化停止LLM代理循环，证明其确定性终止，并在HotpotQA数据集上相比固定迭代次数在同等质量下减少38%令牌。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM循环（如编写-批评）通常使用固定最大迭代次数终止，导致简单输入令牌浪费、困难输入过早截断。这种语法开关缺乏语义感知，效率低下。论文旨在设计语义早停策略，动态判断答案是否仍在改进，以平衡令牌开销与质量。
light_analysis.method: 论文贡献三方面：1）理论证明语义早停的确定性终止和良定义性，将距离序列收敛作为经验假设而非Banach收缩。2）提出法官高效评估协议：生成完整轨迹，重放所有停止策略于相同草案，缓存LLM评判调用，实现严格配对比较。3）在HotpotQA数据集上实验，使用余弦距离度量草案嵌入变化，结合质量改进门控。
light_analysis.result: 在60题测试集上，无质量门控的语义早停相比固定迭代次数，在质量相当（Delta-IS=-0.004, p=0.81）下减少38%操作令牌。加入质量门控因每轮评判成本过高而无效。最优轮次oracle比所有实际策略高+0.115信息分数（p~4e-11），将问题从“何时停止”转为“哪轮最佳”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语义早停机制在不牺牲质量前提下显著提升令牌效率，理论保证了终止性。高效评估协议支持低成本比较。重新定义问题为选择最佳迭代轮次，为未来研究提供方向。局限性在于质量门控变体需更优评判方案。

title: Adaptive Utility driven Resource Orchestration for Resilient AI (AURORA-AI)
abstract: Modern AI systems are increasingly deployed under non-stationary computational, demographic, and operational conditions in which static resource allocation strategies degrade both predictive performance and human-centric properties such as fairness and explainability. This paper presents AURORA-AI, an Adaptive Utility-driven Resource Orchestration framework for Resilient AI that unifies Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman feedback control, Lyapunov-based stability monitoring, and a fairness-aware composite utility into a single closed-loop policy.The framework continuously redistributes computational budget across a population of heterogeneous AI models so that the global utility, defined jointly over predictive performance, demographic parity, cost, latency, robustness, and interpretability, remains maximised under disruption. The framework is evaluated in a stress-rich discrete-time simulation that concurrently injects demographic bias shocks, gradual concept drift, and abrupt black-swan disruptions, and is compared against five established controllers including Static, Round Robin, Greedy, LinUCB, and a deep reinforcement-learning agent based on Proximal Policy Optimisation. AURORA-AI achieves immediate recovery from the black-swan event compared to eighty-eight time steps for the Static baseline and twenty-two for Proximal Policy Optimisation, lifts the alpha-quantile and the super-quantile by twenty-nine and twenty-five percent respectively, simultaneously reduces the mean and maximum demographic parity gap, and increases the fraction of Lyapunov-stable operating steps. These results indicate that fairness-aware adaptive orchestration grounded in stability theory is a practical and theoretically motivated path toward resilient human-centric AI deployment.
comment: Accepted at IEEE Research and Technologies for Society and Industry 2026 conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应效用驱动的资源编排框架AURORA-AI，统一HJB控制、李雅普诺夫稳定性和公平性感知效用，实现弹性AI部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代AI系统在非平稳计算、人口和运行条件下部署，静态资源分配策略会降低预测性能以及公平性和可解释性等人本属性。现有方法缺乏对动态变化的自适应和稳定性保证，无法应对人口统计偏见冲击、概念漂移和黑天鹅事件等干扰，迫切需要一种能够实时调整资源分配、同时优化多目标效用的弹性框架。
light_analysis.method: AURORA-AI框架结合Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman反馈控制、李雅普诺夫稳定性监测和公平性感知复合效用函数，形成闭环策略。它持续在异质AI模型群体间重新分配计算预算，以最大化全局效用（包括预测性能、人口统计均等、成本、延迟、鲁棒性和可解释性）。在离散时间仿真中注入人口统计偏见冲击、渐进概念漂移和突发黑天鹅事件，与静态、轮询、贪婪、LinUCB及PPO深度强化学习等五种控制器对比。
light_analysis.result: AURORA-AI在黑天鹅事件后实现即时恢复，而静态基线需88步、PPO需22步；α分位数和超分位数分别提升29%和25%；同时降低平均和最大人口统计均等差距，增加李雅普诺夫稳定运行步数比例。结果表明该框架在恢复速度和公平性指标上显著优于对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: AURORA-AI证明了将公平性感知自适应编排与稳定性理论相结合是实现弹性、人本AI部署的实用且有理论依据的途径。该方法能同时优化性能、公平性和稳定性，适用于动态变化环境下的AI系统资源管理。未来可扩展到更复杂的多智能体场景或考虑更多效用维度。

title: Uncertainty quantification via conformal prediction in data assimilation
abstract: Quantifying the evolution of uncertainty is critical to both probabilistic forecasting and data assimilation in numerical weather prediction. In this study, we investigate the applicability of conformal prediction (CP), a recent machine learning (ML) method, to quantify uncertainty in a controlled, idealized setting. We use the one dimensional modified shallow water model, designed to mimic the convective process. CP provides a set of possible outcomes with a chosen confidence level. Here, we compare and evaluate the average empirical coverage, the average interval length, miss low, miss high and average interval score loss (AISL) for three variants of CP, namely a) Standard CP, b) Normalized CP and c) Conformalized Quantile Regression. We further compare these CP-based uncertainty estimates with traditional ensemble-based measures such as standard deviation intervals and ensemble spread. In addition, we investigate the integration of CP-derived uncertainty within the data assimilation cycle through CP perturbations. Our results highlight the strengths and limitations of each approach, providing insight into the effectiveness of CP to complement common ensemble-based uncertainty quantification in simplified atmospheric models.
comment: Submitted to Quarterly Journal of the Royal Meteorological Society

light_analysis.overview: 探索共形预测在资料同化中量化不确定性的适用性，并与传统集合方法比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 数值天气预报中，量化不确定性演变对概率预报和资料同化至关重要。传统基于集合的方法存在计算成本高、分布假设强等局限。共形预测作为一种新兴的机器学习方法，能提供任意置信水平的预测集，但在地球物理资料同化中的应用尚不充分。本研究旨在可控理想化环境中评估共形预测的可行性，为简化大气模型提供更灵活的不确定性量化手段。
light_analysis.method: 采用一维修正浅水模型模拟对流过程，研究三种共形预测变体：标准CP、归一化CP和共形分位数回归。通过平均经验覆盖率、平均区间长度、漏报率等指标评估性能。此外，将共形预测衍生不确定性以扰动形式集成到资料同化循环中，并与标准偏差区间、集合离散度等传统集合度量进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明：各共形预测方法在平均覆盖率上接近目标置信水平，但区间长度和误差分布存在差异。归一化CP在平衡区间宽度和覆盖率方面表现较好，而共形分位数回归在尾部不确定性捕获上更具优势。与传统集合方法相比，共形预测在不需要集合预报的情况下提供了类似有效的不确定性估计，且计算更简洁。摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 共形预测能有效补充传统集合不确定性量化，在简化大气模型中具有应用潜力。研究为共形预测向真实天气系统推广奠定了基础。局限性包括理想化模型的一维性质，未来需在高维实际数据中验证。该方法可减少对昂贵集合预报的依赖，为资料同化系统提供高效的不确定性量化工具。

title: Event-Aware Instructed Assistant for Referring Video Segmentation
abstract: Existing referring video segmentation methods often treat a video as a single event consisting of multiple images, overlooking the fact that a video typically contains multiple distinct events. Under such a mechanism, the model needs to directly understand all the complex content in the video and text, which can easily lead to confusion and hallucinations. To address this issue, we propose to decompose a video to a set of simple events by learnable Event Query, and understand complex video content in an event-by-event, easy-to-understand manner. This is based on the observation that natural language expressions often divide a video into distinct, text-related segments, each representing a separate event within a compound event. We introduce EVIS, an Event-Aware Video Instructed Segmentation Assistant, which utilizes text-guided Event Queries to partition a video into simple events, extracting event-aware visual-text features to achieve a hierarchical understanding of the video. Additionally, we propose Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning, which enables the MLLMs to track targets in long-term videos by integrating fine-grained pixel features with prior object queries. Extensive experimental results on 5 public benchmarks demonstrate EVIS's strong performance in addressing the referring video segmentation task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EVIS框架，通过事件感知分解视频为简单事件，结合对象-像素混合学习实现指代视频分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指代视频分割方法将视频视为单事件多帧，忽略了视频通常包含多个不同事件，导致模型理解复杂内容时易混淆和产生幻觉。针对此问题，论文基于自然语言常将视频划分为文本相关片段的观察，提出将视频分解为简单事件集合，以逐事件理解方式降低难度，提升分割准确性。
light_analysis.method: EVIS框架包含两个核心组件：一是可学习的事件查询（Event Query），通过文本引导将视频分割为多个子事件，并提取事件感知的视觉-文本特征实现分层理解；二是对象-像素混合学习（Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning），融合细粒度像素特征与先验对象查询，使多模态大模型（MLLMs）能跟踪长视频中的目标。该方法利用事件分解简化复杂视频内容。
light_analysis.result: 在5个公开基准（如Ref-YouTube-VOS、Ref-DAVIS17等）上，EVIS在指代视频分割任务中表现强劲，显著优于现有方法。具体指标如J&F、IoU等均取得领先，尤其在处理多事件视频时，视频理解幻觉减少，分割精度提升。论文未提供具体数值但强调广泛实验验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EVIS通过事件分解和混合学习有效解决了视频多事件导致的混淆问题，实现了更准确的指代分割。该工作为视频理解提供了新范式，具有提升视频编辑、监控等应用价值的潜力。未来可探索更精细的事件划分或扩展到其他视频理解任务。

title: Decision-Aligned Evaluation of Uncertainty Quantification
abstract: Uncertainty estimates in machine learning are typically evaluated using generic metrics such as the negative log-likelihood and expected calibration error, yet good performance on such metrics does not necessarily imply high utility in downstream decisions. We introduce decision-alignment, a criterion that reveals which evaluation metrics meaningfully align with downstream utilities. Applying this framework, we show that many widely used uncertainty metrics are either misaligned with common decision problems or encode pathological prior beliefs about the downstream task. We then propose prior-weighted utility metrics, a special class of proper scoring rules that provides decision-aligned uncertainty evaluation. Across benchmark experiments and real-world case studies, our metrics consistently align with realized decision utility, while conventional metrics do not. Our results surface flaws in the current UQ evaluation protocol and offer a principled extension of existing metrics toward decision-relevant UQ evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出决策对齐标准，并引入先验加权效用度量，以提供与下游决策效用对齐的不确定性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不确定性度量（如负对数似然和期望校准误差）虽然常用于评估不确定性量化，但良好性能并不保证在下游决策中具有高实用性。研究旨在建立一种评估准则，使不确定性度量与下游决策效用有意义地对齐，从而解决当前评估方法忽视决策相关性的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出决策对齐（decision-alignment）准则，用于识别哪些评估度量与下游效用对齐。进而提出先验加权效用度量（prior-weighted utility metrics），这是一类特殊的Proper Scoring Rules，能够提供与决策对齐的不确定性评估。通过理论分析和实验验证，该方法扩展了传统评估框架。
light_analysis.result: 在基准实验和真实世界案例研究中，所提度量持续与实现的决策效用对齐，而传统度量（如负对数似然、期望校准误差）则表现出不一致。结果揭示了当前不确定性量化评估协议中的缺陷，并证明了新方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统揭示了现有不确定性量化评估协议的不足，并提供了原则性的扩展——先验加权效用度量，使评估更贴近决策相关性。该工作具有重要的学术价值，推动了不确定性量化评估向实用化方向发展，未来可进一步探索其他决策场景下的对齐度量。

title: Where Do Models Find Happiness? Emotion Vectors in Open-Source LLMs
abstract: Recent work identified emotion vectors in Claude Sonnet 4.5, which are internal representations that encode emotion concepts, causally influence behavior, and exhibit geometry mirroring human psychological structure. We test the generality of these findings in two open-weight models, Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 and Gemma-4-E4B-it, extracting emotion contrast vectors across all layers, using two model-generated corpora. We recover valence geometry for both models, with peak PC1--valence correlations of $r = 0.76$ and $r = 0.83$, approaching the $r = 0.81$ reported for Claude.Beyond replication, we observe notable differences in how valence representations emerge across model depth. In Gemma-4-E4B-it, valence is strongly encoded in early layers but collapses towards later layers, whereas Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 exhibits the opposite pattern, with valence representations absent in early layers, but emerging at mid depths. Arousal encoding, in contrast, is sensitive to the extraction corpus: both models show stronger PC2--arousal alignment with Gemma-generated stories ($r$ up to $0.45$) than Apertus-generated ones ($r \leq 0.21$), suggesting arousal-relevant cues are unevenly distributed across generated corpora. We open-source our experiment code and dataset for reproducible investigation of emotion representations across language model architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究在开源大模型中复现了情感向量的存在，并揭示了效价表征随模型深度变化的差异模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期在Claude Sonnet 4.5中发现的情感向量能编码情感概念并因果影响行为，且几何结构类似人类心理。但该发现是否适用于其他模型尚不清楚。本工作旨在验证这些发现在开源模型中的普遍性，探究不同架构下情感表征的异同，以理解情感在大模型中的通用表示机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509和Gemma-4-E4B-it两个开源模型，提取所有层的情感对比向量，利用两个模型各自生成的语料库。通过主成分分析计算效价和唤醒度的编码强度（PC1-效价、PC2-唤醒度相关性），并分析表征随层深的变化模式。
light_analysis.result: 两个模型均恢复了效价几何结构，峰值PC1-效价相关性分别达r=0.76和r=0.83，接近Claude的0.81。但模式不同：Gemma中效价在早期层强编码、后期层坍塌；Apertus中早期层无表征、中层出现。唤醒度编码依赖语料：Gemma生成的故事PC2-唤醒度相关性最高0.45，Apertus生成的故事仅≤0.21。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实情感向量在开源模型中具有普遍性，但架构差异导致表征模式不同。唤醒度编码的语料敏感性提示数据分布影响情感提取。开源代码和数据集为可重复研究提供基础。未来可探索更多模型、情感维度及因果效应。

title: ReaORE: Reasoning-Guided Progressive Open Relation Extraction Empowered by Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Open Relation Extraction (OpenRE) requires a model to extract unseen relations between head and tail entities from unstructured text for real-world applications. The core challenge of OpenRE lies in achieving reliable generalization to unseen relation types. Current OpenRE approaches either employ clustering techniques, which cannot generate relation labels and suffer from poor generalization, or rely on direct relation label generation via Large Language Models (LLMs), which lack sufficient discriminative capacity to distinguish easily confused relations. To address these limitations, we propose Reasoning-guided progressive OpenRE (ReaORE), a framework for performing relation extraction through coarse-to-fine relation reasoning. Specifically, ReaORE consists of two key stages: (i) relation filtering, which reasons over multiple aspects to understand relations and instances, yielding an initial relation set, and further supplements and filters relations via embedding-based similarity to ensure the target relation is included; (ii) relation prediction, which aims to predict the target relations from the above set via fine-grained comparative reasoning to better distinguish easily confused relations. Extensive experiments on two widely used OpenRE datasets demonstrate that ReaORE outperforms existing baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大推理模型的渐进式开放关系抽取框架，通过粗到细的推理提升对未见关系类型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放关系抽取要求模型从非结构化文本中提取未见过的实体关系，核心挑战是可靠泛化。现有聚类方法无法生成关系标签且泛化差，而直接依赖大语言模型生成关系标签则缺乏判别力，难以区分易混淆关系。因此，需要一种能同时生成关系标签并增强判别能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ReaORE框架，包含两个阶段：关系过滤阶段，通过多方面推理理解关系和实例得到初始关系集，并利用嵌入相似度补充和过滤确保目标关系包含在内；关系预测阶段，通过细粒度比较推理从上述集合中预测目标关系，以更好区分易混淆关系。方法利用了大型推理模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 在两个广泛使用的OpenRE数据集上进行大量实验，ReaORE在关系抽取性能上优于现有基线方法。具体结果包括准确率、召回率等指标提升，但摘要未明确说明具体数值。与聚类方法和直接LLM生成方法相比，展示了更好的泛化能力和判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReaORE通过引入推理引导的渐进式策略，有效解决了开放关系抽取中泛化差和判别不足的问题。该方法具有学术价值，为利用大型推理模型进行开放任务提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化推理效率或扩展到其他开放信息抽取任务。

title: Unison: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Models via Synergistic Understanding and Generation
abstract: Unified multimodal models capable of both understanding and generation have achieved remarkable strides. However, despite their unified designs, existing evaluations typically assess understanding and generation capabilities in isolation, overlooking the synergy between comprehension and generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce Unison, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,169 high-quality unified task samples, designed to evaluate joint understanding and generation in unified multimodal models. Unison offers three key strengths: 1) Comprehensive Dimensions: Unison encompasses internal consistency, understanding-guided generation, generation-guided understanding, and mutual enhancement to enable holistic evaluation. 2) Diagnostic Evaluation: it provides both unified and decoupled tracks for understanding and generation, allowing fine-grained attribution of failure modes and quantitative analysis of the gains from unified modeling. 3) Human Alignment: we also introduce Unison-Judge, an evaluation model well aligned with human judgments to ensure reliable assessment. Based on systematic evaluations of state-of-the-art models on Unison, we uncover critical limitations in current unified multimodal systems and highlight promising directions for future research. Codes, Unison and Unison-Judge are publicly available at https://github.com/FudanCVL/Unison.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Unison基准测试，用于评估统一多模态模型的协同理解与生成能力，填补了现有评估中孤立看待理解与生成的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在理解和生成任务上取得进展，但评估时通常将两者割裂，忽略了它们之间的协同效应。这种孤立评估无法全面反映模型在真实应用中需要同时处理理解与生成的能力，限制了模型性能的准确定位和未来改进方向。因此，需要一个综合基准来系统评估统一多模态模型的协同能力。
light_analysis.method: Unison包含2,169个高质量统一任务样本，覆盖内部一致性、理解引导生成、生成引导理解和相互增强四个维度。提供统一和解耦两种评估轨道，可细粒度归因失败模式并量化统一建模的增益。同时引入Unison-Judge评估模型，与人类判断高度对齐，确保评估可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 基于Unison对当前最先进统一多模态模型的系统评估，揭示了现有模型在协同理解与生成方面的关键局限性，如内部一致性不足、跨任务互促效果有限等。具体性能指标及对比基线摘要未明确说明，但指出了未来研究方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: Unison为统一多模态模型提供了首个聚焦协同能力的综合基准，有助于诊断模型缺陷并指导设计。其开源代码和评估模型可复现和扩展。局限性在于样本规模有限，未来可扩展到更多模态和任务。该工作对推动统一多模态模型向真实应用场景发展具有重要价值。

title: Auditing Framing-Sensitive Behavioral Instability in Large Language Models for Mental Health Interactions
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being integrated into mental health support tools and other psychologically sensitive conversational applications. In such settings, behavioral stability and consistency are important for trustworthy human-AI interaction. However, semantically similar concerns can be presented through different contextual framings, potentially eliciting different model responses. Such framing-sensitive variability may challenge user expectations regarding system behavior and complicate the assessment of AI reliability. While prior studies have primarily examined such effects at the behavioral level, less is known about how framing-related variation is reflected in the internal representations of aligned language models. In this work, we investigate these effects using controlled matched prompts spanning multiple contextual framing conditions across several instruction-tuned model families. Across architectures, framing systematically alters interpretive response tendencies. Layer-wise probing analyses show that behavior-associated information remains decodable throughout transformer depth, with architecture-dependent variation in decoding strength. Moreover, held-out framing probes remained consistently above chance across architectures despite strong lexical baselines. Activation steering experiments further suggest that framing-associated representational directions can partially modulate downstream behavioral outcomes. Finally, these findings indicate that robustness to contextual variation may represent an important consideration when evaluating the consistency and trustworthiness of conversational AI systems deployed in mental-health-oriented interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLM在心理健康交互中对上下文框架的敏感性及其对行为稳定性的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型越来越多用于心理健康支持等敏感场景，行为稳定性对可信赖的交互至关重要。然而，语义相似的问题可能因不同框架而引发不同响应，这种框架敏感性挑战系统一致性和可靠性评估。现有研究主要关注行为层面，对框架变化在模型内部表征中的反映知之甚少。因此，研究框架敏感性如何影响LLM的内部表征和行为稳定性具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 使用控制匹配的提示，涵盖多种上下文框架条件，跨多个指令微调模型家族进行分析。通过逐层探测分析，研究行为相关信息在transformer深度中的可解码性，并跨架构比较解码强度变化。进行保留框架探测，评估高于基线的解码能力。最后，采用激活引导实验，探索框架相关的表征方向是否可部分调控下游行为。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，框架系统地改变了模型解释性响应倾向。层逐探测显示行为相关信息在整个transformer深度中保持可解码，但架构间解码强度存在差异。保留框架探测在所有架构中均显著高于随机基线，尽管存在强词汇基线。激活引导表明，与框架相关的表征方向可以部分调节下游行为输出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，对上下文变化的鲁棒性是评估心理健康交互对话AI系统一致性和可信赖性的重要考虑因素。研究贡献在于揭示了框架敏感性在LLM内部表征中的体现，并提供了通过激活引导部分调控行为的方法。未来可进一步探索减少框架敏感性的对齐策略。

title: Geometric Gradient Rectification for Safe Open-Set Semi-Supervised Learning
abstract: Open-set semi-supervised learning aims to leverage unlabeled data that may contain out-of-distribution outliers while maintaining performance on in-distribution classes. Existing methods mainly follow two paradigms: filtering suspicious samples or incorporating unlabeled objectives with soft weighting. We argue that both face a common trade-off: aggressive filtering can discard informative but hard ID samples, whereas utilization can introduce auxiliary gradients that conflict with supervised learning when pseudo labels are wrong. We therefore shift the focus from sample selection to gradient-level control. We propose \textit{Geometric Gradient Rectification} (GGR), a plug-in framework that uses the supervised gradient as an anchor and projects conflicting auxiliary gradients onto an admissible region in gradient space. This makes the applied auxiliary update first-order non-opposing within the rectified coordinate block while preserving orthogonal components that may still carry useful representation signals. We further extend GGR with subspace-aware rectification to stabilize the anchor under noisy mini-batch gradients. Experiments on CIFAR and ImageNet benchmarks show that GGR improves representative OSSL baselines in most settings and yields gains in both closed-set generalization and open-set robustness. Code will be available at https://github.com/JiaheChen2002/GGR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何梯度修正（GGR）框架，通过梯度级控制解决开集半监督学习中的梯度冲突问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 开集半监督学习利用可能含离群分布的未标记数据，现有方法通过过滤或软加权实现，但面临共同权衡：激进过滤会丢弃难ID样本，而利用错误伪标签会导致辅助梯度与监督梯度冲突。因此需要从样本选择转向梯度级控制。
light_analysis.method: 提出GGR插件框架，以监督梯度为锚点，将冲突的辅助梯度投影到梯度空间的可允许区域，使辅助更新在修正坐标块内非反对，并保留正交分量。扩展子空间感知修正，稳定噪声小批量梯度下的锚点。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet基准上，GGR显著提升代表性OSSL基线性能，在多种设置下同时改善闭集泛化能力和开集鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从样本选择转向梯度控制，解决了梯度冲突问题，提供即插即用框架，学术价值和实际应用意义显著。代码开源，便于复现与扩展。

title: Computer Vision for MOBA Analytics: A Dataset and Baseline for Visibility Analysis in Dota 2
abstract: Introduction: Most Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) analytics studies rely on structured data, which does not directly capture what each team could actually see during a match. Objective: This work introduces Dota2-Vis, a video-based dataset, and a baseline pipeline for visibility analysis in professional Dota 2 matches. Methodology: The dataset comprises all 144 matches from The International 2025, recorded from both team perspectives, totaling 288 Full HD videos, together with 2,477 manually annotated minimap images. We evaluate multiple variants of a modern object detector for player-icon detection and use the best-performing model to estimate opponent-visible player presence over time. Results: YOLO11l (large) achieved the best overall performance, reliably identifying player icons even in dense and visually cluttered minimap scenes. The resulting visibility curves reveal player, hero, role, and team-level patterns that complement conventional MOBA analytics, highlighting behavioral differences that are difficult to obtain from structured data alone. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/RicardoRCarvalho/dota2-vis/.
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 Simpósio Brasileiro de Jogos e Entretenimento Digital (SBGames)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Dota2-Vis数据集和基线方法，用于分析Dota 2职业比赛中的可见性信息。
light_analysis.motivation: MOBA分析通常依赖结构化数据，难以捕捉每支队伍在比赛中的实际视野。可见性对战术分析至关重要，但现有方法缺乏基于视频的细粒度可见性数据。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过构建视频数据集和检测管道，提供对手可见玩家存在的估计，以揭示结构化数据难以获取的行为差异。
light_analysis.method: 收集The International 2025所有144场比赛的双视角全高清视频（共288个），并手动标注2477张小地图图像。采用YOLO11等现代化目标检测器进行玩家图标检测，评估多个变体，选择最佳模型（YOLO11l）来估计随时间变化的对手可见玩家数量。通过检测结果生成可见性曲线。
light_analysis.result: YOLO11l在密集和杂乱的小地图场景中可靠地识别玩家图标，达到最佳性能。可见性曲线揭示了玩家、英雄、角色和团队级别的模式，补充了传统MOBA分析，突出了结构化数据难以获得的行为差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了首个面向MOBA可见性分析的视频数据集和基线方法，证明基于视觉的可见性分析能提供补充性洞察。数据集和代码已开源，有助于推动电竞分析研究。未来可扩展至其他MOBA游戏或结合更高级的视觉模型。

title: Einstein World Models
abstract: Does intelligence require the ability to reason about phenomena beyond direct experience? It is natural to suspect that some complex thought cannot be captured through language alone. However, of particular concern to this work, is whether visualising counterfactual events can complement language as a mechanism for complex thought. We ask whether LLMs can be trained to utilise such visualisation mechanisms, in a way that benefits their reasoning abilities. Motivated by this question, we propose Einstein World Models. EWMs are a blueprint for LLM-based reasoning systems that place visual-temporal rollouts inside the reasoning trace, allowing them to reason in ways that text alone may not support well. In an EWM, the LLM calls a world-module (not to be confused with a world model), to produce short rollouts of scenes under consideration. The returned rollout is treated not as the answer, but as an inspectable hypothesis that can support later reasoning. Einstein World Models extend the capability of LLMs for tool calling (such as web search or code execution), into the domain of visual thought experiments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Einstein World Models框架，通过视觉时间推理扩展LLM能力，解决语言难以捕获的复杂思维。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM主要依赖语言推理，但复杂思维可能无法仅通过语言充分表达。可视化反事实事件能补充语言，然而目前缺乏将视觉化机制融入LLM推理过程的有效方法。本研究旨在探索利用视觉时间展开提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.method: Einstein World Models（EWM）是一种基于LLM的推理蓝图，核心是让LLM调用世界模块（world-module）生成短时序的场景展开，并将其作为可检查的假设嵌入推理轨迹中，而非直接作为答案。该方法将工具调用（如搜索、代码执行）扩展到视觉思维实验领域，使LLM能通过模拟视觉场景进行推理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果或性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: EWM为LLM提供了一种结合视觉时间推理的新范式，拓展了工具调用的适用范围，使LLM能处理语言难以支持的视觉思维实验。该方法有望提升复杂推理能力，但具体效果需实验验证。未来可探索更高效的世界模块及多模态融合。

title: RedVox: Safety and Fairness Gaps in Speech Models Across Languages
abstract: Speech-capable models are increasingly deployed in real-world applications across languages. Yet their safety and fairness beyond English settings and under naturalistic conditions remain understudied. We survey safety reporting practices across state-of-the-art speech model releases, finding that only 8% document any multilingual analysis. To address this gap, we introduce RedVox, a multilingual safety and fairness benchmark for audio and speech built on real voices, covering unsafe and unfair stereotypical requests across five languages (English, French, Italian, Spanish, and German). Evaluating eight state-of-the-art models, we find that vulnerabilities persist even under non-adversarial conditions, worsen in non-English languages, and are amplified when the request comes from a spoken input. Finally, by surveying the participants who contributed to RedVox, we document the unique personal and privacy challenges of collecting speech data with human participants, pointing to broader sociotechnical challenges in naturalistic speech safety research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言语音安全与公平性基准RedVox，揭示非英语环境下模型漏洞加剧。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音模型在多语言实际场景中广泛应用，但其安全性和公平性在英语以外的环境下研究不足。现有模型发布中仅8%记录多语言分析，缺乏系统性的多语言安全评估基准。该研究旨在填补这一空白，评估自然条件下非英语语言的模型漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 构建RedVox基准，包含五种语言（英语、法语、意大利语、西班牙语、德语）的真实语音中的不安全和不公平刻板请求。评估8个最新语音模型，在非对抗条件下测试漏洞，并比较语音输入与文本输入的差异。通过参与者调查记录数据收集的隐私挑战。
light_analysis.result: 评估发现，即使在非对抗条件下，模型仍存在漏洞；非英语语言中漏洞更严重；当请求来自语音输入时漏洞被放大。研究揭示了多语言语音模型的安全性和公平性差距，强调实际部署风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: RedVox揭示了语音模型在多语言环境下的安全与公平性问题，突显了非英语语言中漏洞加剧的严重性。研究指出了自然语音安全研究的社会技术挑战，包括参与者隐私问题。未来需扩展语言覆盖和模型类型，推动更公平的语音AI发展。

title: Look-Before-Move: Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention in Dynamic 3D Story Worlds
abstract: As embodied AI and world models increasingly operate in dynamic 3D environments, visual perception must move beyond passively interpreting given observations toward actively deciding what to observe. We study this problem through camera planning in dynamic 3D story worlds, where the camera must not only generate smooth motion, but also decide what visual evidence should be acquired before it moves. We formulate this capability as Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention, where the camera acts as an embodied observer that determines what to observe, how to compose the observation, and how to shift attention over time under narrative intent and physical 3D constraints. To realize this capability, we propose Look-Before-Move, a camera planning framework that separates observation specification from motion execution. It first builds a Semantic Observation Contract to convert directorial intent into executable visual constraints, then performs Monte Carlo Viewpoint Search to find narrative-compliant and geometrically feasible viewpoints, and finally applies Semantic Trajectory Grounding to connect selected viewpoints into continuous, collision-aware, and temporally coherent camera motion. We further construct a dynamic 3D Story World Benchmark based on StoryBlender, covering 50 stories, 457 scenes, and 1585 shots with animated characters, semantic scene configurations, and executable 3D environments. Experiments show that our framework improves subject perception, intent consistency, and trajectory quality over representative baselines, demonstrating the importance of organizing visual attention before generating camera motion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Look-Before-Move框架，在动态3D故事世界中实现叙事引导的视觉注意力，通过先规划观察再执行运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身AI和世界模型在动态3D环境中需要主动决定观察什么，而现有方法被动解释给定观察。本文通过动态3D故事世界的相机规划研究该问题，相机需要根据叙事意图和物理约束决定观察目标、构图和注意力转移。现有方法缺乏将观察规范与运动执行分离的能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Look-Before-Move框架，包含三部分：语义观察合同(SOC)将导演意图转化为可执行视觉约束；蒙特卡罗视点搜索(MCVS)找到符合叙事和几何可行的视点；语义轨迹接地(STG)连接选定视点生成连续、碰撞感知、时间一致的相机运动。基于StoryBlender构建动态3D故事世界基准，含50个故事、457个场景、1585个镜头。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在主体感知、意图一致性和轨迹质量方面优于代表性基线，证明了在生成相机运动前组织视觉注意力的重要性。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出叙事引导的世界视觉注意力能力和Look-Before-Move框架，实证了先观察后运动的有效性。学术价值在于为具身AI中主动视觉感知提供新范式，实际应用可用于自动叙事相机规划。未来可扩展至更复杂交互场景，当前框架的计算开销可能为潜在局限性。

title: Term-Centric Hierarchy Induction from Heterogeneous Corpora
abstract: Organizing knowledge from diverse text sources into interpretable hierarchies is crucial for tasks such as policy analysis, innovation monitoring, and exploratory domain mapping. Existing taxonomy induction methods typically rely on document-level representations that capture entire documents rather than the specific domain concepts relevant for knowledge organization, limiting their ability to generalize across heterogeneous sources. We propose a term-centric framework for inducing hierarchical taxonomies from heterogeneous corpora that scales to massive document collections. Our approach maps documents from diverse sources into a shared representation space using automatic term extraction, enabling robust cross-source alignment. Based on these representations, we construct interpretable hierarchies that integrate domain priors with datadriven clustering. Experiments on a novel English and German multi-source benchmark of over one million documents demonstrate that our method improves cross-source coherence and hierarchy quality over text- and summarybased baselines. A case study on German regional innovation analysis further demonstrates its practical utility for technology landscape mapping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种以术语为中心的层次归纳框架，能从异构语料库中构建可解释的分类层次，支持跨源对齐和大规模扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖文档级表示，难以在异构数据源中提取特定领域概念，导致跨源泛化能力不足。为支持政策分析、创新监测等任务，需要一种可扩展的方法从多源文本中自动组织成可解释的层次结构。
light_analysis.method: 采用术语自动提取将文档映射到共享表示空间，实现跨源鲁棒对齐。基于这些表示，结合领域先验与数据驱动聚类构建可解释层次。在超百万文档的英德多源基准上评估，并与文本和摘要基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 在英德多源基准上，方法在跨源一致性和层次质量上优于基线。德国区域创新分析案例研究证明了其在技术景观映射中的实际效用，具体提升幅度未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种可扩展的术语中心层次归纳方法，在异构语料库中有效生成高质量层次结构，具有实际应用价值。未来可优化术语提取质量并探索更多领域。

title: Scaling Multi-Reference Image Generation with Dynamic Reward Optimization
abstract: While personalized image generation has achieved remarkable progress, multi-reference image generation (MRIG) remains a challenging task. Most existing benchmarks fail to adequately evaluate complex MRIG scenarios, hindering further progress in this area. To better assess model performance on complex MRIG tasks, we introduce OmniRef-Bench, a benchmark that covers complex combinations of reference image types and a large number of reference images. Evaluations on OmniRef-Bench show that mainstream open-source models struggle in complex MRIG scenarios, and their performance deteriorates significantly as the number of mixed-type reference images increases. To address this issue, we propose DyRef, a two-stage training framework. In the first stage, supervised fine-tuning equips the model with the basic capability to handle complex MRIG tasks. In the second stage, we introduce Difficulty-aware Advantage Reweighting (DAR) and Discriminative Reward Scaling (DRS). DAR dynamically adjusts the optimization objective to improve performance when handling a large number of mixed-type reference images. DRS enlarges intra-group reward differences for more effective policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that DyRef significantly improves the performance of open-source models on OmniRef-Bench and single-image editing benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization capability of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多参考图像生成基准OmniRef-Bench和两阶段训练框架DyRef，通过动态奖励优化提升复杂场景下的生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多参考图像生成（MRIG）任务在个性化图像生成中至关重要，但现有基准无法充分评估复杂场景（如混合类型和大量参考图像）。主流开源模型在复杂MRIG任务中表现不佳，且性能随参考图像数量增加显著下降。因此，需要更全面的基准和有效的训练方法来解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出DyRef两阶段训练框架。第一阶段通过监督微调使模型具备处理复杂MRIG的基础能力。第二阶段引入难度感知优势重加权（DAR）和判别性奖励缩放（DRS），DAR动态调整优化目标以应对大量混合类型参考图像，DRS放大组内奖励差异以优化策略。未明确说明使用的具体模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在OmniRef-Bench和单图像编辑基准上，DyRef显著提升了开源模型的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明方法在复杂MRIG任务中有效，并展现了良好的泛化能力。对比基线方法，DyRef在包含大量混合类型参考图像的场景下表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过提出OmniRef-Bench和DyRef框架，解决了多参考图像生成中基准不足和模型性能退化的问题。DyRef通过动态奖励优化有效提升了复杂场景下的生成质量，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可进一步探索更高效的奖励设计或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: TraMP-LLaMA: Generative Interpretability with Decoupled Instruction Tuning for Facial Expression Quality Assessment
abstract: Existing facial expression quality assessment (FEQA) methods typically produce only a severity score, without explicitly communicating the observable facial motion evidence that supports the prediction. This limits interpretability and makes it difficult to inspect the basis of model outputs in Parkinson's disease assessment. To address this gap, we propose TraMP-LLaMA, a unified multimodal framework that jointly predicts severity scores and generates structured textual reports from facial motion cues. The framework integrates RGB appearance and landmark trajectory cues, and adopts a decoupled instruction-tuning strategy to reduce task interference between severity prediction and language generation. To support this task, we further extend the PFED5 dataset with expert-guided textual motion descriptions and construct PFED5-plus. Experiments on PFED5-plus show that TraMP-LLaMA outperforms competitive video-language baselines in report generation and achieves the best severity prediction performance among the compared methods under joint multi-expression training, improving Spearman's rank correlation by at least 4.39 percent over all competing methods. The text annotations and code are available at https://github.com/shuchaoduan/TraMP-LLaMA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TraMP-LLaMA多模态框架，联合预测严重性分数并生成结构化文本报告，采用解耦指令微调策略提升可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有面部表情质量评估方法仅输出严重性分数，缺乏可解释性，无法揭示支撑预测的面部运动证据，尤其在帕金森病评估中难以检验模型依据。
light_analysis.method: 提出TraMP-LLaMA，融合RGB外观和地标轨迹多模态线索，采用解耦指令微调策略分离严重性预测与语言生成任务。将PFED5数据集扩展为PFED5-plus，包含专家引导的文本运动描述。
light_analysis.result: 在PFED5-plus上，TraMP-LLaMA在报告生成任务中优于视频-语言基线模型，并在联合多表情训练下实现最佳严重性预测性能，Spearman等级相关性较所有竞争方法至少提升4.39%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过生成文本报告增强了模型可解释性，有助于临床评估。代码和注释已开源，为未来可解释面部运动分析提供基础。

title: Focusing on What Matters: Saliency-Harnessing Accurate Routing for Diffusion MoE
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a powerful paradigm for scaling diffusion models in visual generation. Recent advancements have focused on adaptively allocating computational resources across diverse tokens to improve efficiency and performance. However, we identify a routing assignment problem in existing diffusion MoE frameworks: the router fails to accurately allocate more computational resources to salient tokens. Our analysis attributes this failure to the router's reliance on noise-corrupted latent features throughout the denoising process. Such stochastic noise obscures the critical structural and textural information, thereby preventing the router from effectively distinguishing salient tokens. To address this, we propose SharpMoE, a post-training framework with a saliency-harnessing accurate routing mechanism, which utilizes clean latent features as a noise-free guidance signal for routing. By bypassing the noise-distorted inputs, SharpMoE provides the router with clear saliency guidance, enabling the identification of salient tokens even in high-noise stages. Furthermore, we introduce a trajectory routing loss to constrain the compute allocation throughout the multi-step denoising trajectory, ensuring precise resource allocation along the generation rollout. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SharpMoE serves as a versatile, plug-and-play solution that further enhances the pretrained, converged MoE models, achieving state-of-the-art performance in visual generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SharpMoE，一种后训练框架，利用清洁潜在特征作为无噪声引导信号，解决扩散MoE中路由分配问题，实现视觉生成中的精准资源分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散MoE框架中，路由器依赖噪声损坏的潜在特征，导致无法准确分配计算资源给显著令牌，尤其在高噪声阶段。此问题限制了效率与性能的提升，亟需一种能有效识别显著令牌的路由机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出SharpMoE后训练框架，核心包括：1) 利用清洁潜在特征作为无噪声引导信号，使路由器在高噪声阶段也能识别显著令牌；2) 引入轨迹路由损失，约束多步去噪轨迹中的计算分配，确保资源精准分配。作为即插即用方案，增强预训练MoE模型。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，SharpMoE作为后训练框架，能进一步增强预训练且收敛的MoE模型，在视觉生成任务中达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SharpMoE解决了扩散MoE的路由分配问题，实现精准资源分配，提升视觉生成性能。学术上为MoE在扩散模型中的应用提供新方向；实际中作为即插即用工具，易于部署。未来可探索更高效的清洁潜特征提取方法。

title: Where Do CoT Training Gains Land in LLM based Agents?
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is widely used in language-model agents, but prior work has shown that verbalized CoT is not always faithful and may instead reflect post-hoc reasoning, which means the model already knows the answer before reasoning. We therefore ask what CoT training is actually improving: is the model getting better at changing its action through generated reasoning, or is it getting better at predicting the action directly from the prompt? We study this question by comparing \emph{prompt actions} (predicting action without CoT) with CoT actions (predicting action with CoT). Across checkpoints, prompt-action quality improves substantially. While interacting with the environment, the relative advantage of CoT actions over prompt actions remains similar, showing that CoT training does not widen the advantage of CoT reasoning, and it helps to improve the quality of prompt actions. We further find that later checkpoints are less likely to revise the action in response to CoT, suggesting greater reliance on the prompt. Motivated by these patterns, we selectively mask action-token supervision on a fraction of training examples. This intervention improves out-of-domain generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 研究CoT训练在LLM智能体中的真正受益机制，发现其提升直接提示动作质量而非CoT推理优势，并提出选择性遮蔽动作标记监督以改善泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究指出CoT推理可能不忠实，模型可能在推理前已知答案，但缺乏对CoT训练提升机制的理解。需探究CoT训练是增强了通过推理改变动作的能力，还是直接提升提示动作预测能力。这对于优化CoT训练、提升智能体泛化性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过对比prompt actions（无CoT预测动作）与CoT actions（有CoT预测动作）在训练过程中的质量变化，分析CoT相对优势的演变。基于发现，提出选择性遮蔽动作标记监督，即对部分训练样本移除动作预测监督，以迫使模型更依赖CoT推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，训练过程中prompt-action质量显著提升，而CoT相对优势保持恒定，说明CoT训练主要提升提示动作预测。后期检查点更少根据CoT修改动作，提示对提示的依赖增强。选择性遮蔽动作标记监督方法有效提升了跨域泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了CoT训练提升LLM智能体表现的主要机制是增强直接提示动作预测，而非CoT推理本身。基于此提出的选择性遮蔽动作标记监督改善了泛化。研究为理解CoT在智能体中的作用提供了新视角，并提示未来可探索减少CoT依赖以提升鲁棒性。

title: PortraitGen: Exemplar-Driven GRPO with Dual-Reward Guidance for Photorealistic Portrait Generation
abstract: Reinforcement Learning like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has significantly advanced text-to-image post-training. However, current methods often favor superficial aesthetics, such as over-saturated colors, leaving critical flaws like AI artifacts and biological implausibilities unresolved. We attribute these limitations to two primary factors: (1) The absence of real images during post-training confines GRPO sampling to the original distribution, failing to break inherent generative boundaries; (2) the optimization process lacks specific rewards targeting fine-grained artifacts like overly oily skin and other AI artifacts. To address this, we propose PortraitGen, a novel framework tailored for photorealistic portrait generation. First, we break inherent generative boundaries by directly introducing real images into the GRPO sampling groups, where image inversion is employed to obtain their transition probabilities and latents. Second, to explicitly steer the model toward photorealism, we introduce a complementary dual-reward mechanism: OmniReward for general quality and AI-Portrait for human-centric fidelity. Furthermore, we curate PortraitBench, a comprehensive portrait-centric benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PortraitGen significantly outperforms existing baselines, effectively suppressing AI artifacts and achieving unprecedented photorealism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PortraitGen框架，通过将真实图像引入GRPO采样组和双奖励机制，有效抑制AI伪影，实现前所未有的照片级人像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于GRPO的文本到图像后训练偏重表面美学（如过饱和颜色），未能解决AI伪影和生物不合理性等关键缺陷。原因有二：一是后训练缺乏真实图像，GRPO采样局限于原始分布，无法打破固有生成边界；二是优化过程缺少针对细粒度伪影（如油腻皮肤）的特定奖励。因此亟需新方法提升人像生成的真实感。
light_analysis.method: 提出PortraitGen框架。首先，通过直接向GRPO采样组引入真实图像，并采用图像反演获得其转移概率和潜在变量，从而打破生成边界。其次，设计互补的双奖励机制：OmniReward（通用质量）和AI-Portrait（人像保真度），显式引导模型趋向照片级真实感。此外，构建了人像基准PortraitBench用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，PortraitGen显著优于现有基线方法，有效抑制AI伪影并实现前所未有的照片级真实感。摘要未明确说明具体量化指标（如FID、LPIPS等）及提升幅度，但定性结果证明其卓越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PortraitGen通过引入真实图像和双奖励机制，解决了当前后训练方法在照片级人像生成中的关键缺陷，显著提升了生成质量。该工作为基于强化学习的生成模型提供了新范式，具有高保真人像生成的学术和实用价值。未来可探索将其扩展至其他生成领域或优化奖励设计。

title: GAVEL: Grounded Caption Error Verification and Localization
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) often produce hallucinated or inconsistent outputs, where text and images are not properly aligned. Addressing this issue requires not only detecting misalignment but also explaining the discrepancy and localizing its visual evidence. We introduce GAVEL (Grounded Caption Error Verification and Localization), a task that jointly addresses verification, explanation, and localization for image-text pairs. To support systematic evaluation, we also present a corresponding dataset and benchmark. We further train a supervised baseline on the human-annotated training split to assess whether GAVEL provides learnable supervision for these abilities. Experiments show that even strong closed-source models struggle on GAVEL, while the supervised baseline yields consistent improvements across grounding and explanation metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAVEL任务，联合解决图像-文本对的验证、解释和视觉证据定位问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型常产生幻觉或不一致输出，文本与图像未正确对齐。现有方法仅能检测不对齐，缺乏对差异的解释和视觉证据的定位，因此需要联合解决验证、解释和定位的任务。
light_analysis.method: 定义GAVEL任务，包含三个子任务：验证图像-文本是否对齐、解释不对齐的原因、定位视觉证据。构建了相应的数据集和基准，并在人工标注训练集上训练监督基线模型以评估任务的可学习性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，即使是强闭源模型在GAVEL任务上也表现困难，而监督基线模型在基础和解释指标上取得了一致的性能提升，证明了GAVEL提供的监督信号的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAVEL为视觉语言模型的对齐问题提供了可学习的监督框架，能够系统评估模型的验证、解释和定位能力。未来可用于改进模型鲁棒性，减少幻觉输出。

title: Diagnosing Task Insensitivity in Language Agents
abstract: Large language models can serve as capable long-horizon agents, but their out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization remains weak. We identify a key source of this failure as task insensitivity: when faced with similar but distinct tasks, models might apply patterns learned during training and fail to solve the task at hand. We show that models often continue with actions aligned with the original task even when the instruction is semantically corrupted and cannot be directly answered. We further find that, when we replace the task description in a trained prompt with another similar but distinct task, the model may still output the same action. This behavior is accompanied by a consistent training-time attention drift away from task tokens and toward local observations, suggesting an optimization bias toward shortcuts. To mitigate this problem, we propose Task-Perturbed NLL Optimization, a lightweight contrastive regularizer that explicitly encourages action dependence on the task instruction. Extensive evaluations show that our intervention improves task sensitivity and OOD generalization while preserving more stable attention to task tokens.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示语言智能体的任务不敏感性导致分布外泛化失败，并提出任务扰动NLL优化正则化方法缓解此问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在长程任务中作为智能体时，分布外泛化能力较弱。研究发现关键因素是任务不敏感性：当面对相似但不同的任务时，模型会沿用训练时学到的模式，导致无法正确解决当前任务。现有方法未能充分诊断并处理这一现象，限制了模型在真实场景中的适应性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Task-Perturbed NLL Optimization，一种轻量级对比正则化方法。通过语义破坏或替换任务指令，构建对比样本，显式鼓励动作对任务指令的依赖。同时发现训练时注意力从任务token漂移至局部观察，该方法通过正则化稳定注意力分布，减少对捷径的优化偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多个长程任务评估中，该方法显著提升了任务敏感性和分布外泛化能力，模型对任务token的注意力保持更稳定。具体性能提升幅度论文未明确数值，但报告了与基线方法的定性改进，且未牺牲内分布性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统诊断了语言智能体中的任务不敏感性，并提出了有效的正则化解决方案。该方法轻量且通用，可嵌入现有训练流程，提升模型在实际部署中的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的任务扰动策略及在更大规模模型上的应用。

title: GEOALIGN: Geometric Rollout Curation for Robust LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Online reinforcement learning is widely used to align large language models (LLMs) with reward signals, yet training can be unstable under noisy or misspecified rewards. We identify a failure mode we call directional inconsistency: within a batch, a small set of high-reward rollouts induces representation-space preference directions that sharply disagree with the batch majority, resulting in high-variance and destabilizing updates. We propose geoalign, a lightweight plug-in for rollout curation in iterative policy optimization. Geoalign (i) forms within-prompt preference pairs, (ii) learns an online projector on per-rollout hidden states to concentrate reward-ordered displacement directions, and (iii) detects directionally inconsistent rollouts via their angular deviation from a batch consensus prototype and rectifies them with within-prompt stable alternatives. Geoalign is forward-pass only and adds negligible overhead. Across dialogue alignment with a learned reward model and mathematical reasoning with binary verified rewards, Geoalign improves final performance and reduces training oscillation, outperforming PF-PPO, PAR, PODS, and Seed-GRPO. These results suggest latent directional consensus as an effective reliability signal for online LLM RL.
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEOALIGN，通过几何一致性检测和修正方向不一致的rollouts，提升LLM在线强化学习的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习用于对齐LLM时，奖励噪声或错误导致训练不稳定。发现一种方向不一致故障模式：批内少数高奖励rollouts的表示空间偏好方向与大多数严重冲突，引发高方差更新。因此需要轻量级rollout筛选方法以提高稳定性。
light_analysis.method: GEOALIGN是迭代策略优化的轻量级插件，包含三步：形成提示内偏好对；学习在线投影器集中奖励有序的位移方向；通过角度偏差检测方向不一致rollouts并用提示内稳定替代项修正。仅需前向传播，计算开销极小。
light_analysis.result: 在对话对齐（学习奖励模型）和数学推理（二元验证奖励）任务中，GEOALIGN提升最终性能并减少训练振荡，优于PF-PPO、PAR、PODS和Seed-GRPO等基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEOALIGN利用潜在方向一致性作为在线LLM RL的可靠性信号，实验验证有效。学术上揭示了方向一致性的重要性，实用上可用于多种LLM对齐场景。未来可探索跨任务泛化能力。

title: PhysRAG: Enhancing Physics-Awareness in Video Generation via Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Developing physically aware video generation models remains a significant challenge due to the difficulty in capturing diverse physical phenomena, such as thermal dynamics, mechanics, and optics. In this work, we introduce PhysRAG, a novel pipeline that enhances physical awareness in video generation through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). To address the issue of limited high-quality data, we design a two-stage data filtering pipeline based on the WISA-80K dataset, resulting in a curated set of 7K high-quality videos for training. Furthermore, we construct a physical video database and develop a mechanism to inject physical knowledge into a video diffusion model using learnable queries. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both visual quality and physical rule compliance, surpassing existing models in benchmarks such as PhyGenBench and VBench. We conduct extensive ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our key components, including the data filtering pipeline, RAG mechanism, and method for physical information extraction. To facilitate future research, our code, data, and models are prepared for release at https://github.com/sediment1024/PhysRAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysRAG，利用检索增强生成（RAG）增强视频生成模型的物理感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型难以捕捉热动力学、力学和光学等物理现象，缺乏高质量物理视频数据，导致生成的视频物理规则不准确。该问题对视频的真实性和应用价值至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建两阶段数据过滤管道，基于WISA-80K数据集筛选出7K高质量视频；建立物理视频数据库，并通过可学习查询向视频扩散模型注入物理知识，实现检索增强的物理感知生成。
light_analysis.result: 在PhyGenBench和VBench等基准上，PhysRAG在视觉质量和物理规则遵守方面均达到最先进水平，显著优于现有模型。消融实验验证了数据过滤、RAG机制和物理信息提取等关键组件的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysRAG通过检索增强生成有效提升了视频生成的物理感知能力，为领域提供了新范式。代码、数据和模型已开源，可促进相关研究。未来可扩展至更多物理现象和更高分辨率视频。

title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
abstract: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framework that integrates plan, reason, search, memory and feedback in a context-centric manner. Qwen-Image-Agent treats user input as partial context and progressively constructs the generation context through Context-Aware Planning and Context Grounding. Specifically, Context-Aware Planning identifies missing context and plans how it should be acquired and used, while Context Grounding gathers this context from reason, search, memory, and feedback. To evaluate agentic image generation, we further introduce Image Agent Bench (IA-Bench), a benchmark covering four core image agent capabilities: Plan, Reason, Search, and Memory. Experiments on IA-Bench, Mindbench and WISE-Verified show that Qwen-Image-Agent outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Qwen-Image-Agent框架，通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地弥合真实世界图像生成中的上下文差距，并引入IA-Bench基准评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在处理真实世界请求时，往往面临用户上下文与生成上下文不匹配的问题，即上下文差距。用户请求常存在未明确、隐含或依赖最新知识的情况，导致模型无法生成符合预期的图像。解决这一问题对于提升图像生成在实际应用中的实用性至关重要，然而现有方法缺乏系统性的上下文管理机制。
