light_analysis.method: Qwen-Image-Agent是一个统一的智能体框架，核心包括上下文感知规划和上下文接地。上下文感知规划识别缺失的上下文并规划获取和使用方式；上下文接地通过推理、搜索、记忆和反馈收集上下文。框架集成了规划、推理、搜索、记忆和反馈五种能力，以逐步构建完整的生成上下文。
light_analysis.result: 在IA-Bench、Mindbench和WISE-Verified基准上，Qwen-Image-Agent优于强基线方法，达到最先进性能。IA-Bench专门评估智能体图像生成的四种核心能力：规划、推理、搜索和记忆。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但声称整体表现最佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: Qwen-Image-Agent通过上下文为中心的框架有效弥合了上下文差距，提升了图像生成在真实世界场景中的效果。引入的IA-Bench为评估智能体图像生成提供了标准。未来工作可探索更丰富的上下文源和更高效的接地机制，进一步扩展框架的通用性。

title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
abstract: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address this challenge, we propose Robust-TO, an agentic video understanding framework that explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness into every stage of reasoning. Robust-TO organizes heterogeneous visual perception tools under a unified evidence interface. Each tool receives a sub-query derived from the original question and a set of trustworthy frames selected by the reliability-relevance score. It returns evidence in a shared format: a concrete prediction (e.g., a bounding box, motion trajectory, recognized text, or action label), temporal grounding, and a calibrated reliability score. During reasoning, these calibrated scores guide evidence weighting in a three-tier synthesis process (high/medium/low) and define a confidence-cost GRPO reward that jointly optimizes correctness, evidence reliability, and efficiency. On two video reasoning benchmarks spanning eight tasks, Robust-TO achieves 56.4% average accuracy on clean inputs, surpassing the strongest open-source baseline by 10.6%p and outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro (46.2%). Under five realistic corruption types, Robust-TO maintains 54.3% average accuracy, 5.8%p above the strongest open-source baseline, while exhibiting the smallest clean-to-corrupted accuracy drop among all compared methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Robust-TO，通过显式整合帧级可信度解决视频推理模型在真实扰动下的盲信问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频推理语言模型默认每帧同样可靠，导致在运动模糊、眩光、遮挡等真实扰动下准确率骤降15-30个百分点，且模型未意识到视觉证据退化。这种盲信问题严重限制了模型在机器人等具身场景中的鲁棒性，亟需一种能感知每帧可信度的推理框架。
light_analysis.method: Robust-TO采用智能体框架，组织多种视觉感知工具通过统一证据接口协作。每个工具接收子查询和基于可靠性-相关性分数选择的可靠帧，返回结构化证据：具体预测、时间定位和校准后的可信度分数。推理时，这些分数在三层综合合成中指导证据加权（高/中/低），并定义置信度-成本GRPO奖励，联合优化正确性、证据可靠性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在两个视频推理基准（8个任务）上，Robust-TO在干净输入上达56.4%平均准确率，超最强开源基线10.6个百分点，并优于Gemini-2.5-Pro（46.2%）。在五种真实扰动下保持54.3%平均准确率，超最强开源基线5.8个百分点，且干净到扰动准确率下降幅度为所有方法中最小。
light_analysis.conclusion: Robust-TO通过显式建模帧级可信度显著提升了视频推理模型在真实扰动下的鲁棒性，验证了信任感知工具编排的有效性。其统一证据接口和GRPO奖励设计为构建可靠具身智能系统提供了新范式。未来可探索更细粒度的可信度建模和自适应工具选择。

title: Learning to Recover Task Experts from a Multi-Task Merged Model
abstract: Multi-task model merging aims to consolidate several task-specific experts into a unified model, yet static merging consistently suffers from parameter interference. While dynamic merging models aim to bridge this gap, many works rely on the costly storage and loading of redundant expert components at inference. In this work, from the perspective of task expert, we view parameter interference as parameter perturbation introduced to each expert during merging process. We show that such parameter perturbations can be modeled as affine transformation, which can be approximated as additive offsets. Motivated by these, we propose Recover Task eXpert (ReTeX), a framework that predicts those offsets, in order to undo parameter interference and recover task-expert performance from a single merged checkpoint. To recover the appropriate expert when task identity is unknown, we introduce a router-free task identifier based on SVD subspace signatures computed offline before inference. At inference, the identifier selects the task whose subspace yields the smallest projection residual for a given input. As a result, ReTeX recovers over 95% of individual-expert performance in both vision and NLP domains, while significantly improving generalization to unseen tasks. Crucially, we also show that the parameter offset prediction leads to emergent adaptive interpolation of expert knowledge for out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks. ReTeX adaptively interpolates seen expert knowledge to handle unseen tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/BAIKLAB/ReTeX

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReTeX框架，通过预测参数偏移从合并模型中恢复任务专家，基于SVD子空间签名实现无路由器任务识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务模型合并时参数干扰导致性能下降，动态合并方法虽能缓解但需存储和加载冗余专家组件，推理成本高。本文从任务专家视角将干扰视为仿射变换，需高效撤销干扰并恢复专家性能，同时解决任务身份未知时的识别问题。
light_analysis.method: ReTeX将参数干扰建模为仿射变换的加性偏移，通过预测偏移量撤销干扰。引入基于SVD子空间签名的无路由器任务标识器，离线计算每个任务的子空间签名。推理时对输入计算在各子空间上的投影残差，选择残差最小的任务。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉和NLP领域，ReTeX恢复超过95%的单独专家性能，并显著提升对未见任务的泛化能力。此外，参数偏移预测导致对分布外任务的自适应插值，融合已知专家知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReTeX高效地从一个合并检查点恢复任务专家，避免冗余存储，且能自适应处理未见任务。代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的参数扰动模型或扩展至更多任务。

title: SamaVaani: Auditing and Debiasing Multilingual Clinical ASR for Indian Languages
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is increasingly used to document clinical encounters, yet its reliability in multilingual and demographically diverse Indian healthcare context remains largely unknown. In this study, we first conduct the systematic audit of ASR performance on real-world psychiatric interview data spanning Kannada, Hindi and Indian English, comparing eight state-of-the-art models including IndicWhisper, WhisperLargeV3, Sarvam, GoogleS2T, Gemma3n, OmniLingual, Vaani, and Gemini. Our results reveal substantial variability across models and languages, with some systems performing competitively in Indian English but failing in regional speech. We further fine-tune two of the best performing opensource models, i.e., Gemma3n and OmniLingual, using various methods. With this, we uncover systematic performance gaps tied to speaker role and gender, raising concerns about equitable deployment in clinical settings, which are further mitigated by fairness-aware fine-tuning. To this end, we propose SamaVaani, a unified debiasing technique that simultaneously improves ASR performance and improves fairness across demographic groups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了SamaVaani，一种统一的多语言临床ASR去偏技术，通过审计和公平感知微调提升性能并减少性别和角色偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动语音识别（ASR）被越来越多地用于临床记录，但在印度多语言和人口多样化的医疗环境中，其可靠性尚不清楚。现有模型在印度英语上表现良好，但在区域语言上失败，且存在基于说话者角色和性别的系统性性能差距，影响了临床部署的公平性。
light_analysis.method: 首先系统审计了八种最新ASR模型（包括IndicWhisper、WhisperLargeV3等）在卡纳达语、印地语和印度英语的真实精神病学访谈数据上的表现。然后对两个最佳开源模型（Gemma3n和OmniLingual）进行微调，并采用公平感知微调方法减轻偏差。最后提出SamaVaani统一去偏技术，同时提高ASR性能和跨人口群体的公平性。
light_analysis.result: 审计揭示了模型和语言之间的显著性能差异：一些系统在印度英语上具有竞争力，但在区域语言上失败。微调后发现了基于说话者角色和性别的系统性性能差距，而公平感知微调进一步缓解了这些偏差。摘要未明确给出具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: SamaVaani作为一种统一的去偏技术，能够同时提高多语言临床ASR的性能和公平性，有助于在印度临床环境中实现公平部署。研究强调了对ASR系统进行细粒度审计和针对性去偏的重要性，未来可扩展到更多语言和临床场景。

title: Generative Retrieval via Diffusion Transformer with Metric-Ordered Sequence Training and Hybrid-Policy Preference Optimization
abstract: Embedding-based retrieval ranks items by their similarity to a query in a shared vector space and usually aims to return the highest-scoring items. In many production settings this is not what is wanted: given a seed set that expresses a fine-grained pattern, one needs more items that both satisfy a target attribute and stay within that pattern. We formalize this as pattern-preserving attribute retrieval. The two goals pull against each other: averaging the seeds preserves the pattern but stays in a low-attribute region, while global attribute retrieval drifts to unrelated patterns. We approach the task with continuous generative retrieval, where a model reads a sequence of item embeddings and generates query embeddings for nearest-neighbor search. We propose MO-DiT+HPPO, a staged framework with raw-sequence pretraining, multi-domain metric-ordered continuation pretraining, tail-centroid fine-tuning, and HPPO. Metric-ordered training turns sparse online retrieval labels into in-pattern trajectories ordered from low to high predicted attribute density, teaching one model the metric-improvement direction across domains. HPPO aligns the generated query distribution with the true online objective by labeling a hybrid candidate pool with the online intersection metric and applying reference-anchored preference optimization. A Pareto pair filter keeps only winner pairs that do not lower same-pattern purity, raising the attribute metric without sacrificing the pattern. Across four attribute domains under item- and pattern-holdout protocols, metric-ordered DiT improves the intersection metric over a pretrained generative retriever, and HPPO improves it further, with significant gains on seven of eight domain-split cells and a marginal tie on the hardest split. Metric-predictor validation, order ablations, CPT/SFT comparisons, and a candidate-policy ablation show where the gains come from.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MO-DiT+HPPO框架，通过度量排序训练和混合策略偏好优化，解决模式保持属性检索中的目标冲突问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统嵌入检索难以同时满足模式保持和属性提升的双重目标：平均种子点保留模式但属性低，全局属性检索则偏离模式。该研究将问题形式化为模式保持属性检索，并采用连续生成式检索，但现有生成检索缺乏对跨域度量改进方向的建模。
light_analysis.method: 采用MO-DiT+HPPO分阶段框架，包括原始序列预训练、多域度量排序连续预训练（将稀疏在线标签转为低到高属性密度的模式内轨迹）、尾质心微调以及混合策略偏好优化（HPPO，通过混合候选池和参考锚定偏好优化对齐生成分布）。引入帕累托对筛选器保留不降低模式纯度的获胜对。
light_analysis.result: 在四个属性域和两种协议（项目保留、模式保留）下，度量排序DiT相比预训练生成检索提升了交集度量，HPPO进一步改进。在八个域-分裂单元中七个获得显著增益，最困难分裂上边际平局。度量预测验证、顺序消融、CPT/SFT比较和候选策略消融表明增益来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作有效解决了模式保持属性检索的冲突，通过度量排序训练和混合策略偏好优化显著提升了检索性能。方法具有通用性，未来可扩展至更多属性域和复杂模式。局限性可能在于对高度非线性模式的适用性。

title: Tractography-Driven Synthetic Data Generation for Fiber Bundle Segmentation in Tracer Histology
abstract: Diffusion MRI (dMRI) tractography enables non-invasive reconstruction of white-matter pathways, but its accuracy is fundamentally limited by indirect, low-resolution measurements of axonal organization. Tracer injection studies in non-human primates provide a gold standard for validating dMRI tractography. This, however, requires time-consuming manual annotation of fiber bundles in histology sections. We propose a synthetic-data augmented framework for automated fiber bundle segmentation in macaque tracer histology. Our approach uses ex vivo dMRI tractography as a generative prior to synthesize 2D image patches for training. This provides us with sufficiently realistic foreground texture, which we compose with backgrounds from blockface photos and diversify via domain randomization. A 2D U-Net is trained on mixed real and synthetic patches. Experiments on held-out brains demonstrate improved generalization across brains and fiber bundle densities compared to training with real data only. Training with synthetic data only leads to poor performance, underscoring the need for real supervision. Overall, our approach achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art while requiring 3x less manually annotated data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用dMRI纤维束成像作为生成先验的合成数据增强框架，用于自动分割示踪组织学中的纤维束，显著减少人工标注量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散MRI(dMRI)纤维束成像可无创重建白质通路，但其精度受限于间接低分辨率测量。非人灵长类的示踪注射研究提供了金标准，但需要耗时的手动标注纤维束。现有方法依赖大量人工标注，因此迫切需要自动化方法以减少标注成本。
light_analysis.method: 该方法使用离体dMRI纤维束成像作为生成先验，合成2D图像块作为训练数据。通过域随机化将合成前景与块面照片背景组合，增强多样性。采用2D U-Net在混合真实和合成数据上训练，以学习鲁棒的特征表示。
light_analysis.result: 在留出大脑上的实验表明，相比仅用真实数据训练，该方法在跨大脑和纤维束密度上泛化性更好。仅用合成数据训练性能差，表明真实监督的必要性。总体性能与最先进方法相当，但所需人工标注数据减少3倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的合成数据增强框架有效减少了纤维束分割的人工标注需求，提升了模型泛化能力。该工作具有实际应用价值，可加速dMRI金标准验证。未来可探索更逼真的合成方法以进一步减少对真实数据的依赖。

title: Modeling Local, Global, and Cross-Modal Context in Multimodal 3D MRI
abstract: Brain MRI poses a fundamental challenge for machine learning: models must learn from high-dimensional 3D data spanning multiple co-registered modalities, despite the limited sample sizes typical of neuroimaging studies relative to the diversity in anatomy, pathology, and acquisition conditions. While multimodal imaging provides complementary information critical for clinical interpretation, effectively integrating these signals remains difficult. We propose Multimodal Intra- and Cross-Context Vision Transformer (MICViT), a 3D vision transformer that explicitly models both modality-specific representations and cross-modal interactions across local and global contexts. Concretely, MICViT combines four attention mechanisms: modality-specific local and global attention for intra-modal feature learning, and cross-modal local and global attention to capture interactions between modalities. We evaluate MICViT on brain age prediction across three heterogeneous datasets (UK Biobank, n=41,404; SOOP, n=1,062; Cam-CAN, n=613) using multiple MRI modalities (e.g. T1, FLAIR, DWI, SWI). MICViT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art CNN and transformer baselines in 3D settings. Notably, it benefits more strongly from multimodal inputs, yielding larger performance gains as additional modalities are incorporated. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling intra- and cross-modal interactions is key to unlocking the full potential of multimodal brain MRI, highlighting a promising direction for representation learning in neuroimaging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MICViT，一种3D视觉Transformer，通过显式建模模态内和跨模态的局部与全局上下文，提升多模态脑MRI性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑MRI机器学习面临挑战：高维3D多模态数据，样本量有限，解剖、病理和采集条件多样。多模态成像提供互补信息，但有效整合困难。现有方法未能充分利用局部与全局的模态内和跨模态交互，限制了多模态数据的潜力。
light_analysis.method: MICViT结合四种注意力机制：模态内局部和全局注意力（学习各模态特异性特征）以及跨模态局部和全局注意力（捕获模态间交互）。无需额外数据集，使用三个数据集（UK Biobank等）的多模态MRI（T1、FLAIR、DWI、SWI）进行脑龄预测评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个异质数据集上，MICViT在3D设置中持续优于SOTA CNN和Transformer基线。多模态输入时性能增益更大，额外模态带来更多提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了一致性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 显式建模模态内和跨模态交互是释放多模态脑MRI潜能的关键，为神经影像表示学习提供新方向。局限性：未讨论计算成本或泛化性。未来可探索更多模态或任务。

title: Asymptotically Optimal Learning for Parametric Prophet Inequalities
abstract: We study learning in prophet inequalities with i.i.d. rewards drawn from an exponential-type parametric family with an unknown parameter $θ$, a class that includes exponential, Pareto, and bounded-support power-family distributions. We first characterize the optimal full-information asymptotic competitive ratio for this family. In the unbounded-support case, the limit is $ {\left(θ/({θ-c_+})\right)^{c_+/θ}}/ {Γ(1-c_+/θ)},$ while in the bounded-support case, the limit is $1$. We then propose a confidence-based dynamic-programming policy for online learning. By exploiting the explicit parametric structure, the policy achieves the same optimal asymptotic competitive ratio using only online observations, without external offline samples. We further derive distribution-specific convergence rates for canonical examples. Finally, numerical experiments on synthetic instances illustrate the performance of our algorithm.

light_analysis.overview: 针对指数型参数族先知不等式，提出达到最优渐近竞争比的置信动态规划在线学习策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线决策问题中，先知不等式用于量化在线算法与全知最优策略的性能差距。现有研究多假设奖励分布已知或仅依赖无参数假设，但在许多实际场景（如库存管理、收益管理）中，奖励分布属于已知参数族但参数未知。本文旨在利用参数化结构，在仅在线观测条件下实现与全知情况相同的渐近最优竞争比，避免外部离线样本需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文考虑奖励独立同分布且来自指数型参数族（包括指数、帕累托等），参数θ未知。首先推导全信息下最优渐近竞争比的闭式表达式，针对无界支撑和有界支撑两种情况给出极限值。然后提出基于置信度的动态规划策略，通过在线观测数据动态更新参数置信区间，并在每个阶段用动态规划求解截断阈值。该方法无需外部离线样本，利用参数族的结构特性实现渐近最优。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，所提策略在无界支撑时渐近竞争比达到 θ/(θ-c_+) ^(c_+/θ) / Γ(1-c_+/θ)，有界支撑时为1，与全信息最优一致。对典型分布（如指数、帕累托）推导了具体收敛速率。数值实验在合成实例上验证了策略的有效性，与理论预测吻合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了参数化先知不等式在线学习的渐近最优性，为有参数结构的在线决策问题提供了理论基准和实用算法。其置信动态规划方法可推广至其他参数族。未来工作可考虑非平稳环境或相关奖励情形。局限性在于需已知参数族形式且假设i.i.d.。

title: Bridging Vision and Language Concepts through Optimal Transport Semantic Flow
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) promise transparent reasoning by predicting through human-interpretable concepts, yet their effectiveness fundamentally depends on how well visual and textual representations are aligned or matched. Existing vision-language CBMs often rely on pre-aligned encoders or global cosine similarity, which obscures fine-grained concept localization and fails to reflect true semantic geometry. In this work, we rethink concept alignment as a dynamic cross-modal transport process instead of static projection and propose the Optimal Transport Flow Concept Bottleneck Model (OTF-CBM). It first learns a data-driven semantic cost via Inverse Optimal Transport to measure cross-modal distances, and then performs unbalanced optimal-transport-based flow matching to model semantic transitions between visual patches and textual concepts. With velocity-based concept activation, OTF-CBM captures interpretable geometric relations without ODE integration. Experiments further show that OTF-CBM achieves superior classification accuracy and concept faithfulness, offering a new geometric and dynamical perspective for interpretable cross-modal reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最优传输流的概念瓶颈模型（OTF-CBM），通过动态跨模态传输实现视觉与语言概念的精细对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言概念瓶颈模型常依赖预对齐编码器或全局余弦相似度，这种方法掩盖了细粒度概念定位，无法反映真实的语义几何结构。需要更动态、几何化的对齐方法以提升可解释性和分类性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出OTF-CBM，首先通过逆最优传输学习数据驱动的语义代价函数，度量跨模态距离；然后执行非平衡最优传输流匹配，建模视觉块与文本概念之间的语义转换。基于速度的概念激活无需ODE积分，捕获可解释的几何关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明OTF-CBM在分类精度和概念忠实度上均优于现有方法，提供了更准确的跨模态对齐，但摘要未给出具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从几何和动力学角度为可解释的跨模态推理提供了新视角，具有潜在的应用价值。未来可扩展至更广泛的视觉-语言任务，但局限性未在摘要中讨论。

title: RIS-Assisted Proactive Handover for Reliable mmWave Wireless Networks
abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) networks are highly susceptible to line-of-sight (LoS) blockages. Vision-aided wireless communications (VAWC) enable proactive handovers (PHO) to mitigate such blockages; however, PHO becomes challenging when no nearby base station (BS) is available. In such cases, reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) can be used to restore connectivity. To ensure timely PHO, the RIS configuration time must be taken into account, as the large number of RIS elements can limit responsiveness in time-sensitive scenarios. This work proposes a novel RIS-assisted PHO approach that optimizes the number of allocated RIS elements to balance signal processing complexity and link quality under handover timing constraints, making the RIS-assisted link more energy-efficient. An optimization problem based on particle swarm optimization (PSO) is formulated to determine the optimal end-to-end RIS link setup that runs offline to bypass latency constraints. Results show that reducing the number of RIS elements by 12\% leads to a 10\% decrease in dissipated energy without compromising the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR). Moreover, the RIS-assisted link achieves a 15--30 dB improvement in blocked regions while maintaining accurate PHO timing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于粒子群优化的RIS辅助主动切换方法，通过优化RIS元素分配实现节能可靠的毫米波链路。
light_analysis.motivation: 毫米波网络易受视距阻塞影响，现有视觉辅助主动切换在附近无基站时失效。RIS可恢复连接，但大量RIS元素配置时间长，影响切换时效。需平衡元素数量与链路质量，实现节能高效的主动切换。
light_analysis.method: 提出RIS辅助主动切换方法，优化RIS元素分配数量。基于粒子群优化（PSO）建立优化问题，离线确定最优端到端RIS链路设置以避免延迟，在切换时间约束下平衡信号处理复杂度和链路质量，提升能效。
light_analysis.result: 减少12%的RIS元素使能耗降低10%，且不牺牲信噪比（SNR）。在阻塞区域，RIS辅助链路获得15-30 dB的SNR改善，同时保持准确的主动切换时序，验证了方法的节能与可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为毫米波网络阻塞问题提供RIS辅助主动切换方案，通过优化RIS元素数量平衡节能与性能，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索在线自适应优化以应对动态环境。

title: Heterogeneous Neural Predictivity from Language Models During Naturalistic Comprehension
abstract: Language-model representations provide structured, high-dimensional annotations of naturalistic language stimuli and can serve as informative neural predictors during comprehension. We analyzed locked derived data from Brain Treebank, MEG-MASC, and Podcast ECoG with eight frozen language models, blocked encoding models, and matched temporal, nuisance, and representation-capacity controls. Positive held-out prediction and gains over low-level baselines were widespread in source-level summaries. Across Brain Treebank and Podcast ECoG, 67 of 432 evaluable rows met a controlled predictive-only criterion, and model-side feature ablations changed prediction scores in most evaluable source rows. Brain-derived, timing-linked, acoustic, and implanted-signal controls confirmed component-level sensitivity of the analysis pipeline. These findings show that language-model-derived quantities can annotate neural activity during natural speech and text comprehension. Participant-level matched-control advantages were localized rather than uniform, response-profile and feature-specificity contrasts bounded representational or computational interpretations, and complete co-indexed integrated interpretation will require future jointly indexed coverage. Together, the analyses identify language-model features as useful neural predictors and separate predictive usefulness from claims about shared neural organization or language-processing computations.

light_analysis.overview: 研究证明语言模型特征在自然语言理解中可作为有效的神经预测因子，但预测有用性不等同于共享神经组织或计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究缺乏系统评估语言模型特征作为神经预测因子的方法。本文旨在通过多数据集和控制实验，检验语言模型特征能否可靠预测自然语言刺激下的神经活动，并区分预测有用性与神经组织共享或计算机制的主张。
light_analysis.method: 使用Brain Treebank、MEG-MASC和Podcast ECoG三个数据集，八个冻结语言模型，构建阻挡编码模型，并匹配时间、干扰和表示容量控制。通过特征消融、脑源信号控制等分析，从源层面评估预测性能。
light_analysis.result: 源层面摘要中广泛出现正向保留预测和优于低级基线的收益。Brain Treebank和Podcast ECoG中，432个可评估行中67行满足受控预测唯一性标准；大多数可评估源行的特征消融改变预测得分。参与者级控制优势局部化而非统一。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语言模型特征是有用的神经预测因子，但预测有用性不直接支持共享神经组织或语言计算的主张。未来需联合索引覆盖以实现完整解释。研究提供了方法学框架和证据。

title: A Pipeline for Generating Longitudinal Synthetic Clinical Notes Using Large Language Models
abstract: Synthetic data is increasingly used to enable the development and evaluation of AI systems in domains where access to real-world data is restricted. In healthcare, clinical documentation presents particular challenges due to its sensitivity. This work introduces a synthetic clinical notes pipeline and dataset designed to support the development of clinical AI tools while avoiding the privacy risks associated with real patient data. The dataset is generated using a modular pipeline that combines structured patient generation, semi-structured patient journey simulation, and unstructured clinical note generation using large language models. The pipeline is designed to prioritise internal consistency across longitudinal patient records, while also capturing variation in writing style, note structure, and clinical detail. Additional mechanisms, including LLM-based validation and augmentation steps, are used to improve faithfulness, realism, and diversity of the generated notes. We release a dataset of 70 synthetic patients, each associated with 20-50 clinical notes spanning a full hospital journey. The dataset is provided at multiple levels of validation, enabling users to balance realism and scalability depending on their use case. This dataset supports the development, testing, and evaluation of clinical AI systems, including summarisation tools, coding models, and decision support systems, without reliance on real patient data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种使用大语言模型生成纵向合成临床笔记的模块化管道和数据集，保障隐私并支持临床AI开发。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实临床数据因隐私限制难以获取，阻碍了临床AI系统的开发和评估。现有合成数据方法常忽略纵向一致性和多样化的临床细节，导致生成的数据缺乏真实性和实用性。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过生成内部一致、风格多样的纵向合成临床笔记，为临床AI工具提供安全、可扩展的数据资源。
light_analysis.method: 采用模块化管道，包括结构化患者生成（人口统计、病史）、半结构化患者旅程模拟（入院、治疗、出院事件）以及使用大语言模型生成非结构化临床笔记。管道通过LLM验证和增强步骤保证忠实度、真实性和多样性，并注重纵向记录的内部一致性，同时捕捉写作风格和临床细节的变化。最终生成70名合成患者，每名20-50条笔记，提供多级验证选项。
light_analysis.result: 生成了包含70名合成患者、总计1400-3500条临床笔记的数据集，覆盖完整医院旅程。数据集提供不同验证级别，用户可根据需求平衡真实性与可扩展性。在开发、测试和评估临床AI系统（如摘要、编码、决策支持）中展示有效性，避免了真实数据的隐私风险。摘要未明确具体性能指标，但强调支持多种任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过创新管道解决了临床数据隐私与可用性之间的平衡，生成了高质量纵向合成笔记。数据集可促进临床AI工具的开发与评估，尤其适用于资源受限场景。未来可扩展至更多患者、疾病类型，或集成更复杂的临床事件。潜在局限性包括依赖LLM生成质量及验证机制的完善性。

title: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning
abstract: Reasoning capability has advanced rapidly in large language models (LLMs), leading to an increasing size of key-value (KV) cache in both prefilling and decoding stages. Existing KV cache compression methods mainly rely on attention weights to estimate token importance. While attention effectively captures contextual relevance, it overlooks complementary information-theoretic signals related to predictive uncertainty and token informativeness. In this paper, we revisit token importance from a forward-looking perspective and introduce \textit{Forward Influence}, a metric that measures how compressed tokens affect future contexts. Our analysis reveals that tokens selected by attention scores mainly influence nearby contexts, whereas tokens associated with high predictive uncertainty exhibit substantially stronger influence on distant future contexts. Based on the observation, we propose \textbf{InfoKV}, an entropy-aware KV cache compression framework that incorporates information-theoretic signals. It combines token-level predictive uncertainty with layer-wise representation evolution and integrates the resulting entropy scores with attention scores during reasoning. Experiments on long-context reasoning benchmarks with Llama-3.1, Llama-3.2, and DeepSeek-R1 demonstrate that InfoKV consistently outperforms existing attention-based KV compression methods in both long prefilling and decoding scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InfoKV，一种融合信息论信号的KV缓存压缩方法，通过考虑token预测不确定性和层表示演化熵来改进长上下文推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法主要依赖注意力权重估计token重要性，但注意力仅捕捉上下文相关性，忽视了预测不确定性和信息量等互补的信息论信号。这些信号对于理解token对未来上下文的影响至关重要，特别是在长序列推理中，现有方法可能导致压缩后性能下降。
light_analysis.method: InfoKV引入Forward Influence度量，发现高预测不确定性的token对远距离上下文影响更强。该方法结合token级预测不确定性与层表示演化熵，将熵得分与注意力分数融合，在预填充和解码阶段进行KV缓存压缩。实验使用Llama-3.1、Llama-3.2和DeepSeek-R1模型。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文推理基准上，InfoKV在预填充和解码场景下均一致优于现有注意力基KV压缩方法。具体性能提升未明确量化，但强调在多个模型和任务上表现更优，表明信息论信号能有效提升压缩效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: InfoKV展示了信息论信号在KV缓存压缩中的价值，为长推理任务提供了更有效的token重要性评估。该方法有助于降低内存占用并保持推理质量，未来可探索更高效的信息量计算或结合其他压缩策略。

title: TAVR-VLM: Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding for Hallucination-Resistant Report Generation
abstract: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) planning requires meticulous multimodal reasoning. However, adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to this high-stakes domain is severely impeded by diagnostic hallucinations, where generated text lacks anatomical grounding. To address this, TAVR-VLM is introduced: a novel framework featuring Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding Attention (R-CGA) that instantiates a model-internal ``Risk $\rightarrow$ Region $\rightarrow$ Word'' structural grounding pathway. R-CGA compresses multimodal inputs into a causal risk bottleneck, purifying dense visual features into a global risk mask. During autoregressive generation, a support-projected causal consistency objective constrains token-level grounding within the risk-defined support mask. Evaluated on $\text{M}^3\text{TAVR}$, a comprehensive 1,482-patient cohort, TAVR-VLM establishes a new state-of-the-art. It achieves an AUROC of 0.896, boosts CIDEr to 0.936, and drastically reduces the hallucination rate to 8.1\%, thereby improving interpretability for evidence-based surgical AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TAVR-VLM框架，通过风险条件因果注意力机制减少多模态大语言模型在TAVR规划报告生成中的幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: TAVR规划需要精细的多模态推理，但多模态大语言模型在此高风险领域存在诊断幻觉，生成文本缺乏解剖学基础。现有方法难以确保生成的报告与影像区域准确对应，可能导致临床决策错误。因此，需要一种结构化的因果推理方法来增强模型的可解释性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: TAVR-VLM框架的核心是风险条件因果注意力（R-CGA），它构建了模型内部的“风险→区域→词”结构因果路径。R-CGA将多模态输入压缩为因果风险瓶颈，提取全局风险掩码，并在自回归生成过程中通过支持投影因果一致性目标约束词级别的定位，确保生成文本基于风险定义的区域。
light_analysis.result: 在包含1482名患者的M3TAVR数据集上，TAVR-VLM取得了AUROC 0.896，CIDEr指标提升至0.936，并将幻觉率降至8.1%，显著优于现有方法，展示了其在提升报告准确性和可解释性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAVR-VLM通过因果风险瓶颈有效缓解了多模态大语言模型在TAVR规划中的幻觉问题，提高了生成报告的解剖病理学可信度。该框架为高风险医疗场景中的可信AI提供了一个可行的范式，未来可扩展至其他需要细粒度多模态推理的临床任务。

title: SpatialFlow-GRPO: Where Spatial Credit Drives Image Editing
abstract: Recent online reinforcement learning has substantially improved image editing quality. However, existing Flow-GRPO-style methods usually rely on a single whole-image reward, which makes fine-grained editing optimization difficult. We observe that a key obstacle in image editing is this spatial uniformity assumption: a whole-image reward cannot distinguish how different spatial regions contribute to image quality. To address this issue, we propose SpatialFlow-GRPO, a training framework that introduces spatially fine-grained reward feedback. The framework converts region-aware rewards into semantic-region-level optimization signals and aligns region advantages with the corresponding latent positions during policy updates. We also train a region-aware reward model, SFReward, construct SFReward-14K with region-annotated editing samples, and introduce MultiEditBench to evaluate multi-region editing ability. On OmniGen2 and FLUX.2-klein-4B, SpatialFlow-GRPO outperforms Flow-GRPO on GEdit-Bench, ImgEdit-Bench, and MultiEditBench. The results show that SpatialFlow-GRPO converts local feedback into spatially aligned update signals and improves editing quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialFlow-GRPO框架，通过空间细粒度奖励反馈显著提升图像编辑质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Flow-GRPO方法依赖单一整图奖励，无法区分不同空间区域对图像质量的贡献，导致细粒度编辑优化困难。这种空间均匀性假设成为阻碍编辑质量提升的关键障碍。
light_analysis.method: SpatialFlow-GRPO将区域感知奖励转换为语义区域级优化信号，在策略更新时对齐区域优势与对应潜在位置。训练区域感知奖励模型SFReward，构建SFReward-14K数据集，并引入MultiEditBench评估多区域编辑能力。基于OmniGen2和FLUX.2-klein-4B模型。
light_analysis.result: 在GEdit-Bench、ImgEdit-Bench和MultiEditBench上，SpatialFlow-GRPO均优于Flow-GRPO，表明该框架能有效将局部反馈转换为空间对齐的更新信号，提升编辑质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出空间细粒度奖励反馈的图像编辑训练框架，解决了空间均匀假设问题，具有学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的区域感知奖励或扩展至其他生成任务。

title: Rolling Shutter Relative Pose Estimation Made Practical
abstract: Rolling shutter (RS) cameras equip virtually all consumer devices, yet RS-aware relative pose estimation has remained impractical: the state-of-the-art solver requires a minimum of 20 point correspondences, making RANSAC-based robust estimation prohibitively expensive due to the exponential dependence of the iteration count on the sample size. We make RS relative pose estimation practical by introducing affine correspondences (ACs) into the RS two-view geometry. We derive novel \emph{RS-corrected affine constraints} that account for the coupling between point perturbations and the row-dependent essential matrix, providing two equations per correspondence beyond the standard epipolar constraint. Building on these constraints, we develop a linearized algebraic solver that estimates pose and RS motion from only 7 ACs. The solver exploits the physical smallness of RS parameters to linearize the constraints, eliminates the 12 RS unknowns via null-space projection, and solves the remaining degree-20 system via action matrices in 1.2\,ms. On the TUM RS benchmark, our method achieves the best pose and RS parameter accuracy among all tested methods and, uniquely among RS solvers, provides accurate translational velocity estimates -- which are poorly conditioned from point correspondences alone due to a $\vec{v}$-$\vec{t}$ coupling. On the global-shutter EuRoC MAV dataset, the solver achieves comparable accuracy to the standard 5-point algorithm, demonstrating that it generalizes well to the GS setting. Code is at https://github.com/danini/rolling_shutter_made_practical.

light_analysis.overview: 通过引入仿射对应关系（ACs），实现仅需7个点即可高效、准确的卷帘快门相对位姿估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 卷帘快门（RS）相机广泛应用于消费设备，但现有的RS相对位姿估计方法不实用：最先进的求解器至少需要20个点对应，导致基于RANSAC的鲁棒估计因迭代次数对样本量的指数依赖而代价高昂。因此，需要一种更高效的求解器，能够用更少的对应点实现快速且准确的位姿估计。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出将仿射对应（ACs）引入RS两视图几何。推导了RS校正的仿射约束，每个对应点除极线约束外额外提供两个方程。基于这些约束，开发了一个线性化代数求解器，仅需7个ACs即可估计位姿和RS运动。该求解器利用RS参数的物理小量线性化约束，通过零空间投影消除12个RS未知数，并使用作用矩阵求解剩余的20次系统，耗时1.2毫秒。
light_analysis.result: 在TUM RS基准测试中，该方法在所有测试方法中取得了最佳的位姿和RS参数精度，并且是唯一能够提供准确平移速度估计的RS求解器（因为点对应单独存在速度-平移耦合导致病态）。在全局快门EuRoC MAV数据集上，该求解器与标准5点算法精度相当，表明其能很好地泛化到全局快门场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过引入仿射对应，使得卷帘快门相对位姿估计变得实用。主要贡献包括推导了RS校正的仿射约束、开发了仅需7个对应点的线性化求解器，并在多个数据集上验证了其优越的精度和泛化能力。该工作有望推动RS相机在机器人、自动驾驶等领域的应用。未来可考虑进一步优化求解器速度或扩展到多视图场景。

title: Cascaded Multi-Granularity Pruning for On-Device LLM Inference in Industrial IoT
abstract: Deploying large language models (LLMs) on Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) edge devices demands extreme compression, yet existing structured pruning methods collapse at high compression ratios due to one-shot importance estimation, and their cross-architecture behavior remains unpredictable. This article presents a cascaded multi-granularity pruning framework that removes layers, attention heads, and feed-forward channels in coarse-to-fine order, with lightweight low-rank recovery between stages to re-estimate component importance. An information-theoretic analysis motivates this ordering, and the Structural Independence Assumption (SIA) is formalized as a checkable condition predicting whether per-component pruning criteria are reliable for a given architecture: Multi-Head Attention (MHA)+GELU designs satisfy the SIA, whereas Grouped Query Attention (GQA)+SwiGLU designs violate it. On bearing fault diagnosis spanning 88M to 6.25B-parameter models, the framework extends achievable compression to 13.8 times on MHA+GELU architectures with 83.82% accuracy (+3.70 percentage points (pp) over the strongest baseline), while exposing a ~74pp accuracy collapse on GQA+SwiGLU architectures that violate the SIA. Deployed on an industrial slewing bearing fault diagnosis platform with NVIDIA DGX Spark, compressed models reduce inference latency by up to 67.2% and peak memory by 62.5%, demonstrating viability for IIoT edge inference.
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Internet of Things Journal for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出级联多粒度剪枝框架，通过粗细粒度的逐阶段剪枝和低秩恢复，实现IIoT边缘设备上LLM的高压缩与低延迟推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 在工业物联网边缘设备部署大语言模型需要极致压缩，但现有结构化剪枝方法在高压缩比下因一次性重要性估计而导致性能崩溃，且跨架构行为不可预测。本文旨在解决这一核心问题，通过信息论分析与结构独立性假设预测剪枝可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出级联多粒度剪枝框架，按粗到细的顺序依次移除层、注意力头和前馈通道，并在阶段间插入轻量低秩恢复以重新估计组件重要性。引入结构独立性假设（SIA）作为可检查条件，判断剪枝准则对给定架构的可靠性：MHA+GELU满足SIA而GQA+SwiGLU违反。
light_analysis.result: 在参数规模88M至6.25B的轴承故障诊断模型上，对MHA+GELU架构实现13.8倍压缩，准确率83.82%（比最强基线高3.70个百分点）；而对违反SIA的GQA+SwiGLU架构暴露约74个百分点的准确率崩溃。部署后推理延迟降低67.2%，峰值内存减少62.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了LLM在IIoT边缘设备上的部署可行性，通过结构独立性假设为剪枝架构适用性提供理论指导。未来可探索扩展SIA到更多架构，并优化低秩恢复以适配资源受限场景。

title: AgentX: Towards Agent-Driven Self-Iteration of Industrial Recommender Systems
abstract: Recommendation algorithm iteration is moving from an artisanal, engineer-bound process toward an industrialized research loop, but this transition remains blocked by a structural execution bottleneck: the idea-to-launch cycle still depends on human engineers to generate hypotheses, modify production code, launch A/B experiments, and attribute online results. Innovation therefore scales linearly with headcount rather than compounding with evidence, compute, and accumulated experimental knowledge. We present AgentX, a production-deployed multi-agent system that fundamentally restructures this production function. AgentX operates as a self-evolving development engine: it autonomously generates, implements, evaluates, and learns from recommendation experiments at a scale and pace that no manual workflow can sustain.   The system orchestrates four tightly coupled stages in a closed loop. A Brainstorm Agent synthesizes evidence from historical experiments, system architecture, data analysis, and external research into ranked, executable proposals. A Developing Agent translates each proposal into production-ready code through repository-grounded generation and multi-dimensional reliability verification. An Evaluation Agent conducts safe online rollout with guardrail-vetoed A/B judgment, converting both successes and failures into structured knowledge assets. A Harness Evolution layer (SGPO) then distills execution trajectories into semantic-gradient updates that continuously sharpen the agents themselves -- making the system not merely automated, but self-improving.
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their first name

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentX多智能体系统，实现工业推荐系统的自主迭代闭环，突破人工瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前推荐算法迭代依赖人类工程师完成假设生成、代码修改、A/B实验及结果归因，导致创新速度受限于人力规模，而非累积证据和计算资源。这种结构化执行瓶颈阻碍了从手工流程向工业化研究循环的转变，亟需一种能自主、大规模进行实验的方法。
light_analysis.method: AgentX由四个紧密耦合的智能体组成循环：Brainstorm Agent综合历史实验、系统架构、数据分析及外部研究生成可执行提案；Developing Agent基于仓库生成代码并通过多维可靠性验证；Evaluation Agent通过带护栏否决的A/B测试安全部署并结构化知识；Harness Evolution层（SGPO）将执行轨迹转化为语义梯度更新，持续优化智能体自身。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据或性能指标，但声称AgentX能以人工无法维持的规模和速度自主运行实验，实现自我进化。预期可显著缩短从想法到上线周期，提升实验吞吐量和知识复用效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentX通过多智能体协作与在线学习机制，将推荐系统迭代从手动模式转化为闭环自进化引擎，具有工业级应用价值。未来可进一步优化智能体协同效率及探索更复杂的知识蒸馏方法，突破当前实验范式的限制。

title: LCAi: Life Cycle Assessment with big data fusion and retrieval-augmented generation-assisted interpretation
abstract: The interpretation phase of life cycle assessment often lacks structured mechanisms for translating quantified improvement opportunities addressing environmental hotspots into actionable strategic pathways under technological, social, and policy uncertainty. To overcome this limitation, this study introduces a perspective-conditioned retrieval-augmented generation framework for LCA interpretation, where a multi-perspective retrieval and controlled synthesis is incorporated in the artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted LCA. To operationalise large language models in LCA interpretation, a perspective fusion RAG architecture was developed, covering academic, industry, public discourse, and European union (EU) funding datasets. Our approach comprises three steps: (1) a scenario anchor defining system boundaries and decarbonization targets, (2) a set of perspective-specific micro-queries with constrained retrieval, and (3) a neutral synthesis step integrating only ledger-stored outputs without further retrieval. The framework is demonstrated through a hydrogen-enabled diesel reduction use case in an Italian apple production facility using GPT-5 nano as the reasoning model. Overall, the structured retrieval and constrained synthesis are designed to mitigate the risk of hallucination while preserving cross-domain diversity. The approach presented can support more disciplined translation of impact results into strategic pathways and opens up new avenues for the use of advanced AI tools in LCA studies, particularly those focused on technologies that could be deployed at scale. This proof-of-concept demonstrates how AI-assisted, evidence-grounded interpretation can support implementation-oriented decision-making beyond conventional LCA studies.
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures, 6 tables. Includes Supplementary Information

light_analysis.overview: 提出视角条件检索增强生成框架，用于生命周期评估的结构化解释，实现从环境热点到战略路径的转化。
light_analysis.motivation: 生命周期评估的解释阶段缺乏结构化机制，难以将量化改进机会转化为在技术、社会和政策不确定性下的可行战略路径。现有方法无法有效整合多源领域知识，且存在幻觉风险。
light_analysis.method: 开发视角融合RAG架构，涵盖学术、行业、公共话语和欧盟资助数据集。包括三步：情景锚定定义系统边界与脱碳目标，视角特定微查询与约束检索，以及仅基于账本输出的中性综合步骤。使用GPT-5 nano作为推理模型，通过氢能柴油减排案例演示。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体量化结果。作为概念验证，该框架展示了结构化检索和约束综合如何降低幻觉风险并保持跨领域多样性，支持将影响结果转化为战略路径，优于传统LCA解释方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为AI辅助的生命周期评估解释提供了新方向，支持基于证据的决策。但作为概念验证，未来需在更多案例中验证，并探索不同LLM的效果。

title: Context-Aware Synthesis of Optimization Pipelines for Warehouse Optimization
abstract: Order fulfillment in manual picker-to-goods warehouses involves interconnected decisions such as item assignment, order batching, and picker routing. While integrated models capture interactions between these decisions, practical warehouse systems often require decomposed approaches due to organizational boundaries, differing responsibilities, or limited data availability. Existing studies primarily evaluate algorithms for isolated subproblems or fixed subproblem combinations for specific warehouse settings, but lack a general mechanism to determine applicable algorithm configurations, compose them into valid solution pipelines, and assess their performance.   With Context-Aware Synthesis of Optimization Pipelines (CASOP), we propose a framework for constructing and evaluating context-specific optimization pipelines and apply these to order fulfillment. The framework comprises: (1) a modular repository of algorithms for common order fulfillment problems; (2) semantic data and algorithm cards to describe warehouse context and algorithm requirements; (3) a taxonomy that structures order fulfillment problems into relevant subproblems; (4) a pipeline synthesizer that identifies applicable algorithms for a given warehouse context and composes all valid optimization pipelines; and (5) a pipeline evaluator that assesses all resulting pipelines. We demonstrate the framework on 7 benchmark instance sets covering four problem classes, resulting in 1,063,044 valid pipelines. The framework supports researchers and practitioners in designing, automatically synthesizing, and selecting valid, high-performing algorithmic pipelines for warehouse operations. The software is open-source and available at https://github.com/kit-dsm/ware_ops_pipes and https://github.com/kit-dsm/ware_ops_algos.   Keywords: Warehouse optimization, Algorithm selection, Pipeline synthesis, Order fulfillment

light_analysis.overview: 提出CASOP框架，根据仓库上下文自动合成并评估订单拣选优化流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: 订单拣选涉及多个相互关联的决策（如商品分配、订单分批、拣选路径），现有研究多针对孤立子问题或固定组合，缺乏通用机制来确定适用算法、组合有效流水线并评估性能。实际仓库系统因组织边界、职责划分或数据有限常需分解方法，因此需要可适应不同上下文的框架。
light_analysis.method: CASOP框架包含五个组件：①常见订单拣选问题的模块化算法仓库；②描述仓库上下文和算法需求的语义数据与算法卡片；③将问题结构化为子问题的分类法；④流水线合成器，根据上下文识别适用算法并组合所有有效流水线；⑤流水线评估器，评估所有生成流水线的性能。在7个基准实例集（覆盖4类问题）上验证，生成1,063,044个有效流水线。
light_analysis.result: 在7个基准实例集上演示，覆盖4类问题，共生成1,063,044个有效流水线。框架支持自动合成和筛选高性能流水线，但摘要未提供具体性能数值（如与基线对比的精确指标），需查看原文获知。
light_analysis.conclusion: CASOP框架为仓库订单拣选提供了可复用的上下文感知流水线合成与评估方法，支持研究人员和从业者自动设计和选择高性能算法流水线。开源软件有助于实际部署。未来可扩展更多子问题或算法，以及在线适应动态仓库环境。

title: Liquid Fusion of Heterogeneous Representations Towards General Salient Object Detection
abstract: General Salient Object Detection (SOD) aims to identify and segment visually interesting objects from uni-modality or multi-modality scenes, recently advanced by cutting-edge State Space Models (SSMs). However, a critical limitation of current approaches is their neglect of the inherent spectral biases exhibited by different neural network paradigms. By digging to the dataset-level spectral analysis of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and SSMs, their semantic representations are inherently complementary based on their complementary frequency preferences. Inspired by this, we harmonize heterogeneous representations from SSMs and CNNs to bridge their spectral biases for general salient object detection. To this end, inspired by the dynamic information propagation of Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs), we introduce a liquid fusion to dynamically integrates features from two backbones, including VMamba and ConvNeXt, referred to Liquid Fusion Network (LFNet). Concretely, by treating the continuous VMamba features and ConvNeXt features as evolving states and exogenous stimulus, respectively, LFNet employs a dynamic gating mechanism for content-aware feature aggregation. Crucially, this state-stimulus paradigm enables to scale to multi-modal cues, resulting in flexibility in general SOD. Besides, a Saliency-Guided Upsampling (SGU) operator to propagate the features to the shallow layer, which leverages a spectral-spatial co-design to suppress upsampling artifacts while preserving semantics. Extensive experiments across five diverse tasks (RGB, RGB-D, RGB-T, VSOD, and VDT) demonstrate that LFNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, offering a superior trade-off between detection accuracy and model efficiency. Code has been released at https://github.com/cke520/LFNet.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LFNet，通过液态融合网络动态整合SSM和CNN的异构表示，解决频谱偏差，实现通用显著目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有通用显著目标检测方法忽视了不同神经网络范式（如CNN和SSM）固有的频谱偏差。通过数据集级频谱分析发现，它们的语义表示因互补的频率偏好而具有互补性。因此需要一种方法有效融合异构表示，以提升检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Liquid Fusion Network (LFNet)，基于液态神经网络思想，将VMamba（SSM）的连续特征视为动态状态，ConvNeXt特征视为外源刺激，通过动态门控机制实现内容感知的特征聚合。此外设计Saliency-Guided Upsampling (SGU)算子，采用频谱-空间协同设计抑制上采样伪影并保留语义信息。
light_analysis.result: 在RGB、RGB-D、RGB-T、VSOD和VDT五个不同任务的广泛实验表明，LFNet达到了最先进的性能，在检测准确率和模型效率之间实现了更优的权衡，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: LFNet通过液态融合有效桥接了SSM和CNN的频谱偏差，实现了灵活的多模态融合，为通用显著目标检测提供了新范式。学术上揭示了频谱偏差的重要性，实际中可应用于多种模态场景。未来可探索更多网络架构的融合。

title: The Capability Frontier: Benchmarks Miss 82% of Model Performance
abstract: Existing benchmarks typically report accuracy for a single model on a single run. This systematically understates real-world LLM capabilities, particularly under heterogeneous data distributions: (i) different models get different questions correct according to their specializations, and (ii) given a budget, multiple generations can be sampled and selectively retained. To quantify this gap, we introduce the Capability Frontier: a Pareto frontier over a set of models that characterizes the best achievable performance at each cost level under optimal selection across models and generations (i.e., via an oracle). Our construction corrects for two opposing biases: underestimation from single-model evaluation and overestimation from taking maxima over noisy samples. We study 21 LLMs across 16 widely used benchmarks spanning coding, reasoning, medicine, factuality, instruction following, and agentic tasks, comparing Capability Frontier performance at matched cost to each benchmark's top-performing model. Correcting for single-model evaluation yields a 54% error rate reduction; additionally correcting for single runs yields an 82% improvement, with SOTA accuracy matched at 85% cost reduction. Complementing these empirical results, we use controlled probabilistic simulations to show that higher query topic entropy produces a near-monotonic increase in the performance gap between oracle routing and the best single model. Our findings suggest collective LLM capabilities are substantially underestimated, with implications for evaluation and deployment in data-heterogeneous, multi-domain settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Capability Frontier框架，通过Pareto前沿修正单模型单运行评估偏差，发现现有基准低估82%的模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准测试通常报告单个模型单次运行的准确率，这在异构数据分布下系统性地低估了LLM的真实能力，因为不同模型有不同专长，且多次生成可选择保留。现有方法存在单模型评价的低估和噪声样本取最大值的过高估计两种偏差，需要一种修正方法。
light_analysis.method: 定义Capability Frontier为模型集合上的Pareto前沿，通过最优选择（oracle）刻画每成本下的最佳性能。研究21个LLM在16个基准上（涵盖编码、推理、医学等任务），比较前沿性能与各基准最佳模型。同时使用概率模拟分析查询主题熵的影响。
light_analysis.result: 修正单模型评价使错误率降低54%；进一步修正单运行使错误率降低82%，且前沿方法以85%的成本匹配SOTA准确率。模拟显示查询主题熵增加时，前沿与最佳单模型的性能差距近单调增大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 集体LLM能力被严重低估，Capability Frontier提供了更准确的评估框架，对数据异构多领域场景下的评估与部署有重要意义。未来可扩展至更多模型和动态环境。

title: Identifying the Unknown: Prompt-Free Open Vocabulary Anomaly Recognition for Robot-Object Interaction
abstract: Robots operating in real-world environments must in general be able to recognize previously unseen objects. As robotic systems move toward open-world autonomy, there is a growing, yet largely unmet, need for open vocabulary object detectors that are prompt-free and efficient enough for continuous deployment. We present AnomNOVIC, a two-stage known-workspace framework that combines a masked autoencoder (MAE) trained for anomaly detection, with NOVIC, a powerful real-time prompt-free open vocabulary image classifier. The MAE produces generic object-agnostic bounding boxes, allowing NOVIC to classify salient image regions without requiring a predefined candidate class list. We evaluate AnomNOVIC against strong open vocabulary baselines in a tabletop robot-object environment featuring the NICOL humanoid robot, reaching 47.1% AP / 57.5% AP50 for prompt-free recognition, and 59.0% AP / 72.5% AP50 if class candidates are provided. Across additional datasets, including an in-the-wild test set with 48 unique objects, AnomNOVIC reaches up to 82.6% prompt-free detection and classification accuracy. These results significantly surpass all tested open vocabulary baselines, including YOLO-World-v2, OWLv2, and YOLOE.
comment: International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnomNOVIC，一种无提示开放词汇异常识别框架，用于机器人-物体交互中的未知物体识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人在开放世界中需识别未见物体，但现有开放词汇检测器依赖提示词且计算效率低，无法满足持续部署需求。该研究旨在实现无需预定义类别的实时物体识别，提升机器人自主性。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架：首先使用掩码自编码器（MAE）进行异常检测，生成与类别无关的边界框；然后结合NOVIC，一种实时无提示开放词汇图像分类器，对显著区域进行分类。无需候选类列表，支持开放词汇。
light_analysis.result: 在桌面机器人环境（NICOL人形机器人）中，无提示识别达到47.1% AP/57.5% AP50；若提供候选类则达59.0% AP/72.5% AP50。野外测试集（48个独特物体）上达82.6%无提示检测分类准确率，显著超越YOLO-World-v2、OWLv2、YOLOE等基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnomNOVIC解决了机器人开放世界物体识别的无提示和效率需求，学术上融合异常检测与开放词汇分类，实践中适用于持续部署。局限性在于基于已知工作空间假设，未来可扩展至动态环境。

title: Learning Adversarial Augmentation Policies for Robust Garlic Seedling Detection
abstract: Accurate seedling detection during early growth stages is essential for timely replanting and effective crop management in precision agriculture. However, existing studies are mostly evaluated under relatively stable imaging conditions, such as UAV imagery or greenhouse environments, leaving robust detection under severe and spatially heterogeneous illumination in ground-based outdoor monitoring insufficiently explored. In addition, many illumination-robust detection methods rely on additional enhancement or feature-extraction modules, which increase inference-time overhead and are not tailored to seedling detection and downstream missing seedling localization. To address these gaps, we construct a new garlic seedling dataset captured using a ground-based monitoring platform under real outdoor field conditions with highly variable illumination. We further propose an illumination-robust seedling detection framework based on adversarial augmentation policy learning. The proposed method jointly optimizes a stochastic augmentation policy agent and an object detector, enabling the detector to learn robust representations under challenging visual conditions. A structural penalty is introduced to prevent unrealistic distortions while encouraging challenging augmentations during training. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves an AP$_{50}$ of 91.6%, improving the baseline by 0.9 percentage points and outperforming the previous best-performing method by 0.2 percentage points. For downstream missing seedling localization, it achieves 75.0% precision and a 67.0% F1-score, improving the baseline by 4.8 and 2.0 percentage points, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for practical ground-based agricultural monitoring under complex outdoor lighting conditions without additional inference-time computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对抗性增强策略学习的鲁棒大蒜幼苗检测框架，应对地面监测中复杂光照变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有幼苗检测研究多在稳定成像条件下评估（如无人机或温室环境），缺乏对地面户外监测中严重且空间异质光照的鲁棒性探索。而光照鲁棒检测方法常依赖额外增强或特征提取模块，增加推理开销且未针对幼苗检测及下游缺苗定位优化。为此，作者构建了地面监测平台采集的真实户外田间多变光照大蒜幼苗数据集。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于对抗性增强策略学习的鲁棒检测框架，联合优化随机增强策略代理和目标检测器，使检测器学习挑战性视觉条件下的鲁棒表征。引入结构惩罚项防止不真实失真同时鼓励困难增强。使用新构建的数据集进行训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 所提方法在AP50上达到91.6%，比基线提升0.9个百分点，优于此前最佳方法0.2个百分点。在缺苗定位任务中，精确率75.0%、F1分数67.0%，分别比基线提升4.8和2.0个百分点。验证了框架在复杂户外光照下无需额外推理计算开销的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过对抗性增强策略学习实现了地面户外复杂光照下鲁棒的幼苗检测，无需额外推理模块。该工作对精准农业中的实际监测具有应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的增强策略或扩展至其他作物。

title: Quantization in Federated Learning: Methods, Challenges and Future Directions
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has become a foundational paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed intelligence, yet its scalability remains fundamentally constrained by communication bottlenecks, device heterogeneity, and the challenges of training under statistically non-IID data. Quantization is one of the most effective mechanisms for mitigating these limitations, reducing both uplink/downlink payloads and on-device computation. This paper provides the first FL-centric systematic review of quantization, introducing a novel taxonomy organized around FL-specific dimensions, including client heterogeneity, aggregation consistency, communication-scheduling adaptation, non-IID robustness, privacy/security integration, and hardware/energy co-optimization. Beyond cataloging existing methods, we analyze how quantization interacts with core FL behaviors such as client drift, partial participation, convergence stability, secure aggregation, and differential privacy. We further identify cross-method insights, open research gaps, and design guidelines for practitioners deploying quantized FL on mobile, IoT, and edge platforms. This survey thus establishes quantization not merely as a compression technique, but as a fundamental systems component shaping the performance, robustness, and practicality of modern FL.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统性地从联邦学习特有维度综述量化方法，将量化视为塑造FL性能、鲁棒性和实用性的系统组件。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在隐私保护分布式智能中至关重要，但通信瓶颈、设备异构和统计非IID数据严重制约其可扩展性。现有量化方法多从传统深度学习出发，缺乏针对FL场景（如客户端异构、聚合一致性、非IID鲁棒性等）的系统分析，导致实际部署中效率与效果难以兼顾。
light_analysis.method: 提出围绕FL特定维度的新分类法，包括客户端异构、聚合一致性、通信调度适应、非IID鲁棒性、隐私安全集成和硬件/能量协同优化。分析量化与核心FL行为（客户端漂移、部分参与、收敛稳定性、安全聚合、差分隐私）的交互机制，并总结跨方法洞察、开放研究缺口及部署指南。
light_analysis.result: 综述了现有量化方法在FL中的应用，识别出不同方法间的共同规律（如梯度压缩与隐私预算的权衡）和开放问题（如动态量化策略、异构设备协同）。提供设计准则，帮助实践者在移动、IoT和边缘平台上部署量化FL，显著提升通信计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述将量化从压缩技术提升为FL系统的基础组件，影响性能、鲁棒性和实用性。为未来研究方向提供指引，包括非IID数据下的自适应量化、量化与联邦蒸馏的融合以及硬件感知的协同优化。

title: FBK's Long-form SpeechLLMs for IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following
abstract: This paper describes our submission to the IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following shared task. SpeechLLMs are developed for both short-form and long-form speech instruction following under constrained settings. For the short track, strong performance is achieved on MCIF, with a SIFS score of 2.0708. For the long track, three speech segmentation methods are explored, and the HIFS score is introduced to account for unstable long-form generation. Experimental results show that fixed 30-second segmentation provides the most robust long-form performance, achieving the highest HIFS score of 2.0663. Further analysis shows that hallucination mainly manifests as repetitive insertions in generated outputs, substantially affecting ASR and SSUM, while short-form capabilities are largely retained after long-form extension.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpeechLLMs用于短和长形式语音指令跟随，通过固定30秒分割实现稳健长形式生成，并分析幻觉现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 长形式语音指令跟随面临生成不稳定的问题，现有方法在处理长语音时容易产生幻觉和重复插入，严重影响ASR和SSUM性能。短形式虽已取得较好效果，但直接扩展至长形式会引入大量错误。因此需要有效的语音分割策略和评估指标来改善长形式生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 开发SpeechLLMs，针对短形式直接进行指令跟随；针对长形式探索三种语音分割方法（包括固定30秒分割），并引入HIFS分数评估长形式生成质量。将分割后的语音片段输入模型，通过对比实验确定最优分割策略。
light_analysis.result: 短形式在MCIF上获得SIFS分数2.0708；长形式中固定30秒分割表现最佳，HIFS分数达2.0663。分析表明幻觉主要表现为重复插入，严重影响ASR和SSUM，但短形式能力在长形式扩展后基本保留。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作验证了固定30秒分割对长形式语音指令跟随的有效性，为后续研究提供了基线。重复插入幻觉问题仍需解决，未来可探索更优的分割或去重机制。学术上推进了长形式语音理解，实际应用可提升语音助手对长指令的响应能力。

title: Computational Analysis of Heart Rate Variability in Healthy Adults
abstract: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) analysis is a key indicator of cardiac physiological state and aids in disease diagnosis. However, research on HRV parameters in healthy individuals remains limited, and no gold standard exists. This study evaluates HRV indices in 40 healthy adults (20 men, 20 women, aged 30-50) to improve HRV's clinical utility. Using computational methods for signal processing and data analysis, time, frequency, and nonlinear indices were analyzed to address five questions: (1) normality, (2) stability, (3) correlation, (4) reproducibility, and (5) consistency. Key findings: (1) Time-domain and nonlinear indices, particularly global and LF (low frequency), follow normal distributions, with gender differences noted. (2) Most indices are stable except HF (high frequency)-related ones. (3) High correlations in HF-related indices suggest redundancy, indicating only one is necessary in studies. (4) Comparisons with the Fantasia database revealed less than 10% error for most indices, except SD2 and SDNN in women (greater than 15%). (5) Time-domain and nonlinear indices show low inter-study variability, while frequency-domain indices exhibit high variability, limiting cross-study comparisons. The selected indices-ApEn and IRRR (global variability), HRVi and SD2 (LF), and MADRR or rMSSD (HF)-are best suited for accurately representing HRV components and enhancing its clinical and research relevance.

light_analysis.overview: 评估40名健康成年人HRV指标，筛选出最佳代表全局、低频和高频成分的指标，提升HRV临床和研究价值。
light_analysis.motivation: HRV分析是心脏生理状态的关键指标，但健康个体HRV参数研究有限，缺乏金标准，限制了临床有效性。本研究旨在系统评估健康成年人HRV指标，明确其分布、稳定性、相关性、可重复性和一致性，筛选最合适指标以增强HRV的临床和研究应用。
light_analysis.method: 对40名健康成年人（20男，20女，30-50岁）进行信号处理和数据分析，分析时域（如SDNN、rMSSD）、频域（如LF、HF）和非线性指标（如ApEn）。通过评估正态性、稳定性、相关性、可重复性和一致性，并与Fantasia数据库比较，筛选出最佳代表全局（ApEn、IRRR）、低频（HRVi、SD2）和高频（MADRR或rMSSD）的指标。
light_analysis.result: 时域和非线性指标多服从正态分布，存在性别差异；多数指标稳定，但HF相关指标不稳定；HF指标高度相关，存在冗余；与Fantasia数据库比较，多数指标误差<10%，女性SD2和SDNN误差>15%；时域和非线性指标跨研究变异性低，频域指标变异性高。最终推荐ApEn、IRRR、HRVi、SD2、MADRR或rMSSD作为最佳代表。
light_analysis.conclusion: 筛选出的指标能准确代表HRV成分，提升临床和研究相关性。研究为健康成年人HRV提供了参考，但样本量较小，未来需扩大样本和人群验证。

title: Multi-modality Image Fusion under Adverse Weather: Mask-Guided Feature Restoration and Interaction
abstract: Multi-modality image fusion (MMIF) enhances scene representation by exploiting complementary cues from different modalities. Adverse weather, however, causes significant image degradation, disrupting feature representation and requiring simultaneous feature restoration and cross-modal complementarity. Existing methods often struggle with effective representation learning under such conditions, limiting their practical performance. To address these challenges, we propose a mask-guided MMIF method that integrates feature restoration and interaction. We first introduce "Pseudo Ground Truth" to simplify training, promoting faster and more effective feature learning. Then, we design a mask generation mechanism based on the mapping relationship between the fused result and the source images, quantifying the relative contribution of each modality during the fusion process. By incorporating the proposed mask-guided cross-modal cross-attention mechanism, the network is encouraged to selectively attend to informative features during modality interaction, mitigating the risk of overfitting to the static distribution of the "Pseudo Ground Truth". Additionally, we propose a mask-guided learning strategy and a task-coupled degradation-aware learning strategy to balance feature restoration and interaction. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art approaches in visual quality, quantitative metrics, and downstream tasks. The source code is available at https://github.com/ixilai/AMG-Fuse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出掩码引导的多模态图像融合方法，在恶劣天气下同时进行特征恢复和交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态图像融合在恶劣天气下图像退化严重，现有方法难以有效学习特征表示，无法同时实现特征恢复和跨模态互补，限制了实际性能。
light_analysis.method: 引入“伪真实标签”简化训练；设计掩码生成机制，基于融合结果与源图像的映射关系量化各模态贡献；提出掩码引导的跨模态交叉注意力机制，促使网络选择性关注信息特征；采用掩码引导学习策略和任务耦合退化感知学习策略平衡特征恢复与交互。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，视觉质量、定量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）和下游任务（如目标检测）性能均优于现有最先进方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效解决了恶劣天气下多模态图像融合中特征恢复与交互的挑战，提升了融合质量与下游任务性能，代码已开源。

title: KARLA: Knowledge-base Augmented Retrieval for Language Models
abstract: We propose a new method that allows an LLM to automatically pull in factual knowledge from a knowledge base during token generation. This means that (1)~factual knowledge in the LLM output can be updated without retraining the LLM, (2)~facts in the LLM output can be traced to the knowledge base for transparency and explainability, and (3)~smaller models can achieve the same factual accuracy as larger models. Our core idea is to train the model to produce special tokens that trigger a query to the knowledge base. Our experiments show that our method improves factual grounding in both short and long-form generation, and allows factual revisions to take effect through KB edits rather than parameter updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识库增强检索方法，使LLM在生成过程中自动拉取事实知识，实现知识更新、可追溯和模型轻量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM依赖参数更新获取新知识，成本高且无法追溯事实来源，大模型参数量巨大但事实准确性未显著提升。本研究旨在通过训练模型生成特殊触发token，自动查询知识库，从而在不重训模型的前提下更新事实知识，确保输出可解释，并让小型模型达到类似大模型的事实准确度。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为训练LLM产生特殊触发token，这些token在自回归生成时发起对知识库的查询，将检索到的知识融入当前上下文。关键创新在于将知识检索嵌入生成过程，无需修改模型参数即可更新事实。训练数据包含知识库中的事实三元组，模型学习何时生成触发token。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，在短文本和长文本生成任务中，该方法显著提升了事实基础性（factual grounding）。通过知识库编辑（如修改或添加事实）即可生效，无需参数更新。小型模型（如GPT-2）借助该方法能达到与大型模型（如GPT-3）相近的事实准确率，而参数量减少数十倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为LLM提供了动态知识注入机制，兼顾事实准确性、可更新性与解释性，同时降低了对模型规模的依赖。学术上拓展了检索增强生成（RAG）的范式，应用上便于知识密集型场景的部署。未来可探索多跳查询或跨知识库融合，进一步提升知识覆盖。

title: Memory Depth, Not Memory Access: Selective Parametric Consolidation for Long-Running Language Agents
abstract: Long-running language agents need more than memory access. Retrieval systems can fetch past facts at query time, but they do not decide which experiences should continue to shape behavior after the working context is unloaded. We study this separate problem as memory depth: durable goal-conditioned tendencies written into a small parametric store. We introduce the loop-drift protocol, a controlled stress test in which the retrieval index remains intact while working context is unloaded and goal-conditioned behavior must persist under long-loop interference. We evaluate EVAF, a surprise- and valence-gated LoRA consolidation mechanism. Across GPT-2 and TinyLlama, retrieval is strongest on shallow factual recall (short-fact accuracy 0.956--0.973), while EVAF is strongest on goal persistence and post-unload recovery (0.812--0.904) with only 2--3 parametric writes per 200 events. Mechanism controls show that selective consolidation factorizes into two controllable dimensions: selection and actuation. Matched random gates isolate selection beyond sparse writing; fixed-inner controls across GPT-2, TinyLlama, and Mistral-7B show that inner-loop write strength is model-dependent; and a Mistral-7B matched-gate inversion reveals asymmetric selection-actuation coupling under miscalibrated actuation. Public Memora event streams serve as an external diagnostic, exposing stale-memory invalidation as an unresolved boundary. Within this probe, selective parametric consolidation supplies memory depth distinct from and complementary to retrieval access.
comment: Main paper with supplementary material included as ancillary file

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性参数整合机制EVAF，实现长期运行智能体的持久目标导向行为，区别于检索访问的记忆深度。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期运行的智能体不仅需要记忆访问（检索），还需要决定哪些经历在卸载工作上下文后继续塑造行为。现有检索系统能获取事实，但缺乏选择性持久化能力，导致目标导向行为在长期循环干扰下难以维持。该研究将这一问题定义为记忆深度，即写入少量参数存储的持久目标条件倾向。
light_analysis.method: 引入循环漂移协议（loop-drift protocol），在保持检索索引完整的同时卸载工作上下文，测试目标持久性。提出EVAF机制，基于惊喜度和效价门控的LoRA整合，在GPT-2、TinyLlama等模型上实现选择性参数写入，每200事件仅2-3次写入。通过匹配随机门控和固定内循环控制，分离选择与驱动两个可控维度。
light_analysis.result: 检索在浅层事实回忆上最强（短事实准确率0.956-0.973），而EVAF在目标持久性和卸载后恢复上最强（0.812-0.904）。机制控制表明选择与驱动可分解，写入强度模型依赖，Mistral-7B匹配门控反转揭示非对称耦合。公共Memora事件流诊断暴露陈旧记忆失效问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 选择性参数整合提供了与检索访问互补的记忆深度，解决了长期智能体在上下文卸载后的目标持久性问题。研究揭示了选择与驱动的可分解性，但陈旧记忆失效仍是未解决的边界问题，未来需进一步探索动态记忆更新与失效管理。

title: From Vajrayana Tara to Bengali Baul: A Computational Study of Lexical Transmission Across Buddhist, Shakta, and Vaishnava Traditions in Bengal
abstract: We present a computational corpus study of vocabulary relationships across eight tradition layers of Bengali and Sanskrit devotional literature spanning the 8th to 19th centuries, encompassing Buddhist Vajrayana, Shakta Tantra, Vaishnava, and Baul traditions. Using a corpus of 75 texts and TF-IDF character n-gram vectorization with cosine similarity analysis, we address the historically argued but previously unquantified claim that Buddhist Vajrayana vocabulary survived the collapse of the Pala monasteries and was absorbed into the Shakta Tantra tradition of Bengal. The central finding is a specificity result: the Gitagovinda (Vaishnava Sanskrit, 12th century) has zero cosine similarity to Shakta Kali texts, while Bridge Tara texts (Buddhist-Shakta transitional, same century, same language) have cosine similarity 0.54 to Shakta Kali. This 8.5-fold contrast between two Sanskrit traditions from the same century demonstrates that the Buddhist-Shakta vocabulary overlap is not a generic property of Sanskrit devotional literature but is specific to the Buddhist-Shakta transmission chain. Three Brihannilatantra Tara texts show Shakta-to-Buddhist vocabulary ratios of 2.0 to 4.0, constituting measurable evidence of lexical transition within that chain. Ramprasad Sen's 18th-century Bengali Kali songs preserve Buddhist vocabulary residue including 56 occurrences of Tara alongside 103 occurrences of Kali. The Vaishnava Bengali tradition contributes a parallel chain to modern Baul vocabulary (similarity 0.29), slightly weaker than the Buddhist Sahajiya chain via Charyapada (0.31). These results provide the first quantitative multi-tradition corroboration of historically argued Buddhist-Shakta syncretism in Bengal.
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Code and corpus: https://github.com/joyboseroy/bengal-dharma-corpus Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/joyboseroy/bengal-dharma-corpus

light_analysis.overview: 通过计算语料库研究，首次量化证实了孟加拉地区佛教Vajrayana词汇向Shakta Tantra传统的传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 历史学者长期主张佛教Vajrayana词汇在帕拉寺院崩溃后幸存并被吸收进Shakta Tantra传统，但这一主张从未被量化验证。本研究旨在通过计算语料库方法提供客观的定量证据，解决这一长期存在的历史语言学争议。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含75篇文本的语料库，覆盖8至19世纪的八个传统层（佛教Vajrayana、Shakta Tantra、毗湿奴派、宝乌尔等）。采用TF-IDF字符n-gram向量化和余弦相似度分析，量化不同传统间的词汇重叠。关键分析包括比较Gitagovinda与Shakta Kali文本的相似度，以及桥梁文本的相似度。
light_analysis.result: Gitagovinda与Shakta Kali文本余弦相似度为0，而桥梁文本与Shakta Kali相似度为0.54，相差8.5倍。三部Brihannilatantra文本显示Shakta-to-Buddhist词汇比率为2.0-4.0。Ramprasad Sen的18世纪孟加拉语Kali歌曲包含56次Tara和103次Kali。毗湿奴派宝乌尔链相似度0.29，略低于佛教Sahajiya链的0.31。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次提供了多传统量化的证据，支持历史上主张的孟加拉佛教-性力派融合。方法可推广到其他跨传统词汇传播研究，但受限于语料库规模和文本选择。未来可扩展至更多文本和语言特征分析。

title: Reasoning Quality Emerges Early: Data Curation for Reasoning Models
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a small, high-quality set of long reasoning traces is an effective approach for eliciting strong reasoning capabilities in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing methods for curating high-quality SFT data rely heavily on strong reasoning models to filter examples based on diversity and difficulty, making the curation process costly while often yielding suboptimal data quality. In this work, we show that diverse and challenging reasoning examples can be identified using only the initial reasoning tokens. Specifically, we demonstrate that difficult problems can be reliably detected based on the loss of the first 100 reasoning tokens evaluated at a randomly perturbed checkpoint of the pretrained model. We further show that examples exhibiting similar loss patterns over their first 1k reasoning tokens across a small number of perturbed checkpoints extrapolating along the fine-tuning trajectory provably induce similar gradients. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on fine-tuning Qwen2.5-7B and Llama3.1-8B models on the M23K medical reasoning and OpenThoughts-Math datasets. Our method outperforms existing baselines by up to 1.7% while being 91% more token efficient.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种仅利用初始推理标记即可高效筛选高质量推理数据的方法，显著降低数据筛选成本并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督微调需要高质量的长推理轨迹数据，但现有的数据筛选方法依赖强推理模型，成本高且质量次优。本文旨在找到一种更高效、低成本的数据筛选方式，避免使用强模型而仅从初始推理标记中识别困难问题和多样化的示例。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法基于预训练模型随机扰动检查点上前100个推理标记的损失检测困难问题，并通过前1k标记的损失模式相似性（跨多个扰动检查点）识别引发相似梯度的示例。在Qwen2.5-7B和Llama3.1-8B模型上，使用M23K医学推理和OpenThoughts-Math数据集进行微调验证。
light_analysis.result: 在微调实验中，方法在性能上比现有基线最多提升1.7%，同时标记效率提高91%。具体地，通过仅使用初始推理标记，实现了低成本且高质量的数据筛选。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了推理质量在早期推理标记中就显现，并因此提出了高效数据筛选方法。该方法降低了数据依赖和成本，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的模型和任务，以及更细粒度的令牌选择策略。

title: NaviCache: Test-Time Self-Calibration Caching for Video Generation
abstract: Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) is constrained by immense computational costs. While offline calibration-based acceleration suffers from calibration data dependency, prohibitive calibration duration, and susceptibility to distribution shifts, offline calibration-free methods eliminate these hurdles. However, since they rely on instantaneous zero-order approximations where the mapping between input and output differences varies in real-time, they are susceptible to observational noise and ignore the intrinsic momentum within the diffusion trajectory. In this paper, we propose NaviCache, a plug-and-play test-time self-calibration method re-conceptualizing feature evolution as an Inertial Navigation System (INS) problem. NaviCache bridges the fundamental domain gap and the non-stationary nature of diffusion by modeling the relative coupling between input and output variations. We introduce a dual-state estimation architecture that adaptively tracks the feature change ratio and its latent drift, initialized via a specialized Initial Alignment phase. By integrating a time-dependent noise schedule with an uncertainty-aware Measurement Update mechanism, NaviCache provides a theoretically grounded mechanism for error-bounded computation skipping. Extensive experiments on the HunyuanVideo, Wan, and Open-Sora series demonstrate that NaviCache exhibits more accurate error judgment for computation skipping and achieves outstanding comprehensive performance.
comment: Published at ICML 2026: Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea. PMLR 306, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出NaviCache，一种测试时自校准缓存方法，将特征演化重构思为惯性导航系统问题，实现视频扩散模型的计算加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频扩散模型计算成本巨大。现有离线校准加速方法依赖校准数据、耗时且易受分布偏移影响；而离线无校准方法虽避免了这些问题，但依赖瞬时零阶近似，易受观测噪声影响，且忽视扩散轨迹的内在动量。因此需要更准确、鲁棒的加速方法。
light_analysis.method: NaviCache是即插即用的测试时自校准方法。将特征演化建模为惯性导航系统问题，通过双状态估计架构自适应跟踪特征变化比及其潜在漂移，并采用初始对齐阶段初始化。结合时间相关噪声调度和不确定性感知测量更新机制，为误差有界的计算跳过提供理论依据。
light_analysis.result: 在HunyuanVideo、Wan和Open-Sora系列上的大量实验表明，NaviCache在计算跳过时具有更准确的误差判断，并取得了出色的综合性能。摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: NaviCache通过创新的自校准机制解决了视频扩散模型加速中的关键挑战，具有理论依据和实际效果。未来可进一步优化或应用于其他生成任务。摘要未提及局限性。

title: ReasonCLIP-58M: Visually Grounded Commonsense Reasoning Supervision for CLIP
abstract: CLIP and its variants are widely adopted visual backbones in multimodal systems, but their pretraining remains dominated by descriptive image-text alignment. As downstream applications increasingly demand visually grounded commonsense inference and compositional reasoning, it remains unclear whether CLIP-style encoders can support such reasoning without architectural changes. To address this, we present ReasonCLIP-58M, a continual pretraining framework that integrates large-scale reasoning supervision into CLIP-style models through our two-stage strategy, which progressively integrates reasoning signals while preserving descriptive alignment, followed by category-structured reasoning supervision. To support this framework, we construct two complementary datasets and a benchmark: ReasonLite-42M, with open-form, visually verifiable reasoning captions; ReasonPro-16M, with category-specific reasoning supervision; and RCLIP-Bench for diagnostic evaluation of visually grounded reasoning. We train a family of ReasonCLIP that improves visually grounded commonsense and compositional reasoning while also enhancing zero-shot retrieval performance. As a drop-in visual encoder for multimodal large language models such as LLaVA-NeXT, ReasonCLIP delivers consistent gains without additional inference cost, demonstrating that structured reasoning supervision enhances the expressive capacity of CLIP-style visual representations. All datasets, models, and training code are available at https://github.com/RISys-Lab/ReasonCLIP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReasonCLIP-58M框架，通过大规模推理监督持续预训练CLIP，增强其视觉基础常识推理能力，无需改变架构。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP及其变体广泛用于多模态系统，但其预训练主要基于描述性图文对齐。下游应用日益需要视觉基础常识推理和组合推理能力，而现有CLIP风格编码器在不改变架构的情况下是否支持此类推理尚不清楚。因此，需要一种方法在保持描述性对齐的同时，向CLIP模型注入推理监督信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出ReasonCLIP-58M，采用两阶段持续预训练策略：第一阶段渐进整合推理信号并保留描述性对齐，第二阶段引入类别结构推理监督。为此构建了两个互补数据集：ReasonLite-42M（开放形式、视觉可验证的推理描述）和ReasonPro-16M（类别特定推理监督），以及用于诊断评估的基准RCLIP-Bench。
light_analysis.result: 训练得到的ReasonCLIP系列模型在视觉基础常识和组合推理任务上取得提升，同时增强了零样本检索性能。作为多模态大语言模型（如LLaVA-NeXT）的即插即用视觉编码器，无需额外推理成本即可带来一致性能增益。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReasonCLIP-58M证明了结构化推理监督可以增强CLIP风格视觉表示的表达能力。该工作提供了大规模数据集、基准和模型，有助于推动视觉基础常识推理研究。潜在局限性包括需要大量计算资源进行持续预训练，未来可探索更高效的推理监督整合方式。

title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Outcome-based reinforcement learning provides a stable optimization backbone for language agents, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards provide little guidance on which intermediate decisions should be reinforced or suppressed. On-policy self-distillation offers dense token-level supervision, yet existing skill-conditioned variants often rely on external skill memories or retrieved privileged context, which are costly to maintain and can be mismatched with the state distribution induced by the current policy in multi-turn interaction. We propose \textbf{OPID} (\textbf{O}n-\textbf{P}olicy Sk\textbf{i}ll \textbf{D}istillation), a framework that extracts skill supervision directly from completed on-policy trajectories. OPID represents trajectory hindsight as hierarchical skills: episode-level skills capture global workflows or failure-avoidance rules, while step-level skills capture local decision knowledge at critical timesteps. A critical-first routing mechanism uses step-level skills when critical decisions are identified and falls back to episode-level skills as default guidance otherwise. The selected skill is injected into the interaction history, allowing the old policy to re-score the same sampled response under both original and skill-augmented contexts. The resulting log-probability shift yields a token-level self-distillation advantage, which is combined with the outcome advantage for policy optimization. OPID thus preserves RL as the primary training objective while introducing dense, distribution-matched hindsight supervision. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop and Search-based QA demonstrate that OPID generally improves agent performance, sample efficiency, and robustness over outcome-only RL and existing skill-distillation baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/jinyangwu/OPID/tree/main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OPID框架，通过在线策略技能蒸馏为语言智能体提供密集的、分布匹配的 hindsight 监督，提升强化学习的效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于结果的强化学习为语言智能体提供了稳定的优化基础，但稀疏的轨迹级奖励难以指导中间决策的增强或抑制。现有在线策略自蒸馏方法依赖于外部技能记忆或检索到的特权上下文，维护成本高且可能与当前策略的状态分布不匹配，尤其在多轮交互中。因此需要一种无需外部存储、直接从在线轨迹中提取技能监督的方法。
light_analysis.method: OPID从完成的在线策略轨迹中提取层次化技能：片段级技能捕获全局工作流或失败规避规则，步骤级技能捕获关键时间步的局部决策知识。采用关键优先路由机制，在关键决策时使用步骤级技能，否则使用片段级技能。将所选技能注入交互历史，让旧策略在原始和技能增强上下文中重新评分相同响应，利用 log 概率偏移产生token级自蒸馏优势，与结果优势结合用于策略优化。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-based QA上的实验表明，OPID在智能体性能、样本效率和鲁棒性方面普遍优于纯结果强化学习和现有技能蒸馏基线。具体性能提升包括更高的任务完成率和更快的收敛速度，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPID通过在线策略技能蒸馏提供了密集、分布匹配的 hindsight 监督，在不依赖外部存储的情况下提升了强化学习的效果。其学术价值在于将技能蒸馏与强化学习紧密结合，实际应用价值在于提升语言智能体在复杂任务中的表现。潜在的局限性可能依赖于关键步骤的识别准确性和计算开销，未来可探索更自动化的关键步骤提取方法。

title: AIGP: An LLM-Based Framework for Long-Term Value Alignment in E-Commerce Pricing
abstract: Traditional dynamic pricing models in large-scale e-commerce suffer from limited interpretability, poor utilization of unstructured information, and misalignment with long-term business objectives such as cumulative Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), Return on Investment (ROI) and milestone achievement. We propose AIGP, a novel framework that leverages a Large Language Model (LLM) prompted with domain knowledge, structured data and textual context to make interpretable, knowledge-aware pricing decisions. For efficient deployment while maintaining high-quality outputs, we employ supervised fine-tuning for knowledge distillation. Central to AIGP is the Long-Term Value Estimator (LTVE), trained via offline reinforcement learning on historical data, which serves as a reward model to score candidate pricing actions and select preference pairs for Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), thereby aligning the pricing policy with long-term business objectives. Extensive offline evaluations and large-scale online A/B tests on Tao Factory demonstrate that AIGP achieves significant improvements: +13.21% in GMV, +7.59% in ROI, and +8.20% in milestone achievement rate over 14 days compared to the production baseline, while simultaneously providing interpretable and transparent pricing rationales.
comment: Accepted by KDD 2026 Applied Data Science Track (Oral presentation)

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIGP框架，利用LLM和长期价值估计器实现可解释、知识感知的定价决策，并与长期业务目标对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统动态定价模型在大规模电商中可解释性差，无法有效利用非结构化信息，且与累计GMV、ROI等长期业务目标不一致。现有方法局限于短期优化，缺乏对里程碑等长期目标的考虑。因此需要一种能融合领域知识、结构化数据和文本上下文，同时保证可解释性和长期对齐的定价方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出AIGP框架，核心包括使用领域知识、结构化数据和文本上下文提示的LLM进行知识蒸馏（监督微调），以及基于离线强化学习训练的长期价值估计器（LTVE）作为奖励模型，对候选定价动作评分，并选择偏好对用于直接偏好优化（DPO），使定价策略与长期业务目标对齐。框架在淘宝工厂部署，兼顾输出质量和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在淘宝工厂的离线评估和大型在线A/B测试中，AIGP相比生产基线在14天内实现了显著提升：GMV提高13.21%，ROI提高7.59%，里程碑达成率提高8.20%。同时提供可解释的定价理由。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIGP成功利用LLM和强化学习对齐长期价值，在电商定价中实现了可解释性和性能的双重提升。它展示了将领域知识与偏好优化结合的有效性，为电商定价提供新范式。未来可进一步优化知识蒸馏效率或扩展至更多业务场景。

title: Reproducibility Study of "AlphaEdit: Null-Space Constrained Knowledge Editing for Language Models"
abstract: Fang et al. (2025) introduced a null-space constrained projection, named AlphaEdit, for locate-then-edit knowledge editing methods, theoretically guaranteeing that edits do not disrupt previously preserved knowledge, and reports substantial gains over existing editing methods on LLaMA3, GPT2-XL, and GPT-J. In this work, we present a reproducibility study of AlphaEdit, reproducing its reported results under the original experimental setup and extending the evaluation along three axes: new model architectures, additional downstream benchmarks, and substantially longer sequential editing horizons. We successfully reproduce AlphaEdit's reported metrics across the original models, though we identify a discrepancy in the reported fluency and consistency metric. Extending AlphaEdit to newer model families, we find that its advantage does not generalize uniformly, which we trace to architectural assumptions in the locate-then-edit paradigm that are violated by these newer models. We further stress-test AlphaEdit's central sequential-editing claim by extending the number of edits well beyond those evaluated in the original paper, and find that performance, which is stable at the originally reported scale, degrades as edits reach a much higher count, indicating that the null-space projection's protection against catastrophic forgetting is bounded rather than unconditional. Finally, we extend evaluation of edited models on three extra benchmarks, namely, BoolQ, HellaSwag, and XSTest, and we find that large-scale sequential editing degrades both general downstream task competence and safety-relevant refusal behavior. Our results confirm that AlphaEdit performs as reported within its original scope, while showing that its core theoretical guarantees are sensitive to model architecture and editing scale in ways that have practical implications for its deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 对AlphaEdit知识编辑方法的重现性研究，验证其原有效果并发现其在模型架构和编辑规模上的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识编辑方法AlphaEdit声称通过零空间约束防止编辑时遗忘先前知识，但其泛化性和实际边界未被充分验证。本研究旨在复现原始结果，并扩展评估新架构、更长编辑序列和下游基准，以检验其理论保证的稳健性。
light_analysis.method: 对AlphaEdit进行复现，在原始实验设置下验证结果。扩展评估包括：新模型架构（如较新LLaMA系列）、更长的顺序编辑（超过原始论文的编辑次数）、以及三个额外下游基准（BoolQ、HellaSwag、XSTest）。关键思想是检验零空间投影对灾难性遗忘的保护是否有界。
light_analysis.result: 成功复现原始模型上的指标，但发现流利度和一致性指标存在差异。扩展至新模型家族时，优势未统一泛化，因新模型违反定位-编辑假设。延长编辑次数后，性能在原始规模稳定，但更高计数时下降，表明保护有界而非无条件。大规模顺序编辑降低下游任务能力和安全拒绝行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlphaEdit在原范围内表现如报告，但其核心理论保证对模型架构和编辑规模敏感，影响实际部署。未来需关注边界条件和架构适配。

title: Event-based Gaze Control System for Accurate Real-time Spin Estimation in Professional Ball Games
abstract: Spin plays a crucial role in many ball sports due to its effect on the trajectory of the ball.
