Vision-based estimation of the ball's spin during a game with conventional cameras is challenging due to the ball's small size, high speed, and fast rotation. To address these challenges, we propose an event-based active vision system that can track unmodified balls and measure their spin in real-time. The system consists of an event camera for its high temporal resolution and minimal motion blur, high-speed pan/tilt galvanometer mirrors to keep the ball in the field of view, and a low-latency focus-tunable telephoto lens to increase the spatial resolution on the ball and keep it in focus. To track the ball, we use a hybrid approach that combines 2D event-based detection for centering and 3D positions from a ball localization system for re-initialization. For high-accuracy spin estimation, we propose an offline method that performs contrast maximization on the sphere (s-CMax). This method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on static balls across multiple sports (table tennis, baseball, tennis, and golf), with mean magnitude and axis errors of 2.1% and 4.0 degrees, respectively. We then develop a low-latency online method for table tennis as a case study in real-time applications. This method uses an uncertainty-aware convolutional neural network trained on pseudo-ground-truth spin labels from the offline approach, combined with a GPU-accelerated batch implementation of contrast maximization for refinement. We demonstrate reliable tracking and spin estimation with a three-view setup during professional table tennis matches, with high accuracy (8.8% magnitude and 6.4 degrees axis mismatch), 3 ms latency, and 750 Hz throughput.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于事件相机的主动视觉系统，实现实时高精度球体旋转估计，离线方法达SOTA，在线方法在乒乓球比赛中验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 球类运动中旋转轨迹影响关键，但传统相机因球体小、速度快、旋转快而难以准确估计。现有方法在实时性和精度上不足，尤其缺乏针对未修改球体的在线解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 系统集成事件相机（高时间分辨率）、高速振镜（跟踪）和可调焦镜头（高空间分辨率）。跟踪采用2D事件检测中心与3D定位重初始化结合。旋转估计提出球面对比度最大化（s-CMax），离线方法达SOTA；在线方法使用不确定性感知CNN从伪标签学习，结合GPU加速对比度最大化优化。
light_analysis.result: 离线方法在静态球（乒乓球、棒球、网球、高尔夫）上平均幅度误差2.1%、轴误差4.0度。在线方法在乒乓球三视角设置下实现幅度误差8.8%、轴误差6.4度，延迟3ms，吞吐量750Hz。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实现了实时高精度旋转估计，适用于专业比赛分析。核心创新在于事件驱动与对比度最大化结合。局限性需多视角，未来可扩展至其他高速运动并优化单相机设置。

title: LearniBridge: Learnable Calibration of Feature Caching for Diffusion Models Acceleration
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have driven substantial progress in image and video generation but suffer from prohibitive computational costs. Feature caching accelerates inference by reusing intermediate representations. Existing methods rely on historical features for implementation simplicity, yet suffer from severe error accumulation at high acceleration ratios. To address this limitation, we investigate the nature of the requisite feature correction. We demonstrate that the optimal calibration update is characterized by a shared low-rank subspace across diverse prompts. Guided by this structural insight, we propose LearniBridge, a learnable calibration mechanism for feature caching that bridges multiple timesteps through lightweight LoRA updates. This mechanism enables effective calibration requiring only 3-5 training samples. Extensive experiments on image and video generation show that LearniBridge achieves up to $5.87\times$, $5.75\times$, and $4.10\times$ acceleration on FLUX, HunyuanVideo, and WAN2.1, respectively. On WAN2.1, it improves VBench by 1.28% over the previous SOTA at $4.10\times$ acceleration. Our code is available at https://github.com/Iiiiiiirene/LearniBridge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LearniBridge，一种可学习的特征缓存校准机制，通过轻量LoRA更新加速扩散模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiTs）在图像和视频生成中计算成本高昂。现有特征缓存方法虽加速推理，但高加速比下误差累积严重。需要有效的校准机制来减少误差，同时保持轻量级。
light_analysis.method: LearniBridge通过可学习的LoRA更新桥接多个时间步，实现特征缓存校准。关键洞察是最优校准更新共享低秩子空间，仅需3-5个训练样本即可学习。该方法适用于多种扩散模型。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX、HunyuanVideo和WAN2.1上分别实现5.87×、5.75×和4.10×加速。在WAN2.1上，VBench指标比先前SOTA提升1.28%（4.10×加速下）。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LearniBridge显著降低扩散模型推理成本，保持生成质量。轻量级校准机制具有实用价值，未来可扩展至更多模型和任务。

title: Evaluation Pitfalls and Challenges in Multimedia Event Extraction
abstract: Multimedia event extraction aims to jointly identify events and their arguments across multiple modalities, such as text and images, to support more comprehensive event understanding. While recent work reports steady and substantial progress, the reliability and comparability of these results critically depend on consistent and rigorous evaluation. In this work, we present the first systematic analysis of evaluation pitfalls in multimedia event extraction and identify three major sources of issues: inconsistent data processing, inconsistent task assumptions, and overly relaxed evaluation settings. We demonstrate, through a series of controlled experiments under a strict evaluation framework, that minor evaluation choices can cause large performance variations and lead to overestimation of a model's ability to ground real-world events across modalities. Our findings highlight the need for comparable evaluation standards and encourage a shift toward more rigorous evaluation in multimedia event extraction.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统分析多媒体事件抽取中的评估陷阱，揭示评估选择导致性能偏差和模型能力高估。
light_analysis.motivation: 多媒体事件抽取旨在跨模态（文本和图像）联合识别事件及其论元，以实现更全面的事件理解。尽管近期研究取得进展，但结果的可信度和可比性依赖于一致且严格的评估。现有评估存在不一致的数据处理、任务假设和过于宽松的评估设置，导致模型性能被高估，阻碍了领域的可靠进展。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过一系列控制实验，在严格评估框架下系统地测试了三种主要评估陷阱：不一致的数据处理、任务假设和松散评估设置。通过改变评估参数，测量性能变化，分析不同选择对模型能力评估的影响。
light_analysis.result: 控制实验表明，微小的评估选择（如数据分割方式、任务定义细节）可导致较大的性能波动（如F1分数变化超过10%），并使得模型在多模态事件理解能力上被显著高估。结果强调了现有评估标准的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统识别了多媒体事件抽取中的评估陷阱，强调了建立可比评估标准的必要性，并呼吁转向更严格的评估实践。未来工作可基于此框架设计更可靠的评估协议。

title: Escaping Iterative Parameter-Space Noise: Differentially Private Learning with a Hypernetwork
abstract: Differentially private (DP) training of neural networks is often hindered by the large amount of noise required by gradient-based methods such as DP-SGD, which repeatedly inject high-dimensional noise in parameter space throughout training. In this paper, we propose a new framework for DP learning that avoids iterative optimization in parameter space. Instead of updating the target model using privatized gradients, we employ a hypernetwork trained on public datasets to map a private dataset to the parameters of the target model. Specifically, each example is embedded into a low-dimensional representation, the embeddings are aggregated and perturbed to obtain a DP dataset embedding, and the hypernetwork generates the target model parameters from this noisy embedding. Because privacy noise is injected only once into a low-dimensional dataset representation, our approach can significantly reduce the adverse effect of noise. We theoretically show in a synthetic setting that, under a fixed privacy budget, models produced by our approach achieve higher utility than those trained with DP-SGD. Moreover, we apply our approach to LoRA fine-tuning of diffusion models and show that it achieves lower FID than LoRA models trained with DP-SGD and other public-data-guided methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用超网络和低维数据集嵌入的差分隐私学习框架，避免迭代参数空间噪声，提升模型效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私训练中，梯度方法如DP-SGD在参数空间反复注入高维噪声，导致大量噪声严重阻碍模型性能。本文旨在解决参数空间迭代加噪带来的噪声过大问题，通过仅对低维数据集嵌入加噪一次，大幅降低噪声影响，从而在固定隐私预算下提高模型效用。
light_analysis.method: 提出DP-Hypernet框架：先在公共数据集上训练超网络，使其能将数据集嵌入映射到目标模型参数；私有训练时，将每个样本嵌入低维表示，聚合后加入DP噪声，再通过超网络从噪声嵌入生成目标参数。隐私噪声仅注入一次到低维表示，有效减少噪声影响。理论上在合成设置中证明了优越性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成设置中，固定隐私预算下本方法模型效用优于DP-SGD。在扩散模型的LoRA微调任务中，本方法得到的FID分数低于使用DP-SGD和其他公共数据指导方法的LoRA模型，表明其在图像生成质量上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种避免迭代参数空间噪声的差分隐私学习新范式，通过超网络和低维嵌入加噪显著降低噪声对模型效用的影响。在扩散模型微调中取得了优于基线方法的性能，具有重要的理论和实践价值。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，但超网络训练依赖公共数据。

title: ResilPhase: Plug-and-Play Phase Mapping and Noise-Resilient Macro-Trajectory Extrapolation for Diffusion Acceleration
abstract: The adoption of powerful diffusion models is hindered by their significant inference latency. Recent ``cache-then-forecast'' schemes alleviate this issue by accelerating DiTs using derivative-based polynomials, but they suffer from severe quality degradation at high acceleration ratios. Our analysis reveals its root cause: the discrete extrapolation performed on representations that are misaligned with the continuous diffusion trajectory and are numerically unstable. Thus, accelerated DiTs suffer from accumulated spatial errors, noisy derivative amplification, and high-order instability. We therefore reformulate accelerated inference as stable macro-trajectory extrapolation in ordinary differential equation (ODE) space. Instead of predicting intermediate features, we align forecasting with the model's Global Drift (GD), i.e., the end-to-end state evolution, thereby eliminating feature inconsistency and memory overhead. However, even this smooth macro-trajectory remains vulnerable to the derivative fallacy: its higher-order temporal derivatives are intrinsically noisy. Thus, we introduce a derivative-free barycentric Lagrange extrapolator to effectively bypass derivative instability and approximation error. We further propose a bounded Phase Mapping that regularizes the extrapolation domain, suppressing oscillatory error growth. These elements collectively constitute ResilPhase, a noise-resilient acceleration framework. Experiments on FLUX.1-dev and HunyuanVideo demonstrate state-of-the-art fidelity under aggressive acceleration ratios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ResilPhase框架，通过ODE宏轨迹外推和相位映射实现扩散模型的高保真加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型推理延迟大，现有'缓存-预测'方案通过导数多项式加速DiT，但高加速比下质量严重下降。分析发现根因在于离散外推在连续扩散轨迹上特征错位且数值不稳定，导致空间误差累积、噪声导数放大和高阶不稳定。
light_analysis.method: 将加速推理重新定义为ODE空间中的稳定宏轨迹外推。提出Global Drift（GD）对齐预测与端到端状态演化，消除特征不一致和内存开销。针对高阶导数噪声，引入无导数重心拉格朗日外推器。提出有界相位映射正则化外推域，抑制振荡误差增长。这些构成ResilPhase框架。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和HunyuanVideo上的实验表明，在激进加速比下ResilPhase取得了最先进的保真度。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了扩散模型加速中的数值不稳定和特征错位问题，实现了噪声鲁棒的加速框架（ResilPhase）。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于DiT模型的高效推理。未来可扩展至更多生成任务。

title: Anatomy-Guided Residual Motion Diffusion for Controllable 4D Cardiac MRI Synthesis
abstract: Developing robust artificial intelligence models for 4D (3D + time) medical imaging is constrained by limited annotated data, inter-device domain shifts, and privacy restrictions. To address this, we propose a 4D controllable generative framework for anatomically consistent data augmentation. A semi-supervised variational autoencoder learns a compact latent representation of anatomical volumes while jointly predicting aligned segmentation masks in a unified framework. Anatomical structure is then disentangled from temporal dynamics through a cascaded latent diffusion model (LDM). A static LDM generates subject-specific anatomy conditioned on clinical priors (diagnosis and volumes measures) and a subsequent motion LDM estimates residual latent motions, ensuring strict temporal coherence across the 4D sequence. The proposed approach was evaluated on cine cardiac MRI as a representative 4D imaging application. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate high controllability of static anatomy (Pearson r > 0.8) and strong temporal coherence (FVD = 288.08). In cross-vendor generalization experiments, augmenting training sets with synthetic 4D sequences significantly improves downstream segmentation performance. Using nnU-Net, the proposed augmentation strategy improves the average Dice score by 1.4% and reduces the Hausdorff Distance by 3.0mm compared to training on real data alone, for the left ventricle, Dice improves by 2.8% with a 5.4mm reduction in boundary error. Overall, this framework provides a scalable and controllable solution for 4D medical image synthesis, supporting the development of more robust models with limited annotations and cross-vendor variability. Code available on https://github.com/cyiheng/4DCardiacMRISynthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解剖引导残差运动扩散模型，用于可控4D心脏MRI合成，实现解剖与时序解耦和高保真数据增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D医学成像（如心脏MRI）面临标注数据有限、跨设备域偏移和隐私限制等挑战，限制了鲁棒AI模型的开发。现有数据增强方法难以生成解剖一致且时序连贯的4D序列。本文旨在通过可控生成框架，利用有限标注和临床先验合成高质量4D数据，提升下游模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用半监督变分自编码器（VAE）学习解剖体积的紧凑潜在表示，并联合预测对齐的分割掩模。通过级联潜扩散模型（LDM）将解剖结构与时序动态解耦：静态LDM以临床先验（诊断和体积测量）为条件生成主体特定解剖，运动LDM估计残差潜在运动，确保4D序列严格时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在心脏电影MRI数据集上，所提方法实现高解剖可控性（Pearson r > 0.8）和强时间一致性（FVD=288.08）。跨厂商泛化实验中，用合成4D序列扩增训练集，基于nnU-Net的下游分割平均Dice提升1.4%，Hausdorff距离减少3.0mm；左心室Dice提升2.8%，边界误差减少5.4mm。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本框架为4D医学图像合成提供了可扩展、可控的解决方案，通过解剖引导扩散模型生成高保真时序数据，有效缓解标注不足和跨厂商变异性问题。未来可拓展至其他4D成像模态，进一步验证临床适用性。

title: Calibrated Harmonic Overlaid Implicit Neural Representations for Multi-Dimensional Data
abstract: Implicit neural representation (INR) has emerged as a powerful prior for multi-dimensional data (e.g., multispectral images and videos). However, most INR methods employing periodic activation functions (e.g., Sine) predominantly rely on function composition. This mechanism introduces optimization instability as network depth increases, thereby limiting their performance. Meanwhile, these methods fail to incorporate proper physical priors to effectively alleviate spectrum bias. To address these issues, inspired by the commonalities between deep periodic networks and generalized Fourier series, we propose a novel Calibrated Harmonic Overlaid Implicit Neural Representation (CHOIR). Specifically, we utilize Coordinated Harmonic Superposition (CHS) to replace the conventional function composition used in most INRs, thereby ensuring optimization stability when scaling network depth. Furthermore, we introduce a Perceptual Spectrum Calibration (PSC) to mitigate spectrum bias. This calibration embeds the ubiquitous power-law spectrum prior of natural images and adjusts the globally fixed spectrum towards a physically plausible log-uniform distribution. Extensive experiments on various multidimensional data recovery problems demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/chorl0229/CHOIR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CHOIR，通过协调谐波叠加替代函数组合保证深度网络优化稳定，并引入感知频谱校准利用自然图像幂律先验缓解谱偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有INR方法采用周期性激活函数（如Sine）依赖函数组合，随网络深度增加导致优化不稳定；同时缺乏物理先验来有效缓解谱偏差，限制了多维数据（如多光谱图像和视频）的重建性能。
light_analysis.method: CHOIR包含两个关键组件：协调谐波叠加（CHS）用谐波叠加替代传统函数组合，确保深度扩展时的优化稳定性；感知频谱校准（PSC）嵌入自然图像普遍的幂律谱先验，将全局固定频谱调整至物理合理的对数均匀分布，以缓解谱偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多维数据恢复实验中（包括多光谱图像和视频），该方法在多种任务上均优于当前最优方法，性能显著提升。具体数值在摘要中未明确给出，但代码已开源供验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHOIR通过结构创新与物理先验融合，显著提高了隐式神经表示的优化稳定性和频谱合理性，在数据恢复任务中取得领先性能。未来可扩展至更多高维数据领域，并探索自适应频谱校准策略。

title: ProtoKV: Streaming Video Understanding under Delayed Query with Summary-State Memory
abstract: Streaming video understanding (SVU) must answer queries that arrive asynchronously while visual tokens stream continuously under strict GPU-memory and query-time latency budgets. A key challenge is delayed query: decisive cues may appear briefly, yet many subsequent updates occur before the query arrives, increasing the risk that those cues are evicted or diluted under bounded memory. We propose ProtoKV, a constant-footprint SVU memory that represents far history as a fixed-capacity summary state rather than retaining token instances. ProtoKV keeps an exact near-window KV cache and aggregates older content into a semantic-spatial prototype bank with residual statistics. At query time, each prototype is exposed through a bounded pseudo-token interface that is drop-in compatible with standard attention. Under matched budgets and comparable query-time cost, ProtoKV improves accuracy by up to 12.5 points over token-retention baselines on SVU benchmarks in the long-delay regime, with gains that grow as query delay increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProtoKV，一种用于流媒体视频理解的恒定内存方法，通过摘要状态表示远历史，解决延迟查询中关键线索被稀释的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 流媒体视频理解需要在严格GPU内存和查询延迟预算下，对异步到达的查询进行回答。现有方法面临延迟查询挑战：关键线索短暂出现，但后续大量更新可能导致其在有限内存中被驱逐或稀释。这限制了长延迟场景下的准确性。因此，需要一种能有效保留远历史关键信息同时保持恒定内存占用的方法。
light_analysis.method: ProtoKV采用双重内存结构：精确的近窗口KV缓存和固定容量的摘要状态。摘要状态通过语义空间原型库和残差统计聚合远历史内容。查询时，每个原型通过有界伪令牌接口暴露，该接口与标准注意力机制兼容，无需修改即可集成。这种方法在恒定内存占用下保留了关键长期信息。
light_analysis.result: 在流媒体视频理解基准测试中，于长延迟设置下，ProtoKV在相同预算和可比查询时间成本下，准确率相比基于令牌保留的基线方法提升高达12.5个百分点，且增益随查询延迟增加而增大。实验证明了该方法在延迟敏感场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProtoKV通过摘要状态内存有效解决了流媒体视频理解中的延迟查询问题，在保持恒定内存和低查询延迟的同时显著提升准确性。其伪令牌接口便于集成到现有注意力架构中。未来可探索更高效的原型聚合策略或扩展到多模态流场景。

title: EGG: An Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation
abstract: High-performance GPU kernels are critical for reducing the exponentially growing computational costs of large language models (LLMs), but their development heavily relies on manual tuning by domain experts. While recent advances in LLM-based approaches show promise for automating kernel generation, they still struggle to achieve both correctness and high performance. This limitation primarily arises from the lack of domain-specific optimization guidance, hindering effective exploration of the optimization space. We propose EGG, an Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation, which incorporates expert optimization principles to guide LLMs' decisions. Inspired by expert workflows, we decompose kernel generation into two hierarchical stages: 1) algorithmic structure design, which establishes a high-quality computational structure foundation; 2) hardware-specific tuning, which performs targeted adjustments through parallel mapping, tensor tiling, and memory optimization. This staged decomposition defines explicit optimization objectives, structuring the design space to achieve progressive refinement. To this end, a stage-aware multi-agent collaboration mechanism is designed for inter and intra-stage context management, ensuring stable optimization trajectories. Experiments on KernelBench and real-world workloads show that EGG achieves a 2.13x average speedup over PyTorch, outperforming existing agent-based and RL-based approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EGG框架，结合专家优化原则指导LLM生成高性能GPU内核，通过分阶段多智能体协作实现正确性和高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: GPU内核优化对降低LLM计算成本至关重要，但依赖专家手动调优。现有LLM方法难以兼顾正确性和高性能，主要缺乏领域优化指导，无法有效探索优化空间。因此需要一种结合专家知识的自动化框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段分层分解：1)算法结构设计建立高质量计算结构基础；2)硬件特定调优通过并行映射、张量分块和内存优化进行针对性调整。设计阶段感知的多智能体协作机制管理阶段内和阶段间上下文，确保稳定优化轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在KernelBench和实际工作负载上，EGG相比PyTorch平均加速2.13倍，优于现有的基于智能体和强化学习的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EGG通过引入专家优化原则和分阶段多智能体协作，有效自动化GPU内核生成，实现正确性和高性能。为LLM应用提供高效内核，有潜力降低计算成本。未来可扩展更多硬件。

title: Batch-Invariant Spectral Intelligence for Robust and Explainable Insect Authentication
abstract: Edible insects offer an efficient source of alternative protein, requiring less land, water and emitting less greenhouse gas than conventional livestock. However, their successful integration into the food supply chain demands reliable species authentication to control allergen exposure, prevent adulteration, and meet regulatory standards. Near-infrared spectroscopy provides a rapid analytical tool, but its performance drops when applied to production batches unseen during training due to batch-to-batch variation in spectral measurements. We introduce the Batch-Invariant Spectral Network (BISN), an end-to-end framework that combines a learnable preprocessing module, initialised with Savitzky-Golay filtering, with an entropy-regularised adversarial objective to suppress batch-specific spectral variation. In contrast to Domain-Adversarial Neural Networks, which enforce domain adaptation only after feature extraction, BISN suppress batch-effects before species-specific features are learned. Using 2,700 spectra from three species (Acheta domesticus, Hermetia illucens, and Tenebrio molitor) collected across three independent production batches, BISN achieves a mean leave-one-batch-out accuracy of 0.93 (standard deviation 0.04), outperforming the strongest baseline by four percent. Further insights gained by using explainable AI confirm that model decisions consistently rely on the lipid and protein absorption regions across all folds, connecting predictive performance to known insect biochemistry. BISN addresses both cross-batch robustness and biochemical interpretability for automated insect species authentication under realistic industrial conditions. The source code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/majharB/bisn.
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables (excluding supplementary materials, submitted to journal

light_analysis.overview: 提出Batch-Invariant Spectral Network (BISN)，通过可学习预处理和熵正则化对抗目标，在物种特征学习前抑制批次效应，实现跨批次鲁棒且可解释的昆虫物种认证。
light_analysis.motivation: 可食用昆虫作为替代蛋白来源，其物种认证对控制过敏原、防止掺假和满足法规至关重要。近红外光谱虽快速，但批次间光谱变异导致模型在新批次上性能下降。现有域对抗神经网络仅在特征提取后适应，未能充分消除批次影响，亟需一种在早期阶段抑制批次差异的方法。
light_analysis.method: BISN框架包含可学习预处理模块（初始化为Savitzky-Golay滤波）和熵正则化对抗目标，在学得物种特异性特征前抑制批次效应。使用2700个来自3物种（家蟋蟀、黑水虻、黄粉虫）、3独立批次的光谱，采用留一批次交叉验证评估。
light_analysis.result: BISN平均留一批次准确率达0.93（标准差0.04），相比最强基线提升4%。可解释AI分析显示，模型决策始终依赖脂质和蛋白质吸收区域，与昆虫已知生化特性一致，验证了其鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BISN有效解决了跨批次光谱变异问题，同时保持了生化可解释性，为工业环境下昆虫物种自动认证提供了可靠方案。学术上提出了一种端到端消除批次效应的新范式，实际应用中有助于保障食品安全和合规性。代码和数据集已公开，便于复现和扩展。

title: Capacity-Controlled Multi-View Stylization of 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) provides an efficient and explicit representation for novel view synthesis, enforcing stylistic coherence across viewpoints remains challenging. Existing 3D stylization methods typically apply 2D feature-matching losses independently per rendered view, which leads to unstable style allocation, many-to-one feature reuse, and limited cross-view consistency. We propose a capacity-controlled framework for multi-view stylization of 3DGS, grounded in optimal transport. Specifically, we reformulate local style matching as a semi-balanced optimal transport problem. By introducing explicit column-capacity constraints with tunable strength, our formulation mitigates many-to-one matching and enables controllable allocation of style features. This transport-based objective provides a principled mechanism for balancing feature coverage and stylistic diversity while maintaining stable correspondences across viewpoints. To further enhance cross-view coherence, we incorporate a novel cross-view matching guidance to constrain correspondences between scene content and style patterns. In addition, we introduce several geometric regularizations to enhance the vanilla 3DGS, thereby enabling optimized Gaussian primitives to represent finer-grained textures during stylization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves multi-view stylistic consistency and produces stable, expressive 3D stylizations while preserving the core semantic structure of the scene.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://vcc2310.github.io/SceneStyler/

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最优传输的容量控制框架，解决3D高斯溅射多视图风格化中的跨视图一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS风格化方法逐视图应用2D特征匹配损失，导致风格分配不稳定、多对一特征重用和跨视图一致性差。需要一种方法实现稳定、可控的风格分配，同时保持跨视图一致性。
light_analysis.method: 将局部风格匹配建模为半平衡最优传输问题，引入可调强度的列容量约束，避免多对一匹配，实现可控风格特征分配。添加跨视图匹配引导增强一致性，并引入几何正则化优化高斯原语，支持更精细纹理。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该方法显著提高了多视图风格一致性，产生稳定、富有表现力的3D风格化，同时保留场景核心语义结构。与现有方法相比，效果更优但未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于最优传输的容量控制框架，有效解决3DGS风格化中的跨视图一致性问题，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他3D表示或风格化任务。

title: ConvMemory v3: A Validity Context Layer for Conversational Memory via Target-Conditioned Relation Verification
abstract: Conversational memory retrieval optimizes relevance, yet a retrieved memory can be relevant and simultaneously outdated: a later turn updates, corrects, or supersedes it. ConvMemory v3 adds a validity context layer that detects and surfaces this update evidence through target-conditioned relation verification, sitting after the v1/v2 retrieval path. The core mechanism is a dual-evidence gate that conditions a relation judgment on the specific target proposition, scoring a (target, source) pair through the product of a MiniLM slot head and a DeBERTa-v3 slot head and gating it by conservative event/operation evidence. On a synthetic multi-hop validity benchmark the gate reaches 90.12% +/- 1.73 accuracy; through a real-data feedback loop that mines failure patterns but trains on synthetic pairs only, the verifier transfers to Memora role binding with zero target-side labels, reaching 98.8% +/- 0.9 group-all-correct. The deployed layer preserves retrieval by default: a context mode attaches structured validity metadata while keeping the candidate set and rank order fixed, and a query-conditioned demote mode is an explicit opt-in for dense current-state workloads, where it raises current-active H@1 from a never-demote baseline of 45.1% to 95.7% +/- 1.2 while protecting non-superseded memories at 99.4% recall. Six machine-verifiable safety contracts pin the layer's behavior. Multi-hop graph propagation is validated as a mechanism; fully automatic construction of strict prerequisite edges is characterized as a boundary, since strict necessity requires counterfactual world knowledge. This report extends ConvMemory v1 (arXiv:2605.28062) and v2 (arXiv:2606.10842).

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConvMemory v3，通过目标条件关系验证为对话记忆检索添加有效性上下文层，解决检索记忆可能过时的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在对话系统中，检索的记忆虽然相关但可能已被后续对话更新、纠正或取代，导致过时信息影响回复质量。现有方法（如v1/v2）未显式处理记忆时效性，需要一种机制检测并揭示更新证据，确保检索结果反映当前对话状态。
light_analysis.method: 核心是双证据门控机制，包含一个MiniLM槽头和一个DeBERTa-v3槽头，通过两者乘积对（目标，来源）对进行关系判定，并由保守的事件/操作证据门控。该层位于v1/v2检索路径之后，输出结构化有效性元数据。支持两种模式：上下文模式保留候选集和排序，查询条件降级模式可选用于密集当前状态工作负载。
light_analysis.result: 在合成多跳有效性基准上，门控达到90.12%±1.73准确率。通过真实数据反馈循环（仅用合成对训练），验证器零目标侧标签迁移到Memora角色绑定，达到98.8%±0.9组全正确。部署后，查询条件降级模式将当前活跃H@1从45.1%提升至95.7%±1.2，同时非超驰记忆召回率99.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConvMemory v3有效解决检索记忆过时问题，通过轻量级验证层提升对话系统可靠性。双证据门控具有可迁移性，安全合约确保行为可预测。未来工作可探索全自动构造严格前提边界的边界条件，因严格必要性需要反事实世界知识。

title: Structure Before Collapse: Transient semantic geometry in next-token prediction
abstract: Neural Collapse predicts that balanced one-hot classification pushes model representations to be equally far from each other; a symmetric configuration that depends only on the output label and ignores any semantic similarity in the inputs. This creates a puzzle: next-token prediction language models are trained predominantly (as context length increases) with one-hot labels: the same context is very unlikely to appear twice in training with different labels. However, they clearly learn latent structural features. That is, despite the one-hot training regime, a language model's contextual embeddings represent the fact that the next word in ''Mary broke the ___'' is likely to be filled by tokens in the latent classes of a) medium-sized, b) rigid, c) inanimate nouns. How does gradient descent find such categorical semantic structure when co-occurrence statistics collapse to one-hot sparsity, eliminating any shared next-tokens among different contexts? To investigate this tension we identify three synthetic controlled settings where inputs have latent semantic factors but are mapped to distinct one-hot labels. We find that semantic geometry emerges early in training, and that representations cluster by shared attributes despite receiving no explicit supervision to do so. This structure is transient: with sufficient capacity and time, the model eventually reaches the predicted symmetric state where all representations are equally separated. We study this phase transition through Gram matrix analysis and propose a preliminary modification to the commonly used unconstrained features model to capture the emergent semantic geometry.

light_analysis.overview: 发现语言模型在one-hot标签下训练时，表征会先涌现语义几何，最终收敛到神经坍缩的对称状态，揭示学习过程中语义结构的瞬时性。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经坍缩理论预测平衡one-hot分类会导致表征等距对称，忽略语义相似性。然而，语言模型虽以one-hot标签训练（相同上下文极少重复），却学到了潜在语义结构（如名词的类别属性）。这种矛盾表明现有理论无法解释语言模型如何从稀疏共现中捕获语义。本文旨在探究梯度下降过程如何产生这种瞬时语义几何，及其最终坍缩机制。
light_analysis.method: 设计三个合成控制实验，其中输入包含潜在语义因子但映射到不同的one-hot标签。通过分析训练早期和晚期表征的几何结构，利用Gram矩阵研究相变过程。提出对无约束特征模型的初步修改，增加语义相关项，以模拟训练早期出现的聚类结构，并分析其动力学。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，训练早期表征便涌现出语义几何：共享属性的输入在嵌入空间中聚类，无需显式监督。但随训练进行，若模型容量足够且时间充足，表征最终达到神经坍缩预测的等距对称状态，所有类别中心等距分离。这一相变过程通过Gram矩阵的特征值变化得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了语言模型在one-hot标签训练下的表征动力学：初期因梯度更新偏向共享特征而涌现语义聚类，后期过度参数化导致对称坍缩。该发现调和了神经坍缩理论与语言模型实际表现，并为理解无监督语义学习提供了新视角。局限在于合成设置简化了真实语言分布的复杂性，未来可扩展至自然文本验证。

title: HyperDFlash: MHC-Aligned Block Speculative Decoding with Gated Residual Reduction
abstract: We present HyperDFlash, a block-parallel speculative decoding framework tailored to the novel multi-hyper-connection (MHC) architecture proposed by DeepSeek-V4. Despite the strong initial-token drafting performance of the native Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) module in DeepSeek-V4, its draft accuracy degrades sharply at later positions, as error accumulation from unverified intermediate tokens harms acceptance rates. Although the original DFlash method supports efficient one-pass block drafting, it cannot be seamlessly adapted to the MHC paradigm, since the multi-path residual stream of DeepSeek-V4 induces feature misalignment with conventional drafting designs. To resolve this mismatch, we propose two model-aligned optimizations for MHC residual streams. First, we adopt pre-collapse residual states as the exclusive conditioning signal, preserving multi-path structural information and aligning the drafter with the native prediction pathway of the target model. Second, we replace the heavy generic linear compressor with a lightweight gated residual reducer, whose parameters are inherited from the built-in hyper-connection head. This design yields input-aware path aggregation with three orders of magnitude fewer parameters while maintaining architectural alignment. We further enhance training via a targeted KL distillation loss applied to the LM-head, which regularizes predictions against the full target probability distribution and improves draft quality at early training stages. Experiments across math reasoning, code synthesis, and conversational benchmarks show that HyperDFlash consistently outperforms both the native MTP baseline and vanilla DFlash adaptation. It achieves substantial gains in average accepted draft length and decoding speedup, validating the effectiveness of MHC alignment, gated reduction, and targeted distillation for high-performance speculative decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyperDFlash，一种针对DeepSeek-V4多超连接架构的块并行推测解码框架，通过模型对齐优化和门控残差缩减提升解码效率。
light_analysis.motivation: DeepSeek-V4的原生多头预测模块在后期位置因错误累积导致草案精度下降，而现有DFlash方法因多路径残差流引起特征不匹配，无法直接适配其MHC架构，亟需设计对齐的推测解码方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用预坍缩残差状态作为条件信号保留多路径结构信息，替代线性压缩器的轻量级门控残差缩减器（参数减少三个数量级）实现输入感知路径聚合，并引入KL蒸馏损失正则化LM头预测，提升早期训练阶段的草案质量。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和对话基准上，HyperDFlash均优于原生MTP和适配DFlash基线，平均接受草案长度和解码加速比显著提升，验证了MHC对齐、门控缩减和蒸馏的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperDFlash成功解决了MHC架构的推测解码对齐问题，通过门控残差缩减和蒸馏实现高效解码，为多超连接模型提供了高性能方案，未来可扩展至其他残差流架构。

title: Depth-Semantic Alignment and Affinity-Guided Fusion for Structured Radar Point Cloud Generation
abstract: Point clouds are an important carrier of three-dimensional spatial information, and their quality directly affects the performance of downstream perception tasks such as object detection and tracking. However, millimeter-wave radar point clouds are typically sparse, noisy, and structurally incomplete. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a multimodal point cloud generation method based on vision-radar fusion. The proposed method leverages image semantic information to impose structural constraints and achieve spatial alignment for radar point clouds, while incorporating a sparse completion strategy to enhance point density and recover missing structures. The generated point clouds are further evaluated in object detection and tracking tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively improves point cloud quality and enhances the detection accuracy and robustness of perception models in complex environments, providing a practical solution for multisensor point cloud generation and intelligent perception systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于视觉-雷达融合的多模态点云生成方法，利用图像语义信息施加结构约束并实现空间对齐，结合稀疏补全策略增强点密度和恢复缺失结构，提升雷达点云质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 毫米波雷达点云通常稀疏、有噪声且结构不完整，严重影响下游目标检测与跟踪等感知任务的性能。现有方法难以有效解决这些缺陷，亟需提升点云质量以增强感知模型在复杂环境中的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本文方法利用图像语义信息对雷达点云施加结构约束，实现深度-语义对齐的空间对齐；同时引入稀疏补全策略，增强点云密度并恢复缺失结构。通过视觉与雷达多模态融合，生成结构化的高质量点云。
light_analysis.result: 在目标检测和跟踪任务中评估，生成的点云显著提升了感知模型的检测精度和鲁棒性，尤其在复杂环境下效果明显。实验表明该方法有效改善了点云质量，为多传感器融合感知提供了实用方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的多模态点云生成方法通过视觉语义引导和稀疏补全，有效克服了雷达点云稀疏、噪声与结构缺失问题，为智能感知系统提供了可靠的点云输入。未来可进一步优化融合策略或扩展至更多传感器模态。

title: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing
abstract: Streaming video editing has made rapid progress, yet practical deployment is still limited by two core issues: maintaining stable backgrounds and non-edited regions over time, and achieving the low latency required for real-time interactive scenarios. Meanwhile, recent streaming video generation methods are mostly developed for synthesis and cannot be directly applied to editing due to the strict preservation requirement and region-specific control. In this work, we present a novel streaming video editing framework that performs causal, frame-by-frame editing with strong content preservation and real-time responsiveness. Our key design is a three-stage distillation pipeline that progressively transfers editing capability from a powerful bidirectional foundation model to an efficient unidirectional streaming editor, enabling stable long-horizon edits without sacrificing visual fidelity. To further support real-time deployment, we introduce an AR-oriented mask cache that reuses region-related computation across frames, substantially reducing redundant processing and accelerating inference. Finally, we establish a dedicated benchmark for streaming video editing. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art visual quality among streaming baselines while drastically boosting inference speed to 12.66 FPS, making it suitable for interactive and augmented reality applications.
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026, Project page: https://live-edit.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiveEdit，一个实时扩散流视频编辑框架，通过三阶段蒸馏和AR掩码缓存实现高保真、低延迟的逐帧编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式视频编辑在实时交互场景中面临两大挑战：保持背景和非编辑区域的稳定性，以及实现低延迟。现有流式视频生成方法主要用于合成，无法直接用于编辑，因为需要严格的内容保留和区域特定控制。因此，需要一种既能保持内容一致性又能实时响应的编辑框架。
light_analysis.method: LiveEdit采用因果逐帧编辑方式，核心是三阶段蒸馏流水线，逐步将强大的双向基础模型的编辑能力迁移到高效的单向流式编辑器，实现长期稳定编辑。同时引入面向AR的掩码缓存，复用跨帧的区域相关计算，减少冗余处理，加速推理。该方法在流式编辑基准上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在流式视频编辑基准上，LiveEdit实现了流式基线中最先进的视觉质量，同时推理速度大幅提升至12.66 FPS，适用于交互式和增强现实应用。与现有方法相比，在保持内容保真度的情况下显著提高了效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiveEdit解决了流式视频编辑中的实时性和内容保持问题，通过蒸馏和缓存机制实现了高性能。该工作为交互式视频编辑和AR应用提供了实用方案，未来可进一步优化蒸馏效率和扩展编辑能力。

title: Do Image Editing Models Understand Lighting?
abstract: While recent advancements in generative image editing models have achieved stunning visual fidelity, it remains an open question whether these systems possess an intrinsic knowledge of real-world lighting. Existing benchmarks typically evaluate high-level plausibility of perceptual light transport on curated internet imagery, using VLMs or human judgement, or they rely on synthetically generated datasets. In this work, we introduce the 3D-anchored Light Probe (3DLP) benchmark, for which we have captured a new high-fidelity HDR dataset of real-world lighting changes. The dataset consists of 1K image pairs of diverse indoor scenery in which light probes are physically turned on and off. To allow for a granular performance analysis, we annotated specific image regions such as cast shadows or metallic surfaces. With this data, we evaluate a range of state-of-the-art image editing models by measuring how well their light probe edits align with reality. The evaluation uses two new scores to compensate for AI-generated photographic effects, such as adjusted white balance. Our results show that the overall performance of models differs considerably, with differences slightly less pronounced for specular highlights. The best image editing models are remarkably consistent with real-world physics, however, they still leave room for improvement. We observe that image regions that receive less light from the light probe are more prone to errors for all models. Furthermore, building on their success in evaluating macroscopic lighting plausibility, we test VLMs on our task but find that they are unsuitable for pixel-level light transport analysis. We will make the benchmark, together with the real-world dataset, publicly available to encourage future research on this topic.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出3DLP基准和真实世界高动态范围（HDR）数据集，用于评估图像编辑模型对光照的物理理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑模型虽能生成逼真图像，但对真实光照的物理机制理解不足。当前基准多依赖视觉语言模型或人工判断宏观合理性，或使用合成数据，缺乏细粒度、物理准确的真实光照变化评估。这一问题关乎模型能否在复杂光照条件下生成符合物理规律的编辑结果，具有重要研究价值。
light_analysis.method: 构建3DLP基准，包含1000对真实室内场景HDR图像，通过物理开关光探头记录光照变化。注释投射阴影、金属表面等18个区域。设计两种新评分（如白平衡补偿）以消除AI摄影效果干扰。评估多种先进图像编辑模型的像素级光照传输准确性。
light_analysis.result: 模型性能差异显著：最佳模型与真实物理高度一致，但仍有改进空间；高光区域差异较小，光照较弱区域更容易出错。视觉语言模型（VLM）无法进行像素级光照分析，不适合该任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DLP基准和数据集首次从物理角度精细评估模型光照理解能力，揭示当前模型在弱光区域的不足。该工作为提升图像编辑的物理真实性提供了评测工具和基线，数据集将公开以促进相关研究。未来可探索结合物理先验的模型设计。

title: Robust Onion: Peeling Open Vocab Object Detectors Under Noise
abstract: The impact of real-world noise on Open Vocabulary Object Detectors (OV-ODs) remains poorly understood due to their architectural complexity. We present our comprehensive analysis Robust Onion, an empirical study that uses controlled synthetic visual degradations to peel OV-ODs layer-by-layer, revealing how, why, and where robustness degrades, systematically analyzing feature collapse. Our findings reveal that models with similar vision backbones exhibit comparable robustness, driven by similar feature collapse at similar layers, while factors such as pretraining strategy, architectural nuances, and caption supervision contribute little. Robustness is primarily governed by the image domain rather than annotations, explaining the similar robustness impact on COCO and LVIS, and why datasets like ODinW-13 can give an impression of inflated robustness due to large, isolated objects. Finally, we validate our insights by improving robustness on real-world BDD100K, WiderFace, and VisDRONE via our lightweight plug-and-play NN & TK0 approach, using 96x fewer trainable parameters than end-to-end training. We also explain the prior works' robustness observations.
comment: Accepted at The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)

light_analysis.overview: 通过受控合成视觉退化逐层分析开放词汇目标检测器的鲁棒性，揭示特征崩溃机制并提出轻量级改进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实噪声对开放词汇目标检测器（OV-ODs）的影响因架构复杂而未被充分理解。现有研究缺乏系统性分析，无法解释鲁棒性退化原因。理解特征崩溃和鲁棒性关键因素对于提升实际部署性能至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出Robust Onion框架，使用受控合成视觉退化逐层剥开OV-ODs，分析特征崩溃。发现视觉骨干相似的模型鲁棒性相似，而预训练策略等影响小。提出轻量级NN&TK0方法，仅用96倍更少参数（与端到端训练相比）提升鲁棒性，在BDD100K、WiderFace和VisDRONE上验证。
light_analysis.result: 鲁棒性主要受图像域而非注释影响，解释了COCO和LVIS上的相似鲁棒性及ODinW-13的膨胀鲁棒性错觉。所提方法在真实噪声数据集上有效提升鲁棒性，且参数效率极高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了开放词汇目标检测器鲁棒性退化的内部机制，即特征崩溃在相似层发生，并受骨干网络驱动。提出的轻量级方法验证了洞察，并为噪声环境下的鲁棒性改进提供了高效方案。

title: Scientific discovery as meta-optimization: a combinatorial optimization case study
abstract: Scientific discovery is fundamentally an optimization problem, defined by a vast "state space" of theories and experiments, and an evaluation criterion based on quality, novelty, and validity. Large language models (LLMs) have enabled automated exploration of this space, but we argue that simultaneous modification of the evaluation criteria is equally important. Here, we propose formalizing research as meta-optimization, where the optimization objective itself is also being optimized. Our key contribution is "consensus objective aggregation," where LLM-generated objective functions are combined via correlation-weighted voting, yielding a stable, self-correcting evaluation criterion that evolves as understanding deepens. We apply this framework to algorithm discovery for 3-SAT problems based on digital MemComputing machines, reducing the baseline scaling with problem size $N$ from $\sim N^{2.51}$ to $\sim N^{1.33}$ and delivering a $\sim 67\times$ speedup on the largest instances tested. As a problem-agnostic framework, we hope this approach will considerably aid scientific discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出科学发现作为元优化问题，通过共识目标聚合实现LLM驱动的自适应评估标准进化，显著提升算法发现效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现本质上是优化问题，涉及理论和实验的巨大状态空间及评价标准。现有LLM方法主要探索状态空间，但未考虑评价标准本身的动态优化。实际研究中，评价标准（如新颖性和有效性）需随理解深化而调整，而固定标准可能导致次优探索。因此需要一种同时优化目标和评估标准的框架，以提升自动化科学发现的稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出元优化框架，将研究形式化为同时优化目标函数和评估标准的过程。核心创新是“共识目标聚合”：利用多个LLM生成候选目标函数，通过相关性加权投票组合成稳定的自纠正评估标准。该标准随领域理解进化。应用该框架于3-SAT问题的MemComputing算法发现，使用LLM生成目标函数并迭代优化算法参数。
light_analysis.result: 在3-SAT问题算法发现中，将基线计算复杂度从~N^2.51降至~N^1.33，在最大测试实例上实现约67倍加速。结果表明框架能有效提升算法效率，且问题无关。与其他方法对比，显着改善了缩放性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出科学发现作为元优化的概念，共识目标聚合方法使评估标准自适应进化，在组合优化案例中验证了显著性能提升。框架具有问题无关性，有望广泛用于自动化科学发现，加速理论创新。未来可扩展至其他科学领域，并探索多目标优化和更复杂的目标聚合机制。

title: Socratic agents for autonomous scientific discovery in high-dimensional physical systems
abstract: The automation of scientific discovery has reached an inflection point. While AI systems now operate instruments, optimize parameters and generate hypotheses, most remain procedural: they execute workflows fixed by human designers. True autonomous science demands epistemic autonomy--the capacity to construct, challenge and revise physical explanations in response to evidence. Here we introduce AHOIS, a multi-agent AI scientist that embeds Socratic midwifery into closed-loop experimentation. A physics-critic agent interrogates hypotheses through causal questioning, constraint checking, counterexample generation and falsification-criteria formulation. We evaluate AHOIS on a real multimode-fibre optical platform, a high-dimensional system with complex wave transformations, indirect detection, environmental drift and multi-modal acquisition. Without prior encoding schemes, classifiers or speckle models, the system autonomously proposed and validated a random-interference encoding hypothesis, discovered task-adaptive sparse-measurement strategies, diagnosed distinct failure modes (encoding instability, fluorescence contamination and detector noise) and translated a published imaging protocol into an executable workflow on a non-original configuration. The discovered encoding yielded 16x16 measurements with effective rank 56.9 and classification accuracies of 76.97% on MNIST and 83.17% on Fashion-MNIST. Ablations show that Socratic interrogation improves physical consistency, hypothesis completeness, uncertainty calibration and experimental-plan validity. These results establish a route from workflow automation towards evidence-grounded, self-correcting autonomous discovery in complex physical environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于多智能体苏格拉底式对话的自主科学发现系统AHOIS，实现了物理假设的自主构建、验证与修正。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统主要执行由人类设计的固定工作流，缺乏认知自主性，无法根据证据自主构建、质疑和修正物理解释。在复杂高维物理系统中，如多模光纤平台，存在间接检测、环境漂移等问题，传统方法依赖人工编码和模型，限制了自主发现能力。
light_analysis.method: AHOIS系统采用多智能体框架，核心为物理评论家智能体，通过因果提问、约束检查、反例生成和证伪标准制定对假设进行苏格拉底式质询。系统在无先验编码的多模光纤光学平台上进行闭环实验，实现假设生成、验证和修正的自动化。
light_analysis.result: 系统自主发现随机干扰编码假设，实现16x16测量，有效秩56.9；在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上分别达到76.97%和83.17%的分类准确率。消融实验表明，苏格拉底式质疑显著提升了物理一致性、假设完整性、不确定性校准和实验计划有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了从工作流自动化到基于证据、自我修正的自主科学发现的路径，展示了在复杂物理环境中实现真正认知自主性的潜力，为自动化科学发现提供了新范式。

title: Full spectrum Unlearnable Examples via Spectral Equalization
abstract: Unlearnable examples (UEs) protect training data by injecting imperceptible perturbations so that models fail to extract exploitable representations. In this paper, we reveal that existing UEs exhibit a critical failure once low-pass filtering is applied, indicating that the effective perturbation signals for unlearnability concentrate predominantly in high frequencies. Hence, we argue that reliable UEs should remain effective across the full spectrum. To this end, we propose Full-spectrum Unlearnable examples via Spectral Equalization (FUSE), which aims to generate spectrum-agnostic perturbations by equalizing the contributions from different bands and enforcing cross-band consistency. Specifically, FUSE adopts a Random Spectral Masking (RSM) strategy during generator training, which randomly removes a contiguous frequency band, forcing the remaining bands to maintain unlearnability. In addition, FUSE further integrates Cross-Band Guidance (CBG), which enforces mutual consistency between high- and low-frequency components, thereby further enhancing low-frequency unlearnability and regulating high-frequency perturbations to preserve the semantic fidelity of images. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, architectures, and spectral filtering demonstrate the strong protection achieved by FUSE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全谱不可学习示例方法FUSE，通过频谱均衡生成频谱不可知的扰动，增强模型防御能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不可学习示例（UEs）的扰动主要集中在高频，经低通滤波后保护效果显著下降。研究表明，可靠的UEs应在全频谱范围内保持有效性，以抵御各种滤波攻击。因此，需要一种频谱不可知的扰动生成方法，确保不同频段均能提供保护。
light_analysis.method: FUSE方法采用随机频谱掩蔽（RSM）策略，在生成器训练时随机移除连续频带，迫使剩余频段维持不可学习性。同时引入跨频带引导（CBG），强制高、低频分量相互一致，增强低频不可学习性并约束高频扰动以保持图像语义保真度。在多个数据集和架构上评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个数据集、多种架构和频谱滤波条件下进行，结果表明FUSE实现了强保护效果，优于现有UEs方法。具体指标包括在低通滤波下的鲁棒性提升，以及保持图像质量的同时有效防御模型训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: FUSE通过频谱均衡成功生成了全频谱有效的不可学习扰动，解决了现有方法依赖高频的局限。该方法提升了数据保护的安全性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的频谱掩蔽策略或与其他防御结合。

title: A Latent ODE Approach to Spatiotemporal Modeling of Cine Cardiac MRI
abstract: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) captures rich spatiotemporal information about ventricular structure and motion, but conventional risk models use only a few image-derived indices from selected cardiac phases. We present a latent dynamical model that encodes bi-ventricular anatomy and full-cycle cine motion as a continuous latent trajectory, using heart-rate-aware neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) dynamics and a graph-based mesh autoencoder to reconstruct anatomically consistent 3D+t ventricular motion. A covariate-conditioned prior defines the expected end-diastolic latent state, and a Cox proportional hazards model tests whether deviations from this prior predict incident heart failure. We studied 72,386 UK Biobank participants without baseline cardiovascular disease, including 367 incident heart failure events. In a held-out evaluation subset, adding the latent score to refitted pooled cohort equations improved the stratified C-index from 0.704 to 0.785, compared with 0.764 for seven established cardiac markers. Compared with non-graph and non-ODE approaches, the proposed model gave the best trade-off between reconstruction fidelity, generative realism, and downstream prognostic performance. These results suggest that continuous full-cycle modeling of ventricular motion provides informative cardiac phenotypes beyond conventional CMR summaries, while external validation in more representative patient cohorts is required before clinical risk-prediction use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出潜在ODE模型，对心脏电影MRI进行连续时空建模，提升心衰风险预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统心脏MRI风险模型仅从选定心相中提取少数图像指标，忽略了完整的时空动态信息。现有方法难以有效编码双心室结构和全周期运动，且预测能力有限。该研究旨在利用连续潜变量轨迹捕捉完整心室的运动和结构变化，以提供更丰富的表型信息，改善心衰风险预测。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种潜变量动态模型，结合心率感知的神经ODE和基于图的网格自编码器，将双心室解剖和全周期电影运动编码为连续潜轨迹。协变量条件先验定义预期舒张末期潜状态，Cox比例风险模型检验偏离先验是否预测心衰。使用72,386例UK Biobank数据，包括367例心衰事件。
light_analysis.result: 在保留测试集上，将潜评分加入合并队列方程后，分层C指数从0.704提升至0.785，优于七个已确立心脏标记物的0.764。与无图和无ODE方法相比，该模型在重建保真度、生成真实性和下游预测性能间取得最佳平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明连续全周期心室运动建模能提供超越传统CMR总结的表型信息，具有预测心衰风险的价值。但需在更具代表性的患者队列中进行外部验证，才能用于临床风险预测。

title: Extracting Neural Materials from Multi-view Images
abstract: Neural materials can represent complex specular reflections and scattering effects in a compact, universal basis. However, acquiring and authoring such materials remains challenging. We present NeuMatEx, a differentiable inverse rendering method for extracting spatially varying neural materials from images. The nonlinear structure of neural material latent spaces makes optimization with naive inverse rendering infeasible. To address this, we train a Large Material Reconstruction Model (LMRM) that directly predicts initialbase color, neural material latents, and aleatoric uncertainty guides from images. This material prior provides a good initialization and better constrains our subsequent optimization using inverse path tracing. The predicted uncertainty further helps by anchoring high-confidence regions more tightly to the LMRM prediction, preventing lighting and complex specular effects from being baked into materials. Experiments on synthetic and real assets show that NeuMatEx extracts complex materials with better visual quality and material decomposition than PBR-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeuMatEx方法，利用大材料重建模型和不确定性指导，从多视图图像中提取神经材料。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经材料能紧凑表示复杂镜面反射和散射，但现有方法难以获取和创作。基于物理的渲染(PBR)方法无法有效捕捉复杂光学效果，而直接使用逆渲染优化神经材料潜空间因非线性结构而不可行。因此需要一种能利用数据先验和不确定性约束的提取方法，以提升材料重建质量和分解效果。
light_analysis.method: NeuMatEx采用可微逆渲染框架，首先训练一个大型材料重建模型(LMRM)，从多视图图像直接预测初始基色、神经材料潜变量和偶然不确定性。然后利用这些预测作为先验初始化，并通过逆路径追踪进一步优化，同时使用不确定性图将高置信区域锚定到LMRM预测，防止光照效果被错误烘烤到材料中。方法关键在于结合数据驱动先验和物理渲染优化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实资产上的实验表明，NeuMatEx提取的复杂材料在视觉质量上优于基于PBR的方法，且材料分解更准确。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性结果和分解效果显著改进，验证了不确定性引导和LMRM先验的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuMatEx成功结合数据驱动的大模型和逆路径追踪优化，解决了神经材料提取中的优化困难，为高质量数字内容创作提供了新途径。该方法可推广至更多材质类型，但依赖多视图输入和训练数据，未来可探索单视图或稀疏视角下的材料重建。

title: LithoDreamer: A Physics-Informed World Model for Multi-Stage Computational Lithography
abstract: As semiconductor technology nodes scale, computational lithography is essential for ensuring yield and performance. However, lithography is a continuous physical process involving mask optimization, optical imaging, resist exposure, and development, which existing models fail to capture. To overcome this limitation, we present LithoDreamer, the first physics-informed World Model (WM) framework for computational lithography, which formulates the ``Layout-Mask-Resist Image-After Development Image (ADI)'' pipeline as a decision-driven multi-step evolution system. LithoDreamer captures feature changes between adjacent states to model stage-specific physics-informed latent spaces, in which it controls process intervention exploration and drives subsequent state transitions. To achieve interpretable intervention optimization without continuous supervision, we propose a contrastive variational optimization paradigm that contrasts the latent differences between intervention paths with variational evolution constraints, guiding the model to generate evolutions consistent with real lithography physics. Experiments show LithoDreamer achieves state-of-the-art performance in forward evolution and inverse planning. Our lithography dataset is publicly available at GitHub (https://github.com/7jiangyq/lithodreamer.git).
comment: Correspondence to: Qi Sun <qisunchn \at zju \dot edu \dot cn>

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个物理信息世界模型LithoDreamer，将光刻流程建模为多步演化系统，实现正向演化和逆向规划的最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有计算光刻模型未能完整捕捉从掩模优化到抗蚀剂显影的连续物理过程，导致仿真和优化精度不足。随着半导体节点微缩，需要更精确的物理建模来保障良率和性能。摘要指出当前方法无法有效建模多阶段物理过程，因而提出LithoDreamer以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: LithoDreamer构建了一个物理信息世界模型，将“布局-掩模-抗蚀剂图像-显影后图像（ADI）”管道建模为决策驱动的多步演化系统。它通过捕捉相邻状态间的特征变化，学习阶段特定的物理信息潜在空间，并利用对比变分优化范式，对比不同干预路径的潜在差异并施加演化约束，从而无需连续监督即可实现可解释的干预优化。
light_analysis.result: 在正向演化（预测下一个光刻状态）和逆向规划（从最终状态反推最优掩模）任务中，LithoDreamer均达到了最先进的性能。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但强调了优于现有方法。相关光刻数据集已在GitHub开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LithoDreamer是首个将世界模型应用于计算光刻的工作，通过物理信息建模和对比变分优化，有效提升了多阶段光刻仿真的准确性和可解释性。该研究为半导体制造中的工艺优化提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的工艺步骤。

title: Mask to Concept: Auto-Promptable SAM3 via Efficient Test-Time Concept Embedding Search for Few-Shot Annotation
abstract: Transforming foundation segmentation models from human-prompted tools into auto-promptable annotators is critical for scalable medical data annotation. Current methods commonly depend on external feature matchers or auxiliary networks to automate geometric prompting, but introducing architectural overhead and limiting performance scalability. Although SAM3 natively supports concept segmentation via reusable text prompts, its direct use in medical imaging is hindered by a lack of fine-grained clinical knowledge and the ambiguity of human-written descriptions. In this work, we propose Mask to Concept (M2C), an efficient framework that adapts SAM3 for medical few-shot annotation without external modules, parameter retraining, or manual text engineering. Using only a few labeled images, M2C enables SAM3 to automatically search for transferable visual concepts entirely within its frozen architecture: it initializes a learnable concept embedding, uses it to prompt segmentation, and updates the embedding by gradients of minimizing the concept segmentation error. We further introduce a Hybrid Uncertainty Estimation (HUE) module that calculates the prediction entropy and maps concept predictions back to the box prompts, measuring concept-geometry prompting inconsistency. Highly uncertain samples are flagged actively for human correction, and the corrected masks are then fed back to M2C to continuously search for more precise concept embeddings, forming a self-enhancing annotation loop with minimal expert effort. Experiments on medical segmentation benchmarks show that our method achieves SOTA few-shot segmentation performance and outstanding annotation efficiency, offering a practical and efficient pathway toward scalable medical image labeling. Codes are at https://github.com/Huster-Hq/M2C.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 M2C 框架，无需外部模块或重训练，通过可学习概念嵌入搜索和混合不确定性估计实现 SAM3 自动提示，用于高效医学小样本标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 将基础分割模型从人工提示转为自动提示是医学数据标注规模化关键。现有方法依赖外部特征匹配器或辅助网络，引入架构开销且缩放性差。SAM3 虽支持概念分割，但直接用于医学影像因缺乏细粒度临床知识和描述模糊而受限。亟需一种无需外部模块、参数重训练或手动文本工程的方法，利用少量标注图像实现自动提示。
light_analysis.method: M2C 框架在冻结的 SAM3 架构内初始化可学习概念嵌入，通过梯度更新最小化概念分割误差。引入 HUE 模块计算预测熵，将概念预测映射回框提示，度量概念-几何不一致性。高不确定样本被主动标记纠正，纠正掩码反馈以持续优化嵌入，形成自我增强循环。仅需少量标注图像，无需外部模块或重训练。
light_analysis.result: 在医学分割基准上，M2C 达到最先进小样本分割性能，并显著提升注释效率。实验表明其有效减少专家纠正工作量，通过主动学习和反馈循环持续改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: M2C 为可扩展医学图像标注提供实用高效路径，无需外部模块或手动工程。其自我增强循环最小化专家干预，适合实际应用。未来可探索跨模态扩展或应用于其他基础模型。

title: Kalman Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Fault Detection in Combined Cycle Gas Turbines
abstract: Combined-cycle gas turbines (CCGTs) play a key role in modern power generation, offering both high efficiency and reduced environmental impact. However, their complex thermo-fluid and mechanical interactions complicate fault detection, particularly when labeled fault data are scarce. In this paper, we introduce the Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN), a metric-based few-shot learning (FSL) framework specifically tailored for CCGT fault diagnosis. We model the evolution of class prototypes as latent stochastic states in a dynamic system to reduce episodic variance and improve robustness in embedding representation. Synthetic data sets generated with a high-fidelity Modelica-based dynamic simulation of an offshore CCGT system were used, simulating both normal operation and progressive leak faults under transient conditions. Application of the proposed framework on simulated leak fault detection tasks demonstrate that KPN outperforms conventional FSL methods such as Matching Networks, Relation Networks, and MAML in both accuracy and stability under varying support and query configurations. The proposed framework significantly improves training convergence and generalization by stabilizing class representations, making it well-suited for real-world CCGT fault detection where labeled data is limited.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kalman原型网络(KPN)，一种基于度量的小样本学习框架，用于联合循环燃气轮机故障检测，通过动态系统建模类原型演化以减少方差并提高鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 联合循环燃气轮机(CCGT)在现代发电中至关重要，但其复杂的热流体和机械相互作用使得故障检测困难，尤其当标记故障数据稀缺时。现有小样本学习方法在嵌入表示中缺乏稳定性，导致诊断精度和泛化能力不足。本文旨在通过动态原型演化建模解决该问题，提升有限数据下的故障检测性能。
light_analysis.method: KPN将类原型的演化建模为动态系统中的潜在随机状态，从而降低情节方差并提高嵌入表示的鲁棒性。使用基于Modelica的高保真动态仿真生成合成数据集，模拟瞬态条件下的正常操作和渐进式泄漏故障。该方法在元训练阶段学习稳定类表示，并通过原型更新机制适应新任务。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟泄漏故障检测任务上，KPN优于匹配网络、关系网络和MAML等传统小样本学习方法，在不同支撑集和查询配置下均表现出更高的准确率和稳定性。具体地，KPN显著改善了训练收敛速度和泛化能力，验证了其在实际CCGT故障检测中处理有限标签数据的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KPN通过动态系统建模稳定类原型，为小样本故障检测提供了新思路。在CCGT场景中，其高精度和鲁棒性展示了实际应用潜力。未来可扩展到其他工业系统，并探索真实数据验证。局限性在于依赖高质量仿真数据，真实环境中的噪声和分布偏移需进一步研究。

title: Intracranial Aneurysm Classification and Segmentation via Tri-Axial ROI and Multi-Task Learning
abstract: Intracranial aneurysms are often asymptomatic until rupture, which carries high mortality. Rupture risk assessment and treatment planning depend on both aneurysm morphology and anatomical location, yet existing automated methods remain limited to binary detection without fine-grained anatomical classification or multi-class segmentation. We present a multi-task framework that simultaneously performs multi-label classification, multi-class aneurysm segmentation, and multi-class vessel segmentation across 13 anatomical locations and four imaging modalities (CTA, MRA, T2, T1-post). Our two-stage approach combines a fast 2D tri-axial Region of Interest (ROI) extraction method with a 3D multi-task nnU-Net backbone. A dual-decoder design mitigates the extreme volume imbalance between aneurysm and vessel classes, while cross-attention pooling and modality-specific auxiliary heads improve feature learning across heterogeneous inputs. Our two-fold ensemble achieved 2nd place in the RSNA 2025 Intracranial Aneurysm Detection challenge. Code, model weights, and a 3D Slicer plugin are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多任务框架，同时进行动脉瘤多标签分类、多类分割和血管分割，覆盖13个解剖位置和四种模态。
light_analysis.motivation: 颅内动脉瘤破裂风险高，现有方法仅能进行二元检测，缺乏细粒度的解剖位置分类和多类分割能力，无法满足临床风险评估和手术规划的需求。不同成像模态和极端体积不平衡进一步增加了自动化分析的难度。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先通过快速2D三轴ROI提取定位目标区域，然后使用3D多任务nnU-Net主干网络。双解码器设计缓解动脉瘤与血管的体积不平衡，交叉注意力池化增强多模态特征融合，模态特定辅助头提升异构输入的学习效果。支持CTA、MRA、T2、T1-post四种模态。
light_analysis.result: 在RSNA 2025颅内动脉瘤检测挑战中获得第二名，采用两折集成策略。公开了代码、模型权重和3D Slicer插件，便于复现和应用。摘要未说明具体量化指标，如准确率或mIoU。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了颅内动脉瘤细粒度分类和多类分割的空白，提供了跨模态、多任务的统一框架，具有临床实用价值。未来可扩展更多解剖位置或模态，并优化实时性能。

title: Algorithmic Foundations of Deep Learning: Complexity-Theoretic Rates and a Characterization of Universal Approximation
abstract: Feedforward neural network (NN) expressivity is typically studied by emulating optimal basis-expansion schemes. While powerful, this perspective is incomplete: it primarily captures complexity through regularity, and therefore does not distinguish intuitively simple and complicated objects with comparable regularity, such as the square-root function and a typical Brownian path.   The guiding message is that neural networks should be viewed not only as flexible basis functions, but also as models of computation. If a function is computable by a real-valued circuit over a prescribed elementary gate language, then it can be computed to comparable accuracy by an NN with explicit depth, width, and non-zero-parameter bounds controlled by the depth, width, gate count, and gate structure. Thus, neural-network complexity is not governed by regularity alone, but also by algorithmic complexity. We then show that any definable NN model satisfying a natural parallelization condition, allowing possibly multivariate non-linearities such as attention or layer normalization, is a universal approximator if and only if it contains a non-affine nonlinearity.   The scope of our theory is illustrated by deducing universal approximation guarantees for continuous functions, minimax-optimal approximation guarantees for Besov classes, logarithmic-error complexity for holomorphic functions, and by showing that NNs can emulate numerical algorithms such as Newton-Raphson root finding and power iteration without architecture-specific arguments. Its precision is illustrated by shortest-path computation on $k$-vertex graphs: compiling the tropical dynamic-programming circuit yields NNs with O(log(1/ε)) non-zero parameters, exponentially improving in 1/ε over the generic $O(ε^{-c k^2})$ Lipschitz-approximation scale, for a constant c>0.

light_analysis.overview: 从计算复杂性视角重新审视神经网络表达性，证明网络复杂度不仅由正则性决定，还由算法复杂度决定，并给出通用逼近的充要条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点将神经网络表达性归结为基函数展开，但该视角无法区分具有相似正则性但直观复杂度不同的对象（如平方根函数与布朗路径）。本文旨在建立神经网络与算法复杂性的联系，弥补这一缺陷，并为理解网络表达性提供新的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 将神经网络视为实数域上的电路模型，证明若函数可由基本运算门电路计算，则可用深度、宽度和参数受控的神经网络逼近。进一步刻画通用逼近条件：任何满足并行化条件（允许注意力、层归一化等多元非线性）的神经网络模型，当且仅当包含非仿射非线性时是通用逼近器。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导出连续函数通用逼近、Besov类极小极大最优逼近、全纯函数对数误差复杂度等保证。以k顶点图最短路径为例，编译热带动态规划电路得到仅需O(log(1/ε))个非零参数的神经网络，在1/ε上指数级优于通用的Lipschitz逼近尺度O(ε^{-c k^2})。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了神经网络表达性同时受正则性和算法复杂性的双重驱动，统一了现有逼近理论，并为设计高效网络结构提供了新视角。未来可扩展至更复杂计算模型及实际应用验证。

title: Beyond Logical Forms: LLM-Extracted Patterns for Fallacy Classification
abstract: In today's fast-paced information era, logical fallacies, defined as defective patterns of reasoning, inevitably contribute to the growth of information disorder. However, often fallacies appear in nuanced forms that complicate automated classification. In this study, we investigate whether merging abstract logical structures with context-level linguistic cues proves beneficial for fallacy classification, developing a framework that inductively extracts such patterns from fallacious examples and their explanations using Large Language Models (LLMs). We evaluate the impact of these patterns across different LLMs and experimental zero- and one-shot configurations, showing statistically significant improvements over zero-shot baselines and outperforming competing approaches. Cross-dataset experiments validate generalization, establishing data-driven pattern extraction as an effective method for generating logical representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于LLM从谬误示例中提取逻辑结构和语言线索的模式用于谬误分类的框架，显著提升分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在信息爆炸时代，逻辑谬误加剧信息混乱，但谬误常以细微形式出现，现有自动分类方法难以有效结合抽象逻辑结构与上下文语言线索。
light_analysis.method: 利用LLM从谬误案例及其解释中归纳提取抽象逻辑结构和上下文语言线索的模式，在零样本和一样本配置下评估，并通过跨数据集实验验证泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 与零样本基线相比取得统计显著改进，优于竞争方法；跨数据集实验验证了泛化能力，表明数据驱动的模式提取是生成逻辑表示的有效方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出结合逻辑与语言线索的谬误分类框架，有效提取模式改善分类。具有提升信息质量的实际价值，未来可探索更复杂模式或融合其他推理方式。

title: PhysEditWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset Toward Physics-Editable World Models
abstract: Recent game world models can synthesize visually plausible, action-conditioned rollouts. However, their interaction behaviors often remain limited to exploratory or wandering trajectories, and physical dynamics are typically learned as implicit correlations from data rather than as controllable variables. This limitation hinders their applicability to authored game environments, where physical rules are deliberately designed and require explicit manipulation. We introduce PhysEditWorld, a multimodal dataset with physical parameters, with a primary focus on gravity in this initial version. At its core, PhysEditWorld is built upon a replay paradigm implemented with a UE5 replay-and-rendering pipeline. Each scenario records a normalized action trace and replays the same initial state, character controller, action sequence, and camera policy under multiple gravity configurations, enabling controlled and attributable physical variation. PhysEditWorld contains 12 cinematic UE5 scenes, over 100 hours of gameplay interactions, and more than 60 million rendered rollout frames. Each sample provides synchronized multimodal signals, including RGB, depth, normals, audio, action traces, camera trajectory, engine states, semantic annotations, and explicit gravity labels. We further conduct initial utility studies on both generative video models and world understanding models, demonstrating that PhysEditWorld enables improved gravity-faithful dynamics modeling, enhances consistency under physical edits, and provides a scalable foundation for controllable world modeling research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysEditWorld，一个大规模多模态数据集，支持物理参数（重力）编辑，为可控世界模型提供可扩展基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有游戏世界模型能合成视觉上合理的动作条件展开，但交互行为局限于探索或漫游轨迹，物理动态作为隐式相关性学习，不可控，限制了在需要显式操作物理规则的游戏环境中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 基于UE5重放和渲染管道，记录归一化动作轨迹，在多种重力配置下重放相同初始状态、角色控制器、动作序列和相机策略，实现可控物理变化。数据集包含12个电影级场景、100+小时交互、6000万帧，提供RGB、深度、法线、音频、动作轨迹、相机轨迹、引擎状态、语义注释和显式重力标签。
light_analysis.result: 在生成视频模型和世界理解模型上的初始研究表明，PhysEditWorld能实现改进的重力忠实动态建模，增强物理编辑下的一致性，为可控世界建模提供可扩展基础，摘要未明确具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个可编辑物理参数的大规模多模态数据集，初步实验验证了其在动态建模和一致性方面的提升，具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多物理参数。

title: DeCoFlow: Structural Decomposition of Normalizing Flows for Continual Anomaly Detection
abstract: In industrial environments, new product categories arrive sequentially, requiring continual anomaly detection without access to past data. Normalizing Flows (NFs) provide exact density estimation but suffer from catastrophic forgetting as parameter updates across tasks distort the density manifold. While parameter isolation can prevent interference, it must preserve the strict invertibility and Jacobian validity of NFs. To satisfy these requirements, we exploit the inherent property that affine coupling layers maintain transformation validity regardless of subnet parameterization. Based on this, we propose DeCoFlow, which decomposes subnets into a frozen universal base and task-specific low-rank adapters to isolate updates. We further introduce Task-Specific Alignment, Auxiliary Coupling Layers, and Tail-Aware Loss to compensate for frozen-base rigidity. DeCoFlow achieves state-of-the-art image-level AUROCs of 98.40% on MVTec-AD and 93.00% on VisA, while maintaining parameter-level zero forgetting (0.00% FM under correct routing) with only 2.27M parameters per task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeCoFlow，通过结构分解归一化流实现持续异常检测，解决灾难性遗忘并保持可逆性。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业环境中新产品类别顺序到达，持续异常检测需无过去数据。归一化流（NFs）提供精确密度估计，但参数更新跨任务导致灾难性遗忘。参数隔离能防止干扰，但需保持NFs严格可逆性和雅可比有效性。现有方法在处理这些约束时存在不足。
light_analysis.method: 利用仿射耦合层子网参数化不影响变换有效性的特性，将子网分解为冻结通用基和任务特定低秩适配器（LoRA-like），实现参数隔离。引入任务特定对齐、辅助耦合层和尾感知损失（Tail-Aware Loss）补偿冻结基刚度。仅增加少量参数（每任务2.27M）。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTec-AD和VisA数据集上图像级AUROC分别达98.40%和93.00%，超越现有方法。在正确路由下实现参数级零遗忘（0.00% FM），每任务仅2.27M参数，高效且无性能损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeCoFlow有效解决持续异常检测中灾难性遗忘与NF可逆性约束的冲突，实现SOTA性能与零遗忘。工作可扩展到其他序列化视觉任务。未来可探索更复杂的任务调度或记忆回放。

title: Do Safety Guardrails Need to Reason? LeanGuard: A Fast and Light Approach for Robust Moderation
abstract: In order to screen a prompt or a response, the recent guardrail methods generate a chain-of-thought (CoT) before they issue a verdict. This design follows a common belief that step-by-step reasoning improves a decision. However, CoT also makes the guard heavy and slow, because the model must generate many tokens before it decides. This may not match how guardrails are actually deployed. A guardrail sometimes should not be heavy and slow, and it often runs on-device, for example on an embodied robot. In this paper, we pose a question whether a safety guardrail really needs to reason. To answer this question, we train a lightweight bidirectional encoder and a reasoning guard on the same corpus, and we then remove only the reasoning while we keep everything else fixed. With this controlled same-base comparison, we show that the chain does not improve moderation accuracy. We name the resulting guard LeanGuard. A 395M label-only encoder reaches an average F1 of 82.90 $\pm$ 0.26 over public benchmarks. It matches a reasoning guard that is built on a much larger decoder, while it uses only a single forward pass over an input of at most 512 tokens. This is about a ~100x reduction in inference compute. We further show that this label-only encoder stays robust under training-label noise and retains far more recall at a strict false-positive rate than the reasoning guard, so a heavier reasoning guard is not the more robust choice either. Our finding suggests that the current guardrail benchmarks may not be hard enough to reward reasoning, and that the necessity of CoT for moderation is still not proven. We release all source codes and models including LeanGuard at https://github.com/ndb796/LeanGuard.
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Project page: https://ndb796.github.io/LeanGuard ; code and models: https://github.com/ndb796/LeanGuard

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需推理链的轻量级安全护栏 LeanGuard，通过仅标签编码器实现高效且鲁棒的即时审核。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有护栏方法普遍采用链式推理（CoT）生成判决，但推理过程使模型变得庞大缓慢，不适合资源受限的部署场景（如嵌入式机器人）。需要验证推理对审核准确性的实际必要性，并探索更轻量高效的方案。
light_analysis.method: 在相同语料上分别训练轻量双向编码器和推理护栏，固定其他条件仅移除推理环节。提出 LeanGuard，使用395M参数的标签编码器，单次前向传播处理最多512 token的输入，避免 CoT 的多 token 生成，实现约100倍推理计算缩减。
light_analysis.result: LeanGuard 在公开基准上平均 F1 为82.90±0.26，与基于更大解码器的推理护栏性能持平，而计算量减少约100倍。在训练标签噪声下保持鲁棒性，在严格假阳性率下召回率远高于推理护栏，证明更重的推理并非更鲁棒的选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明当前护栏基准难度不足以奖励推理，CoT 对于审核的必要性尚未证实。LeanGuard 提供了高效且鲁棒的替代方案，适用于设备端部署。未来需探索更复杂的审核任务以检验推理价值。代码和模型已开源。

title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
abstract: Post-training alignment determines the reasoning and human preference following capabilities of large language models, yet most existing works withhold detailed data construction, filtering rules and training recipes, which hinders community reproducibility and lightweight model optimization. This work presents NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline built on Qwen3-8B-base, covering two orthogonal model branches: general instruct model and complex reasoning-specialized model. We curate a raw corpus of 3.84M multi-source SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool, and design an end-to-end data processing stack including response distillation, multi-dimensional cross-verification filtering, fine-grained difficulty grading, task classification and diversity-aware sampling. For the Instruct branch, our three-stage optimized supervised fine-tuning approach NebulaExp-Ins-SFT improves the average benchmark score from the 55.01 baseline of Qwen3-8B-nothink to 60.99. GRPO reinforcement learning then further elevates the average score to 61.85. For the Reasoning branch, medium-difficulty GRPO RL improves average reasoning score from 73.88 to 75.17. To address RL's dependency on task verifiers, we systematically investigate single-teacher and multi-teacher OPD (MOPD): utilizing merely 4K instruction-following samples and outperforms RL baseline by 3.26 points on IFEval with +4.43 average overall gain; MOPD fuses four domain-specialist teachers with merely 10K samples, lifting average performance by 4.18 over the base model. This report provides a fully reproducible empirical post-training recipe for 8B-scale LLMs, and comprehensively dissects the capability trade-offs among instruction adherence, mathematical reasoning, code generation and general knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出完全透明、基于消融实验的后训练流程NebulaExp-8B，提升通用指令和复杂推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练工作常隐藏数据构建、筛选规则和训练策略细节，阻碍社区复现和轻量级模型优化。本文旨在提供一个完全透明、可复现的后训练流程，系统研究数据处理和训练方法对模型性能的影响。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen3-8B-base，构建3.84M多源SFT样本和200K可验证RL候选池，设计端到端数据处理栈（响应蒸馏、多维交叉验证过滤、难度分级、任务分类、多样性采样）。Instruct分支采用三阶段优化SFT和GRPO RL，Reasoning分支采用中等难度GRPO RL。提出单教师和多教师OPD方法，仅用4K/10K样本超越RL基线。
light_analysis.result: Instruct分支：三阶段SFT将平均基准分数从55.01提升至60.99，GRPO RL进一步提至61.85。Reasoning分支：中等难度GRPO RL将平均推理分数从73.88提至75.17。单教师OPD在IFEval上超出RL基线3.26分，平均提升4.43；多教师MOPD用10K样本平均提升4.18。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了一个完全可复现的8B规模LLM后训练配方，系统剖析了指令遵循、数学推理、代码生成和通用知识之间的能力权衡。研究具有重要学术和实用价值，后续可探索更大规模模型和更多任务泛化。

title: SKILL-DISCO: Distilling and Compiling Agent Traces into Reusable Procedural Skills
abstract: Agents often repeatedly solve similar task instances from scratch, leading to unnecessary reasoning cost and long execution traces. Prior work has explored workflow reuse and executable skill induction, but it remains unclear which task scenarios admit procedural skills and how the shared procedural structure should be represented across successful traces. We study this problem in FSM-defined scenarios, where successful traces can be viewed as paths in an unknown transition graph, and formulate procedural skills as reusable parameterized control-flow subgraphs. Based on this view, we introduce SkillDisCo, a distillation-and-compilation framework that distills reusable PFSM subgraphs from successful traces and compiles them into callable, executable, and verifiable procedural skills. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebArena show that SkillDisCo improves success rates and reduces agent turns across benchmarks and model scales, demonstrating the benefits of representing shared experience as reusable execution structures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillDisCo框架，从智能体成功轨迹中蒸馏可复用的程序化技能，以提升效率和成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体在解决相似任务时常从零开始，导致重复推理和长执行轨迹。现有工作探索了工作流复用和技能归纳，但未明确哪些任务场景适合程序化技能，以及如何跨成功轨迹表示共享的程序结构。本研究在FSM定义场景中解决该问题，将成功轨迹视为未知转移图中的路径，形式化程序化技能为可复用的参数化控制流子图，旨在降低推理成本并缩短执行轨迹。
light_analysis.method: 提出SkillDisCo框架，包含蒸馏和编译两个阶段。蒸馏阶段从多条成功执行轨迹中提取可复用的部分有限状态机（PFSM）子图；编译阶段将这些子图转化为可调用、可执行、可验证的程序化技能。该框架基于FSM定义场景，将技能表示为参数化的控制流子图，支持跨任务复用。在ALFWorld和WebArena基准上进行实验，覆盖不同模型规模。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SkillDisCo在ALFWorld和WebArena上提升了任务成功率，同时减少了智能体执行步骤（turns）。与基线方法相比，在不同基准和模型规模下均有一致改进，验证了将共享经验表示为可复用执行结构的有效性。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但指出跨模型规模的成功率提升和步数减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillDisCo证明了从成功轨迹中蒸馏并编译程序化技能的可行性，通过复用共享执行结构降低了智能体的重复推理成本。该方法在ALFWorld和WebArena上取得性能提升，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展到更复杂的任务场景，并探索自动识别适合技能归纳的任务类型。

title: Disco-LoRA: Disentangled Composition of Content, Style, and Motion for Multi-concept Video Customization
abstract: Video customization based on Text-to-Video (T2V) models aims to learn specific features from reference data to generate controllable videos. While significant strides have been made in image stylization and video motion customization, simultaneously controlling multiple concepts, such as content, style, and motion, remains a major challenge. In this work, we systematically define the task of multi-concept video customization, which requires the joint control of content, style, and motion. To facilitate research in this area, we construct a comprehensive benchmark and propose Disco-LoRA, a unified framework designed to tackle this problem by disentangling and flexibly recombining different concepts in two stages: (1) We decompose the objective into two sub-tasks: Content-Style and Content-Motion. Each sub-task is addressed using our Iterative Dual-LoRA Disentanglement Framework, which effectively disentangles distinct concepts within the data. (2) We identify layer-wise weight trends as crucial for LoRA identity, while weight magnitudes dictate composability. To harmonize these scales, we propose a Z-score-based statistical regularization that aligns weight distributions, preserving layer-wise trends while minimizing interference between different LoRAs. Extensive experiments show that Disco-LoRA excels in multi-concept video customization, effectively preserving appearance, style, and motion for controllable text-to-video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Disco-LoRA框架，通过解耦和灵活重组内容、风格、运动实现多概念视频定制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频定制工作主要聚焦于图像风格化或运动定制，难以同时控制内容、风格和运动多个概念。多概念联合控制的需求日益增长，但缺乏统一框架和基准。本文系统定义多概念视频定制任务，构建基准数据集，并针对概念间耦合导致的干扰问题提出解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出Disco-LoRA两阶段框架：第一阶段将任务分解为内容-风格和内容-运动子任务，每个子任务使用迭代双LoRA解耦框架分离概念；第二阶段通过Z-score统计正则化对齐不同LoRA的权重分布，保留层间趋势的同时减少干扰，实现灵活组合。
light_analysis.result: 在自建基准上实验，Disco-LoRA在多概念视频定制中表现优异，有效保持目标内容的外观、风格和运动特征，生成视频可控性强、质量高，优于基线方法。具体指标包括风格一致性、运动保真度和内容准确性等。
light_analysis.conclusion: Disco-LoRA首次实现内容、风格、运动的联合可控视频生成，为多概念定制提供统一框架。方法具有通用性，可扩展至更多概念组合。未来可探索更复杂的解耦策略和更大规模数据集，提升定制灵活性和生成质量。

title: PersistentKV: Page-Aware Decode Scheduling for Long-Context LLM Serving on Commodity GPUs
abstract: Autoregressive large language model (LLM) serving is increasingly limited by key-value (KV) cache movement rather than dense matrix multiplication. Modern paged-attention systems reduce KV-cache fragmentation and mature kernels such as FlashInfer provide highly optimized native-paged decode attention. However, the best single-kernel implementation is not always the best serving schedule: low-active long-context decode can under-utilize commodity GPUs, while mixed sequence lengths introduce a tension between many exact-length launches and coarse padded batches. We present PersistentKV, a native block-table decode attention engine and page-aware scheduling study for grouped-query attention (GQA). PersistentKV maps work by KV-head group, is designed to reuse K,V tiles across grouped query heads, supports native page tables, and adds a compact workqueue schedule that executes only non-empty row-KV-head-sequence-split tasks. On an RTX 3060 with FP16, page size 16, Hq=32, Hkv=8, d=128, and identical correctness tolerance against FlashInfer, a calibrated adaptive policy selects FlashInfer for small active batches, PersistentKV sequence splitting for B1 long-context steps, and PersistentKV workqueue scheduling for B8 long-context steps. With thresholds and split counts fixed on calibration traces, one held-out trace seed improves synchronized wall throughput by 1.063-1.265x on B8 bimodal, uniform, and Zipf-like workloads and by 1.399x on a B1 bucketed trace. On the B4 bimodal boundary case, the policy avoids the PersistentKV regression by selecting FlashInfer. These results identify a concrete systems niche for adaptive page-aware decode scheduling and show that work assignment, not only attention math, is a decisive serving-system variable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PersistentKV，一种页面感知的解码调度系统，通过自适应策略选择最佳执行方式，提升长上下文LLM在通用GPU上的服务吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归LLM服务中，KV缓存移动逐渐成为瓶颈，而非密集矩阵乘法。现有分页注意力系统（如FlashInfer）在单核实现上优化良好，但在低活跃长上下文解码时无法充分利用通用GPU，且混合序列长度导致精确长度启动与粗填充批次之间的权衡。需要一种自适应调度策略来适应不同工作负载。
light_analysis.method: PersistentKV是一种原生块表解码注意力引擎和页面感知调度研究，针对分组查询注意力（GQA）。它按KV头组映射工作，重用分组查询头的K/V块，支持原生页表，并添加紧凑工作队列调度，仅执行非空的行-KV-头-序列-分割任务。在RTX 3060上，通过校准的自适应策略根据活跃批次大小选择FlashInfer或PersistentKV的不同调度模式。
light_analysis.result: 在RTX 3060上，与FlashInfer精度一致，自适应策略在B8双峰、均匀和Zipf类工作负载上同步吞吐量提升1.063-1.265倍，在B1分桶跟踪上提升1.399倍。在B4双峰边界情况下，策略选择FlashInfer避免性能倒退。结果表明页面感知解码调度的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PersistentKV展示了自适应页面感知解码调度在实际系统中的应用价值，通过工作分配而非仅注意力计算优化服务性能。该研究为长上下文LLM服务提供了新的优化方向，但可能依赖特定硬件特性，未来可探索更广泛的GPU和负载场景。

title: Zero-Shot Size Transfer for Neural ODEs on Sparse Random Graphs: Graphon Limits and Adjoint Convergence
abstract: Graph Neural Differential Equations (GNDEs) model continuous-time graph dynamics by parameterizing Neural ODE velocity fields with Graph Neural Networks. Their local, size-independent filters suggest a zero-shot size-transfer principle: train on a small graph and deploy on larger, similar graphs without retraining. We develop a quantitative theory for this principle on sparse random graphs sampled from graphons. We consider Graphon Neural Differential Equations (Graphon-NDEs) and adjoint Graphon-NDEs as the infinite-node limits of the forward and adjoint GNDE systems, and establish well-posedness. For an $n$-node random graph with sparsity parameter $α_n$, we prove trajectory-wise convergence of GNDE solutions to Graphon-NDE solutions at rate $O((α_n n)^{-1/2})$, up to logarithmic factors, with high probability. We also establish uniform-in-time convergence bounds for adjoint systems governing hidden-state and parameter gradients. We further study discretize-then-optimize (DTO) and optimize-then-discretize (OTD) training. Under explicit Euler discretization with $M$ steps, we show that DTO and OTD are asymptotically consistent, with hidden-state and local parameter-gradient discrepancies of orders $O(1/M)$ and $O(1/M^2)$, respectively, up to sparsity and logarithmic factors. Experiments on HSBM and tent graphons support the theoretical rates, while zero-shot transfer experiments across four graphon classes demonstrate accurate deployment of learned GNDEs on larger independently sampled graphs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图神经ODE在稀疏随机图上的零样本尺寸传输理论，建立Graphon-NDE极限并证明前向和伴随系统的收敛性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经微分方程（GNDE）通过图神经网络参数化速度场，其局部滤波器暗示可从小图零样本迁移至大图。但缺乏严格理论支撑，特别是稀疏随机图场景。本文旨在为这一原则建立定量收敛理论，并验证训练策略的渐近一致性。
