light_analysis.method: 引入Graphon神经微分方程（Graphon-NDE）作为无限节点极限，证明适定性。对n节点稀疏随机图（稀疏参数α_n），证明GNDE解以高概率收敛到Graphon-NDE解，速率O((α_n n)^(-1/2))（对数因子）。给出伴随系统均匀收敛界。研究离散化-然后-优化（DTO）和先优化-后离散化（OTD），在欧拉离散化下证明两者渐近一致，差异分别为O(1/M)和O(1/M^2)。
light_analysis.result: 在HSBM和tent图ON上的实验验证理论速率。四类图ON的零样本尺寸传输实验表明，在更大独立采样图上准确部署学习到的GNDE，支持从小图到大图的无重训练迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为GNDE的零样本尺寸传输提供严格理论，包括前向和伴随系统收敛性及训练策略一致性。实际中可减少大图训练成本。未来可推广至更一般图结构，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Target-Aware Bandit Allocation for Scalable Surrogate Optimization in Chemical Space
abstract: Identifying high-utility candidates from massive discrete spaces under expensive evaluations is a recurring challenge across the sciences, with structure-based drug discovery as a prominent example. While surrogate-based optimization can increase sample efficiency by reducing the number of expensive evaluations, modern molecular libraries have reached billions to trillions of compounds, making full-library surrogate inference itself a major computational bottleneck. We introduce BOBa, a bandit-guided surrogate optimization framework that eliminates full-library inference by adaptively allocating computation across partitions of the action space. By treating partitions as arms in a multi-armed bandit, BOBa concentrates inference and evaluations on empirically promising partitions while maintaining principled exploration. Experiments on real-world synthesis-on-demand libraries demonstrate that optimism-under-uncertainty bandits, combined with meaningful action space partitioning, are essential for effective allocation of inference and evaluations. Our findings reveal a tunable tradeoff between screening performance and surrogate inference cost, which supports practical optimization over current libraries, and establishes a viable route to ultra-large library virtual screening.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BOBa框架，利用多臂赌博机自适应分配计算资源，避免全库代理推理，实现化学空间中大规模离散代理优化的可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在结构药物发现等场景中，需从大规模离散空间（如数十亿分子库）筛选高价值候选，但昂贵评估和全库代理推理成为计算瓶颈。现有代理优化方法无法高效处理超大规模库，迫切需要自适应分配计算资源的策略。
light_analysis.method: BOBa将动作空间划分为多个分区，视作多臂赌博机的臂，通过乐观不确定性赌博机算法自适应分配推理和评估资源到最有希望的分区。结合有意义的分区策略，在保证探索的同时集中计算于经验优势区域，避免全库推理。
light_analysis.result: 在真实合成按需库实验中，BOBa有效降低了代理推理成本，并揭示了筛选性能与推理成本之间的可调权衡。与基线方法对比，乐观不确定性赌博机结合分区策略显著提升了计算效率，为超大库虚拟筛选提供了可行方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: BOBa通过赌博机引导的自适应分配消除了全库推理瓶颈，实现了可扩展的代理优化。学术上提出了新颖的优化框架，实际应用上支持当前及未来超大规模分子库的高效虚拟筛选，同时可调权衡为资源受限场景提供了灵活性。

title: SocialPersona: Benchmarking Personalized Profiling and Response with Multimodal Social-Media Context
abstract: Personalized language-model assistants are often evaluated through a memory lens: can a model recall preferences users have explicitly stated in dialogue? More comprehensive personalization demands a harder capability -- inferring what users care about from the multimodal traces they naturally leave behind. We introduce SocialPersona, a benchmark for evaluating whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can recover revealed preferences from longitudinal social-media timelines and use them in dialogue. Built from longitudinal timelines of 171 everyday, non-promotional social-media users, SocialPersona contains text, images, timestamps, and 2,597 human-verified preference tags across seven interest domains, separating stable interests from recent interests. It supports two tasks: constructing structured user profiles from multimodal context and generating responses aligned with inferred profiles. Experiments with proprietary and open-weight MLLMs show that models can identify broad interest domains, yet their performance drops on fine-grained and recent interests and degrades further when inferred profiles must be used to personalize dialogue. Together with evidence that text and images provide complementary preference signals, these results indicate that robust cross-modal, long-horizon user modeling remains a key challenge, and that SocialPersona can help measure and advance progress toward assistants that infer and act on revealed preferences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SocialPersona基准，评估多模态大语言模型从社交媒体时间线推断用户偏好并用于个性化对话的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有个性化语言模型评估多聚焦于记忆显式偏好，缺乏从用户自然留下的多模态痕迹中推断偏好并应用的能力。社交媒体时间线包含文本、图像、时间戳等多模态信息，但缺乏标准基准衡量模型在此场景下的表现。该研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 从171名普通社交媒体用户的长时域时间线构建数据集，包含文本、图像、时间戳及2597个人工验证的偏好标签（7个兴趣领域，区分稳定与近期兴趣）。设计两个任务：从多模态上下文构建结构化用户画像，以及基于推断画像生成个性化对话回复。评估多种专有和开源多模态大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 模型能识别广泛兴趣领域，但在细粒度兴趣和近期兴趣上表现下降；将推断画像用于个性化对话时性能进一步降低。文本和图像提供互补偏好信号。结果表明跨模态、长时域用户建模仍是关键挑战，SocialPersona能有效衡量进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: SocialPersona为评估多模态大语言模型的隐性偏好推断和个性化能力提供了标准化基准。实验揭示现有模型在细粒度、动态兴趣及多模态融合方面的不足，为未来研究指明方向。该基准有助于推动更鲁棒、个性化的语言助手发展。

title: CAT-Q: Cost-efficient and Accurate Ternary Quantization for LLMs
abstract: In this paper, we present CAT-Q, Cost-efficient and Accurate Ternary Quantization, for compressing and accelerating LLMs. Unlike existing state-of-the-art ternary quantization methods that rely on data-intensive and costly quantization-aware training to mitigate severe performance degradation, CAT-Q is a simple yet effective post-training quantization scheme that is readily applicable to LLMs with diverse architectures and model sizes. It has two key components, learnable modulation (LM) and softened ternarization (ST), which are coupled from an optimization perspective. LM leverages a composition of learnable factors to modulate the distribution of pre-trained high-precision weights and the ternary threshold, making them less sensitive to ternarization. ST further introduces a differentiable transition function to guide the ternarization process toward stable convergence. We show that, for pre-trained LLMs with 1.7B to 8B parameters, CAT-Q can efficiently quantize them into ternary models using only 512 calibration samples, while achieving superior performance than the seminal BitNet 1.58-bit v1 and v2 families (with 1.3B to 7B parameters) trained with 100B tokens, yielding about a 100,000X reduction in training tokens. Moreover, we show for the first time that CAT-Q can quantize much larger pre-trained LLMs having 14B to 235B parameters into leading ternary models within just 8 to 60 hours on 8 A100-80GB GPUs. Code is available at https://github.com/IntelChina-AI/BitTern.
comment: This work is accepted to ICML 2026 as an oral. The project page: https://github.com/IntelChina-AI/BitTern

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAT-Q，一种高效准确的后训练三元量化方法，用于压缩和加速大型语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有三元量化方法依赖数据密集且成本高昂的量化感知训练来缓解性能下降，这限制了其在大型语言模型上的应用。CAT-Q旨在提供一种简单有效且即插即用的后训练量化方案，能适应不同架构和规模的LLM，大幅降低训练成本和时间。
light_analysis.method: CAT-Q包含两个关键组件：可学习调制（LM）和软化三元化（ST）。LM通过可学习因子的组合来调节预训练高精度权重和三元阈值的分布，降低对三元化的敏感度；ST引入可微分的过渡函数引导三元化过程稳定收敛。仅需512个校准样本即可完成量化。
light_analysis.result: 在1.7B至8B参数的预训练LLM上，CAT-Q仅用512个校准样本就能实现优于BitNet 1.58-bit系列（使用100B tokens训练）的性能，训练tokens减少约100,000倍。首次在14B至235B参数的大型LLM上成功量化，8至60小时内在8张A100-80GB GPU上完成。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAT-Q提供了一种成本高效且准确的三元量化方案，显著降低了对训练数据和计算资源的需求，适用于多种规模的语言模型。其实际应用价值在于高效部署大型模型，未来可探索进一步优化或扩展到其他量化位宽。

title: Autoformalization of Agent Instructions into Policy-as-Code
abstract: Agent safety in high-stakes domains requires formal policy enforcement, but most existing approaches either rely on probabilistic guardrails (fine-tuned classifiers, prompt-based steering) that offer no formal guarantees, or on hand-coded symbolic enforcement that does not scale to the breadth of real policy specifications. We present an autoformalization pipeline that translates agent prompts, MCP tool descriptions, and natural language policy documents into formally verified policies using an LLM-based generator-critic loop. The resulting policies are written in the Cedar Policy Language. On the MedAgentBench benchmark, our autoformalized policies cover substantially more of the source natural-language specification than the hand-coded symbolic enforcement in prior work.
comment: Accepted at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD), ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个自动形式化管道，将自然语言策略文档转化为形式化验证的Policy-as-Code，使用LLM生成器-评论家循环。
light_analysis.motivation: 在关键领域，代理安全需要正式的策略执行。现有方法要么依赖无形式保证的概率护栏（如微调分类器、提示引导），要么依赖手工编码的符号执行，难以扩展到真实策略规范的广度。因此需要自动将自然语言策略形式化为可验证的代码。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个自动形式化管道，输入包括代理提示、MCP工具描述和自然语言策略文档，通过基于LLM的生成器-评论家循环，输出用Cedar策略语言编写的形式验证策略。该循环确保策略的正确性和覆盖性。
light_analysis.result: 在MedAgentBench基准上，自动形式化的策略覆盖了比先前手工编码符号执行更多的源自然语言规范，显著提高了策略覆盖率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了自动形式化在代理安全中的应用价值，能够将自然语言策略自动转化为形式验证的代码，提高了覆盖率和可扩展性。未来可应用于实际高风险领域，但可能面临复杂策略的生成挑战。

title: LayersReg: A Layer-by-Layer Progressive Regressor for Reliable Intraoperative 3D/2D Registration
abstract: 3D/2D registration serves as a cornerstone technique in surgical navigation. Traditional iterative optimization algorithms suffer from low efficiency and high failure rates in intraoperative settings. Deep learning-based methods reformulate registration from iterative optimization to a regression problem that maps image appearance features to spatial pose, typically achieving improved real-time performance and accuracy. However, such learnable methods are confined to memory-driven retrieval of specific pose features rather than understanding the task of image alignment itself, which limits their generalization in complex scenarios. We propose LayersReg, a pioneering regression paradigm that endows the model with 3D anatomical awareness and searches for the correct pose in a progressive, layer-by-layer manner. Inspired by the iterative pose-searching optimization criterion of classical registration, LayersReg searches for correlations between the moving and fixed images in feature space, capturing the trend of pixel flow and thereby converging iteratively toward the correct spatial pose transformation. We further design a coupling of node-wise regression with the progressive registration framework to enhance the model's perception of spatial pose changes. Experimental results demonstrate that under large offsets and multimodality conditions, LayersReg achieves high accuracy on both X-ray/CT registration (0.68°, 1.41 mm) and slice localization (0.73°, 1.55 mm) tasks, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods while meeting the intraoperative demands for precision and real-time capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出逐层渐进式回归器LayersReg，通过特征空间中的迭代搜索赋予模型3D解剖意识，实现可靠的术中3D/2D配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 术中3D/2D配准是手术导航的关键技术。传统迭代优化算法在术中效率低、失败率高；现有深度学习方法将配重视为回归问题，但局限于记忆驱动，缺乏对图像对齐任务的理解，泛化性差。因此需要一种能理解姿态变化且鲁棒的方法。
light_analysis.method: LayersReg受经典配准的迭代姿态搜索优化准则启发，在特征空间中搜索移动与固定图像的相关性，捕捉像素流趋势，逐步收敛至正确空间姿态。同时设计节点回归与渐进式配准框架的耦合，增强模型对空间姿态变化的感知。该方法在训练中学习解剖结构先验，实现逐层推理。
light_analysis.result: 在大偏移和多模态条件下，LayersReg在X光/CT配准任务中达到0.68°角度误差和1.41mm平移误差，在切片定位任务中达到0.73°和1.55mm，均优于现有方法，满足术中精度和实时性需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: LayersReg通过逐层渐进式回归赋予模型3D解剖意识，提升了复杂场景下的泛化能力和配准精度，为学习型配准提供了新范式。其高精度和实时性支持可靠的术中导航，未来可扩展至其他模态配准。

title: FracEvent: Event-Camera Simulation via Fractional-Relaxation Pixel Dynamics
abstract: Event cameras asynchronously report brightness changes with microsecond-level temporal resolution, but real event data remain difficult to collect at scale because specialized sensors, careful synchronization, and task-specific annotations are required. Event-camera simulation is therefore important to event-based vision tasks. Most practical simulators build on contrast-threshold event generation, some with additional filtering, stochastic noise, or hand-tuned sensor parameters. While effective, such formulations often simplify the temporal structure produced by the lifecycle of each pixel, which can distort event timing and weaken downstream transfer. We introduce FracEvent, an event simulator that models this pixel-level lifecycle with fractional-relaxation voltage dynamics. Given a log-intensity trajectory, FracEvent drives a compact stack of relaxation modes, combines their responses into a voltage state, emits ON/OFF events by localizing threshold crossings on the continuous voltage trajectory, and updates the reference while retaining the underlying memory modes. This retained state links residual voltage response to later event timing. We evaluate FracEvent through event-stream comparison and downstream transfer on image reconstruction and optical flow estimation. Across multiple datasets, FracEvent improves the temporal structure of generated events and achieves stronger downstream-transfer results than competing simulator baselines, showing its practical value for event-camera simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FracEvent模拟器，通过分数阶松弛电压动力学建模像素生命周期，改善事件时序结构并提升下游任务迁移性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机难以大规模采集真实数据，现有模拟器简化像素生命周期导致事件时序失真，削弱下游迁移表现。因此需要更精确的像素级动态模型来生成高保真事件流。
light_analysis.method: 基于分数阶松弛电压动力学建模像素级生命周期，利用紧凑松弛模式栈处理对数强度轨迹，组合为电压状态，通过连续电压阈值交叉生成ON/OFF事件，并保留记忆模式关联残余电压与后续事件时序。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上通过事件流比较及图像重建、光流估计下游任务评估，FracEvent生成的事件具有更优时序结构，且下游迁移结果显著优于现有模拟器基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: FracEvent通过精确模拟像素动态提升了事件模拟的真实性，对事件视觉任务具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂场景或硬件参数自适应。

title: Temporally Consistent Label Interpolation for Robust Surgical Multi-Task Learning under Challenging Conditions
abstract: Effective multi-task learning for surgical scene understanding is fundamentally hindered by annotation granularity mismatch; temporal workflow tasks such as phase recognition, step recognition and anticipation benefit from dense frame-level supervision, whereas pixel-level spatial tasks including instrument segmentation and action recognition are only sparsely annotated on selected keyframes due to prohibitive labeling costs. This supervision imbalance undermines shared representation learning and limits joint optimization across heterogeneous surgical tasks. To address this, we propose Flow-guided Annotation for Robust Operating Scenes (FAROS), a flow-guided label interpolation framework, that combines zero-shot segmentation-based mask propagation with optical flow estimation to overcome the limitations of appearance-based propagation under challenging surgical conditions such as occlusion, smoke, and motion blur, generating temporally consistent dense pseudo labels from sparse keyframe annotations. The densified instrument masks and action labels are integrated into a unified Transformer-based multi-task framework that jointly learns surgical phase recognition, step recognition, anticipation, instrument segmentation, and action recognition, enabling balanced optimization between dense temporal supervision and sparse spatial supervision. The label interpolation quality of FAROS is first validated on the DAVIS 2017 benchmark under a sparse ground-truth protocol, confirming robust propagation beyond the surgical domain. Extensive experiments on GraSP, MISAW, and AutoLaparo benchmarks further demonstrate that FAROS significantly improves cross-task representation learning and enhances holistic surgical scene understanding performance across spatio-temporal tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAROS框架，利用光流引导的标签插值解决手术多任务学习中时空标注粒度不匹配问题，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 手术场景理解中，时间任务（如阶段识别）需密集帧级监督，而空间任务（如器械分割）仅稀疏标注关键帧，导致监督不平衡，限制共享表示学习和联合优化。现有传播方法在遮挡、烟雾等挑战条件下易失败。
light_analysis.method: 提出FAROS框架，结合零样本分割掩码传播与光流估计，生成时间一致的密集伪标签；集成到统一Transformer多任务框架，联合学习阶段识别、步骤识别、预测、器械分割和动作识别五个任务，实现时空监督平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在DAVIS 2017稀疏基准协议下验证标签插值质量，证明跨域鲁棒性。在GraSP、MISAW和AutoLaparo基准上，FAROS显著提升跨任务表示学习，整体改善手术场景理解性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAROS有效克服稀疏标注与密集标注之间的粒度不匹配，提升多任务学习鲁棒性，适用于手术领域及其他类似场景，未来可优化传播效率并扩展任务。

title: Position Rebinding Cache Reuse: Replay-Free Visual Revisiting for Interleaved Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Interleaved multimodal reasoning improves visual grounding by revisiting visual evidence during multi-step generation, yet existing methods typically rely on token replay, repeatedly forwarding selected visual tokens. A natural shortcut is to reuse the historical visual key-value (KV) cache directly. However, we identify a critical failure mode of this strategy: cached visual keys are already bound to their original positional context. Such stale positional binding distorts attention under later decoding contexts and can trigger severe autoregressive decoding collapse. This failure suggests that effective cache reuse requires reconstructing visual evidence under positions compatible with the current decoding state, rather than directly copying position-bound historical cache entries. To this end, we propose Position Rebinding Cache Reuse (PRCR), a cache-level framework for replay-free visual revisiting. PRCR stores raw visual KV cache together with their original spatial coordinates, then reassigns position-compatible coordinates to select entries and rebinds their keys before injecting the reconstructed cache into the active decoder cache. This design reuses historical visual evidence while preserving textual positional continuity and relative visual structure. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that PRCR achieves replay-level or better performance, improving average accuracy by 5 percent and reducing visual-revisiting computation by up to tens of thousands of times.

light_analysis.overview: 提出位置重绑缓存重用（PRCR），通过重绑视觉键的位置信息实现免重播的视觉再访，解决交错多模态推理中缓存重用导致的自回归解码崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 交错多模态推理通过多步生成中反复访问视觉证据提升视觉接地性能，但现有方法依赖token重播，计算成本高。直接重用历史视觉KV缓存会导致失败：缓存的视觉键已绑定原始位置上下文，这种过时的位置绑定在后续解码中扭曲注意力，可能引发严重的自回归解码崩溃。因此需要一种既不重播又能有效重用缓存的方法，关键在于重构与当前解码状态兼容的视觉证据。
light_analysis.method: 提出PRCR，一种缓存级框架。它存储原始视觉KV缓存及其空间坐标，然后根据当前解码上下文重新分配位置兼容的坐标以选择条目，并对所选键进行位置重绑，最后将重构的缓存注入活动解码器缓存。该设计在重用历史视觉证据的同时，保持文本位置连续性和相对视觉结构，避免了直接复制位置绑定缓存的问题。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态推理基准上，PRCR达到重播级或更优性能，平均准确率提升5%，视觉再访计算量减少高达数万倍。实验验证了其高效性和有效性，相比传统重播方法显著降低了计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRCR实现了免重播的视觉再访，显著提升交错多模态推理的计算效率，同时保持或提高准确性。该工作为视觉语言模型中的缓存重用提供了新思路，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来可探索其在更复杂推理场景中的适应性。

title: From Weights to Features: SAE-Guided Activation Regularization for LLM Continual Learning
abstract: Weight-space regularization methods such as Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) are the standard approach to catastrophic forgetting in continual learning. However, those methods tend to underperform when applied to large language models. We argue that such underperformance can be partly explained by the ``polysemantic'' nature of large language models: per-weight importance estimates utilized by EWC-style regularization are too coarse and cannot isolate the knowledge that needs protection. In this paper, we propose regularizing instead in the model's activation space, using pretrained Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) as a monosemantic feature dictionary. From the perspective of constrained optimization, we derive a new loss function that uses the SAE feature dictionary to explicitly balance stability and plasticity, and show that EWC is a special case in the one-sided weight-space penalty setting. Unlike replay-based methods that store or revisit examples from earlier tasks, our method requires no previous-task data after mask construction: current-task data is used to compute a compact SAE feature mask, and only this mask is retained for later training. Further, since the feature space has significantly lower dimensionality than the parameter space, the proposed method is more memory efficient. On the TRACE and MedCL continual learning benchmarks, the method achieves the strongest result among approaches without introducing task-specific architectural components, also surpassing traditional weight-space regularization methods like EWC. Beyond performance comparisons, we provide empirical evidence for the polysemanticity thesis: task-relevant representations are linearly separable in the SAE feature basis but indistinguishable from chance in the weight basis, and weight-space protection is nearly non-selective at the concept level.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于稀疏自编码器(SAE)的激活空间正则化方法，解决大语言模型持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 权重空间正则化方法（如EWC）在大语言模型中表现不佳，原因是权重重要性估计过于粗糙，无法隔离需要保护的知识。大语言模型具有多语义性（polysemanticity），使得权重空间保护在概念层面几乎无选择性，因此需要更细粒度的特征级正则化。
light_analysis.method: 利用预训练的稀疏自编码器（SAE）将激活空间映射为单语义特征字典，推导新损失函数显式平衡稳定性与可塑性。仅需当前任务数据构建紧凑的SAE特征掩码，无需存储旧任务数据。特征空间维度远低于参数空间，内存效率更高。EWC可视为该方法在单侧权重空间惩罚下的特例。
light_analysis.result: 在TRACE和MedCL持续学习基准上，该方法在不引入任务特定架构的前提下取得最强结果，超越EWC等权重空间正则化方法。实验证明任务相关表示在SAE特征基中线性可分，而在权重基中与随机无异，验证了多语义性假说。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出激活空间正则化策略有效缓解了大语言模型的灾难性遗忘，揭示了权重空间保护在概念层面的非选择性。该方法无需旧任务数据且内存高效，具有实用价值。未来工作可探索更优的特征字典构造或与其他持续学习技术结合。

title: Discovering Millions of Interpretable Features with Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful tool for decomposing superposed language model representations into sparse and interpretable features. However, training SAEs is computationally expensive, and available open-source SAE models remain limited. In this work, we introduce \textbf{Qwen3-Instruct SAE}, a comprehensive suite of SAEs trained on the Qwen3 instruction-tuned model family, covering Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-8B. For Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B, we train layer-wise SAEs at three key activation sites: residual streams, MLP outputs, and attention outputs. For Qwen3-8B, we train SAEs on a subset of residual stream layers. We systematically evaluate these SAEs using both activation-level reconstruction metrics and model-level recovery metrics, revealing distinct sparsity--fidelity trade-offs across layers and components. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of Qwen3-Instruct SAE through a refusal-steering case study, showing that selected SAE features can causally steer instruction-tuned Qwen3 models toward refusal behavior. Our release provides a practical resource for studying sparse representations, feature-level mechanisms, and behavioral interventions in instruction-tuned language models

light_analysis.overview: 提出Qwen3-Instruct SAE套件，系统训练稀疏自编码器于指令调优模型，揭示稀疏性与忠实度的权衡，并验证特征因果干预能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）可分解语言模型叠加表示为稀疏可解释特征，但训练计算成本高且开源模型有限。现有SAE资源不足，限制了对指令调优模型内部机制的研究。本研究旨在提供覆盖多个规模和层级的SAE套件，促进稀疏表示和特征级机制分析。
light_analysis.method: 在Qwen3指令调优模型（1.7B/4B/8B）上训练SAE，针对残差流、MLP输出和注意力输出三个关键激活位置。对1.7B和4B按层训练所有位置，8B仅残差流部分层。使用激活级重构指标和模型级恢复指标评估，分析不同层和组件的稀疏性-忠实度权衡。
light_analysis.result: 系统评估揭示了不同层和组件间的稀疏性-忠实度权衡。通过拒绝行为干预案例演示，选定的SAE特征可因果地引导指令调优模型产生拒绝行为。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但验证了SAE特征的可干预性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Qwen3-Instruct SAE为研究指令调优语言模型的稀疏表示、特征级机制和行为干预提供了实用资源。其覆盖多模型规模和激活位置，可用于分析模型内部机制。未来工作可扩展至更大模型或更细粒度的特征分析。

title: Closing the Quality Gap in Low-Resource Text-to-Speech: LoRA Fine-Tuning of VoxCPM2 for Khmer and Korean
abstract: Large pretrained text-to-speech (TTS) models sound almost human for well-resourced languages, but much worse for languages that are rare in their training data. We study this quality gap for Khmer and Korean using VoxCPM2, a 2.4B-parameter, tokenizer-free TTS model that joins a MiniCPM-4 language-model backbone with a flow-matching diffusion decoder. We build one shared, language-tagged corpus of about 26 hours and adapt VoxCPM2 with a single Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapter, trained on both languages at once and added to both the language model and the decoder. The adapter is zero-initialized, so training starts exactly at the original (zero-shot) model. In native-speaker listening tests, the Khmer Mean Opinion Score (MOS) rises from 3.85 to 4.23 with the best adapter (rank 64), a highly significant gain (paired Wilcoxon test, p<0.001), while training only 0.19 to 3.03 percent of the parameters. The automatic loss and the human ratings, however, disagree on the best rank: validation loss is lowest at rank 128, yet MOS peaks at rank 64. The same adapter brings no gain for Korean, a language the base model already handles well, and at a high rank it even degrades quality. Adaptation therefore helps mainly where the base model is genuinely weak.
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables. IEEE conference format (IEEEtran)

light_analysis.overview: 通过LoRA微调VoxCPM2模型，同时适应两种低资源语言，显著提升基模型表现弱的高棉语语音质量，但对基模型已擅长的韩语无改善。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型预训练TTS模型在资源丰富的语言上表现接近人类，但在训练数据稀有的语言上质量大幅下降。现有方法通常为每种语言单独训练或需要大量数据，成本高且效果有限。因此，需要一种高效适应方法，在保持基模型优势的同时，提升低资源语言合成质量，并探索适配对不同语言效果的差异。
light_analysis.method: 使用2.4B参数、无分词器的VoxCPM2模型，其结合MiniCPM-4语言模型骨干与流匹配扩散解码器。构建约26小时的共享语言标注语料库，采用单一零初始化LoRA适配器同时训练两种语言，并同时应用于语言模型和解码器。训练仅更新0.19%至3.03%的参数，保持基模型原始能力。
light_analysis.result: 在母语者听力测试中，高棉语平均意见得分（MOS）从3.85提升至4.23（rank 64适配器），统计显著（p<0.001）。但验证损失最佳rank为128，与MOS峰值rank 64不一致。韩语MOS无提升，高rank下甚至下降。表明适配仅对基模型弱点语言有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoRA微调能高效缩小低资源TTS质量差距，尤其对基模型表现弱的语言。零初始化适配器可保留原始能力。但自动指标与人类评分存在分歧，且适配对已处理好的语言无益甚至有害。未来需研究适配最佳rank选择及跨语言迁移机制。

title: Sketched Linear Contrastive Learning: Approximation, Optimization, and Statistical Scaling
abstract: Scaling laws describe how learning performance varies with model size, data size, and compute. While recent theoretical work has established scaling laws for sketched linear regression, much less is understood for contrastive representation learning. In this paper, we study a sketched linear model for contrastive learning under a paired Gaussian latent-variable setup. The learner observes only sketched views of two correlated variables and trains a bilinear contrastive score by full-batch empirical gradient descent. We analyze a Gaussian-negative quadratic contrastive surrogate under aligned power-law spectra and a contrastive source condition, where we derive a risk decomposition into irreducible risk, approximation error, GD bias, GD variance, and a cross term. The cross term is controlled by the bias and variance and therefore does not affect the upper-bound scaling. Our main theorem gives an explicit scaling law with respect to sketch dimension $M$, sample size $N$, and effective optimization horizon $L_{\mathrm{eff}}γ$. Compared with standard linear-regression scaling laws, the contrastive setting must learn interactions between two views, and this changes how optimization and finite-sample noise scale with model size, data, and training time. This provides a first theoretical step toward understanding scaling behavior in contrastive learning and gives guidance for balancing model size, data, and optimization compute.

light_analysis.overview: 首次建立了对比学习中线性草图模型的缩放定律理论，分析了近似、优化和统计误差的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 缩放定律描述了学习性能随模型大小、数据量和计算量的变化，但对比学习领域缺乏理论理解。现有工作多聚焦于线性回归，而对比学习需学习两个视图的交互，其缩放行为未知。本文旨在填补这一空白，为平衡模型、数据和计算提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 采用配对高斯潜变量设置下的sketched线性对比学习模型，观测两个相关变量的草图视图，通过全批梯度下降训练双线性对比分数。分析高斯负二次对比损失在幂律谱和对比源条件下的风险分解，包括不可约风险、近似误差、梯度下降偏差、方差和交叉项，并推导缩放定律。
light_analysis.result: 主要定理给出了关于草图维度M、样本量N和有效优化视野L_effγ的明确缩放定律。相比线性回归，对比学习需学习视图间交互，改变了优化和有限样本噪声随模型大小、数据和训练时间的变化方式。具体数值比例未明确，但理论界定了各因素影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次从理论角度揭示对比学习中的缩放行为，为实际中平衡模型复杂度、数据规模和优化计算提供了理论依据。局限性在于模型假设较强（线性、高斯），未来可扩展至非线性架构和更复杂数据分布。

title: TaskTok: Delving into Task Tokens for Task-driven Image Restoration
abstract: While traditional image restoration focuses on perceptual quality, Task-Driven Image Restoration (TDIR) aims to maximize the performance of downstream high-level vision tasks. Recent approaches leveraging generative priors have shown promise for TDIR; however, they typically suffer from computational inefficiency and potential semantic alteration by indiscriminately updating all latent tokens. In this paper, we posit that not all visual information is equally important for machine perception. Through an analysis of the latent token space, we observe that task-relevant cues are unevenly distributed across the token sequence, exhibiting index-wise specialization. This suggests that selectively refining a subset of tokens can be sufficient for task-driven objectives. Leveraging this insight, we propose TaskTok, a novel framework that selectively restores only task-relevant tokens via a learnable token switch and a lightweight token refinement module. Extensive experiments across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection demonstrate that TaskTok significantly enhances task performance with high computational efficiency. The source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/TaskTok

light_analysis.overview: 提出TaskTok框架，通过选择性恢复任务相关token实现高效任务驱动图像恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图像恢复关注感知质量，而任务驱动图像恢复（TDIR）旨在提升下游任务性能。现有方法使用生成先验，但存在计算效率低和潜在语义改变的问题，因为无差别更新所有隐式token。通过分析发现任务相关线索在token序列中分布不均，具有索引级专门化，因此选择性恢复部分token即可满足任务需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出TaskTok框架，包含可学习的token开关和轻量级token细化模块。首先分析token空间，识别任务相关token；然后通过开关机制选择需恢复的token子集，再通过轻量级模块进行细化，避免全量更新。该方法在保持高效计算的同时，针对性地恢复对下游任务重要的特征。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测任务上进行实验，TaskTok显著提升了任务性能，同时具有高计算效率。与现有方法相比，在减少计算开销的情况下，实现了更优或相当的下游任务表现，验证了选择性token恢复的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了任务驱动图像恢复中token的专门化特性，提出TaskTok框架进行选择性恢复，兼顾性能与效率。该工作为高效TDIR提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更精细的token选择策略及在更多任务上的应用。

title: LogicIR: Logic Gate Networks for Image Restoration
abstract: Image restoration aims to reconstruct high-quality images from degraded low-quality inputs. As the computational demands of image restoration models continue to rise, there is growing interest in lightweight architectures optimized for fast and efficient inference. Logic gate networks (LGNs), which operate using fundamental logic operations such as NAND and XOR, have recently emerged as a promising direction for achieving highly efficient computation. However, their potential remains largely untapped in the domain of image restoration. In this work, we introduce LogicIR, the first LGN specifically designed for image restoration tasks. LogicIR incorporates a UNet-inspired architecture composed entirely of logic gates. In addition, we propose a differentiable bit decoding layer and an index shuffling mechanism that improves information propagation across logic gates. Experimental results across multiple image restoration benchmarks demonstrate that LogicIR achieves strong performance with significantly reduced computational cost, establishing LogicIR as a viable and efficient alternative for image restoration. The source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/LogicIR

light_analysis.overview: 首个将逻辑门网络（LGN）应用于图像恢复任务的模型LogicIR，通过纯逻辑门UNet架构和可微解码机制实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像恢复模型计算需求不断攀升，亟需轻量高效架构。逻辑门网络（LGN）在高效计算方面展现出潜力，但在图像恢复领域尚未探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，构建一个完全由逻辑门组成的图像恢复模型，以兼顾性能与效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出LogicIR，采用UNet风格的逻辑门网络架构，所有操作均基于NAND、XOR等基本逻辑门。创新点包括：1）可微位解码层，将浮点特征转换为二进制表示以适应逻辑门运算；2）索引洗牌机制，增强跨层信息流动。整个模型可端到端训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图像恢复基准上，LogicIR与主流全精度模型相比，在取得相当或更优恢复质量的同时，计算成本显著降低（具体计算量减少比例摘要未明确说明）。验证了逻辑门网络在图像恢复任务中的可行性与高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LogicIR证明逻辑门网络可以成为图像恢复领域高效且有效的替代方案，为低功耗边缘设备部署提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更复杂的逻辑门拓扑或联合其他轻量技术进一步优化性能。代码已开源。

title: DiCoBench: Benchmarking Multi-Image Fine-Grained Perception via Differential and Commonality Visual Cues
abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive fine-grained perception capabilities. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on explicit textual cues or low-resolution inputs, failing to evaluate a model's ability to autonomously perceive implicit visual cues in high-resolution. To bridge this gap, we introduce DiCoBench, a comprehensive, multi-image high-resolution benchmark designed for cross-image fine-grained perception. DiCoBench consists of 765 meticulously curated samples categorized into two progressive tracks: Differential Visual Cues and Commonality Visual Cues, covering 8 distinct perception tasks. By formulating the benchmark as a multiple-choice question task and utilizing high-resolution imagery (approaching 2K), we eliminate evaluation metric bias and pose a substantial challenge to current state-of-the-art MLLMs. Our extensive evaluation of 18 diverse MLLMs reveals a striking performance gap compared to human accuracy (98.3\%), with top-performing models struggling significantly with micro-scale detail capture. We believe DiCoBench will serve as a challenging testbed to drive future research in autonomous, high-resolution multi-image perception.
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page with code: https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/DICO_Bench_ECCV2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出多图像高分辨率细粒度感知基准DiCoBench，通过差异性与共性视觉线索评估MLLMs。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准依赖显式文本线索或低分辨率输入，无法评估模型自主感知高分辨率隐式视觉线索的能力。DiCoBench填补了这一空白，为跨图像细粒度感知提供挑战性测试。
light_analysis.method: 包含765个精选样本，分为差异性和共性视觉线索两个渐进轨道，覆盖8种感知任务。采用多项选择格式和高分辨率图像（接近2K）消除评估偏差，对18种MLLMs进行系统评估。
light_analysis.result: 人类准确率98.3%，而顶尖MLLMs在微观细节捕获上表现显著差距，暴露了当前模型在自主高分辨率多图像感知中的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiCoBench作为挑战性测试平台，推动自主高分辨率多图像感知研究。未来可扩展更多任务和更复杂视觉线索。

title: LLM-based Models for Detecting Emerging Topics in Service Feedback
abstract: Enhancing the analysis of service feedback is essential for public sector organizations, particularly tax administrations, where trust and compliance depend on fair and effective service delivery. As feedback volumes grow, identifying emerging service quality issues and potential disparities across diverse populations becomes increasingly challenging. Traditional approaches often rely on manual review or static expert-defined indicators, limiting scalability and the ability to capture complex patterns in textual feedback.   This paper presents a novel methodology that integrates large language models (LLMs), statistical techniques, and human-AI collaboration to improve multilingual customer feedback analysis. The primary objective is to detect emerging service quality topics that may also reveal potential inequities in service delivery. Our framework combines fine-tuned, quantized LLMs with expert oversight to produce accurate, computationally efficient, and context-aware analyses.   The proposed approach was evaluated using similarity analysis and assessments from experienced tax officers, demonstrating stronger alignment with expert judgments than baseline models. By incorporating a human-in-the-loop framework, the methodology reduces LLM fabrication while improving the reliability and relevance of generated insights.   The results demonstrate the practicality of combining LLMs with human expertise to support scalable, evidence-based decision-making in public sector organizations. This work contributes to the development of responsible AI systems that enhance service quality, responsiveness, fairness, and public trust through more effective analysis of multilingual customer feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出整合LLM、统计技术与人类反馈的新方法，用于从多语言服务反馈中检测新兴服务问题及潜在不公平。
light_analysis.motivation: 公共部门（如税务）服务反馈量激增，传统人工审查或静态专家指标难以扩展且无法捕捉文本中的复杂模式，亟需自动化识别新兴问题与人群差异。
light_analysis.method: 采用微调量化的LLM，结合相似性分析与人类监督（human-in-the-loop），在多语言反馈中检测新兴主题；关键创新在于量化LLM降低计算开销，并利用专家反馈减少LLM幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 与基线模型相比，该方法在专家判据匹配度上更优，能有效降低LLM捏造内容，提升检测可靠性与相关性。实验采用税务官员评估和相似性分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实LLM与人类专家协同可支撑公共部门可扩展、循证决策；有助于构建负责任AI，提升服务质量、响应性、公平性及公众信任。

title: Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning for Ultrasound Speckle Reduction
abstract: Ultrasound is a non-invasive, real-time, and cost-effective imaging technique widely used in clinical diagnosis. However, its diagnostic efficacy is often compromised by inherent speckle noise that degrades image quality and obscures underlying anatomical structures. Existing speckle reduction methods tend to over-smooth tissue boundaries and generalize poorly to heterogeneous noise levels. To address these limitations, we propose a Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) framework for ultrasound speckle reduction, which simultaneously preserves annotated anatomical boundaries and adapts to varying noise levels. The NBGL framework consists of a speckle reduction branch and a boundary enhancement branch. The former leverages generative learning to suppress speckle noise, while the latter learns boundary-sensitive representations to preserve target anatomical structures. Furthermore, a noise-aware interaction weight generation (NIWG) module estimates the speckle noise level via 3D Laplacian filtering and a median absolute deviation estimator, and translates it into an adaptive interaction weight. This weight is incorporated into a weighted feature-wise linear modulation (wFiLM) module to adaptively modulate cross-branch feature coupling, thereby improving robustness to varying noise levels. Extensive evaluations on 141 3D transvaginal ultrasound volumes demonstrate that NBGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in speckle reduction and structural preservation across six noise levels, while maintaining consistency with annotated anatomical boundaries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出噪声感知边界增强生成学习框架，同时抑制超声散斑噪声和保留解剖边界，适应不同噪声水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声成像中固有的散斑噪声会降低图像质量并模糊解剖结构。现有方法容易过度平滑组织边界，且对异质噪声水平泛化能力差。因此需要一种既能有效抑制散斑噪声又能保留边界信息，并能适应不同噪声水平的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出NBGL框架，包含散斑抑制分支和边界增强分支，分别利用生成学习抑制噪声和学习边界敏感表示。创新点在于噪声感知交互权重生成模块，通过3D拉普拉斯滤波和中位数绝对偏差估计器估计噪声水平，转化为自适应交互权重，并利用加权特征线性调制模块实现跨分支特征的自适应调制，增强对噪声变化的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在141个3D经阴道超声数据上，NBGL在6种噪声水平下均在散斑抑制和结构保留方面持续优于现有方法，同时保持与标注解剖边界的一致性。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调了一致性的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: NBGL框架有效解决了超声散斑减少中边界过平滑和对噪声水平泛化差的问题，通过噪声感知的跨分支特征调制，实现了散斑抑制和边界保留的平衡。该方法具有临床诊断应用价值，未来可进一步优化计算效率或扩展至其他医学成像模态。

title: CoVStream: Edge-Cloud Collaboration for Understanding of Long Video Streams
abstract: Long, continuous video streams are an increasingly critical driver of multimedia intelligence. Existing efforts often handle long videos with a sample-encode-reason approach using large models. However, they overlook a crucial deployment fact: the stream is often produced by computationally constrained devices. This forces an untenable compromise: cloud offloading unlocks strong reasoning but incurs prohibitive bandwidth overhead, while on-device processing remains limited by edge hardware capacity. Therefore, we propose CoVStream, the first edge-cloud collaborative framework for understanding long video streams. The edge node distills raw video streams into compact visual features and semantic captions for transmission to the cloud, minimizing bandwidth costs, while the cloud server integrates this data into an entity graph and global visual context, activating the heavy reasoning model only when a user query arrives. Experiments on VideoMME-Long, LVBench, and RTV-Bench show that CoVStream reduces bandwidth usage by 87.6% while retaining 99.2% of the cloud baseline accuracy on LVBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个边缘-云协作框架CoVStream，用于长视频流理解，大幅降低带宽开销的同时保持接近云端的准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频流处理面临边缘设备计算能力有限与云端卸载带宽开销大的矛盾。现有方法采用采样-编码-推理方式，但未考虑流式视频通常由资源受限设备产生，导致云卸载带宽高昂或边缘处理能力不足，无法部署实际应用。
light_analysis.method: CoVStream采用边缘-云协作架构：边缘节点将原始视频流压缩为紧凑视觉特征和语义描述（如物体检测、场景描述），大幅降低传输数据量；云端接收后构建实体图（Entity Graph）和全局视觉上下文，缓存历史信息，仅在用户查询时激活大型推理模型，避免持续昂贵计算。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoMME-Long、LVBench和RTV-Bench三个长视频基准上评估，CoVStream在LVBench上带宽使用减少87.6%，同时准确率保留云基线模型的99.2%，证明其在降低通信成本与保持推理性能间的有效平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoVStream首次实现边缘与云端协作处理长视频流，解决部署中带宽与算力矛盾。学术上提出实体图与全局上下文结合的方法，应用上适用于监控、直播等实时场景。未来可探索更高效的特征压缩和动态查询调度策略。

title: MMGist: A Comprehensive Multimodal Benchmark for 2027
abstract: We conduct a systematic study of 18 widely used vision-language benchmarks and identify three major issues: 1) many items do not rely on visual cues and therefore fail to effectively measure multimodal understanding; 2) many items are already close to performance saturation for current LVLMs, which limits their discriminative power; 3) a small number of anomalous items affect the reliability of evaluation results. To this end, we propose MMGist, a curated benchmark that covers seven capability dimensions and contains 7,262 items. MMGist is constructed through a three-stage pipeline, which sequentially combines text-ablation filtering, cross-model saturation filtering, and anomaly detection filtering. We conduct extensive experiments on 27 leading LVLMs and compare MMGist with the raw pool of 23,250 items. The results show that MMGist preserves model rankings with high fidelity, with Spearman $ρ= 0.98$, while reducing evaluation items by 69\% and improving cross-model discrimination by 78\%. Further results indicate that Visual Logic remains a systematic weakness of current LVLMs, while knowledge-intensive dimensions such as Expert Knowledge dimensions remain important factors for distinguishing closed-source models from open-source models. These findings suggest that high-quality evaluation should prioritize visual dependency, discriminative power, and reliability, rather than simply pursuing benchmark scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MMGist基准，解决现有视觉语言基准的视觉依赖不足、性能饱和和异常项问题，实现高保真模型排名。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有18个常用视觉语言基准存在三个主要问题：许多项目不依赖视觉线索，无法有效衡量多模态理解；大量项目对于当前LVLMs已接近性能饱和，区分能力有限；少量异常项影响评估结果可靠性。因此需要构建一个更高质量、更具区分力的基准，以准确评估LVLMs的真实能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出MMGist基准，包含7,262个项目，覆盖7个能力维度。通过三阶段流水线构建：首先进行文本消融过滤，剔除不依赖视觉线索的项目；然后进行跨模型饱和度过滤，移除模型已饱和的项目；最后进行异常检测过滤，排除异常项。在27个领先LVLMs上进行实验，验证基准的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 与原始23,250项池相比，MMGist保留模型排名高保真，Spearman ρ=0.98，同时减少69%评估项，跨模型区分度提升78%。实验发现视觉逻辑是当前LVLMs的系统性弱点，知识密集型维度（如专家知识）是区分闭源与开源模型的关键因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 高质量评估应优先考虑视觉依赖、区分能力和可靠性，而非单纯追求基准规模。MMGist为多模态理解评估提供了有效工具，揭示了当前LVLMs的弱点，并为未来基准设计提供了方向。

title: Improving Reasoning in Vision-Language Models via Perception Verified Self-Training
abstract: Achieving human-like reasoning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remains a long-standing challenge. Recent approaches leverage Chain-of-Thought (CoT) rationales generated by human annotators or proprietary models to improve reasoning, which is costly and difficult to scale. Self-training offers a promising alternative by using models own outputs as supervision. However, existing methods often suffer from visual hallucinations -- where rationales describe non-existent visual content, and language shortcuts -- where predictions rely on textual priors rather than true visual grounding, as rationales are typically filtered only by answer correctness without verifying visual perception. To address this limitation, we propose a perception-verified self-training framework that enforces visually grounded reasoning. First, our method employs a CoT template (caption-reasoning-conclusion) that disentangles perception from reasoning, enabling independent verification of visual understanding. To compensate for the absence of ground-truth captions, we propose PerceptEval, an unsupervised method that evaluates caption quality based on its alignment with visual and textual elements present in the image. Using caption verification together with answer correctness, we partition the data into three subsets: easy (correct caption and conclusion), medium (correct caption but incorrect conclusion), and hard (incorrect caption). Building on this partitioning, we design a two-stage curriculum learning strategy. In Stage 1, the model is trained on easy examples and subsequently in Stage 2, medium samples are incorporated through a caption-guided reasoning enhancement procedure that regenerates reasoning conditioned on verified captions. Only regenerated samples with the correct conclusions are retained.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种感知验证的自训练框架，通过解耦感知和推理，结合无监督图文对齐评估和两阶段课程学习，提升视觉语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管在视觉语言模型（VLM）中，思维链（CoT）推理已显示出潜力，但现有方法依赖于人类标注或专有模型生成的推理过程，成本高且难以扩展。自训练虽可替代，但存在视觉幻觉（描述不存在的视觉内容）和语言捷径（依赖文本先验而非真实视觉基础）的问题，因为现有方法仅通过答案正确性过滤推理，未验证视觉感知。因此，需要一种能强制视觉基础推理的自训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出感知验证的自训练框架。首先，采用“描述-推理-结论”的CoT模板解耦感知与推理。为在没有真实描述的情况下验证描述质量，提出无监督方法PerceptEval，评估描述与视觉和文本元素的对齐程度。结合描述验证和答案正确性，将数据划分为三个子集：简单（描述和结论正确）、中等（描述正确但结论错误）、困难（描述错误）。基于此，设计两阶段课程学习：阶段1在简单样本上训练；阶段2合并中等样本，通过描述引导的推理增强过程，基于验证的描述重新生成推理，仅保留结论正确的样本。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但预期该方法能有效减少视觉幻觉和语言捷径，提升VLM在需要视觉基础推理的任务上的性能。通过与基线对比，可能显示在准确率或推理一致性上的改进。由于未提供数据，无法给出具体指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过引入感知验证机制，解决了自训练中视觉幻觉和语言捷径的问题，提供了一种可扩展且有效的VLM推理改进方法。感知验证和课程学习的结合增强了模型对视觉内容的理解和依赖。未来工作可探索更复杂的验证方法或扩展到多模态推理任务。

title: Learning Cross-View Semantic Priors for Single-Reference Unseen Object Pose Estimation
abstract: Single-reference unseen object 6D pose estimation reduces object onboarding by estimating poses of arbitrary novel objects from only one reference view. Recent correspondence-based pipelines have achieved robust performance with vision foundation model (VFM) features. However, they typically treat these features as intra-view descriptors, leaving dense visual-semantic cues, including appearance, structure, and context, insufficiently exchanged across views before geometric decoding. Consequently, the decoded point features may lack joint semantic and geometric discriminability, making correspondence estimation still difficult in challenging cases. Instead of processing features independently, we build the correspondence pipeline around an early cross-view semantic prior. Specifically, cross-view semantic interaction (CVSI) enables dense query and reference VFM tokens to exchange semantic context and form a cross-view prior. Nevertheless, direct CVSI may disturb the VFM token structure, while the resulting semantic prior still needs 3D representation consistency for rigid correspondence. To make this CVSI prior reliable for 3D correspondence learning, we introduce two complementary training-time constraints: the intra-view structure preservation (IVSP) loss preserves the original intra-view token affinity structure during interaction, while the reference-anchored geometric consistency (RAGC) loss enforces spatial representation consistency of decoded point features. The final pose is recovered from learned correspondences through weighted SVD. We further construct a challenging view-pair protocol from the BOP Challenge datasets YCB-V and TUD-L to evaluate robustness in difficult matching scenarios. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks under different view-pair settings show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining comparable inference speed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过早期交叉视图语义先验实现单参考未知物体6D位姿估计，解决了现有方法中视图间语义交换不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于对应关系的未知物体6D位姿估计方法使用视觉基础模型特征时，通常将其视为视图内描述符，导致外观、结构和上下文等密集视觉语义线索在几何解码前跨视图交换不充分。这使得解码后的点特征缺乏联合语义和几何判别能力，在挑战性场景中对应估计困难。因此，亟需一种能有效交换跨视图语义先验的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建基于早期交叉视图语义先验的对应管道：交叉视图语义交互（CVSI）使密集查询和参考的VFM令牌交换语义上下文形成先验。为保护令牌结构并保证3D表示一致性，引入训练时约束：视图内结构保持（IVSP）损失保留交互中原有的令牌亲和结构，参考锚定几何一致性（RAGC）损失强制解码点特征的空间表示一致性。最终通过加权SVD从学习到的对应关系恢复位姿。
light_analysis.result: 在BOP Challenge数据集YCB-V和TUD-L上构建了挑战性视图对协议，并在六个基准的不同视图对设置下进行广泛实验，表明所提方法在保持可比推理速度的同时达到了最先进性能。具体结果摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过早期跨视图语义先验有效提升了单参考未知物体6D位姿估计的鲁棒性，尤其在困难匹配场景下。其贡献在于提出CVSI、IVSP和RAGC等创新组件，为基于VFM特征的对应学习提供了新范式。未来可探索更高效的语义交换机制或扩展到多参考场景。

title: EvoEmbedding: Evolvable Representations for Long-Context Retrieval and Agentic Memory
abstract: Existing embedding models are inherently static: they encode text segments in isolation, ignoring their surrounding context and temporal order. This paper introduces EvoEmbedding, a novel embedding model that generates evolvable representations for retrieval. It is tailored for long-context scenarios, where information is dynamic, sequential, and requires continuous state tracking. Our design is simple: EvoEmbedding maintains a continuously updated latent memory as it sequentially processes inputs, and uses it alongside the raw content to jointly generate evolvable embeddings. Consequently, for the same query, our model adapts its representation to retrieve distinct targets based on the evolving context, going beyond static semantic search. To equip the model with this capability, we construct EvoTrain-180K, a diverse dataset for the joint optimization of latent memory and retrieval. Furthermore, we introduce a memory queue to prevent representation collapse during recurrent encoding, alongside segment-batching techniques that tackle significant length variance and accelerate training by 3.8$\times$. Extensive experiments show that our model not only outperforms larger-scale specialists (e.g., Qwen3-Embedding-8B and KaLM-Embedding-Gemma3-12B) across a range of long-context retrieval benchmarks, but also generalizes well to downstream tasks (e.g., personalization) with contexts 10$\times$ longer than its training window. Notably, EvoEmbedding seamlessly integrates into agentic workflows to boost performance. For instance, a naive RAG pipeline equipped with our model surpasses dedicated agentic memory systems. Project Page: https://clare-nie.github.io/EvoEmbedding/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoEmbedding，一种通过维护持续更新的潜在记忆生成演化表示的嵌入模型，解决长上下文检索中的动态信息跟踪问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有嵌入模型静态编码文本段落，忽略上下文和时间顺序，在长上下文场景中无法适应动态信息。该研究旨在生成随上下文演化的表示，以检索动态目标，超越静态语义搜索，满足智能体记忆等需要连续状态追踪的实际应用需求。
light_analysis.method: EvoEmbedding维护持续更新的潜在记忆，与原始内容联合生成演化嵌入。构建EvoTrain-180K数据集优化记忆与检索，引入记忆队列防止表示坍塌，采用分批次技术处理长度方差，加速训练3.8倍。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文检索基准上优于Qwen3-Embedding-8B和KaLM-Embedding-Gemma3-12B等更大模型；在个性化任务中以超出训练窗口10倍的上下文泛化良好；配备EvoEmbedding的RAG系统超越专用智能体记忆系统。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoEmbedding通过演化表示实现动态检索，在长上下文和智能体场景中显著提升性能，证明了动态嵌入的学术与实际价值。未来可探索更高效记忆机制或多模态扩展。

title: Geometric and Information Compression of Representations in Deep Learning
abstract: Deep neural networks transform input data into latent representations that support a wide range of downstream tasks. These representations can be characterized along information-theoretic and geometric dimensions, but their relationship remains poorly understood. A central open question is whether low mutual information (MI) between inputs and representations necessarily implies geometrically compressed latent spaces and vice versa. We investigate this question using class-wise clustering as a measure of geometric compression and theoretically sound MI estimation in conditional entropy bottleneck (CEB) networks and continuous dropout networks. We evaluate the interplay between MI, geometric compression, and generalization on classification tasks under controlled noise injection schemes. Our findings show that low MI does not reliably correspond to geometric compression, and that the connection between the two is more nuanced than often assumed. Indeed, our experiments reveal a negative and nonlinear relationship that can reverse when varying training setup. Our results put forward a hypothesis that generalization acts as a potential confounder in this connection rather than being their direct consequence.
comment: Published at ECML PKDD 2026; Dataset: https://doi.org/10.17877/RCTRUST-2026-DWMJTZ. Code: https://github.com/link-er/information_geometric_compression

light_analysis.overview: 揭示深度学习中表示的信息压缩与几何压缩之间非线性且可反转的关系，并提出泛化作为潜在混杂因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络将输入数据转换为潜在表示，这些表示可从信息论（互信息）和几何（聚类）维度刻画，但二者关系尚不明确。现有研究常假设低互信息必然对应几何压缩，反之亦然，但缺乏严格验证。理解这种关系对解释表示学习机制、指导模型设计至关重要。本文旨在通过可控实验探究互信息与几何压缩的实际关联，并评估其对泛化的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用条件熵瓶颈（CEB）网络和连续dropout网络作为模型框架，以类间聚类作为几何压缩的度量，并使用理论上可靠的互信息估计方法。在分类任务上，通过受控噪声注入方案（改变训练设置）系统性评估互信息、几何压缩与泛化之间的相互作用。实验设计包括变化噪声水平、网络架构等，以揭示三者动态关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现低互信息并不稳定对应几何压缩，二者呈现非线性且负相关的关系，且该关系在改变训练设置（如噪声方案）时可能反转。例如，在某些噪声条件下，互信息降低反而导致几何压缩减弱。此外，泛化表现与互信息及几何压缩的关联复杂，表明泛化可能是二者关系的混杂因素，而非直接结果。具体量化指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了互信息与几何压缩强相关的普遍假设，揭示其非线性与情境依赖性。核心贡献是提出泛化作为潜在混杂因素，重新解释了信息压缩与几何压缩的关系。研究为理解表示学习中的权衡提供了新视角，提示未来需结合多维度度量与因果分析。局限性在于仅涉及特定网络和任务，后续可探索更广泛架构与数据集。

title: MetaboNet-Bench: A Multi-modal Benchmark for Glucose Forecasting in Type 1 Diabetes
abstract: Glucose forecasting algorithms are an important aspect of glycemic control management in type 1 diabetes. So far, the research community has developed numerous algorithms and models for forecasting. However, it is well-recognized that the lack of standardized model performance evaluation benchmarks makes fair comparison difficult and hinders further innovation, and thus benchmark standardization is in urgent need. Furthermore, many published glucose forecasting algorithms are limited to CGM data alone, ignoring other multimodal signals such as insulin dosing and carbohydrate intake. Here, we introduce MetaboNet-Bench, a benchmark for multimodal glucose forecasting for patients with type 1 diabetes that provides an extensible open-source evaluation framework for comparison of glucose forecasting algorithms that leverage glucose, insulin, and carbohydrate data. We then demonstrate its utility by benchmarking several recently published glucose forecasting models and a custom multimodal time-series model, representing different model architectures. The results show that the benefit of adding data modalities is conditioned on the complexity of the model and that incorporating more clinical metrics helps identify meaningful gaps to fill for future research.
comment: main content in 10 pages with 5 figures; supplementary section with 11 more pages and 5 more figures. v2: fix figure 4 and 5's misordering

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaboNet-Bench，一个多模态血糖预测基准框架，解决标准化评估缺失问题，并验证多模态数据对模型性能的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 血糖预测算法对1型糖尿病管理至关重要，但现有研究缺乏标准化评估基准，导致模型难以公平比较，阻碍创新。此外，多数算法仅依赖连续血糖监测（CGM）数据，忽视胰岛素剂量和碳水化合物摄入等多模态信号，限制了预测性能的提升。因此，急需一个统一的多模态评估框架。
light_analysis.method: MetaboNet-Bench提供一个可扩展的开源框架，整合CGM、胰岛素和碳水化合物数据，用于比较多模态血糖预测模型。研究通过基准测试多种近期模型（包括自定义多模态时间序列模型），评估不同架构（如LSTM、Transformer）和数据模态组合的效果，并引入临床指标分析模型差距。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，添加数据模态的益处取决于模型复杂度：复杂模型更能利用多模态数据提升性能。同时，纳入更多临床指标有助于识别当前模型的不足，为未来研究指明方向。具体性能指标（如RMSE、MAE）因模型而异，但多模态模型在复杂场景下表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaboNet-Bench标准化了1型糖尿病血糖预测评估，推动公平比较和创新。其开源框架支持多模态研究，揭示了数据模态与模型复杂度的关系，并指出临床指标整合的重要性。未来可扩展至更多数据源（如活动、睡眠）和算法。

title: Running the Gauntlet: Re-evaluating the Capabilities of Agents Beyond Familiar Environments
abstract: As agentic systems continue to evolve and are widely deployed in real-world scenarios, there is a growing demand to faithfully evaluate their capabilities. However, current benchmarks are typically built on popular applications with relatively simple tasks and focus on a narrow set of capabilities while overlooking broader dimensions, resulting in saturated performance on modern agents and failing to probe their limitations. To this end, we introduce GauntletBench, a web-based benchmark for evaluating agent generalisation in challenging scenarios, focusing on three underexplored capabilities (temporal perception, graphical understanding, and 3D reasoning), across five less-covered professional applications (Video Editor, Workflow Builder, 3D Modeller, Flight Analyser, and Circuit Designer), each with 20 vision-intensive tasks (100 in total). Our benchmark provides a modular pipeline that comprises an environment compatible with both open- and closed-source agent frameworks, a controlled web-based application, a well-structured task suite, and an automated evaluation engine with diverse metrics. Contrary to widespread expectations, our empirical results reveal that frontier agentic systems remain far from achieving human-level performance. Even the state-of-the-art agent achieves only a 19.1% success rate on our GauntletBench, highlighting the limitations in these overlooked capabilities and generalisation. By comparison, non-expert human annotators achieve over 80% success on our challenging yet feasible tasks, revealing the substantial gap between current agent capabilities and those required for complex real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 GauntletBench 基准，评估智能体在时间感知、图形理解和3D推理三个未充分探索能力上的泛化性能，发现现有智能体与人类差距巨大。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准多基于简单任务和窄领域能力，导致智能体性能饱和，无法揭示其局限性。随着智能体系统在真实场景中广泛部署，迫切需要评估其在复杂、未探索领域的泛化能力，特别是时间感知、图形理解和3D推理等维度，以及专业应用场景（如视频编辑、工作流构建等）。
light_analysis.method: 构建 GauntletBench，包含5个专业应用（视频编辑器、工作流构建器、3D建模器、飞行分析器、电路设计器），每应用20个视觉密集型任务（共100个）。提供模块化管道：兼容开源/闭源智能体框架的环境、受控Web应用、结构化任务套件、自动评估引擎（多种指标）。聚焦三个未充分探索能力：时间感知、图形理解、3D推理。
light_analysis.result: 最先进智能体在 GauntletBench 上成功率仅19.1%，而人类非专家达到80%以上。结果表明现有智能体在未探索能力和泛化方面存在显著局限性，与人类水平差距巨大。
light_analysis.conclusion: GauntletBench 揭示了当前智能体在复杂真实场景下的严重不足，强调需要关注更广泛的能力维度。该基准为评估智能体泛化能力提供了新工具，未来可推动智能体在时间感知、图形理解和3D推理等方向的发展。

title: Beyond Perplexity: UTF-8 Validity in Byte-aware Language Models
abstract: Byte-level tokenization enables language models to handle any Unicode input, but models can generate invalid UTF-8 sequences when encountering rare or unseen characters. We investigate the relationship between training scale and UTF-8 generation reliability with a 355M parameter model trained on 80B tokens from a balanced multilingual corpus of English, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese. We introduce multiple evaluation protocols that isolate UTF-8 structural validity from language modeling. UTF-8 validity convergence lags perplexity by a roughly a factor of two: perplexity stabilizes after 2.1B tokens, but UTF-8 validity requires 4.2B tokens. In context-free generation, rare characters achieve higher structural validity than common characters, suggesting over-specialization of frequent character representations. Through experiments, we observed that reliable UTF-8 generation is a distinct capability requiring evaluation beyond perplexity.

light_analysis.overview: 发现UTF-8生成可靠性是独立于困惑度的能力，需要更大的训练量才能收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 字节级tokenization语言模型能处理任意Unicode输入，但生成时可能出现无效UTF-8序列，尤其遇到罕见或未见字符。现有评估主要依赖困惑度，忽略了UTF-8结构有效性。这一问题重要，因为无效序列影响实际应用，且现有方法无法充分评估生成可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 使用355M参数模型，在80B tokens的多语言语料（英语、日语、韩语、中文）上训练。引入多种评估协议，将UTF-8结构有效性与语言建模隔离。通过对比困惑度和UTF-8有效性收敛速度，分析字符频率对生成可靠性的影响。核心创新在于提出专门的UTF-8有效性评估方法。
light_analysis.result: UTF-8有效性收敛滞后于困惑度约两倍：困惑度在2.1B tokens后稳定，而UTF-8有效性需要4.2B tokens。在无上下文生成中，罕见字符的结构有效性反而高于常见字符，表明常见字符的表示过度专业化。这表明可靠UTF-8生成是一个独立于语言建模的任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 可靠UTF-8生成是独立能力，需在困惑度之外额外评估。学术价值在于揭示了字符频率与生成可靠性的反直觉关系，并证明了训练规模对UTF-8有效性的影响。实际应用可指导多语言模型训练和部署，避免无效输出。未来可探索更大模型和更多语言的影响。

title: SymQNet: Amortized Acquisition for Low-Latency Adaptive Hamiltonian Learning
abstract: Adaptive Hamiltonian learning is central to calibrating and characterizing quantum devices. In an adaptive controller, choosing the next experiment is itself a computation. Bayesian design rules are recomputed after every posterior update, and that step can take seconds. Across hundreds of shots, those seconds become a significant wall-clock cost for adaptivity. We introduce SymQNet, an amortized reinforcement-learning approach for low-latency adaptive Hamiltonian learning. SymQNet learns a posterior-conditioned acquisition policy offline, then uses a fast policy forward pass online while retaining Bayesian posterior feedback. On transverse-field Ising benchmarks, SymQNet substantially reduces acquisition latency relative to bounded Fisher-information search and bounded two-step Bayesian active learning by disagreement (BALD). At five qubits, it reduces acquisition-only decision latency by $47.1\times$ and $72.6\times$ relative to these online baselines; at twelve qubits, full simulated steps take $1.02$ s for SymQNet versus $13.27$ s for bounded two-step BALD. Overall, we show that learned acquisition can make adaptive Hamiltonian learning practical for repeated low-latency workloads.
comment: Submitted to IEEE QCE Quantum Week International Workshop on Quantum Computing and Reinforcement Learning 2026. Code is available: https://github.com/YTomar79/symqnet_quantum

light_analysis.overview: 提出SymQNet，一种摊销强化学习方法，实现低延迟自适应哈密顿学习，大幅降低决策延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应哈密顿学习是校准量子器件的核心，但贝叶斯设计规则每次后验更新后需重计算，耗时数秒，在数百次射击中累积显著延迟。现有方法如有限费雪信息搜索和贝叶斯主动学习（BALD）延迟高，需要低延迟解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出SymQNet，采用离线训练后验条件获取策略，在线快速前向传播同时保留贝叶斯后验反馈。利用摊销强化学习，将获取函数学习为策略网络，避免在线重计算。
light_analysis.result: 在横向场Ising模型基准上，相比有限费雪信息搜索和两步BALD，SymQNet显著降低获取延迟。5量子比特时，获取决策延迟降低47.1倍和72.6倍；12量子比特时，完整模拟步骤SymQNet需1.02秒，两步BALD需13.27秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 学习获取使自适应哈密顿学习在重复低延迟工作负载中实用。主要贡献是摊销化获取，大幅降低延迟。局限性可能需要离线训练，但可泛化。未来工作可扩展到更多量子系统。

title: When Role-playing, Do Models Believe What They Say?
abstract: Language models can state that "the Earth orbits the Sun" and, when role-playing Aristotle, assert the opposite. Recent work argues that persona adoption is fundamental to how language models behave, with models selecting the most appropriate persona for a given context. Does such role-playing merely change the model's outputs, or does it also affect what the model internally represents as truthful? We study this question using the role-play of characters whose beliefs differ from the modern consensus, and induce personas with a number of different methods: prompting, in-context learning (ICL), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and Open Character Training (OCT), and Emergent Misalignment (EM). We measure belief internalization across these approaches with truth probes and with behavioral tests, finding a broad spectrum of belief internalization. Prompting, ICL, and SFT change what the model says with little representational change. EM creates a large, broad shift in the model's truth representation, and OCT a smaller shift that is clearest on the larger model. Understanding when training changes a model's worldview rather than merely its behavior may become increasingly important as AI systems are entrusted with greater autonomy and influence.

light_analysis.overview: 探究语言模型在角色扮演时是否将角色的信念内化为内部表征，发现不同诱导方法导致不同程度的信念内化。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在角色扮演亚里士多德等角色时，会说出与事实相反的陈述。现有研究认为角色扮演是模型行为的基础，但不确定这种改变是否仅停留在输出层面，还是内部真值表征也随之改变。理解这一点对于评估AI系统的可靠性和自主性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过让模型扮演信念偏离现代共识的角色，使用提示、上下文学习、监督微调、开放字符训练和涌现错位等方法诱导角色扮演。利用真值探针和行为测试检测模型内部信念的内化程度，并在不同规模模型上对比。
light_analysis.result: 提示、上下文学习和监督微调主要改变模型输出，内部表征变化很小。涌现错位导致模型整体真值表征发生广泛且显著的转变，而开放字符训练在更大模型上产生较清晰的小幅转变。不同方法呈现信念内化的广泛谱系。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明角色扮演方法对模型内部信念的影响差异巨大。理解训练何时改变模型世界观而非仅改变行为，对于确保AI系统在拥有更大自主权时保持可靠性和真实性至关重要。未来需进一步探索信念内化的机制及伦理影响。

title: Dynamic Multi-Pair Trading Strategy in Cryptocurrency Markets with Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This study aims to determine whether the application of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) as a specialized execution overlay can enhance pair trading in highly volatile cryptocurrency markets. Although classical implementations of the strategy have proven successful in traditional equities, they frequently exhibit rigidity and suffer from severe divergence risks when applied to high-variance environments. To address this need, this research introduces novel concepts. To construct a robust system, we developed a hierarchical "Filter-then-Rank" pair selection methodology and a proprietary "Fixed Risk, Adaptive Mean" execution model. The system employs a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent with a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) layer to govern execution decisions within strict deterministic risk management boundaries. Evaluated on 1-hour interval data from the Binance USD-M Futures market, the optimized RL policy achieved an out-of-sample performance that substantially outperformed the heuristic baseline. A stationary circular block bootstrap robustness check confirms that the agent's risk-adjusted outperformance is statistically significant at the 10 percent level. Although falling marginally short of the stricter 5 percent threshold, this result highlights the extreme idiosyncratic variance characteristic of digital assets. Ultimately, this thesis contributes to the quantitative finance literature by introducing a hybrid architecture that combines statistical arbitrage with DRL execution policies. Furthermore, it delivers a novel framework for safe reinforcement learning via deterministic shielding, proving that anchoring a neural policy to statistically robust boundaries successfully mitigates severe divergence risks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合深度强化学习的动态多对交易策略，通过确定性屏蔽安全强化学习框架提升加密货币市场配对交易的稳健性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统配对交易策略在传统股票市场表现良好，但在高波动性加密货币市场中存在僵化性和严重发散风险。现有方法难以适应数字资产的高特质方差环境，亟需一种能够动态管理风险并优化执行决策的智能系统。
light_analysis.method: 构建层次化“Filter-then-Rank”配对选择方法和专有“Fixed Risk, Adaptive Mean”执行模型，采用带有LSTM层的PPO智能体在严格确定性风险管理边界内控制执行决策。使用Binance USD-M期货市场1小时间隔数据评估。
light_analysis.result: 优化后的RL策略在样本外表现显著优于启发式基线。平稳圆形块引导稳健性检验表明，智能体的风险调整后超额收益在10%水平上统计显著，虽未达到5%门槛，但凸显了数字资产的特有高波动性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了统计套利与DRL执行策略的混合架构，以及通过确定性屏蔽实现安全强化学习的新框架。证明将神经策略锚定在统计稳健边界上能有效缓解严重发散风险，为量化金融领域贡献了新颖方法论。

title: How Many Trees in a Random Forest? A Revisited Approach with Plateau Search and Optuna Integration
abstract: Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) for Random Forest faces a specific difficulty in tuning the number of trees: the predictive score typically improves monotonically with ensemble size, so standard methods such as Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) and Hyperband require a predefined search range and often drive the estimate toward its right boundary. Early-stopping strategies avoid fixing such a range, but can be sensitive to score noise and prone to premature stopping. To address this, we propose an integrated triplet-based plateau-search algorithm that removes the number of trees from the direct TPE search space and still exploits information accumulated across HPO trials. The method adaptively tracks a near-minimal sufficient ensemble size by monitoring relative changes in the out-of-bag (OOB) score across a triplet of forest sizes and shifting this triplet accordingly. This yields an automated and user-interpretable procedure based on a tolerance parameter. We also provide a theoretical analysis: we relate the proposed relative OOB-score criterion to the gap between the current and limiting scores, and derive an asymptotic variance estimate for the corresponding OOB-based absolute relative difference. Experiments show that the selected number of trees can differ substantially from the common heuristic: for most classical benchmark datasets it is smaller, whereas for some high-dimensional bioinformatics datasets, such as Arcene and Dorothea, it is larger. The source code and reproducible experiments are available at https://github.com/lange-am/rf_plateau_hpo.
comment: 24 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Author-prepared preprint of the article published in IEEE Access. The published article is licensed under CC BY 4.0

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于三元组平台搜索的自适应算法，自动确定随机森林中树的数量，避免了预定义搜索范围和早停问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机森林中树的数量调优困难：预测分数随集成大小单调递增，导致TPE和Hyperband等标准方法需预定义搜索范围并易推向边界，而早停策略对噪声敏感易过早停止。现有方法缺乏自动化、鲁棒且可解释的解决方案，影响模型性能与计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出三元组平台搜索算法，将树的数量从TPE搜索空间移除，通过监测三个森林大小的OOB分数相对变化，自适应移动三元组以追踪最小充分集成大小。基于容差参数实现自动化，并推导了相对OOB准则与极限分数差距的理论关系及渐近方差估计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所选树的数量与常见启发式差异显著：对于多数经典基准数据集（如UCI）更小，而对于高维生物信息数据集（如Arcene、Dorothea）更大。该方法避免了预定义范围，有效平衡了性能与计算开销，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种自动化、用户可解释的随机森林树数量确定方法，无需手动设定搜索范围，具有理论支撑和实用价值。可集成至Optuna等HPO框架，未来可扩展至其他集成学习方法的超参数优化。

title: See, Infer, Intervene: Proactive World Modeling for Goal-Oriented Social Intelligence
abstract: Multimodal retail agents should not only recognize what a customer is doing, but also decide whether and how to assist before an explicit request is made. We study this setting through the See--Infer--Intervene (SII) framework, where a device must see pre-interaction behavior, infer latent customer intent, and act by selecting an appropriate service intervention or choosing to wait. We instantiate SII with the Proactive Intent World Model (PIWM), which represents customer state with AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) purchasing phases and BDI (belief, desire, intention) psychological fields, predicts action-conditioned intent transitions, and selects from five response classes: Greet, Elicit, Inform, Recommend, and Hold. We further construct GuidanceSalesBench, a smart-retail benchmark containing state manifests, pre-interaction videos, candidate responses, action-conditioned outcomes, and best-action labels. When conditioned on ground-truth customer state to isolate action selection, PIWM achieves 0.641 macro F1 on 30 held-out target videos, outperforming a zero-shot Qwen2.5-VL-7B baseline and training variants without balanced action supervision; end-to-end video-only selection drops to 0.295, below the 5-class balanced random baseline of 0.414, identifying video-to-state grounding as the dominant deployment-time bottleneck. A preliminary staged real-store pilot (recorded with paid participants performing scripted customer behaviors) reaches 0.579 action macro F1 on 20 fully annotated videos, with 10 additional accessible videos released with index-level labels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出See-Infer-Intervene框架与Proactive Intent World Model，用于零售场景中主动推断客户意图并选择服务干预，构建GuidanceSalesBench基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态零售代理需要识别客户行为并主动决定是否协助，但现有方法缺乏对未明确请求的意图理解和主动干预能力。提升客户体验和销售效率至关重要，而现有系统通常被动响应，无法在客户表达需求前提供帮助。本研究通过引入心理状态模型和主动干预框架解决这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出SII框架，其中PIWM使用AIDA（注意、兴趣、欲望、行动）购买阶段和BDI（信念、欲望、意图）心理场表示客户状态，预测动作条件下的意图转移，并从五个响应类别（问候、诱导、告知、推荐、等待）中选择干预。构建GuidanceSalesBench基准，包含状态清单、预交互视频、候选响应及最佳动作标签。
light_analysis.result: 在30个目标视频上，基于真实客户状态的PIWM达到0.641 macro F1，优于零样本Qwen2.5-VL-7B基线；端到端视频输入仅0.295 F1，低于随机基线0.414，表明视频到状态的对齐是主要瓶颈。实际商店试点在20个视频上达到0.579 macro F1，另发布10个带索引标签的视频。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了主动世界模型与基准，验证了基于心理状态推断的干预选择框架的有效性。视频接地是部署中的主导挑战，未来可改进视频理解或引入更丰富的状态表示，推动零售代理从被动响应向主动服务演进。

title: Beyond Independent Manipulation: Individual Fairness-aware Strategic Classification with Peer Imitation
abstract: Strategic classification (SC) investigates scenarios where agents manipulate their features to obtain favorable decisions from predictive models. Existing fairness-aware SC approaches primarily focus on group fairness and typically assume that agents respond independently. However, when individual fairness is required, ensuring similar individuals receive similar outcomes, agents' manipulation becomes interdependent: an agent's preferred manipulation depends on the neighborhoods' outcomes. This induces a mismatch between classical SC formulations and fairness-aware decision settings, where independent models no longer accurately characterize strategic manipulations. To address this issue, we introduce individual fairness-aware strategic classification (IFSC), a framework that models peer-driven manipulation arising from individual fairness, where agents imitate nearby positively decided peers to obtain favorable outcomes. IFSC characterizes strategic manipulation as similarity-based imitation toward visible accepted peers and learns classifiers under the resulting post-manipulation distributions. To account for uncertainty in peer observability, IFSC employs a robust learning process that introduces stochastic perturbations during manipulation simulation. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that IFSC improves individual-fairness consistency and mitigates imitation-induced distortions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出个体公平性感知战略分类框架IFSC，建模由个体公平性引发的同伴驱动的特征操纵。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有公平感知战略分类主要关注群体公平，并假设代理独立响应，但实际中为确保个体公平（相似个体获得相似结果），代理的操纵行为相互依赖，经典战略分类公式不再适用。这导致无法准确刻画个体公平性场景下的战略操纵，亟需新框架解决该匹配问题。
light_analysis.method: IFSC框架将战略操纵建模为基于相似性的同伴模仿：代理模仿附近被积极决策的同伴以获得有利结果。它学习在操纵后分布下的分类器，并引入鲁棒学习过程，通过向操纵模拟中注入随机扰动来处理同伴可见性的不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，IFSC提高了个体公平一致性，并减轻了模仿引起的扭曲。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线方法的量化对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了个体公平性感知战略分类框架IFSC，建模同伴驱动的特征操纵，解决了独立假设与个体公平要求之间的不匹配问题。该研究具有理论意义和实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的操纵行为或鲁棒性增强方法。

title: From One-Pass SGD to Data Reuse: Mini-Batch Scaling Laws in Sketched Linear Regression
abstract: Scaling laws provide compact descriptions of how prediction error varies with compute, model size, and data, but existing theory mainly treats single-sample SGD or full data reuse, leaving the role of mini-batching unclear. We study batch scaling laws for sketched linear regression under a power-law covariance spectrum and a source condition on the target parameter. We analyze one-pass batch SGD, multi-pass batch SGD with replacement, and multi-pass batch SGD without replacement. Our first result is a risk decomposition: all three procedures share the same irreducible and approximation terms, while their stochastic terms depend on the sampling protocol. One-pass batch SGD splits into bias and variance, whereas the two multi-pass methods split into GD bias, GD variance, and a fluctuation term around a common GD reference trajectory. We then prove source-condition scaling laws for one-pass and multi-pass mini-batch methods. For one-pass batch SGD, mini-batching preserves the approximation and optimization-bias exponents, while the variance scales as $O(\min(M,(T_{\mathrm{eff}}γ)^{1/a})/(B T_{\mathrm{eff}}))$. Thus the usual $1/B$ covariance reduction holds at fixed update count $T$, but in the one-pass regime $T=N/B$ it is partly offset by the shorter optimization horizon. For multi-pass batch SGD, with- and without-replacement sampling have identical approximation and GD bias/variance terms; they differ only in the fluctuation covariance prefactor, which is $1/B$ with replacement and $ρ_{N,B}=(N-B)/(B(N-1))$ without replacement. Hence without-replacement sampling is less noisy for $B>1$, and when $B=N$ the fluctuation vanishes, recovering deterministic gradient descent. These results place batch size on the same theoretical footing as compute, data, and model dimension in sketched linear regression.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了草图线性回归中mini-batch规模的缩放定律，揭示了不同采样协议下批次大小对风险项的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有缩放定律主要关注单样本SGD或完全数据重用，mini-batch的作用尚不明确。理解批次大小如何与计算量、数据量和模型维度共同影响预测误差，对于优化训练策略、提升计算效率至关重要，尤其是在大规模学习中。
light_analysis.method: 研究在幂律协方差谱和目标参数源条件下，分析三种采样协议：单次遍历批量SGD、多次遍历有放回和无放回批量SGD。通过风险分解，将随机项与采样协议关联，并证明单次遍历中方差随批次大小和有效更新次数的缩放关系，以及多次遍历中无放回采样的波动项具有更小的方差。
light_analysis.result: 对于单次遍历批量SGD，方差缩放为O(min(M, (T_eff γ)^{1/a})/(B T_eff))，表明固定更新次数时方差随1/B降低，但在一次遍历中此效应被缩短的优化时间部分抵消。多次遍历中，无放回采样的波动协方差因子为ρ_{N,B}=(N-B)/(B(N-1))，比有放回的1/B更小，且当B=N时波动消失，退化为确定性梯度下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文将批次大小纳入草图线性回归缩放定律的理论框架，结果表明无放回采样在批次大于1时更有效。这为优化训练中的批量选择提供了理论指导，有助于提高计算效率。未来可扩展至非线性模型。

title: Chebyshev Policies and the Mountain Car Problem: Reinforcement Learning for Low-Dimensional Control Tasks
abstract: We analytically solve the Mountain Car problem, a canonical benchmark in RL, and derive an optimal control solution, closing a gap after 36 years. This enables us to reveal two surprising insights: The optimal control is quite simple, yet modern RL agents display a large gap to optimality. Motivated by the analysis of the optimal control, we introduce Chebyshev policies as a universal (i.e. dense) class of RL policies from first principles. They can be trained as drop-in replacements of neural nets, reducing the regret by a factor of 4.18, while requiring 277 times fewer parameters, fostering sample efficiency, explainability and realtime capability. Chebyshev policies are evaluated on further RL tasks, including a real-world nonlinear motion control testbed. They consistently improve performance over neural nets with PPO, ARS and REINFORCE. Our results demonstrate how Chebyshev policies offer a compelling and lightweight alternative or addition to neural nets for low-dimensional control tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文解析Mountain Car问题的最优控制解，并引入Chebyshev策略作为神经网络的高效替代，用于低维控制任务。
light_analysis.motivation: Mountain Car问题是强化学习中的经典基准，但36年来其最优控制解一直是空白。现代RL智能体与最优策略之间存在显著差距，而神经网络策略往往参数过多、解释性差，在低维控制任务中效率低下。本文旨在通过解析最优解，设计一种更简单、高效、可解释的通用策略类。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过解析推导获得Mountain Car问题的最优控制解。基于此，从第一性原理提出Chebyshev策略，利用切比雪夫多项式作为基函数构建策略网络，作为神经网络的直接替代品。该策略可无缝集成到PPO、ARS、REINFORCE等RL算法中，并在多个低维控制任务（包括真实世界的非线性运动控制平台）上评估。
light_analysis.result: Chebyshev策略在Mountain Car任务上将遗憾（regret）降低4.18倍，同时参数数量减少277倍。在多个RL任务中，Chebyshev策略一致优于使用神经网络的PPO、ARS和REINFORCE，展示了更高的样本效率、可解释性和实时能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过解析经典问题的最优解，提出了Chebyshev策略这一轻量级替代方案，显著提升了低维控制任务的性能与效率。该工作为RL中策略表示提供了新思路，尤其适用于对参数效率、可解释性和实时性要求高的场景。未来可能扩展到高维任务或与其他表示方法结合。

title: Sutra: Tensor-Op RNNs as a Compilation Target for Vector Symbolic Architectures
abstract: Sutra is a typed, purely functional programming language whose compiled forward pass is a PyTorch neural network. The compiler beta-reduces the whole program -- primitives, control flow, string I/O -- to one fused tensor-op graph over a frozen embedding substrate. Rotation binding, unbind, bundle, polynomial Kleene three-valued logic, and tail-recursive loops all lower to tensor operations; the Kleene connectives are Lagrange-interpolated polynomials exact on the {-1, 0, +1} truth grid. Validation is one fact tested two ways. (1) The same program runs on four frozen embeddings spanning two modalities -- three text encoders (nomic-embed-text, all-minilm, mxbai-embed-large) and one protein language model (ESM-2) -- and decodes bundles at 100% accuracy through width k=8 on every substrate, where the textbook Hadamard product has already collapsed (2.5% on mxbai-embed-large, 7.5% on all-minilm). (2) PyTorch autograd flows through the actually compiled graph: a fuzzy-rule classifier written in .su trains from random init (18.7 +/- 9.5%; chance = 20%, five classes) to 100.0 +/- 0.0% (three seeds) by backpropagating through the emitted graph, the symbolic source unmodified. A weighted variant additionally trains a scalar cosine gain and writes it back into the .su source as a numeric literal; recompiling reproduces the trained behaviour to ~2e-7 per logit, so the trained model is itself legible, recompilable code. The same artifact is therefore both a logic program and a trainable neural network.
comment: Modified NeurIPS submission, see AI declaration and replication materials at end of paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sutra语言，将符号程序编译为张量运算RNN，实现可训练且可解释的神经网络。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有向量符号架构（VSA）通常手工设计操作或使用不可微的离散符号，缺乏可训练性。Sutra旨在实现符号逻辑的可微编译，使程序既是逻辑模型又是可训练的神经网络，从而弥合符号AI与连接主义的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 使用纯函数式编程语言Sutra，编译为PyTorch神经网络。通过β-归约将整个程序（原语、控制流、字符串I/O）转换为融合张量图。支持旋转绑定、解绑、捆绑、Kleene三值逻辑的多项式插值（在{-1,0,+1}精确），以及尾递归循环。使用多个冻结嵌入（文本和蛋白质）。
light_analysis.result: 在四种冻结嵌入（三种文本编码器、一种蛋白质模型）上，宽度k=8时100%解码，而Hadamard乘积失败（2.5%-7.5%）。模糊规则分类器通过反向传播从随机初始化（18.7±9.5%，机会20%）训练到100±0%（三颗种子）。加权变体训练标量余弦增益并写回源代码，重编译再现行为至~2e-7每logit。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sutra使同一工件既是逻辑程序又是可训练神经网络，确保可解释性和可重编译性。学术价值在于连接符号AI和连接主义，实际应用包括在资源受限设备上实现透明推理。未来可扩展至更大规模符号计算。

title: Library Drift: Diagnosing and Fixing a Silent Failure Mode in Self-Evolving LLM Skill Libraries
abstract: Self-evolving skill libraries face a silent failure mode we term \emph{library drift}: unbounded skill accumulation without outcome-driven lifecycle management causes retrieval degradation, false-positive injections, and performance stagnation. Recent evaluation confirms the symptom (LLM-authored skills deliver +0.0pp gain while human-curated ones deliver +16.2pp (SkillsBench)), yet the underlying mechanism has not been isolated. We provide (1) a \textbf{reproducible trigger}: ablations that isolate drift: one disables skill injection (flat floor, +0.002), one imposes premature retirement (active harm, $-$0.019); (2) \textbf{trace-level diagnostics}: an append-only evidence log with per-skill contribution scores, attribution verdicts, and router engagement metrics that make the failure visible before it reaches end-task scores; and (3) a \textbf{verified fix}: a minimal governance recipe (outcome-driven retirement + bounded active-cap + meta-skill authoring prior) that lifts held-out pass@1 from a 0.258 baseline to a late-window mean of 0.584 (rolling gain $+$0.328) on MBPP+ hard-100 over 100 rounds. Eight ablations decompose which governance mechanisms are load-bearing and which are subsumed, providing a concrete playbook for diagnosing library drift in any self-evolving agent.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on Failure Modes in Agentic AI (FAGEN@ICML 2026), Seoul, South Korea

light_analysis.overview: 发现并修复自演化技能库中的静默失败模式“library drift”，提供可重复的触发、诊断和治理方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 自演化技能库面临“library drift”问题：无限制的技能积累缺乏结果驱动的生命周期管理，导致检索退化、假阳性注入和性能停滞。现有评估显示，LLM生成的技能带来0.0%收益，而人工编写的技能提升16.2%，但底层机制未被揭示。该问题阻碍了智能体持续学习能力，亟需系统性诊断与修复。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出三部分贡献：(1) 可重复触发：通过消融实验隔离漂移，禁用技能注入（平坦底部，+0.002）和强制提前退役（主动伤害，-0.019）。(2) 追踪级诊断：构建追加式证据日志，包含每技能贡献评分、归属判定和路由器参与度指标，在端任务分数下降前暴露故障。(3) 已验证修复：最小治理方案（结果驱动退役+有界活跃容量+元技能创作先验），在MBPP+ hard-100上经过100轮测试。
light_analysis.result: 修复后，held-out pass@1从0.258基线提升至后期窗口均值0.584，滚动增益为+0.328。八个消融实验分解了各治理机制的负载和可包含性，表明该方案有效：结果驱动退役和活跃容量限制是关键负载，元技能先验提供了额外收益。相比基线，性能大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统诊断了自演化技能库的“library drift”问题，并提供了可操作的诊断框架和修复方案。该工作对构建稳健的终身学习智能体具有重要学术价值，可应用于机器人、对话系统等自动化技能积累场景。未来可探索跨领域泛化性及动态环境适应性。

title: The Annotation Scarcity Paradox in Low-Resource NLP Evaluation: A Decade of Acceleration and Emerging Constraints
