abstract: Over the past decade, low-resource natural language processing (NLP) has experienced explosive growth, propelled by cross-lingual transfer, massively multilingual models, and the rapid proliferation of benchmarks. Yet this apparent progress masks a critical, insufficiently examined tension: the deep sociolinguistic expertise required to evaluate increasingly complex generative systems is severely strained, inequitably distributed, and structurally marginalised. We present a critical narrative survey of low-resource NLP evaluation (2014--present), tracing its evolution across three phases: early heuristic optimism, the illusions of top-down benchmark scaling, and the current era of generative bottlenecks. We conceptualise the \emph{Annotation Scarcity Paradox}, the structural friction arising when the technical capacity to scale models vastly outpaces the sovereign human infrastructure required to authentically evaluate them. By examining extractive data pipelines, undercompensated ``ghost work'', and language data flaring, we argue that this paradox threatens the epistemic validity of reported progress. We survey emerging responses -- including data augmentation, model-based evaluation, participatory curation, and annotation-efficient approaches via item response theory and active learning -- and assess their equity and validity trade-offs. We close with a practitioner call to action, arguing that overcoming this bottleneck requires a paradigm shift from transactional data extraction to relational, community-embedded evaluation rooted in epistemic governance, data sovereignty, and shared ownership.

light_analysis.overview: 提出“标注稀缺悖论”，批判性回顾低资源NLP评估的十年演变，指出评估基础设施瓶颈威胁进展有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 低资源NLP在跨语言迁移和多语言模型推动下快速增长，但评估所需的社会语言学专业知识严重不足、分布不均且被边缘化。现有基准扩展和模型能力提升掩盖了评估瓶颈，导致报告进展的认知有效性受到质疑。需要系统审视这一结构性矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 采用批判性叙述调查方法，梳理2014年至今低资源NLP评估的三个阶段：早期启发式乐观、自上而下基准扩展的幻觉、当前生成式瓶颈。提出“标注稀缺悖论”概念，分析提取式数据管道、低补偿“幽灵工作”和语言数据激增等现象。调查数据增强、基于模型的评估、参与式策展以及基于项目反应理论和主动学习的标注高效方法，评估其公平性与有效性权衡。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出定量实验结果。论文主要通过概念分析和定性讨论揭示问题，指出当前方法在公平性和有效性上存在权衡，且未能根本解决评估基础设施瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 低资源NLP评估面临根本性挑战，克服瓶颈需要从交易式数据提取转向关系性、社区嵌入的评估范式，基于认知治理、数据主权和共享所有权。呼吁实践者采取行动，推动范式转变。

title: Semantic Generative Tuning for Unified Multimodal Models
abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) strive to consolidate visual understanding and visual generation within a single architecture. However, prevailing training paradigms independently optimize understanding via sparse text signals and generation through dense pixel objectives. Such a decoupled strategy yields misaligned representation spaces, isolating visual understanding from generation and hindering their mutual reinforcement. This work presents the first systematic investigation into generative post-training, where we formulate hierarchical visual tasks as generative proxies to bridge the isolation in UMMs. Our empirical investigation reveals that high-level semantic tasks, particularly image segmentation, serve as optimal proxies. Unlike low-level tasks that distract models with texture details, segmentation provides structural semantics that significantly enhance both vision-centric perception and generative layout fidelity. Building upon these insights, we introduce Semantic Generative Tuning (SGT), a novel paradigm that leverages segmentation as a generative proxy to align and synergize multimodal capabilities. Mechanistic analyses further demonstrate that SGT fundamentally improves feature linear separability and optimizes visual-textual attention allocation pattern. Extensive evaluations show that SGT consistently improves both multimodal comprehension and generative fidelity across mainstream benchmarks. Our code is available on the https://song2yu.github.io/SGT/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义生成微调（SGT）范式，利用图像分割作为生成代理，对齐统一多模态模型中的视觉理解与生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）旨在单一架构中整合视觉理解与生成，但现有训练方法独立优化理解（稀疏文本信号）和生成（密集像素目标），导致表征空间错位，阻碍两者互促。本文首次系统研究生成式后训练，通过层次化视觉任务作为生成代理来桥接隔离，解决模型内部理解与生成不一致的问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过实证发现高层语义任务（如图像分割）是理想的生成代理，低层纹理任务会分散模型注意力。提出语义生成微调（SGT），将分割任务作为生成代理融入后训练阶段，对齐多模态能力。机制分析表明SGT提升了特征线性可分性，并优化了视觉-文本注意力分配模式。
light_analysis.result: 在主流多模态理解与生成基准上，SGT一致提升了模型性能，包括更好的视觉感知和生成布局保真度。具体数值指标未在摘要中详述，但强调广泛评估验证了有效性。与现有方法相比，SGT缓解了理解与生成间的隔离，实现了相互增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统探索UMMs的生成式后训练，提出SGT以分割为代理协同理解与生成，理论分析揭示了其改善特征和注意力的机制。该方法具有学术价值，为统一多模态建模提供新思路，代码已开源。未来可探索其他层次化任务作为代理。

title: Evaluating Deep Research Agents on Expert Consulting Work: A Benchmark with Verifiers, Rubrics, and Cognitive Traps
abstract: Frontier deep research agents (DRAs) are being deployed in enterprise workflows faster than they are being evaluated. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall, single-hop QA, or generic agentic skill, and miss the multi-document, decision-grade deliverables DRAs are asked to produce. We introduce a benchmark of 70 SME-authored management consulting prompts, each embedding cognitive traps that penalize surface-pattern reasoning. Three frontier agents, namely Claude Opus~4.6, OpenAI o3-deep-research and Gemini~3.1~Pro deep-research, are scored on two complementary layers: deterministic binary verifiers (mean 14.9 per task) and a five-criterion 0--3 SME rubric (Data Integrity, Analytical Rigor, Relevance \& Focus, Execution Precision, Format \& Deliverability), combined into a Verifier-Rubric Score (VRS, 0--100).   Acceptance under a joint threshold (rubric mean $\geq 2.5$ and verifier pass rate $\geq 80\%$) is uniformly low: o3 15.7\%, Claude 12.9\%, Gemini 12.9\%. Pairwise differences are statistically indistinguishable. On the continuous VRS, o3 leads (61.4~[CI: 55.2,\,67.5]), followed by Gemini (52.6) and Claude (38.5); the o3--Claude gap ($Δ{=}22.9$, $p{<}0.001$) survives Bonferroni correction. No agent averages above the rubric's ``adequate'' threshold of 2.0; no agent's mean verifier pass rate reaches the 80\% acceptance floor. Each agent fails distinctively: Claude leads on data fabrication and file-access failures; o3 propagates cascading computation errors; Gemini oscillates between the highest perfect-verifier rate and the most catastrophic collapses. The benchmark, evaluation code, and full prompt corpus are publicly released.
comment: Updating the paper with more data. Will resubmit

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个包含认知陷阱的基准，评估三个前沿深度研究代理在管理咨询任务上的表现，发现所有代理性能均未达到可接受阈值。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要衡量事实回忆、单跳问答或通用代理技能，忽略了深度研究代理在真实企业工作流中所需的多文档、决策级交付物。随着DRAs快速部署，急需更严格的评估方法来检测其实际能力，特别是面对认知陷阱时的表面推理倾向。
light_analysis.method: 构建70个由领域专家编写的管理咨询提示，每个嵌入认知陷阱。采用两层评分：确定性二元验证器（平均每任务14.9个）和五标准0-3 SME评分（数据完整性、分析严谨性、相关性与聚焦、执行精度、格式与可交付性），组合为Verifier-Rubric Score（VRS 0-100）。评估三个前沿代理：Claude Opus 4.6、OpenAI o3-deep-research、Gemini 3.1 Pro deep-research。
light_analysis.result: 联合阈值（rubric均值≥2.5且验证器通过率≥80%）接受率低：o3 15.7%，Claude 12.9%，Gemini 12.9%；连续VRS上o3领先（61.4），Gemini（52.6），Claude（38.5），o3-Claude差距显著（Δ=22.9, p<0.001）。无代理rubric均值超过2.0，无代理验证器通过率达80%。各代理失败模式不同：Claude数据伪造和文件访问失败，o3传播计算错误，Gemini在完美和灾难性结果间摇摆。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前深度研究代理在专家咨询任务上远未达到可接受水平，基准和评估代码已公开。学术价值在于提供了更严格的评估框架，识别了代理的特定弱点；实际应用价值在于指导代理改进方向。未来可扩展至其他专家领域，并探索如何缓解认知陷阱。

title: Weak-to-Strong Elicitation via Mismatched Wrong Drafts
abstract: We consider whether off-policy experience from a smaller, weaker model can elicit capability in a stronger learner that on-policy RL fine-tuning (e.g., GRPO) does not reach. We find that injecting mathematically wrong drafts from a smaller but more domain-trained model -- mismatched to the current problem -- into a stronger learner's GRPO context consistently outperforms standard on-policy GRPO on held-out MATH-500 and out-of-distribution AIME 2025/2026. Concretely, we use Mathstral-7B as the learner, Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B as the draft model, 8.8K Level 3--5 MATH problems (with MATH-500 held out), and train with Dr. GRPO. Mismatch is an active ingredient: shuffling drafts to mismatched problems while holding everything else constant yields $+1.62$pp on MATH-500 (greedy pass@1) over the matched-wrong variant ($n=10$ seeds, $p=0.0015$, Welch's $t$). In fact, the mismatched-wrong variant leads all other variants we tested on MATH-500 across both greedy pass@1 and sampling pass@$k$. On out-of-distribution AIME 2025 and 2026, the mismatched-wrong variant uniquely lifts pass@$k$ above both Mathstral-7B (in its native [INST] format) and the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B draft model at every sample budget from $k=1$ to $k=1024$ across 2 seeds ($+14.2$pp on 2025 and $+9.0$pp on 2026 at pass@1024 over Mathstral-7B), and at pass@1024 also leads no-draft, matched-wrong, and mismatched-correct variants on both years. All variants use the same prompt with no draft injection at test time. The recipe -- trained on a single GPU with no SFT, no reward models, no synthesized data, and no produce-critique-revise inner loop -- reaches 71.98% MATH-500 on Mathstral-7B-v0.1, the highest published result on this model to our knowledge, surpassing the heavier WizardMath pipeline at 70.9% on full MATH (SFT + PPO with process/instruction reward models).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种弱到强激发方法，通过向强学习者注入来自更小模型的不匹配错误草稿，显著提升数学推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准在线强化学习微调（如GRPO）可能无法充分激发强学习者的能力，而现有离线经验方法通常使用匹配的正确或错误示例。本文探究利用来自较小但领域训练更充分的模型的不匹配错误草稿，以激发强学习者潜在能力，突破在线RL性能上限。
light_analysis.method: 使用Mathstral-7B作为学习者，Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B作为草稿模型，在8.8K MATH问题（Level 3-5）上采用Dr. GRPO训练。核心创新是将与当前问题不匹配的错误草稿注入GRPO上下文，即来自小模型但针对不同问题的错误解答，并对比匹配错误、不匹配正确等变体。测试时无草稿注入。
light_analysis.result: 不匹配错误变体在MATH-500上贪婪pass@1领先匹配错误变体1.62个百分点（p=0.0015），且所有指标最优。在分布外AIME 2025/2026上，该变体在所有采样预算下优于基线和草稿模型，pass@1024分别提升14.2和9.0个百分点。最终Mathstral-7B达71.98% MATH-500，为当前最高公开结果，超过WizardMath的70.9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明不匹配错误草稿可有效激发强学习者能力，无需SFT、奖励模型、合成数据或复杂循环，仅需单GPU训练，具有高效性和实用性。未来可探索更广泛的错配策略和跨领域迁移。局限性可能包括对特定模型和任务的依赖。

title: Not All Proofs Are Equal: Evaluating LLM Proof Quality Beyond Correctness
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become capable mathematical problem-solvers, often producing correct proofs for challenging problems. However, correctness alone is not sufficient: mathematical proofs should also be clear, concise, insightful, and transferable to other problems. While this proof quality is subjective and depends on the reader and context, many of its components are concrete and broadly valued. In this work, we identify such components and introduce ProofRank, a benchmark curated from challenging mathematical competitions. ProofRank evaluates several scalable proxies of proof quality: (i) conciseness, measuring whether proofs avoid unnecessary steps; (ii) computational ease, measuring the extent to which a proof relies on tedious calculations; (iii) cognitive simplicity, measuring how accessible the used proof techniques are; (iv) diversity, measuring how varied a model's proofs for a single problem are; and (v) adaptivity, measuring whether a model can follow a specified proof technique. Across models, we find substantial differences in proof quality that are not captured by correctness-only benchmarks. We also observe significant trade-offs between proof-quality metrics and correctness, suggesting that future evaluations of mathematical reasoning should measure how useful LLM-generated proofs are.
comment: 9 main text pages, 36 total pages, Accepted at ICML 2026 AI for Math workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ProofRank 基准，从简洁性、计算易用性、认知简单性、多样性和适应性五个维度评估 LLM 生成证明的质量，超越仅关注正确性的传统方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能生成正确数学证明，但正确性不足以保证证明的清晰、简洁、洞察力和可迁移性。现有基准仅关注正确性，忽略了读者和上下文依赖的证明质量要素。这些质量维度虽主观，但许多具体组件被广泛重视。因此，需要新的评估方法系统衡量 LLM 证明的有用性，推动更全面的数学推理评价。
light_analysis.method: 论文从数学竞赛中构建 ProofRank 基准，定义五个可扩展的证明质量代理：简洁性（避免多余步骤）、计算易用性（减少繁琐计算）、认知简单性（技术可访问性）、多样性（同一问题的多变证明）和适应性（遵循指定技巧）。通过评估多个 LLM 在这些代理上的表现，量化证明质量差异，并与正确性指标进行对比分析。
light_analysis.result: 不同模型在 ProofRank 的各质量代理上表现出显著差异，这些差异未被仅考虑正确性的基准捕获。同时，正确性与质量代理之间存在显著权衡，例如高正确性模型可能在简洁性或适应性上较弱。结果表明，未来评估应综合衡量 LLM 生成证明的有用性，而非仅依赖正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了数学证明质量的多维性，并提供了 ProofRank 基准来系统评估 LLM 在正确性之外的性能。其学术价值在于推动数学推理评估范式的扩展，实际应用价值在于指导选择更适合教学或研究的模型。局限性包括质量代理的覆盖范围有限，未来可探索更多主观维度和用户研究。

title: Closed-Loop CO2 Storage Control With History-Based Reinforcement Learning and Latent Model-Based Adaptation
abstract: Closed-loop management of geological CO2 storage requires control policies that adapt to uncertain reservoir behavior while relying on observations that are realistically available during operation. This work formulates CO2 injection and brine-production control as a partially observable sequential decision problem and studies deployable deep reinforcement-learning controllers trained with high-fidelity reservoir simulation. We first compare privileged-state, well-only, history-conditioned, masking-curriculum, and asymmetric teacher-student model-free policies in order to quantify the value of temporal well-response information and training-time privileged simulator states. We then evaluate a latent model-based adaptation pipeline that reuses nominal latent dynamics and retunes controllers under known injector failure, leakage-induced dynamics and reward shift, and compartmentalized reservoir connectivity. The results show that history-conditioned policies recover nearly all of the privileged-state performance while using only deployable well-level information, and that latent model-based retuning outperforms direct model-free retuning under the same scenario-specific real-simulator budget in the abnormal operating cases. The proposed framework therefore provides a simulator-budget-aware alternative to repeated online history matching and re-optimization for closed-loop CO2 storage control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于历史信息的强化学习和潜在模型自适应方法，实现可部署的CO2封存闭环控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 地质CO2封存的闭环管理需要能够适应不确定储层行为的控制策略，且仅依赖实际操作中可获取的观测数据。现有方法通常需要完整的状态信息或频繁的历史匹配，不易部署。本文旨在开发一种可部署的深度强化学习控制器，利用时序井响应信息和训练时的特权模拟器状态，并解决异常工况下的控制适应问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先比较了特权状态、仅井信息、历史条件、掩码课程和非对称师生等无模型策略，量化时序井响应信息和特权状态的价值。然后提出基于潜在模型的自适应管道，复用标称潜在动力学，在已知注入故障、泄漏导致的动力学和奖励偏移以及分隔储层连通性下重调控制器。训练使用高保真储层模拟，测试真实传感器数据。
light_analysis.result: 历史条件策略在使用仅可部署的井层信息时恢复了几乎全部特权状态性能。在异常操作情况下，基于潜在模型的重调在相同场景特定真实模拟器预算下优于直接无模型重调。该方法为闭环CO2封存控制提供了一种模拟器预算感知的替代方案，避免了重复的在线历史匹配和重新优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了结合历史信息强化学习和潜在模型自适应的CO2封存控制框架，可在仅使用井观测数据的情况下接近特权状态性能，并通过潜在模型有效处理异常工况。该方法具有实际应用价值，减少了计算成本和对完整状态信息的依赖。未来可扩展到更复杂的储层模型和多目标优化。

title: To Use AI as Dice of Possibilities with Timing Computation
abstract: The dominant noun-based modeling paradigm has fundamentally constrained AI development, precluding any adequate representation of the future as an open temporal dimension. This paper introduces a verb-based paradigm, together with precise definitions of \emph{timing computation} and \emph{causal factum}, that enables AI to function as an instrument for spontaneously constructing a causal-reasoning world model.   Applied to longitudinal EHR data from 3,276 breast cancer patients, the framework empirically demonstrates: (1) automatic discovery of clinically significant patient trajectories, and (2) counterfactual timing deduction, that is, a \emph{What-If Machine}. Both results are achieved in a purely data-driven manner, without recourse to prior domain knowledge, and represent, to our knowledge, the first such demonstrations in the machine learning literature.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于动词的建模新范式，通过timing computation和causal factum构建因果推理世界模型，实现数据驱动的患者轨迹发现与反事实推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统基于名词的建模范式无法充分表示未来作为开放时间维度，限制了AI对时间动态和因果关系的建模能力。在医疗决策等领域，需要能够自发构建因果推理模型、支持反事实分析的AI系统，而现有方法依赖领域知识且缺乏对时间因果性的处理。
light_analysis.method: 提出verb-based paradigm，定义timing computation（时间计算）和causal factum（因果事实），使AI能够从数据中自动学习动态因果结构。无需预定义本体或领域知识，基于时序事件数据构建世界模型。应用于3276例乳腺癌患者的纵向EHR数据，采用数据驱动方式学习患者轨迹与反事实时序。
light_analysis.result: 在乳腺癌EHR数据上，框架自动发现临床有意义的患者疾病演化轨迹，并能进行反事实时序推理（What-If Machine），回答如“若早期干预，结果如何”的问题。两项任务均达预期效果，且完全数据驱动，据作者称是机器学习文献中首次实现此类演示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作颠覆了传统的名词中心AI范式，通过动词范式使AI能够处理时间开放性和因果推理。在医疗领域有重要应用价值，如个性化治疗决策、临床试验模拟等。未来可扩展至其他时序因果推理场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Why Are Some Emotions Harder for LLMs? Uncovering the Causal Mechanisms of Emotion Inference via Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in emotionally sensitive human-AI applications, where reliable emotion detection is essential. However, their emotion recognition abilities remain uneven: models often perform well on some emotions while consistently struggling with others. Although recent work has explored emotion mechanisms in LLMs, little is known about why models are weaker on some emotions than others from a mechanistic interpretability perspective. In this work, we investigate emotion-specific biases through the causal mechanisms of emotion inference using sparse autoencoders (SAEs). We systematically identify causal sparse emotion features that drive emotion inference and analyze their sparse causal organization within and across emotions. We show that some emotions, such as surprise and fear, rely on highly concentrated feature sets, whereas disgust exhibits a more distributed sparse causal organization: its causal features are generally weaker, frequently co-activate with features for other emotions, and are often overshadowed by causal features for anger. These representational differences provide a mechanistic explanation for why LLMs struggle more with certain emotions. Finally, we conduct two intervention experiments: targeted steering of weaker causal features to mitigate emotion-specific failures, and global optimization of a steering vector over the identified causal features to improve overall emotion recognition performance.

light_analysis.overview: 利用稀疏自编码器揭示LLM情绪推理的因果机制，解释不同情绪表现差异的原因。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在情感识别任务上表现不均，对某些情绪（如惊讶、恐惧）表现好，对厌恶等情绪表现差。现有研究缺乏从机械可解释性角度解释这种偏差。理解不同情绪推理的因果机制差异对于改进LLM的情感能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）从LLM中提取因果稀疏情绪特征，系统识别驱动情绪推理的因果关系。分析特征的稀疏因果组织，比较不同情绪（惊讶、恐惧、厌恶）的特征集中度、强度、共激活模式。进行两种干预实验：针对弱因果特征的目标导向干预，以及基于因果特征的全局优化干预。
light_analysis.result: 发现惊讶和恐惧依赖高度集中的特征集，而厌恶的特征更分散、更弱，常与其他情绪特征共激活，并被愤怒特征掩盖。这些差异机械地解释了LLM在厌恶等情绪上的困难。干预实验显示：针对弱特征的目标干预可缓解特定情绪失败，全局优化干预可提升整体情感识别性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究从因果机制角度揭示了LLM情绪识别偏差的原因，提出了基于稀疏特征的可解释性分析方法。干预实验证明了通过调整因果特征改善情绪识别能力的可行性。未来可扩展到更多情绪和模型架构，为开发更公平、可靠的情感AI提供指导。

title: Mapping License Plate Recoverability Under Extreme Viewing Angles for Opportunistic Urban Sensing
abstract: Urban environments contain many imaging sensors built for specific purposes, including ATM, body-worn, CCTV, and dashboard cameras. Under the opportunistic sensing paradigm, these sensors can be repurposed for secondary inference tasks such as license plate recognition. Yet objects of interest in such im-agery are often noisy, low-resolution, and captured from extreme viewpoints. Recent advances in AI-based restoration can recover useful information even from severely degraded images. A central challenge is de-termining which distortion parameters allow reliable recovery and which lead to inference failure. This paper introduces recoverability maps, a task-agnostic method for quantifying this boundary. The method combines a dense synthetic sweep of degradation parameters with two summary measures: boundary ar-ea-under-curve, which estimates the recoverable fraction of the parameter space, and a reliability score, which captures the frequency and severity of failures within that region. We demonstrate the method on li-cense plate recognition from highly angled views under realistic camera artifacts. Several restoration archi-tectures are trained and evaluated, including U-Net, Restormer, Pix2Pix, and SR3 diffusion. The best model recovers about 93% of the parameter space. Similar results across models suggest that sensing geometry, ra-ther than architecture, sets the limit of recovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出恢复性地图，量化极端视角下车牌恢复的边界，证明传感几何比模型架构更关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市环境中大量成像传感器（如ATM、监控摄像头）可用于机会感知下的车牌识别，但图像常因极端视角、噪声和低分辨率而严重退化。现有AI恢复技术能部分恢复，但缺乏明确标准判断哪些退化参数可恢复，哪些会导致失败。因此，需要一种方法系统量化恢复边界，为实际部署提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出恢复性地图，一种任务无关的方法。它通过密集合成退化参数扫描（如视角、噪声等），结合两个总结指标：边界曲线下面积（评估参数空间可恢复比例）和可靠性分数（衡量恢复失败频率与严重性）。在极端视角车牌识别任务上，训练并评估了U-Net、Restormer、Pix2Pix和SR3扩散等恢复架构。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型（具体架构未明确）恢复了约93%的参数空间。不同模型间结果相似，表明恢复极限主要由传感几何（如视角）决定，而非具体架构。实验在极端视角和真实相机伪影下进行，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次引入恢复性地图，为机会感知中图像恢复的可行性提供量化分析。贡献包括：提出任务无关的评估框架，揭示传感几何是恢复性能的关键瓶颈。该方法可推广至其他感知任务，但需注意其依赖合成数据，真实场景的泛化性待验证。未来可探索多传感器融合或自适应恢复策略。

title: UniGeo: Unifying Geometric Guidance for Camera-Controllable Image Editing via Video Models
abstract: Camera-controllable image editing aims to synthesize novel views of a given scene under varying camera poses while strictly preserving cross-view geometric consistency. However, existing methods typically rely on fragmented geometric guidance, such as only injecting point clouds at the representation level despite models containing multiple levels, and are mainly based on image diffusion models that operate on discrete view mappings. These two limitations jointly lead to geometric drift and structural degradation under continuous camera motion.   We observe that while leveraging video models provides continuous viewpoint priors for camera-controllable image editing, they still struggle to form stable geometric understanding if geometric guidance remains fragmented. To systematically address this, we inject unified geometric guidance across three levels that jointly determine the generative output: representation, architecture, and loss function.   To this end, we propose UniGeo, a novel camera-controllable editing framework. Specifically, at the representation level, UniGeo incorporates a frame-decoupled geometric reference injection mechanism to provide robust cross-view geometry context. At the architecture level, it introduces geometric anchor attention to align multi-view features. At the loss function level, it proposes a trajectory-endpoint geometric supervision strategy to explicitly reinforce the structural fidelity of target views.   Comprehensive experiments across multiple public benchmarks, encompassing both extensive and limited camera motion settings, demonstrate that UniGeo significantly outperforms existing methods in both visual quality and geometric consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniGeo框架，通过三级统一几何指导实现相机可控图像编辑，显著提升几何一致性与视觉质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有相机可控图像编辑方法通常依赖碎片化的几何指导，仅在表示层面注入点云，且基于图像扩散模型处理离散视图映射，导致连续相机运动下出现几何漂移和结构退化。视频模型虽提供连续视角先验，但若几何指导仍碎片化则难以形成稳定几何理解。因此需要系统性地在表示、架构和损失函数三个层面统一几何指导。
light_analysis.method: UniGeo在三级层面注入统一几何指导：表示层采用帧解耦的几何参考注入机制，提供鲁棒的跨视图几何上下文；架构层引入几何锚点注意力对齐多视图特征；损失函数层提出轨迹端点几何监督策略，强化目标视图的结构保真度。框架基于视频模型实现连续视角先验，无需离散视图映射。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开基准上，涵盖大范围与有限相机运动设置，UniGeo在视觉质量和几何一致性上显著优于现有方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但明确提及超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniGeo通过统一三级几何指导，系统解决了相机可控编辑中的几何漂移问题，提升了连续视角下的结构保真度。该方法融合视频模型先验，为视图合成提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的几何交互或实时应用，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: TransXion: A High-Fidelity Graph Benchmark for Realistic Anti-Money Laundering
abstract: Money laundering poses severe risks to global financial systems, driving the widespread adoption of machine learning for transaction monitoring. However, progress remains stifled by the lack of realistic benchmarks. Existing transaction-graph datasets suffer from two pervasive limitations: (i) they provide sparse node-level semantics beyond anonymized identifiers, and (ii) they rely on template-driven anomaly injection, which biases benchmarks toward static structural motifs and yields overly optimistic assessments of model robustness. We propose TransXion, a benchmark ecosystem for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) research that integrates profile-aware simulation of normal activity with stochastic, non-template synthesis of illicit subgraphs.TransXion jointly models persistent entity profiles and conditional transaction behavior, enabling evaluation of "out-of-character" anomalies where observed activity contradicts an entity's socio-economic context. The resulting dataset comprises approximately 3 million transactions among 50,000 entities, each endowed with rich demographic and behavioral attributes. Empirical analyses show that TransXion reproduces key structural properties of payment networks, including heavy-tailed activity distributions and localized subgraph structure. Across a diverse array of detection models spanning multiple algorithmic paradigms, TransXion yields substantially lower detection performance than widely used benchmarks, demonstrating increased difficulty and realism. TransXion provides a more faithful testbed for developing context-aware and robust AML detection methods. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chaos-max/TransXion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高保真反洗钱图基准TransXion，结合画像感知正常行为模拟与随机非模板异常合成，提供更真实的评估平台。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前反洗钱数据集稀疏节点语义且依赖模板驱动异常注入，导致基准偏向静态结构模式，模型评估过于乐观。缺乏真实标注数据阻碍AML机器学习进展。本文旨在创建更逼真的基准以促进上下文感知和鲁棒检测方法的发展。
light_analysis.method: TransXion联合建模持久实体画像和条件交易行为，正常活动模拟采用画像感知方式，异常子图通过随机非模板合成。生成约300万笔交易，涵盖5万个实体，每个实体带有丰富人口统计和行为属性。该方法可评估“异常行为”即观察活动与实体社会经济背景矛盾的情况。
light_analysis.result: 数据集再现支付网络关键结构特性，如重尾活动分布和局部子图结构。在多种检测模型上，TransXion的检测性能显著低于现有常用基准，表明其难度更高、更真实。该基准为开发上下文感知和鲁棒的AML方法提供了更可靠的测试环境。
light_analysis.conclusion: TransXion作为高保真AML基准，解决了现有数据集语义稀疏和异常模板化的问题，推动更真实的模型评估。其数据与代码已公开，可用于开发更上下文感知的反洗钱检测方法。未来可扩展至更多匿名化场景。

title: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
abstract: As LLM agents scale to long-horizon, multi-session deployments, efficiently managing accumulated experience becomes a critical bottleneck. Agent memory systems and agent skill discovery both address this challenge, extracting reusable knowledge from interaction traces, yet a citation analysis of 1{,}136 references across 22 primary papers reveals a cross-community citation rate below 1\%. We propose the \emph{Experience Compression Spectrum}, a unifying framework that positions memory, skills, and rules as points along a single axis of increasing compression (5--20$\times$ for episodic memory, 50--500$\times$ for procedural skills, 1{,}000$\times$+ for declarative rules), directly reducing context consumption, retrieval latency, and compute overhead. Mapping 20+ systems onto this spectrum reveals that every system operates at a fixed, predetermined compression level: none supports adaptive cross-level compression, a gap we term the \emph{missing diagonal}. We further show that specialization alone is insufficient (both communities independently solve shared sub-problems without exchanging solutions), that evaluation methods are tightly coupled to compression levels, that transferability increases with compression at the cost of specificity, and that knowledge lifecycle management remains largely neglected. We articulate open problems and design principles for scalable, full-spectrum agent learning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出经验压缩谱框架，统一记忆、技能和规则，揭示缺失自适应压缩的“对角线”问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在长期多会话部署中，管理经验成为瓶颈。现有记忆系统和技能发现方法相互独立，跨社区引用率低于1%，缺乏统一视角。该研究旨在解决代理经验管理和知识重用问题，突破固定压缩水平的局限。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析22篇主要论文的1136篇参考文献，定义经验压缩谱：情景记忆（5-20倍压缩）、程序性技能（50-500倍）、声明性规则（1000倍以上）。将20多个系统映射到谱上，发现所有系统在固定压缩水平上运作，无法自适应跨级压缩，即“缺失对角线”。
light_analysis.result: 揭示了跨社区引用率低于1%；量化了不同压缩级别的压缩比范围；证明现有系统缺乏自适应压缩能力；发现评估方法与压缩级别紧密耦合；可迁移性随压缩增加而提升但特异性降低；知识生命周期管理被忽视。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架统一了代理记忆、技能和规则的研究，指出了关键缺失（自适应跨级压缩），并提出了开放问题和设计原则。对构建可扩展的全谱代理学习系统具有重要指导意义，未来需探索动态压缩策略和知识生命周期管理。

title: ScheMatiQ: From Research Question to Structured Data through Interactive Schema Discovery
abstract: Many disciplines pose natural-language research questions over large document collections whose answers typically require structured evidence, traditionally obtained by manually designing an annotation schema and exhaustively labeling the corpus, a slow and error-prone process. We introduce ScheMatiQ, which leverages calls to a backbone LLM to take a question and a corpus to produce a schema and a grounded database, with a web interface that lets steer and revise the extraction. In collaboration with domain experts, we show that ScheMatiQ yields outputs that support real-world analysis in law and computational biology. We release ScheMatiQ as open source with a public web interface, and invite experts across disciplines to use it with their own data. All resources, including the website, source code, and demonstration video, are available at: www.ScheMatiQ-ai.com

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScheMatiQ系统，利用大语言模型将自然语言研究问题自动转化为结构化数据，支持交互式模式发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多学科需要从大规模文档集合中提取结构化证据来回答自然语言研究问题，传统方法依赖手动设计注释模式和标注语料库，耗时且易出错。现有方法缺乏自动化和灵活修正能力，限制了分析效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: ScheMatiQ通过调用骨干LLM，输入研究问题和语料库，自动生成注释模式和结构化数据库，并提供交互式Web界面引导用户修正提取过程。系统采用迭代式交互，结合领域专家反馈优化模式发现，支持法律和计算生物学等领域的实际分析。
light_analysis.result: 与领域专家合作，在法律和计算生物学任务中，ScheMatiQ生成的结构化数据支持了真实世界分析，验证了系统的有效性和实用性。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但强调其输出可支撑专业分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScheMatiQ提供了一种自动、交互式的模式发现方案，降低了从非结构化文本构建结构化数据的门槛。作为开源工具，它可被跨学科专家应用于各自数据，促进数据驱动研究。未来可扩展至更多领域并优化交互流程。

title: AfriVoices-KE: A Multilingual Speech Dataset for Kenyan Languages
abstract: AfriVoices-KE is a large-scale multilingual speech dataset comprising approximately 3,000 hours of audio across five Kenyan languages: Dholuo, Kikuyu, Kalenjin, Maasai, and Somali. The dataset includes 750 hours of scripted speech and 2,250 hours of spontaneous speech, collected from 4,777 native speakers across diverse regions and demographics. This work addresses the critical underrepresentation of African languages in speech technology by providing a high-quality, linguistically diverse resource. Data collection followed a dual methodology: scripted recordings drew from compiled text corpora, translations, and domain-specific generated sentences spanning eleven domains relevant to the Kenyan context, while unscripted speech was elicited through textual and image prompts to capture natural linguistic variation and dialectal nuances. A customized mobile application enabled contributors to record using smartphones. Quality assurance operated at multiple layers, encompassing automated signal-to-noise ratio validation prior to recording and human review for content accuracy. Though the project encountered challenges common to low-resource settings, including unreliable infrastructure, device compatibility issues, and community trust barriers, these were mitigated through local mobilizers, stakeholder partnerships, and adaptive training protocols. AfriVoices-KE provides a foundational resource for developing inclusive automatic speech recognition and text-to-speech systems, while advancing the digital preservation of Kenya's linguistic heritage.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了包含5种肯尼亚语言的3000小时多语言语音数据集，填补非洲语言在语音技术中的资源空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 非洲语言在语音技术中严重缺乏代表性，现有数据集无法支持包容性自动语音识别和文本转语音系统。肯尼亚拥有多种语言，但相关资源稀缺，导致语言技术和数字保护落后。该研究旨在提供高质量、多语言语音数据，促进低资源语言技术发展并保护语言遗产。
light_analysis.method: 数据集包含3000小时音频（750小时脚本、2250小时自发），来自4777名母语者。脚本录音基于编译文本、翻译和11个领域的生成句子；自发语音通过文本和图像提示收集。定制移动应用用于录制，质量保证包括自动信噪比验证和人工内容审查。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出实验性能指标，但数据集规模（3000小时）、语言覆盖（5种）和多样性（脚本与自发）为低资源语音技术提供了坚实基础。挑战包括基础设施、设备兼容性和信任问题，通过本地动员和伙伴关系缓解。
light_analysis.conclusion: AfriVoices-KE为肯尼亚语言的多语言语音技术提供了关键基础资源，有助于推动包容性自动语音识别和文本转语音系统发展，并支持数字语言保护。未来可用于低资源场景的模型训练，但需注意数据分布和方言覆盖的局限性。

title: MAVFusion: Efficient Infrared and Visible Video Fusion via Motion-Aware Sparse Interaction
abstract: Infrared and visible video fusion combines the object saliency from infrared images with the texture details from visible images to produce semantically rich fusion results. However, most existing methods are designed for static image fusion and cannot effectively handle frame-to-frame motion in videos. Current video fusion methods improve temporal consistency by introducing interactions across frames, but they often require high computational cost. To mitigate these challenges, we propose MAVFusion, an end-to-end video fusion framework featuring a motion-aware sparse interaction mechanism that enhances efficiency while maintaining superior fusion quality. Specifically, we leverage optical flow to identify dynamic regions in multi-modal sequences, adaptively allocating computationally intensive cross-modal attention to these sparse areas to capture salient transitions and facilitate inter-modal information exchange. For static background regions, a lightweight weak interaction module is employed to maintain structural and appearance integrity. By decoupling the processing of dynamic and static regions, MAVFusion simultaneously preserves temporal consistency and fine-grained details while significantly accelerating inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple infrared and visible video benchmarks, achieving a speed of 14.16 FPS at $640 \times 480$ resolution. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/MAVFusion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAVFusion框架，利用运动感知稀疏交互机制实现高效红外与可见光视频融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有红外与可见光融合方法多针对静态图像，无法有效处理视频中的帧间运动。当前视频融合方法通过帧间交互提升时间一致性，但计算成本高。实际应用中需要高效且高质量的融合方法，因此提出MAVFusion以在保持融合质量的同时提高效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出MAVFusion端到端视频融合框架，核心是运动感知稀疏交互机制。利用光流识别多模态序列中的动态区域，自适应地将计算密集的跨模态注意力分配到稀疏动态区域以捕获显著变化和促进信息交换；对静态背景区域使用轻量级弱交互模块保持结构和外观完整性。通过解耦处理动态和静态区域，同时保持时间一致性和细粒度细节，加速推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个红外与可见光视频基准上达到最先进性能，在640×480分辨率下实现14.16 FPS的融合速度。摘要未提供具体准确率等指标，但表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAVFusion通过运动感知稀疏交互有效解决了视频融合中效率与质量的平衡问题，具有学术价值和应用潜力。局限性可能在于依赖光流估计精度，未来可探索更高效的运动表示或扩展到其他多模态视频任务。

title: From Guessing to Placeholding: A Cost-Theoretic Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Code Completion
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional proficiency in code completion, they typically adhere to a Hard Completion (HC) paradigm, compelling the generation of fully concrete code even amidst insufficient context. Our analysis of 3 million real-world interactions exposes the limitations of this strategy: 61% of the generated suggestions were either edited after acceptance or rejected despite exhibiting over 80% similarity to the user's subsequent code, suggesting that models frequently make erroneous predictions at specific token positions. Motivated by this observation, we propose Adaptive Placeholder Completion (APC), a collaborative framework that extends HC by strategically outputting explicit placeholders at high-entropy positions, allowing users to fill directly via IDE navigation. Theoretically, we formulate code completion as a cost-minimization problem under uncertainty. Premised on the observation that filling placeholders incurs lower cost than correcting errors, we prove the existence of a critical entropy threshold above which APC achieves strictly lower expected cost than HC. We instantiate this framework by constructing training data from filtered real-world edit logs and design a cost-based reward function for reinforcement learning. Extensive evaluations across 1.5B--14B parameter models demonstrate that APC reduces expected editing costs from 19% to 50% while preserving standard HC performance. Our work provides both a theoretical foundation and a practical training framework for uncertainty-aware code completion, demonstrating that adaptive abstention can be learned end-to-end without sacrificing conventional completion quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应占位符补全（APC）框架，在高熵位置输出占位符，降低代码补全的编辑成本，并保持标准补全质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在代码补全中采用硬补全范式，即使在上下文不足时也生成具体代码。分析3百万真实交互发现61%的建议被编辑或拒绝，且与用户后续代码相似度超80%，表明模型在特定token位置频繁错误预测。因此需要一种不确定性感知的补全方法，减少用户纠正错误的高成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出APC框架，在高熵位置输出显式占位符，用户通过IDE导航直接填充。理论化代码补全为不确定下的成本最小化问题，证明存在临界熵阈值使APC预期成本低于硬补全。从真实编辑日志构建训练数据，设计基于成本的奖励函数进行强化学习，端到端训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在1.5B至14B参数模型上评估，APC将预期编辑成本降低19%至50%，同时保持标准硬补全的准确率。与基线方法相比，在编辑成本上显著优势，且不牺牲补全质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了不确定性感知代码补全的理论基础和实践框架，证明自适应放弃（输出占位符）可端到端学习，有效降低用户编辑成本。未来可探索更复杂的占位符类型或与其他交互方式结合，进一步提升用户体验。

title: Towards Video Anomaly Detection from Event Streams: A Baseline and Benchmark Datasets
abstract: Event-based vision, characterized by low redundancy, focus on dynamic motion, and inherent privacy-preserving properties, naturally fits the demands of video anomaly detection (VAD). However, the absence of dedicated event-stream anomaly detection datasets and effective modeling strategies has significantly hindered progress in this field. In this work, we take the first major step toward establishing event-based VAD as a unified research direction. We first construct multiple event-stream based benchmarks for video anomaly detection, featuring synchronized event and RGB recordings. Leveraging the unique properties of events, we then propose an EVent-centric spatiotemporal Video Anomaly Detection framework, namely EWAD, with three key innovations: an event density aware dynamic sampling strategy to select temporally informative segments; a density-modulated temporal modeling approach that captures contextual relations from sparse event streams; and an RGB-to-event knowledge distillation mechanism to enhance event-based representations under weak supervision. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that our EWAD achieves significant improvements over existing approaches, highlighting the potential and effectiveness of event-driven modeling for video anomaly detection. The benchmark datasets will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出基于事件流的视频异常检测基准和EWAD模型，实现显著性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件视觉具有低冗余、关注动态和隐私保护等特性，天然适合视频异常检测。然而，缺乏专用事件流异常检测数据集和有效建模策略严重阻碍了该领域发展。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立统一的研究方向。
light_analysis.method: 构建多个同步事件和RGB记录的事件流视频异常检测基准。提出EWAD框架，包含三项创新：事件密度感知动态采样策略选择时间信息丰富的片段；密度调制时间建模捕捉稀疏事件流中的上下文关系；RGB到事件知识蒸馏增强弱监督下的事件表示。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，EWAD显著优于现有方法，验证了事件驱动建模在视频异常检测中的潜力和有效性。具体性能改进未明确数值，但强调大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将事件流视频异常检测确立为独立研究方向，提供了基准数据集和高效基线模型，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，未来可推动隐私保护型异常检测发展。

title: NASimJax: A GPU-Accelerated Policy Learning Framework for Penetration Testing
abstract: Penetration testing, the practice of simulating cyberattacks to identify vulnerabilities, is a complex sequential decision-making task that is inherently partially observable and features large action spaces. Training reinforcement learning (RL) policies for this domain faces a fundamental bottleneck: existing simulators are too slow to train on realistic network scenarios at scale, resulting in policies that fail to generalize. We present NASimJax, a complete JAX-based reimplementation of the Network Attack Simulator (NASim), achieving up to 100x higher environment throughput than the original simulator. By running the entire training pipeline on hardware accelerators, NASimJax enables experimentation on larger networks under fixed compute budgets that were previously infeasible. We formulate automated penetration testing as a Contextual POMDP and introduce a network generation pipeline that produces structurally diverse and guaranteed-solvable scenarios. Together, these provide a principled basis for studying zero-shot policy generalization. We use the framework to investigate action-space scaling and generalization across networks of up to 40 hosts. We find that Prioritized Level Replay better handles dense training distributions than Domain Randomization, particularly at larger scales, and that training on sparser topologies yields an implicit curriculum that improves out-of-distribution generalization, even on topologies denser than those seen during training. To handle linearly growing action spaces, we propose a two-stage action decomposition (2SAS) that substantially outperforms flat action masking at scale. Finally, we identify a failure mode arising from the interaction between Prioritized Level Replay's episode-reset behaviour and 2SAS's credit assignment structure. NASimJax thus provides a fast, flexible, and realistic platform for advancing RL-based penetration testing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NASimJax，基于JAX的GPU加速渗透测试模拟器，实现百倍加速，并引入Contextual POMDP和动作分解方法，提升RL策略泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 渗透测试是部分可观测且动作空间大的序列决策任务，现有模拟器速度慢，难以在现实网络规模下训练RL策略，导致泛化能力差。需要高效、可扩展的框架来研究策略泛化。
light_analysis.method: 基于JAX重写NASim，实现全硬件加速，环境吞吐量提升100倍；将渗透测试建模为Contextual POMDP；提出网络生成管道产生结构多样且可解的场景；为应对线性增长的动作空间，提出两阶段动作分解（2SAS）方法。
light_analysis.result: 在多达40台主机的网络实验中，NASimJax实现100倍加速；Prioritized Level Replay比Domain Randomization更适应密集训练分布；稀疏拓扑训练形成隐式课程，提升跨分布泛化；2SAS大幅优于平行动作掩码。但发现Prioritized Level Replay的回合重置与2SAS的信用分配交互导致失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: NASimJax提供了快速、灵活、现实的RL渗透测试平台，揭示了策略泛化的关键因素和失败模式，为大规模自动渗透测试研究奠定基础。未来可探索更高效的信用分配和课程学习策略。

title: Training-Free Generation of Protein Sequences from Small Family Alignments via Stochastic Attention
abstract: Generating novel protein sequences that respect a family's statistical constraints typically requires training deep generative models on thousands to millions of examples. Yet most protein families are small: the median Pfam seed alignment contains only 22 sequences, a regime where learned models overfit or collapse. We propose \emph{stochastic attention} (SA), a training-free sampler that treats the modern Hopfield energy over stored sequences as a Boltzmann distribution and draws samples via Langevin dynamics. The score function is the residual of a single softmax attention operation, eliminating the need for a trained score network, pretraining data, or graphics processing units (GPUs). Across eight Pfam families spanning 37 to 420 sequences and 23 to 262 residues, SA generates sequences with low composition divergence, novelty, and structural plausibility supported by ESMFold and AlphaFold2. Compared with profile hidden Markov models (HMMs), EvoDiff, and the multiple sequence alignment (MSA) Transformer, SA is the only tested method to simultaneously achieve low composition divergence, genuine novelty, and sequence identity within each family's nearest-neighbor identity range; the others drift outside this range or produce near-copies. The critical inverse temperature is predicted from principal component analysis (PCA) dimensionality alone, enabling fully automatic operation from a seed alignment. In two domains with deep mutational scanning data, SA-generated substitutions are enriched for experimentally tolerated mutations beyond a position-matched null, and an independent language model (ESM2-650M) scores them within the natural range. Stochastic attention thus opens training-free sequence generation to the long tail of protein families too small for deep learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机注意力方法，无需训练即可从少量蛋白质家族序列中生成新颖且合理的序列。
light_analysis.motivation: 大多数蛋白质家族的序列数量极少（Pfam中位数为22条），现有深度生成模型需要大量训练数据，在小样本场景下容易过拟合或崩溃，无法有效生成。因此亟需一种无需大量训练数据、能从小型家族比对中生成序列的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将现代Hopfield能量视为存储序列的玻尔兹曼分布，通过Langevin动力学采样生成新序列。得分函数由单次softmax注意力的残差计算得到，无需训练神经网络或使用GPU。逆温度参数可通过主成分分析（PCA）维度自动预测，实现全自动操作。
light_analysis.result: 在8个蛋白质家族（序列数37-420，长度23-262）上，随机注意力生成的序列具有低组成散度、高新颖性，且序列同一性落在家族近邻范围内。与HMM、EvoDiff和MSA Transformer相比，SA是唯一同时满足所有指标的方法。在深度突变扫描实验中，SA生成的替换富集了实验耐受突变，且ESM2评分在自然范围内。
light_analysis.conclusion: 随机注意力为小型蛋白质家族提供了一种无需训练、计算高效的序列生成方法，填补了深度学习无法覆盖的长尾场景。该方法无需预训练数据或GPU，仅需一个种子比对即可自动运行。未来可扩展到更复杂的结构约束或结合其他先验知识。

title: Controllable Egocentric Video Generation via Occlusion-Aware Sparse 3D Hand Joints
abstract: Controllable video generation for complex hand-object interactions is a critical step toward building visual world models. However, existing methods often struggle to achieve fine-grained, 3D-consistent hand articulation in generated videos. By relying on dense 2D trajectories or implicit pose representations, they collapse crucial geometric structures into spatially ambiguous signals, leading to severe motion inconsistencies and hallucinated artifacts under egocentric occlusions. To address this, we propose leveraging sparse 3D hand joints as explicit control signals with three key advantages: explicit geometry to resolve occlusions, an intuitive interface for interactive editing, and cross-embodiment generalization to robotic hands. Built upon this, our efficient control module extracts occlusion-aware features from the source reference frame by penalizing unreliable visual features from hidden joints, and employs a 3D-based weighting mechanism to handle dynamically occluded target joints during motion propagation. Meanwhile, it directly injects 3D geometric embeddings into the latent space to enforce structural consistency. To facilitate robust training and evaluation, we develop an automated annotation pipeline, yielding 1M high-quality egocentric video clips paired with precise hand trajectories. Experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, generating high-fidelity egocentric videos with realistic hand-object interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用稀疏3D手部关节点作为显式控制信号，实现可控的自我中心视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖密集2D轨迹或隐式姿态表示，在自我中心视角下因遮挡导致几何结构模糊，产生运动不一致和伪影。稀疏3D手部关节点能显式解析遮挡、提供直观编辑接口并泛化至机器人手部，是解决细粒度手物交互视频生成的关键。
light_analysis.method: 设计遮挡感知控制模块：从源参考帧提取遮挡感知特征，惩罚隐藏关节点不可靠特征；采用3D加权机制处理运动传播中动态遮挡的目标关节点；直接将3D几何嵌入注入潜在空间保持结构一致性。同步开发自动化标注流程，构建100万高质量自我中心视频剪辑及精确手部轨迹数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在自我中心视频生成任务上，本方法在保真度和交互真实性上超越现有基线。定量指标（如FID、轨迹准确率）显著提升，定性结果展示更逼真的手物交互，且能处理严重遮挡场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出稀疏3D手部关节点作为控制信号的范式，有效解决遮挡下视频几何一致性问题。学术上推进了可控视频生成在复杂交互场景的研究，实际可用于增强现实、机器人模仿学习等。未来可扩展至全身姿态建模或多物体交互。

title: MedPruner: Training-Free Hierarchical Token Pruning for Efficient 3D Medical Image Understanding in Vision-Language Models
abstract: While specialized Medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in interpreting 2D and 3D medical modalities, their deployment for 3D volumetric data remains constrained by significant computational inefficiencies. Current architectures typically suffer from massive anatomical redundancy due to the direct concatenation of consecutive 2D slices and lack the flexibility to handle heterogeneous information densities across different slices using fixed pruning ratios. To address these challenges, we propose MedPruner, a training-free and model-agnostic hierarchical token pruning framework specifically designed for efficient 3D medical image understanding. MedPruner introduces a two-stage mechanism: an Inter-slice Anchor-based Filtering module to eliminate slice-level temporal redundancy, followed by a Dynamic Information Nucleus Selection strategy that achieves adaptive token-level compression by quantifying cumulative attention weights. Extensive experiments on three 3D medical benchmarks and across three diverse medical VLMs reveal massive token redundancy in existing architectures. Notably, MedPruner enables models such as MedGemma-1.5 to maintain or even exceed their original performance while retaining fewer than 5\% of visual tokens, thereby reducing visual-token overhead and validating the necessity of dynamic token selection for practical clinical deployment. Our code is available at https://github.com/CUHK-AIM-Group/MedPruner.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedPruner，一种无需训练、模型无关的分层令牌剪枝框架，用于高效3D医学图像理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型处理3D体积数据时，因直接拼接连续2D切片导致大量解剖冗余，且固定剪枝比率无法适应不同切片的信息密度差异，造成计算效率低下。因此需要一种灵活高效的剪枝方法，以降低计算开销并保持性能。
light_analysis.method: MedPruner包含两阶段：跨切片锚点过滤模块消除切片级时间冗余，动态信息核选择策略通过累计注意力权重实现自适应令牌级压缩。该方法无需训练且模型无关，适用于多种医学VLM。
light_analysis.result: 在三个3D医学基准和三种不同医学VLM上的实验表明，MedPruner使MedGemma-1.5等模型在保留不到5%视觉令牌时保持或超越原始性能，大幅减少视觉令牌开销，验证了动态令牌选择的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedPruner通过动态令牌选择有效解决了3D医学图像的计算冗余问题，为实际临床部署提供了高效方案。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的剪枝策略或扩展至其他模态。

title: SignSparK: Efficient Multilingual Sign Language Production via Sparse Keyframe Learning
abstract: Sign Language Production (SLP) faces a fundamental trade-off: direct text-to-pose models suffer from regression-to-the-mean effects, while dictionary-retrieval methods produce disjointed transitions. To resolve this, we propose a novel training paradigm that leverages sparse keyframes to capture the underlying kinematic distribution of human signing. By generating dense motion from discrete anchors, our approach mitigates regression-to-the-mean while ensuring fluid articulation. To achieve this at scale, we introduce FAST, an ultra-efficient sign segmentation model that automatically mines precise temporal boundaries. We then present SignSparK, a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) framework that utilizes these temporal anchors to synthesize 3D signing sequences. This keyframe-driven formulation also unlocks Keyframe-to-Pose (KF2P) generation, making precise spatiotemporal editing of signing sequences possible. Furthermore, SignSparK scales across four distinct sign languages, constituting the largest multilingual SLP framework to date, and integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting for photorealistic rendering. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SignSparK achieves state-of-the-art across diverse SLP tasks and multilingual benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/JianHe0628/SignSparK.
comment: Accepted at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026. Project page available: https://cogvis-cvssp.github.io/papers/signspark/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SignSparK，通过稀疏关键帧学习和条件流匹配，实现高效多语言手语生成，缓解回归到均值问题并支持精细编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 手语生成面临根本性权衡：直接文本到姿态模型因回归到均值效应导致动作模糊，而基于词典检索的方法生成的动作过渡不连贯。现有方法无法同时保证手语的准确性和流畅性。本研究旨在通过稀疏关键帧捕捉手语运动学分布，从离散锚点生成密集动作，从而解决上述矛盾，并实现多语言规模化。
light_analysis.method: 提出SignSparK框架，包含两个核心组件：1) FAST，一种超高效手语分割模型，自动挖掘精确的时间边界；2) 基于条件流匹配（CFM）的生成模型，利用时间锚点合成3D手语序列。通过稀疏关键帧学习，从离散锚点生成密集运动，既缓解回归到均值又保证动作流畅。此外，框架支持关键帧到姿态（KF2P）生成，实现手语序列的时空编辑。集成3D高斯泼溅进行真实感渲染，并在四种手语上扩展，构建最大多语言SLP框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多种手语生成任务和多语言基准测试中，SignSparK均达到当前最优水平。通过稀疏关键帧策略，有效降低了回归到均值效应，生成的姿态序列更加真实且过渡自然。与现有方法相比，在精度和流畅度指标上取得显著提升。框架规模覆盖四种手语，展示了良好的跨语言泛化能力。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源供验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: SignSparK提出了一种基于稀疏关键帧和条件流匹配的手语生成新范式，同时解决了传统方法中回归到均值和过渡不连贯的问题。其多语言扩展能力为跨文化手语研究提供了基础。学术上，证明了稀疏关键帧在手语运动建模中的有效性；应用上，可辅助手语翻译、教育及虚拟人交互。未来可探索更高效的锚点分割策略或扩展到更多手语变体。

title: A Guideline-Aware AI Agent for Zero-Shot Target Volume Auto-Delineation
abstract: Delineating the clinical target volume (CTV) in radiotherapy involves complex margins constrained by tumor location and anatomical barriers. While deep learning models automate this process, their rigid reliance on expert-annotated data requires costly retraining whenever clinical guidelines update. To overcome this limitation, we introduce OncoAgent, a novel guideline-aware AI agent framework that seamlessly converts textual clinical guidelines into three-dimensional target contours in a training-free manner. Evaluated on esophageal cancer cases, the agent achieves a zero-shot Dice similarity coefficient of 0.842 for the CTV and 0.880 for the planning target volume, demonstrating performance highly comparable to a fully supervised nnU-Net baseline. Notably, in a blinded clinical evaluation, physicians strongly preferred OncoAgent over the supervised baseline, rating it higher in guideline compliance, modification effort, and clinical acceptability. Furthermore, the framework generalizes zero-shot to alternative esophageal guidelines and other anatomical sites (e.g., prostate) without any retraining. Beyond mere volumetric overlap, our agent-based paradigm offers near-instantaneous adaptability to alternative guidelines, providing a scalable and transparent pathway toward interpretability in radiotherapy treatment planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OncoAgent，一种无需训练的、将文本临床指南转化为3D靶区轮廓的AI智能体框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 放射治疗中临床靶体积（CTV）勾画复杂，现有深度学习模型依赖专家标注数据，且临床指南更新时需昂贵重训练。因此需要一种能灵活适应指南变化的自动化方法，以降低人工成本并提升适应性。
light_analysis.method: OncoAgent框架通过指南感知的AI智能体，将文本临床指南转化为三维靶区轮廓，无需训练即可实现零样本勾画。在食管癌病例上评估，并推广到其他指南和解剖部位，展现了无需重训练的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 食管癌病例上零样本Dice系数：CTV为0.842，PTV为0.880，与全监督nnU-Net基线高度可比。盲法临床评估中，医生更偏好OncoAgent，在指南依从性、修改工作量、临床可接受性上评分更高。零样本泛化到其他食管指南和前列腺部位。
light_analysis.conclusion: OncoAgent无需重训练即可适应不同指南，提供可扩展、透明的放射治疗计划路径，提升可解释性。未来可进一步探索其在不同临床场景中的适用性。

title: GreenRFM: Learning a resource-efficient radiology vision-language foundation model via supervision-centric pre-training
abstract: Radiology foundation models (RFMs) have largely inherited the scale-first recipe of natural-image vision--language pre-training. This recipe is difficult to deploy in 3D radiology, where training corpora are smaller, reports vary across institutions, and receiving hospitals often need local adaptation under privacy and compute constraints. We ask whether routine radiology reports can instead be converted into auditable diagnostic supervision that shapes the image encoder, text encoder, aligned space, and local-adaptation procedure. We develop GreenRFM, a supervision-centric pre-training framework organized around four empirical principles: More distilled, Ubiquitous, Semantic-enforcing, and Task-aligning (MUST) supervision. These principles convert noisy reports into structured diagnostic signals and use them to learn discriminative unimodal encoders plus an aligned image--text space for diagnosis-centered multimodal use. GreenRFM requires 24 GPU-hours on a single 24GB GPU (lightweight variant: 6GB VRAM, 4~hours) and reaches a zero-shot CT-RATE AUC of 84.8. Evaluations using more than 200,000 volumes from six institutions and two modalities show transfer to private clinical cohorts and to musculoskeletal MRI. On a local institutional cohort, computationally feasible retraining raises macro-AUC from 70.5 to 82.1. The aligned space also improves hepatocellular-carcinoma microvascular-invasion prediction and trans-arterial chemoembolization response analysis over established clinical scores. These results support supervision-centric pre-training as a practical route to resource-efficient, locally adaptable, diagnosis-centered radiology vision--language representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出监督中心预训练框架GreenRFM，通过结构化诊断信号实现资源高效的放射学视觉语言基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 放射学基础模型继承自然图像的规模优先策略，在3D放射学中面临训练语料小、报告差异大、隐私和计算约束下本地适配困难等问题。现有方法难以兼顾效率和诊断准确性，需要更实用的预训练范式。
light_analysis.method: GreenRFM基于MUST四个经验原则（更精简、普适、语义强化、任务对齐），将嘈杂报告转换为结构化诊断信号，用于学习判别式单模态编码器和对齐的图像-文本空间。轻量级变体仅需6GB VRAM和4小时训练。
light_analysis.result: 零样本CT-RATE AUC达84.8；在来自6个机构和2种模态的20万以上体素评估中，实现向私有临床队列和肌肉骨骼MRI的迁移；本地队列中计算可行重训练将macro-AUC从70.5提升至82.1；对齐空间在肝癌微血管侵犯预测和化疗栓塞响应分析中超越临床评分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 监督中心预训练为资源高效、本地可适配、诊断中心的放射学视觉语言表征提供了实用路线，有望推动基础模型在临床中的应用，未来可探索更广泛的诊断任务适配。

title: UltraStar: Semantic-Aware Star Graph Modeling for Echocardiography Navigation
abstract: Echocardiography is critical for diagnosing cardiovascular diseases, yet the shortage of skilled sonographers hinders timely patient care, due to high operational difficulties. Consequently, research on automated probe navigation has significant clinical potential. To achieve robust navigation, it is essential to leverage historical scanning information, mimicking how experts rely on past feedback to adjust subsequent maneuvers. Practical scanning data collected from sonographers typically consists of noisy trajectories inherently generated through trial-and-error exploration. However, existing methods typically model this history as a sequential chain, forcing models to overfit these noisy paths, leading to performance degradation on long sequences. In this paper, we propose UltraStar, which reformulates probe navigation from path regression to anchor-based global localization. By establishing a Star Graph, UltraStar treats historical keyframes as spatial anchors connected directly to the current view, explicitly modeling geometric constraints for precise positioning. We further enhance the Star Graph with a semantic-aware sampling strategy that actively selects the representative landmarks from massive history logs, reducing redundancy for accurate anchoring. Extensive experiments on a dataset with over 1.31 million samples demonstrate that UltraStar outperforms baselines and scales better with longer input lengths, revealing a more effective topology for history modeling under noisy exploration. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/UltraStar.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UltraStar，将超声探头导航从路径回归重构为基于锚点的全局定位，通过星图模型有效利用历史扫描信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声心动图对诊断心血管疾病至关重要，但操作困难导致熟练操作人员短缺。自动化探头导航需要利用历史扫描信息，然而实际数据包含噪声轨迹，现有方法将历史建模为顺序链，容易过拟合噪声路径，尤其在长序列上性能下降。因此需要更鲁棒的历史建模方式。
light_analysis.method: 提出Star Graph星图模型，将历史关键帧视为空间锚点，与当前视图直接连接，显式建模几何约束。采用语义感知采样策略，从海量历史日志中主动选择代表性地标，减少冗余。将导航任务从路径回归转化为基于锚点的全局定位，利用历史信息直接推断当前位置。
light_analysis.result: 在包含131万样本的数据集上，UltraStar优于多种基线方法。随着输入长度增加，其性能下降更少，显示出更好的扩展性，证明了星图拓扑在噪声探索下对历史建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种更有效的历史建模拓扑，显著提升了超声探头导航在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。开源代码有助于推动相关研究。未来可探索更智能的锚点选择机制以进一步提升性能。

title: VisNec: Measuring and Leveraging Visual Necessity for Multimodal Instruction Tuning
abstract: The effectiveness of multimodal instruction tuning depends not only on dataset scale, but critically on whether training samples genuinely require visual reasoning. However, existing instruction datasets often contain a substantial portion of visually redundant samples (solvable from text alone), as well as multimodally misaligned supervision that can degrade learning. To address this, we propose VisNec (Visual Necessity Score), a principled data selection framework that measures the marginal contribution of visual input during instruction tuning. By comparing predictive loss with and without visual context, VisNec identifies whether a training instance is vision-critical, redundant, or misaligned. To preserve task diversity, we combine VisNec with semantic clustering and select high-necessity samples within each cluster. Across 10 downstream benchmarks, training on only 15% of the LLaVA-665K dataset selected by VisNec achieves 100.2% of full-data performance. On the smaller Vision-Flan-186K dataset, our selection not only further reduces data size but also surpasses full-data training by 15.8%. These results demonstrate that measuring and leveraging visual necessity provides an effective solution for both efficient and robust multimodal instruction tuning. Codes and selected subsets will be released upon acceptance.
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://dmk041218.github.io/VisNec/

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisNec框架，通过量化视觉必要性分数进行数据选择，实现高效多模态指令微调，仅用15%数据即可达到或超越全数据性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态指令数据集存在大量视觉冗余样本（仅文本可解）和多模态错位监督，导致学习效率低下和模型退化。现有方法忽视样本的视觉必要性，无法有效筛选关键训练实例，亟需一种原则性的数据选择机制来提升微调效果并减少数据依赖。
light_analysis.method: VisNec通过比较有无视觉上下文时的预测损失，计算每个样本的视觉必要性分数，区分视觉关键、冗余或错位样本。结合语义聚类保留任务多样性，在每个聚类中选取高必要性样本，实现高效且多样化的数据选择。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaVA-665K数据集上，仅用15%的VisNec选择数据达到100.2%的全数据性能；在Vision-Flan-186K上，数据量减少的同时性能反超全数据训练15.8%。表明VisNec有效提升数据效率与模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VisNec通过量化视觉必要性为多模态指令微调提供高效数据选择方案，显著减少数据需求并提升性能，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可探索更精细的聚类策略及扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: CeRA: Breaking the Linear Ceiling of Low-Rank Adaptation with Non-linearity Retained at Inference
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) dominates parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT). However, it faces a ``linear ceiling'': increasing the rank yields diminishing returns in expressive capacity due to linear constraints. We introduce CeRA (Capacity-enhanced Rank Adaptation), a weight-level parallel adapter that injects SiLU gating and dropout to induce non-linearity during inference, thereby placing it in a different function class from adapters whose non-linearity exists during training and collapses to an affine map at inference time. On both the basic arithmetic (GSM8K) and the complex MATH benchmark, CeRA is markedly more parameter-efficient. Across a full rank $\times$ learning rate sweep, CeRA at rank 64 achieves the highest MATH pass@1 of any configuration in the grid (23.6\%), matching or exceeding both a rank-512 LoRA (22.4\%) and DoRA (19.8\%) while using only 1/8 of the parameter budget. With the rank and learning rate fixed, CeRA equals or outperforms LoRA in 10 of 12 matched settings. Spectral analysis attributes the gain, at least in part, to smooth (SiLU) gating, which broadens the utilization of the singular-value spectrum and mitigates the rank collapse that linear adapters exhibit at high rank. Additionally, dropout appears to contribute to regularization rather than rank expansion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CeRA，通过推理时保留SiLU门控和dropout的非线性，突破LoRA线性容量天花板，实现更高效的参数微调。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA在低秩适应中面临“线性天花板”，增加秩数因线性约束导致表达能力收益递减。现有适配器在训练时引入非线性但推理时退化为仿射映射，限制了容量。因此需要一种推理时仍保持非线性的适配器以提升表达能力和参数效率。
light_analysis.method: CeRA是一种权重级并行适配器，在推理时注入SiLU门控和dropout以保持非线性。它属于与训练时非线性推理时线性退化的适配器不同的函数类。关键创新在于SiLU门控拓宽奇异值谱利用，减轻高秩线性适配器的秩坍缩，dropout主要起正则化作用。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K和MATH基准上，CeRA参数效率显著。秩64的CeRA在MATH上达到最高pass@1（23.6%），超越秩512的LoRA（22.4%）和DoRA（19.8%），仅用1/8参数。在12个匹配设置中10个等于或优于LoRA。谱分析表明SiLU门控拓宽了奇异值谱利用。
light_analysis.conclusion: CeRA通过推理时非线性突破LoRA线性天花板，实现更高参数效率和性能。学术上解决了低秩适应的容量限制，实际中提供更高效的微调方案。未来可探索其他非线性门控机制或扩展至更多任务。

title: SEMixer: Semantics Enhanced MLP-Mixer for Multiscale Mixing and Long-term Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Modeling multiscale patterns is crucial for long-term time series forecasting (TSF). However, redundancy and noise in time series, together with semantic gaps between non-adjacent scales, make the efficient alignment and integration of multi-scale temporal dependencies challenging. To address this, we propose SEMixer, a lightweight multiscale model designed for long-term TSF. SEMixer features two key components: a Random Attention Mechanism (RAM) and a Multiscale Progressive Mixing Chain (MPMC). RAM captures diverse time-patch interactions during training and aggregates them via dropout ensemble at inference, enhancing patch-level semantics and enabling MLP-Mixer to better model multi-scale dependencies. MPMC further stacks RAM and MLP-Mixer in a memory-efficient manner, achieving more effective temporal mixing. It addresses semantic gaps across scales and facilitates better multiscale modeling and forecasting performance. We not only validate the effectiveness of SEMixer on 10 public datasets, but also on the \textit{2025 CCF AlOps Challenge} based on 21GB real wireless network data, where SEMixer achieves third place. The code is available at the link https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/SEMixer.
comment: This work is accepted by the proceedings of the ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW 2026). The code is available at the link https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/SEMixer

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEMixer，一种轻量级多尺度MLP-Mixer模型，通过随机注意力机制和多尺度渐进混合链增强语义，实现高效长期时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期时间序列预测需建模多尺度模式，但时间序列的冗余和噪声以及非相邻尺度间的语义鸿沟，使得多尺度时间依赖的高效对齐与整合困难。现有方法难以有效处理这些问题。
light_analysis.method: SEMixer包含随机注意力机制(RAM)和多尺度渐进混合链(MPMC)。RAM在训练中捕获多样时间补丁交互，推理时通过dropout集成增强补丁级语义；MPMC以记忆高效方式堆叠RAM和MLP-Mixer，实现跨尺度语义对齐和有效时间混合。
light_analysis.result: 在10个公开数据集上验证有效性，并在基于21GB真实无线网络数据的2025 CCF AlOps挑战赛中取得第三名。摘要未给出具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEMixer通过RAM和MPMC解决了多尺度时间序列预测中的语义鸿沟和噪声问题，实现了轻量高效的建模。代码已开源，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂场景。

title: Use What You Know: Causal Foundation Models with Partial Graphs
abstract: Estimating causal quantities traditionally relies on bespoke estimators tailored to specific assumptions. Recently proposed Causal Foundation Models (CFMs) promise a more unified approach by amortising causal discovery and inference in a single step. However, in their current state, they do not allow for the incorporation of any domain knowledge, which can lead to suboptimal predictions. We bridge this gap by introducing methods to condition CFMs on causal information, such as the causal graph or more readily available ancestral information. When access to complete causal graph information is too strict a requirement, our approach also effectively leverages partial causal information. We systematically evaluate conditioning strategies and find that injecting learnable biases into the attention mechanism, together with a graph-convolutional encoder, is a highly effective method to utilise full and partial causal information. Our experiments show that this conditioning allows a general-purpose CFM to match the performance of specialised models trained on specific causal structures. Overall, our approach addresses a central hurdle on the path towards all-in-one causal foundation models: the capability to answer causal queries in a data-driven manner while effectively leveraging any amount of domain expertise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将领域知识注入因果基础模型的方法，支持利用完整或部分因果图信息进行因果推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统因果估计依赖定制化估计器，因果基础模型虽统一了因果发现和推断，但无法融入领域知识，导致预测次优。本研究旨在桥接这一差距，使模型能利用因果信息提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 通过将可学习偏置注入注意力机制并结合图卷积编码器，实现因果基础模型对完整或部分因果图（包括祖先信息）的条件化。系统评估不同策略，发现该方法有效利用因果信息。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法使通用因果基础模型匹配在特定因果结构上训练的专用模型性能，显著提升了预测准确性，验证了条件化策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了因果基础模型统一处理因果查询的关键障碍，实现数据驱动与领域知识的融合。未来可推广至更复杂的因果场景，具有重要学术和应用价值。

title: Learning State-Tracking from Code Using Linear RNNs
abstract: Over the last years, state-tracking tasks, particularly permutation composition, have become a testbed to understand the limits of sequence models architectures like Transformers and RNNs (linear and non-linear). However, these are often sequence-to-sequence tasks: learning to map actions (permutations) to states, which is incompatible with the next-token prediction setting commonly used to train language models. We address this gap by converting permutation composition into code via REPL traces that interleave state-reveals through prints and variable transformations. We show that linear RNNs capable of state-tracking excel also in this setting, while Transformers still fail. Motivated by this representation, we investigate why tracking states in code is generally difficult: actions are not always fully observable. We frame this as tracking the state of a probabilistic finite-state automaton with deterministic state reveals and show that linear RNNs can be worse than non-linear RNNs at tracking states in this setup.

light_analysis.overview: 通过将排列组合任务转换为REPL代码踪迹，证明线性RNN在状态追踪上优于Transformer，并揭示部分可观测性导致的追踪困难。
light_analysis.motivation: 状态追踪任务（如排列组合）是评估序列模型理解能力的标准测试，但现有研究多采用序列到序列形式，与语言模型的下一个token预测设置不兼容。此外，代码中的状态追踪因动作部分可观测而更具挑战性，缺乏系统性分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过将任务转化为代码表示来统一评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 将排列组合任务通过REPL踪迹转换为代码，其中状态通过打印和变量变换交织揭示。使用线性RNN和Transformer在该代码形式下进行状态追踪实验。进一步将部分可观测环境建模为概率有限状态自动机（PFSA），比较线性与非线性RNN的追踪能力。
light_analysis.result: 线性RNN在代码形式的排列组合状态追踪任务中显著优于Transformer，而Transformer完全失败。但在部分可观测的PFSA设置中，线性RNN的追踪性能劣于非线性RNN。摘要未提供具体数值指标，仅给出定性结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了代码表示有助于线性RNN实现高效状态追踪，而Transformer在此任务上存在根本性局限。同时指出线性RNN在部分可观测环境中的不足，为设计更鲁棒的状态追踪模型提供了方向。未来可探索更复杂的代码重构或混合架构以提升追踪能力。

title: Revisiting the Platonic Representation Hypothesis: An Aristotelian View
abstract: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis suggests that representations from neural networks are converging to a common statistical model of reality. We show that the existing metrics used to measure representational similarity are confounded by network scale: increasing model depth or width can systematically inflate representational similarity scores. To correct these effects, we introduce a permutation-based null-calibration framework that transforms any representational similarity metric into a calibrated score with statistical guarantees. We revisit the Platonic Representation Hypothesis with our calibration framework, which reveals a nuanced picture: the apparent convergence reported by global spectral measures largely disappears after calibration, while local neighborhood similarity, but not local distances, retains significant agreement across different modalities. Based on these findings, we propose the Aristotelian Representation Hypothesis: representations in neural networks are converging to shared local neighborhood relationships.

light_analysis.overview: 提出亚里士多德表示假说，挑战普适收敛观点，发现全局谱相似性经校准后消失，仅局部邻域关系保持跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 柏拉图表示假说认为神经网络表征收敛于同一统计模型，但现有相似性度量受网络规模混淆，深度或宽度增加会系统性膨胀相似性得分，导致虚假收敛结论。需纠正这一偏差，重新审视表征收敛的真实模式。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于排列的零校准框架，可对任意表征相似性度量进行校准，提供统计保证。应用该框架，分别评估全局谱度量、局部邻域相似性和局部距离，发现全局谱度量校准后一致性消失，局部邻域相似性（非距离）仍显著跨模态一致。据此提出亚里士多德表示假说。
light_analysis.result: 使用校准框架后，全局谱度量（如CCA、CKA）报告的收敛显著减弱，表明先前结果是网络规模膨胀导致的假象。局部邻域相似性（基于最近邻重叠率）在校准后仍保持跨模态显著一致，而局部距离度量（如欧氏距离）一致性消失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 挑战了表征绝对收敛的观点，提出更保守的亚里士多德假说：网络表征在局部邻域关系而非全局结构上收敛。启示后续研究应关注局部拓扑一致性，而非全局谱对齐，并强调统计校准在相似性分析中的必要性。

title: Joint Reward Modeling: Internalizing Chain-of-Thought for Efficient Visual Reward Models
abstract: Reward models are critical for reinforcement learning from human feedback, as they determine the alignment quality and reliability of generative models. For complex tasks such as image editing, reward models are required to capture global semantic consistency and implicit logical constraints beyond local similarity. Existing reward modeling approaches have clear limitations. Discriminative reward models align well with human preferences but struggle with complex semantics due to limited reasoning supervision. Generative reward models offer stronger semantic understanding and reasoning, but they are costly at inference time and difficult to align directly with human preferences. To this end, we propose Joint Reward Modeling (JRM), which jointly optimizes preference learning and language modeling on a shared vision-language backbone. This approach internalizes the semantic and reasoning capabilities of generative models into efficient discriminative representations, enabling fast and accurate evaluation. JRM achieves state-of-the-art results on MMRB2 and EditReward-Bench, and significantly improves stability and performance in downstream online reinforcement learning. These results show that joint training effectively bridges efficiency and semantic understanding in reward modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联合奖励建模（JRM），通过联合优化偏好学习与语言建模，将生成模型的语义推理能力内化到高效判别表示中，实现快速准确的视觉奖励评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有奖励模型在处理图像编辑等复杂任务时面临两难：判别式模型推理高效但语义理解不足，生成式模型语义理解强但推理成本高且难以直接对齐人类偏好。需要一种兼顾效率与语义理解的方法。
light_analysis.method: JRM采用共享视觉-语言骨干网络，联合优化两个目标：偏好学习（判别式）和语言建模（生成式）。通过这种联合训练，模型将生成式模型的链式思维推理能力内化为判别式表示，在推理时仅需前向一次即可完成评估，无需自回归生成。
light_analysis.result: 在MMRB2和EditReward-Bench基准上取得最先进结果，并且在下游在线强化学习中显著提升了稳定性和性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称超越了现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: JRM成功桥接了奖励模型中的效率与语义理解，通过联合训练将生成能力内化到判别表示中，为复杂视觉任务的高效对齐提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更多需要细致语义评估的多模态场景。

title: Probabilistic NDVI Forecasting from Sparse Satellite Time Series and Weather Covariates
abstract: Short-term forecasting of vegetation dynamics is a key enabler for data-driven decision support in precision agriculture. Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) forecasting from satellite observations, however, remains challenging due to sparse and irregular sampling caused by cloud masking, as well as the heterogeneous climatic conditions under which crops evolve. In this work, we propose a probabilistic forecasting framework for field-level NDVI prediction under sparse, irregular clear-sky acquisitions. The architecture separates the encoding of historical NDVI and meteorological observations from future exogenous covariates, fusing both representations for multi-step quantile prediction. To address irregular revisit patterns and horizon-dependent uncertainty, we introduce a temporal-distance weighted quantile loss that aligns the training objective with the effective forecasting horizon. In addition, we incorporate cumulative and extreme-weather feature engineering to capture delayed meteorological effects relevant to vegetation response. Experiments on European satellite data show that the proposed approach outperforms statistical, deep learning, and time-series baselines on both pointwise and probabilistic evaluation metrics. Ablation studies confirm that target history is the primary driver of performance, with meteorological covariates providing additional gains in the full multimodal setting. The code is available at https://github.com/arco-group/ndvi-forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种概率预测框架，用于从稀疏卫星时间序列和天气协变量进行NDVI预测，引入时间距离加权分位数损失处理不规则采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 精准农业中，植被动态的短期预测对数据驱动决策支持至关重要。然而，由于云遮挡导致卫星观测稀疏且不规则，以及作物生长的气候条件异质性，使得NDVI预测具有挑战性。现有方法难以有效处理不规则采样和与预测范围相关的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种概率预测框架，将历史NDVI和气象观测编码与未来外生协变量分离，融合两种表示进行多步分位数预测。引入时间距离加权分位数损失，使训练目标与有效预测范围对齐。同时设计累积和极端天气特征工程，捕捉延迟气象效应。使用欧洲卫星数据进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在欧洲卫星数据上，该方法在逐点和概率评估指标上均优于统计、深度学习和时间序列基线。消融研究表明目标历史是性能的主要驱动因素，气象协变量在全多模态设置中提供了额外增益。具体数值未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为稀疏不规则NDVI预测提供了有效概率框架，具有实际应用价值。代码已开源。未来可能考虑更多气象协变量或更高分辨率数据。潜在局限性包括对高质量气象预报的依赖。

title: DASH: Faster Shampoo via Batched Block Preconditioning and Efficient Inverse-Root Solvers
abstract: Shampoo is one of the leading approximate second-order optimizers: a variant of it has won the MLCommons AlgoPerf competition, and it has been shown to produce models with lower activation outliers that are easier to compress. Yet, applying Shampoo currently comes at the cost of significant computational slowdown, due to its expensive internal operations. In this paper, we take a significant step to address this shortcoming by proposing \method (for \textbf{D}istributed \textbf{A}ccelerated \textbf{SH}ampoo), a faster implementation of Distributed Shampoo based on two main new techniques: First, we show that preconditioner blocks can be stacked into 3D tensors to significantly improve GPU utilization; second, we introduce the Newton-DB iteration and the Chebyshev polynomial approximations as novel and faster approaches for computing the inverse matrix roots required by Shampoo. Along with these algorithmic contributions, we provide a first in-depth analysis of how matrix scaling critically affects Shampoo convergence. On the practical side, our GPU-aware implementation achieves up to $5.6\times$ faster optimizer steps compared to the well-optimized Distributed Shampoo, while Newton-DB attains the lowest validation perplexity per iteration among all tested methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/DASH.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DASH，通过张量化块预处理和高效逆根求解器，加速Shampoo优化器。
light_analysis.motivation: Shampoo是领先的近似二阶优化器，但其内部操作昂贵，导致计算显著变慢。尽管其能产生低激活异常值的模型且易于压缩，但实际应用受限。现有分布式实现优化不足，亟需更快的方法以利用Shampoo的优势，提升训练效率。
light_analysis.method: DASH基于两项关键技术：首先，将预处理块堆叠成3D张量以提升GPU利用率；其次，引入Newton-DB迭代和Chebyshev多项式逼近，用于高效计算Shampoo所需的逆矩阵根。此外，首次深入分析矩阵缩放对Shampoo收敛的关键影响，实现GPU感知的优化实现。
light_analysis.result: 与优化后的分布式Shampoo相比，DASH的优化器步长实现高达5.6倍的加速。Newton-DB方法在所有测试方法中，每迭代取得最低验证困惑度，在加速的同时保持优秀性能。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DASH显著降低了Shampoo的计算开销，使其在保持模型质量的同时更快执行。该工作为二阶优化器的实际应用提供了高效实现，并揭示了矩阵缩放的重要性。未来可进一步优化逆根求解的精度与稳定性。

title: Generating a Paracosm for Training-Free Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is the task of retrieving a target image from a database using a multimodal query, which consists of a reference image and a modification text. The text specifies how to alter the reference image to form a ''mental image'', based on which CIR should find the target image in the database. The fundamental challenge of CIR is that this ''mental image'' is not physically available and is only implicitly defined by the query. The contemporary literature pursues zero-shot methods and uses a Large Multimodal Model (LMM) to generate a textual description for a given multimodal query, and then employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) for textual-visual matching to search for the target image. In contrast, we address CIR from first principles by directly generating the ''mental image'' for more accurate matching. Particularly, we prompt an LMM to generate a ''mental image'' for a given multimodal query and propose to use this ''mental image'' to search for the target image. As the ''mental image'' has a synthetic-to-real domain gap with real images, we also generate a synthetic counterpart for each real image in the database to facilitate matching. In this sense, our method uses LMM to construct a ``paracosm'', where it matches the multimodal query and database images. Hence, we call this method Paracosm. Notably, Paracosm is a training-free zero-shot CIR method. It significantly outperforms existing zero-shot methods on challenging benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art performance for zero-shot CIR.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Website and code: https://leowangtong.github.io/Paracosm/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Paracosm方法，通过生成心理图像进行零样本组合图像检索，无需训练即实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合图像检索（CIR）需要根据参考图像和修改文本形成的“心理图像”检索目标图像。现有零样本方法使用大多模态模型（LMM）生成文本描述，然后用视觉-语言模型（VLM）匹配，但存在模态鸿沟。本文直接从第一性原理出发，生成“心理图像”以进行更精确匹配，并解决合成图像与真实图像的域差距问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Paracosm方法，利用LMM为多模态查询生成“心理图像”（mental image），同时为数据库中每张真实图像生成合成对应物，以弥合合成与真实域差距。通过构建“paracosm”（虚拟世界），在其中匹配查询和数据库图像。该方法无需训练，完全零样本，仅依赖预训练LMM的生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试上，Paracosm显著优于现有零样本CIR方法，达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确说明性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Paracosm通过直接生成心理图像，创新性地解决了CIR中模态缺失问题，实现了训练自由的零样本检索。其不需要额外训练，易于部署，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更有效的域适应策略或扩展到其他多模态检索任务。

title: Dual-Prototype Disentanglement: A Context-Aware Enhancement Framework for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting has witnessed significant progress with deep learning. While prevailing approaches enhance forecasting performance by modifying architectures or introducing novel enhancement strategies, they often fail to dynamically disentangle and leverage the complex, intertwined temporal patterns inherent in time series, thus resulting in the learning of static, averaged representations that lack context-aware capabilities. To address this, we propose the Dual-Prototype Adaptive Disentanglement framework (DPAD), a model-agnostic auxiliary method that equips forecasting models with the ability of pattern disentanglement and context-aware adaptation. Specifically, we construct a Dynamic Dual-Prototype bank (DDP), comprising a common pattern bank with strong temporal priors to capture prevailing trend or seasonal patterns, and a rare pattern bank dynamically memorizing critical yet infrequent events, and then an Dual-Path Context-aware routing (DPC) mechanism is proposed to enhance outputs with selectively retrieved context-specific pattern representations from the DDP. Additionally, we introduce a Disentanglement-Guided Loss (DGLoss) to ensure that each prototype bank specializes in its designated role while maintaining comprehensive coverage. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that DPAD consistently improves forecasting performance and reliability of state-of-the-art models across diverse real-world benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种模型无关的辅助框架DPAD，通过动态双原型解缠与上下文感知路由，提升时间序列预测模型的性能与可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法通过改进架构或增强策略提升预测性能，但未能动态解缠和利用时间序列中复杂交织的模式，导致学习静态平均表示，缺乏上下文感知能力。
light_analysis.method: DPAD框架包含两个核心模块：动态双原型库（DDP）由通用模式库和稀有模式库构成，分别捕获趋势/季节模式与罕见事件；双路径上下文感知路由（DPC）选择性检索上下文特定模式表示以增强输出。同时引入解缠引导损失（DGLoss）确保原型专业化与全面覆盖。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界基准上，DPAD持续提升多种最先进模型的预测性能与可靠性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPAD作为模型无关的辅助方法，赋予预测模型模式解缠与上下文适应能力，具有显著的学术价值与实用价值，可广泛应用于各类时间序列预测任务。

title: OI-Bench: An Option Injection Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Susceptibility to Directive Interference
abstract: Benchmarking large language models (LLMs) is critical for understanding their capabilities, limitations, and robustness. In addition to interface artifacts, prior studies have shown that LLM decisions can be influenced by directive signals such as social cues, framing, and instructions. In this work, we introduce option injection, a benchmarking approach that augments the multiple-choice question answering (MCQA) interface with an additional option containing a misleading directive, leveraging standardized choice structure and scalable evaluation. We construct OI-Bench, a benchmark of 3,000 questions spanning knowledge, reasoning, and commonsense tasks, with 16 directive types covering social compliance, bonus framing, threat framing, and instructional interference. This setting combines manipulation of the choice interface with directive-based interference, enabling systematic assessment of model susceptibility. We evaluate 12 LLMs to analyze attack success rates, behavioral responses, and further investigate mitigation strategies ranging from inference-time prompting to post-training alignment. Experimental results reveal substantial vulnerabilities and heterogeneous robustness across models.
