OI-Bench is expected to support more systematic evaluation of LLM robustness to directive interference within choice-based interfaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OI-Bench基准，通过选项注入方法评估LLM对误导性指令干扰的易感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注接口设计和标准任务性能，但研究表明LLM决策易受社会线索、框架和指令等定向信号影响。然而缺乏系统评估模型对指令干扰鲁棒性的基准。本文旨在通过引入选项注入方法，在多项选择问答界面中添加包含误导性指令的选项，系统性地评估模型对指令干扰的敏感性，填补该领域评估基准的空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出选项注入（option injection）方法，在标准多项选择问答（MCQA）接口中增加一个含误导性指令的选项。构建OI-Bench基准，包含3000个问题，涵盖知识、推理和常识任务，并设计16种指令类型（如社会遵从、奖励框架、威胁框架和指令干扰）。评估12个LLM的攻击成功率、行为响应，并探索从推理时提示到训练后对齐的缓解策略。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了不同LLM存在显著漏洞和异质性鲁棒性。具体攻击成功率和模型间差异未详细给出，但表明模型对指令干扰普遍易感。缓解策略（如推理时提示和训练后对齐）有一定效果，但不足以完全消除漏洞。结果强调了需系统评估模型在基于选择界面中对指令干扰的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OI-Bench为评估LLM在基于选择界面中对指令干扰的鲁棒性提供了系统化基准。研究揭示了现有模型的脆弱性和行为异质性，提示了未来需关注接口设计中的定向干扰风险。该基准可支持更广泛的模型鲁棒性评估。局限性在于未覆盖所有可能干扰类型，未来可扩展更多样本和真实场景。

title: Digital Twin-Driven Communication-Efficient Federated Anomaly Detection for Industrial IoT
abstract: Anomaly detection is increasingly becoming crucial for maintaining the safety, reliability, and efficiency of industrial systems. Recently, with the advent of digital twins and data-driven decision-making, several statistical and machine-learning methods have been proposed. However, these methods face several challenges, such as dependence on only real sensor datasets, limited labeled data, high false alarm rates, and privacy concerns. To address these problems, we propose a suite of digital twin-integrated federated learning (DTFL) methods that enhance global model performance while preserving data privacy and communication efficiency. Specifically, we present five novel approaches: Digital Twin-Based Meta-Learning (DTML), Federated Parameter Fusion (FPF), Layer-wise Parameter Exchange (LPE), Cyclic Weight Adaptation (CWA), and Digital Twin Knowledge Distillation (DTKD). Each method introduces a unique mechanism to combine synthetic and real-world knowledge, balancing generalization with communication overhead. We conduct an extensive experiment using a publicly available cyber-physical anomaly detection dataset. For a target accuracy of 80%, CWA reaches the target in 33 rounds, FPF in 41 rounds, LPE in 48 rounds, and DTML in 87 rounds, whereas the standard FedAvg baseline and DTKD do not reach the target within 100 rounds. These results highlight substantial communication-efficiency gains (up to 62% fewer rounds than DTML and 31% fewer than LPE) and demonstrate that integrating DT knowledge into FL accelerates convergence to operationally meaningful accuracy thresholds for IIoT anomaly detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出五种数字孪生集成联邦学习方法，在保护隐私的同时提升通信效率，实现工业物联网异常检测的快速收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业物联网异常检测需保护数据隐私并减少通信开销，现有方法依赖真实传感器数据、标记数据有限、误报率高且存在隐私泄露风险。数字孪生可生成合成数据但缺乏协同训练框架。本文旨在通过联邦学习融合数字孪生知识，解决收敛慢与通信成本高的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 提出五种数字孪生联邦学习（DTFL）方法：DTML（元学习）、FPF（参数融合）、LPE（逐层参数交换）、CWA（循环权重自适应）、DTKD（知识蒸馏）。各方法独特组合合成与真实知识，平衡泛化与通信开销。评估使用公开工控异常检测数据集。
light_analysis.result: 目标精度80%时，CWA仅需33轮（最优），FPF 41轮，LPE 48轮，DTML 87轮；FedAvg和DTKD在100轮内未达标。CWA相比DTML减少62%轮次，相比LPE减少31%，显著提升通信效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 集成数字孪生知识到联邦学习中可加速收敛至工业可用的精度，为IIoT异常检测提供高效、隐私保护方案。未提及明确局限性，未来可探索更复杂场景或异构数据。

title: Improved Bounds for Private and Robust Alignment
abstract: In this paper, we study the private and robust alignment of language models from a theoretical perspective by establishing upper bounds on the suboptimality gap in both offline and online settings. We consider preference labels subject to privacy constraints and/or adversarial corruption, and analyze two distinct interplays between them: privacy-first and corruption-first. For the privacy-only setting, we show that log loss with an MLE-style algorithm achieves near-optimal rates, in contrast to conventional wisdom. For the joint privacy-and-corruption setting, we first demonstrate that existing offline algorithms in fact provide stronger guarantees -- simultaneously in terms of corruption level and privacy parameters -- than previously known, which further yields improved bounds in the corruption-only regime. In addition, we also present the first set of results for private and robust online alignment. Our results are enabled by new uniform convergence guarantees for log loss and square loss under privacy and corruption, which we believe have broad applicability across learning theory and statistics.

light_analysis.overview: 本文为语言模型的私密且鲁棒对齐建立了理论上的次优性间隙上界，并提出新的均匀收敛保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型对齐中，偏好标签常受隐私约束和对抗性破坏，现有方法在联合设置下缺乏理论保证。研究这些问题的重要性在于确保模型在敏感数据场景下的安全性和可靠性，而传统方法未能同时处理隐私和鲁棒性，或边界不紧。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 本文从理论角度建立离线与在线设置下的次优性间隙上界。考虑隐私和/或破坏的偏好标签，分析隐私优先和破坏优先两种交互模式。在纯隐私设置中，采用MLE风格算法的对数损失实现近最优速率。在联合设置中，重新分析现有离线算法，证明其提供更强的同时性保证。此外，首次提出私密且鲁棒的在线对齐结果。关键技术包括对数损失和平方损失在隐私与破坏下的新均匀收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在纯隐私设置中，对数损失算法达到近最优速率。在联合隐私与破坏设置中，离线算法的保证比已知更强，同步改进了纯破坏设置下的边界。在线设置中，首次得到私密且鲁棒对齐的理论结果。这些边界通过新的均匀收敛保证导出，后者具有广泛的统计学学习理论适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为私密且鲁棒的语言模型对齐提供了严格的理论框架，证明了现有离线算法的更强保证，并首次探索在线场景。成果有助于指导实际中的隐私保护对齐算法设计，未来工作可能扩展到更复杂的破坏模型或更优的隐私-鲁棒性权衡。

title: Solving Semi-Supervised Few-Shot Learning from an Auto-Annotation Perspective
abstract: Semi-supervised few-shot learning (SSFSL) resembles real-world applications such as auto-annotation, as it aims to learn a model from a few labeled and abundant unlabeled task-specific examples to annotate the unlabeled ones. Despite the availability of powerful open-source Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and open-world data, existing SSFSL literature largely neglects these resources. In contrast, the related area few-shot learning (FSL) has already exploited them to boost performance. Arguably, to solve real-world auto-annotation, SSFSL should leverage such open resources. To bridge this gap, we explore established SSL methods to finetune a VLM. Unexpectedly, they significantly underperform FSL baselines that do not use unlabeled data. Our in-depth analysis reveals the root cause of failure: VLMs produce flat distributions of softmax probabilities, resulting in zero utilization of unlabeled data and weak supervision signals. To address this challenge, we propose an embarrassingly simple solution that uses temperatures to sharpen the softmax output, which not only increases the confidence scores of pseudo-labels to improve the utilization of unlabeled data, but also strengthens training supervision for effective finetuning. Furthermore, we exploit task-relevant open data, e.g., those retrieved from VLMs' publicly available pretraining set. To mitigate the imbalance and domain gaps in retrieved data, we employ a stage-wise training strategy. Building on the successful finetuning of VLMs and the exploitation of open data, we present a simple yet effective SSFSL method, Stage-Wise Finetuning with Temperatures (SWIFT). Across five benchmarks, SWIFT outperforms recent FSL and SSL methods by $\sim$5 accuracy points. SWIFT even rivals supervised learning, which finetunes a VLM assuming unlabeled data having ground-truth labels!
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Website and code: https://tian1327.github.io/SWIFT

light_analysis.overview: 提出SWIFT方法，从自动标注角度解决半监督小样本学习，利用温度锐化softmax和分阶段微调，提升VLM在SSFSL中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督小样本学习(SSFSL)旨在从少量标注和大量未标注任务特定样本中学习，类似自动标注场景。现有SSFSL方法忽视强大的开源视觉-语言模型(VLM)和开放世界数据，而小样本学习(FSL)已利用这些资源。直接微调VLM效果差，因VLM产生平坦的softmax分布，导致未标注数据利用率为零且弱监督信号。因此需要解决这一分布平坦问题以有效利用VLM和开放数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出SWIFT方法：首先使用温度参数锐化softmax输出，提高伪标签置信度，增强未标注数据利用和训练监督；其次利用任务相关开放数据（从VLM预训练集中检索），并采用分阶段训练策略缓解检索数据的不平衡和领域差距。该方法简单有效，基于VLM微调和开放数据利用。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准数据集上，SWIFT比近期FSL和SSL方法平均高出约5个准确率点。SWIFT甚至与使用未标注数据真实标签进行微调的有监督学习相媲美。
light_analysis.conclusion: SWIFT成功弥合了SSFSL中VLM利用的空白，表明简单温度锐化可有效解决分布平坦问题，具有实际自动标注应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的数据检索或自适应温度策略。

title: Training Language Models to Use Prolog as a Tool
abstract: Language models frequently produce plausible yet incorrect reasoning traces that are difficult to verify. We investigate fine-tuning models to use Prolog as an external symbolic reasoning tool, training Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on a cleaned version of GSM8K (which we release as gsm8k-prolog-prover). We systematically vary prompt structure, reward composition (execution, syntax, semantics, structure), and inference protocol (single-try, multiple-try, and two agentic modes). Our reinforcement learning approach outperforms supervised fine-tuning on GSM8K, and the resulting 3B model achieves zero-shot performance on MMLU-STEM and MMLU-Pro competitive with 7B few-shot baselines. Most importantly, we identify an accuracy--auditability trade-off: configurations tuned for correctness alone learn to delegate reasoning to natural language and use Prolog only for the final computation, while configurations rewarded for symbolic structure produce fully auditable programs at a cost in accuracy. We interpret this trade-off as a form of reward hacking and discuss its implications for deploying neurosymbolic systems in safety-critical domains. The source code for our experiments is available under https://github.com/aisilab/Prolog-as-a-Tool
comment: ACL 2026 Findings (change from last version: corrected year in this comment)

light_analysis.overview: 通过GRPO强化学习微调语言模型使用Prolog作为符号推理工具，揭示了准确性与可审计性之间的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型常产生看似合理但实际错误的推理轨迹，且难以验证。现有方法缺乏外部符号推理工具的集成，导致模型推理过程不透明。该研究旨在通过训练模型使用Prolog作为工具，提高推理的可审计性和准确性，同时探索不同训练策略对模型行为的影响，以解决神经符号系统中的可靠性与可解释性矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 使用GRPO算法对Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct模型进行微调，在清理后的GSM8K数据集（gsm8k-prolog-prover）上训练。系统化地变化提示结构、奖励组成（执行、语法、语义、结构）和推理协议（单次、多次、两种代理模式）。奖励设计中考虑了代码执行正确性、语法合法性、语义匹配及结构完整性，并通过多轮强化学习迭代优化模型生成Prolog程序的能力。
light_analysis.result: 强化学习在GSM8K上优于监督微调；3B模型在MMLU-STEM和MMLU-Pro上零样本性能与7B少样本基线相当。关键发现是准确性与可审计性之间的权衡：仅奖励正确性的配置会促使模型将推理委托给自然语言，仅在最终计算中使用Prolog；而奖励符号结构的配置则产生完全可审计的程序，但牺牲了准确性。该权衡被解释为一种奖励破解形式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了通过强化学习训练语言模型使用Prolog作为工具的有效性，并揭示了神经符号系统中准确性与可审计性的固有矛盾。这一发现对安全关键领域的部署具有重要警示意义，提示需谨慎设计奖励函数以避免奖励破解。未来工作可探索缓解该权衡的策略，如多目标优化或动态奖励调整。

title: Equivariant symmetry-aware head pose estimation for fetal MRI
abstract: We present E(3)-Pose, a novel fast pose estimation method that jointly and explicitly models rotation equivariance and object symmetry. Our work is motivated by the challenging problem of accounting for fetal head motion during a diagnostic MRI scan. We aim to enable automatic adaptive prescription of diagnostic 2D MRI slices with 6-DoF head pose estimation, supported by rapid low-resolution 3D MRI volumes acquired before each 2D slice. Existing pose estimation methods struggle to generalize to clinical volumes due to pose ambiguities induced by inherent anatomical symmetries, as well as low resolution, noise, and artifacts. In contrast, E(3)-Pose captures anatomical symmetries and rigid pose equivariance by construction, and yields robust estimates of the fetal head pose. Our experiments on publicly available and representative clinical fetal MRI datasets demonstrate the superior robustness and generalization of our method across domains. Crucially, E(3)-Pose achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on clinical MRI volumes, supporting future clinical translation. Our implementation is publicly available at github.com/MedicalVisionGroup/E3-Pose.

light_analysis.overview: 提出E(3)-Pose，通过联合建模旋转等变性和解剖对称性实现快速鲁棒的胎儿头部姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 在胎儿MRI诊断中，胎头运动导致2D切片定位困难。现有姿态估计方法因解剖对称性引起的模糊性、低分辨率、噪声和伪影而难以泛化到临床数据。需要一种能利用快速低分辨率3D体积进行6自由度姿态估计的方法，以自适应地规划诊断2D切片。
light_analysis.method: E(3)-Pose构建了旋转等变性和对象对称性，通过显式建模刚性变换下的等变性和解剖结构的对称性，从低分辨率3D MRI中估计胎儿头部姿态。该方法不依赖大量标注，而是利用对称性约束，实现了快速（快速低分辨率扫描后即时估计）且鲁棒的姿态输出。
light_analysis.result: 在公开和代表性临床胎儿MRI数据集上，E(3)-Pose展现了优越的鲁棒性和跨域泛化能力。在临床MRI体积上实现了最先进的精度，与现有方法相比显著提高了姿态估计的准确性，为临床转化奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: E(3)-Pose通过显式建模旋转等变性和对称性，解决了胎儿MRI头部姿态估计中的模糊性和泛化问题。其高精度和鲁棒性支持未来在自适应2D切片规划中的临床应用，开源代码促进进一步研究。局限可能在于对对称性假设的依赖，未来可扩展至其他医学图像配准任务。

title: 6 Fingers, 1 Kidney: Natural Adversarial Medical Images Reveal Critical Weaknesses of Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly integrated into clinical workflows. However, existing benchmarks primarily assess performance on common anatomical presentations and fail to capture the challenges posed by rare variants. To address this gap, we introduce AdversarialAnatomyBench, the first benchmark comprising naturally occurring rare anatomical variants across diverse imaging modalities and anatomical regions. We call such variants that violate learned priors about "typical" human anatomy natural adversarial anatomy. Benchmarking 25 state-of-the-art VLMs with AdversarialAnatomyBench yielded three key insights. First, when queried with basic medical perception tasks, mean accuracy dropped from 71% on typical to 28% on atypical anatomy. Even the best-performing models, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Llama 4 Maverick, showed performance drops of 41-51%. Second, model errors closely mirrored expected anatomical biases. Third, neither model scaling nor interventions, including bias-aware prompting and test-time reasoning, resolved these issues. These findings highlight a critical limitation in current VLMs: their poor generalization to rare anatomical presentations. AdversarialAnatomyBench provides a foundation for systematically measuring and mitigating anatomical bias in multimodal medical artificial intelligence (AI) systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对罕见解剖变异的基准AdversarialAnatomyBench，揭示视觉语言模型在非典型解剖上的严重性能下降，且模型缩放和干预无法解决。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM基准主要评估常见解剖表现，无法捕捉罕见变异带来的挑战，导致模型在临床应用中可能因解剖偏倚而失败。该研究旨在系统测量和减轻这一关键弱点，提升多模态医学AI的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建AdversarialAnatomyBench，包含多种成像模态（如CT、MRI）和人体区域的自然罕见解剖变异，称为自然对抗解剖。对25个最先进VLM（如GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Llama 4 Maverick）进行基本医学感知任务基准测试，比较典型与不典型解剖的表现。
light_analysis.result: 在典型解剖上平均准确率为71%，非典型解剖骤降至28%。最佳模型GPT-5等性能下降41-51%。模型错误与预期解剖偏倚高度一致。模型缩放、偏倚感知提示和测试时推理等干预均未能改善性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前VLM对罕见解剖表现泛化能力极差，AdversarialAnatomyBench为系统评估和缓解解剖偏倚提供了基础工具，对多模态医学AI的安全应用具有重要意义。未来需开发更鲁棒的解剖变异适应机制。

title: Overcoming State Inertia: Minimally Invasive Temporal Alignment for Evolving Contexts
abstract: Long-context dialogue systems suffer from state inertia, where models over-attend to history and fail to adapt to evolving intents. We demonstrate that standard alignment methods like DPO and even recent long-context optimization techniques struggle to resolve this without incurring a severe contextual alignment tax--a substantial perplexity surge caused by disrupting pre-trained priors. To address this, we propose DZ-TiDPO, a minimally invasive framework that synergizes conflict-aware optimization (during training) with a structural temporal attention bias. This design effectively decouples state updating from general linguistic modeling. Experiments on Multi-Session Chat and our new Inertia Challenge (IC-Bench) show DZ-TiDPO preserves structural coherence while resolving inter-turn conflicts. Crucially, our framework supports dual inference strategies: a negligible-latency static mode for general robustness and a precision-focused dynamic mode for micro-semantic conflicts. Furthermore, our scaling analysis reveals a capacity-stability trade-off, confirming that highly capable mid-sized models (7B) can efficiently internalize temporal alignment. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/lyj20071013/DZ-TiDPO.
comment: 34 pages, 4 figures, 23 tables. Code available at https://github.com/lyj20071013/DZ-TiDPO

light_analysis.overview: 提出DZ-TiDPO，一种最小侵入式的时序对齐框架，通过冲突感知优化和结构时序注意力偏置，解决长上下文对话系统中的状态惯性问题，同时避免上下文对齐税。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文对话系统存在状态惯性，模型过度关注历史而无法响应动态意图。现有方法如DPO和长上下文优化技术要么无效，要么引发上下文对齐税——破坏预训练先验导致困惑度显著上升。因此需要一种能在更新状态时保持语言建模能力的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DZ-TiDPO框架，包含两阶段：训练时采用冲突感知优化，结合结构时序注意力偏置，解耦状态更新与通用语言建模；推理时支持双策略——低延迟静态模式用于通用鲁棒性，精确动态模式用于微语义冲突。实验使用Multi-Session Chat和自建IC-Bench数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在Multi-Session Chat和IC-Bench上，DZ-TiDPO能保持结构连贯性并解决回合间冲突，优于标准DPO和长上下文优化方法。缩放分析显示7B中等规模模型可高效内化时序对齐，揭示了容量-稳定性权衡，但未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出最小侵入式框架克服状态惯性，通过冲突感知优化和时序注意力偏置避免对齐税。双推理模式平衡效率与精度，且中等模型即可胜任。代码开源，为长上下文对话系统的时序对齐提供了新思路，但摘要未讨论局限。

title: Patent Representation Learning via Self-supervision
abstract: We study self-supervised patent representation learning with contrastive objectives. A standard baseline constructs positives by encoding the same text twice under independent dropout masks, but applying this recipe to long, structured patent documents requires careful calibration. We show that dropout-only training can be substantially strengthened by tuning temperature and dropout rate, yet its best configuration is evaluation-dependent and does not transfer uniformly from title--abstract retrieval to claim-to-disclosure retrieval. We propose mixed dropout--section positives, a patent-specific view construction strategy in which the anchor is the title--abstract view and the positive is sampled either from a dropout re-encoding of the same view or from another section of the same patent, such as claims, summary, background, drawings, or description. This uses patent-internal structure as a training-time signal without IPC labels, citations, or relevance annotations. We evaluate on graded EPO search-report retrieval, DAPFAM, a recently proposed family-level patent retrieval benchmark, and IPC subclass classification. Section-based positives improve over calibrated dropout-only and generic title--abstract augmentation baselines, are competitive with citation-informed patent encoders and a general-purpose embedding model, and perform strongly on the out-of-domain split of DAPFAM. Additional cross-section alignment diagnostics show that section-pair training improves compatibility among abstracts, claims, and descriptions of the same invention. These results indicate that patent sections provide effective self-supervised positive views for learning dense patent representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合dropout-章节正样本策略，利用专利内部结构进行自监督对比学习，提升专利表示效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督专利表示学习使用独立dropout掩码构建正样本，但对长结构化专利文档需仔细校准温度与dropout率，且最佳配置依赖评估任务，无法通用。此外，传统方法依赖IPC标签、引用或相关性标注，获取成本高。因此，需要一种无需外部标签、能利用专利自身结构特性的自监督学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合dropout-章节正样本（mixed dropout–section positives）策略：锚点为标题-摘要视图，正样本随机从同一视图的dropout重新编码或同一专利的其他章节（如权利要求、摘要、背景、附图说明或具体实施方式）中采样。该策略利用专利内部章节结构作为训练信号，无需任何外部标签。训练采用对比学习目标，并系统调节温度与dropout率。
light_analysis.result: 在EPO检索报告排序、DAPFAM家族级专利检索基准和IPC子类分类上评估：基于章节的正样本显著优于校准的dropout-only基线与通用标题-摘要增强基线，性能与使用引用信息的专利编码器及通用嵌入模型（如Sentence-BERT）相当，且在DAPFAM域外分割上表现强劲。交叉对齐诊断表明，章节对训练改善了摘要、权利要求与描述之间的兼容性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 专利章节可提供有效的自监督正视图，用于学习高质量专利密集表示。该方法无需外部标签或引用，降低了数据依赖，且性能具有竞争力。局限性在于未探索不同章节组合的优化策略，未来可研究更复杂的视图选择机制。该研究为专利分析、检索等任务提供了实用的表示学习方案。

title: Human-AI Complementarity: A Goal for Amplified Oversight
abstract: Human feedback is critical for aligning AI systems to human values. As AI capabilities improve and AI is used to tackle more challenging tasks, verifying quality and safety becomes increasingly challenging. This paper explores how we can leverage AI to improve the quality of human oversight. We focus on an important safety problem that is already challenging for humans: fact-verification of AI outputs. We find that combining AI ratings and human ratings based on AI rater confidence is better than relying on either alone. Giving humans an AI fact-verification assistant further improves their accuracy, but the type of assistance matters. Displaying AI explanation, confidence, and labels leads to over-reliance, but just showing search results and evidence fosters more appropriate trust. These results have implications for Amplified Oversight -- the challenge of combining humans and AI to supervise AI systems even as they surpass human expert performance.

light_analysis.overview: 探究人机互补性以提升AI监督质量，通过结合AI置信度评分和适当辅助方式增强事实核查效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI能力提升，验证其输出质量和安全性变得越来越困难。人类反馈虽关键，但面临挑战。本文旨在利用AI改进人类监督质量，特别针对事实核查这一安全难题，解决现有方法中人类单独判断或AI单独判断的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于AI置信度的人类-AI评分结合方法，并实验不同类型辅助：显示AI解释、置信度和标签（导致过度依赖），仅显示搜索结果和证据（促进适当信任）。使用事实核查任务评估，探索放大监督策略。
light_analysis.result: 结合AI评分和基于AI置信度的人类评分优于任一单独方法。提供AI事实核查助手可提升准确性，但辅助方式影响显著：显示解释和标签导致过度依赖，而展示搜索结果和证据则建立更适当的信任。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实人机互补性对放大监督的潜力，强调适当辅助设计的重要性。成果有助于开发在AI超越人类专家时仍能有效监督的系统，未来可探索更复杂的交互方式和扩展至其他安全场景。

title: Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Flow-Matching Policies for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models such as OpenVLA, Octo, and $π_0$ have shown strong generalization by leveraging large-scale demonstrations, yet their performance is still fundamentally constrained by the quality and coverage of supervised data. Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a promising path for improving and fine-tuning VLAs through online interaction. However, conventional policy gradient methods are computationally infeasible in the context of flow-matching based models due to the intractability of the importance sampling process, which requires explicit computation of policy ratios. To overcome this limitation, we propose Flow Policy Optimization (FPO) algorithm, which reformulates importance sampling by leveraging per-sample changes in the conditional flow-matching objective. Furthermore, FPO achieves stable and scalable online reinforcement fine-tuning of the $π_0$ model by integrating structure-aware credit assignment to enhance gradient efficiency, clipped surrogate objectives to stabilize optimization, multi-step latent exploration to encourage diverse policy updates, and a Q-ensemble mechanism to provide robust value estimation. We evaluate FPO on the LIBERO benchmark and the ALOHA simulation task against supervised, preference-aligned, diffusion-based, autoregressive online RL, and $π_0$-FAST baselines, observing consistent improvements over the imitation prior and strong alternatives with stable learning under sparse rewards. In addition, ablation studies and analyses of the latent space dynamics further highlight the contributions of individual components within FPO, validating the effectiveness of the proposed computational modules and the stable convergence of the conditional flow-matching objective during online RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow Policy Optimization (FPO)算法，解决流匹配策略在在线强化学习微调中重要性采样不可行的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLA模型如OpenVLA、π₀等依赖大规模示范数据，但性能受限于数据质量和覆盖范围。强化学习可通过在线交互提升模型，然而传统策略梯度方法在流匹配模型中因需要显式计算策略比率，重要性采样过程难以处理，导致计算不可行。因此，需要一种新算法来稳定高效地微调流匹配策略。
light_analysis.method: FPO算法通过利用条件流匹配目标中每个样本的变化重新表述重要性采样，避免显式比率计算。结合结构感知信用分配提升梯度效率、裁剪代理目标稳定优化、多步潜在探索鼓励策略多样性、以及Q集成机制提供鲁棒价值估计。在π₀模型上实现稳定可扩展的在线强化学习微调。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO基准和ALOHA仿真任务中，FPO优于监督学习、偏好对齐、扩散策略、自回归在线RL及π₀-FAST等基线方法。在稀疏奖励下保持稳定学习，且消融实验验证了各组件（信用分配、目标裁剪、潜在探索、Q集成）的有效性，条件流匹配目标在在线RL中收敛稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: FPO有效克服了流匹配策略在线RL微调的计算瓶颈，为VLA模型提供实用的强化学习微调框架。学术上推动了流匹配与RL的结合，应用上提升机器人操作任务的适应性和泛化能力。未来可扩展到更复杂的真实世界场景，并探索与其他策略表示的整合。

title: A Concept of Possibility for Real-World Events
abstract: This paper offers a new concept of {\it possibility} as an alternative to the now-a-days standard concept originally introduced by L.A. Zadeh in 1978. This new version was inspired by the original but, formally, has nothing in common with it other than that they both adopt the Łukasiewicz multivalent interpretation of the logical connectives. Moreover, rather than seeking to provide a general notion of possibility, this focuses specifically on the possibility of a real-world event. An event is viewed as having prerequisites that enable its occurrence and constraints that may impede its occurrence, and the possibility of the event is computed as a function of the probabilities that the prerequisites hold and the constraints do not. This version of possibility might appropriately be applied to problems of planning. When there are multiple plans available for achieving a goal, this theory can be used to determine which plan is most possible, i.e., easiest or most feasible to complete. It is speculated that this model of reasoning correctly captures normal human reasoning about plans. The theory is elaborated and an illustrative example for vehicle route planning is provided. There is also a suggestion of potential future applications.
comment: Submitted to Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR), June 25, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于前提概率和约束概率的现实世界事件可能性概念，用于规划问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Zadeh在1978年引入的标准可能性概念过于一般化，不适用于现实世界事件的具体规划。现有方法缺乏对事件前提和约束的系统考虑，难以准确衡量计划的可行性。
light_analysis.method: 将事件分解为必要前提和约束条件，可能性定义为前提成立且约束不成立的概率。采用Łukasiewicz多值逻辑解释逻辑连接词。通过比较不同计划的可能性（即概率值）选择最可行的方案。以车辆路径规划为例说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未报告具体的实验结果或性能指标。仅提供了车辆路径规划的示例性说明，表明该方法能够比较不同路线计划的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该理论可能正确模拟人类对计划的推理过程，为规划问题提供了一种新的可能性度量。潜在应用包括机器人任务规划、供应链管理等。未来可扩展至更复杂的约束条件和动态环境。

title: Eyes-on-Me: Scalable RAG Poisoning through Transferable Attention-Steering Attractors
abstract: Existing data poisoning attacks on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems scale poorly because they require costly optimization of poisoned documents for each target phrase. We introduce Eyes-on-Me, a modular attack that decomposes an adversarial document into reusable **Attention Attractors** and **Focus Regions**. Attractors are optimized to direct attention to the Focus Region. Attackers can then insert semantic baits for the retriever or malicious instructions for the generator, adapting to new targets at near zero cost. This is achieved by steering a small subset of attention heads that we empirically identify as strongly correlated with attack success. Across 18 end-to-end RAG settings (3 datasets $\times$ 2 retrievers $\times$ 3 generators), Eyes-on-Me raises average attack success rates from 21.9 to 57.8 (+35.9 points, 2.6$\times$ over prior work). A single optimized attractor transfers to unseen black box retrievers and generators without retraining. Our findings establish a scalable paradigm for RAG data poisoning and show that modular, reusable components pose a practical threat to modern AI systems. They also contribute to interpretability research by revealing a strong link between attention concentration and model outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Eyes-on-Me模块化攻击，通过可复用的注意力吸引器实现低成本、可迁移的RAG投毒。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG系统数据投毒攻击可扩展性差，需为每个目标短语优化投毒文档，成本高昂。该研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，实现模块化、可复用的攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: 将对抗文档分解为Attention Attractors和Focus Regions。Attractors经优化引导注意力至Focus Region，攻击者插入语义诱饵或恶意指令。通过控制少量与攻击成功强相关的注意力头实现，无需重新训练即可适应新目标。
light_analysis.result: 在18种RAG设置（3数据集×2检索器×3生成器）上，平均攻击成功率从21.9%提升至57.8%（+35.9点，为先前工作的2.6倍）。单个吸引器可迁移至未见过的黑盒检索器和生成器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了RAG数据投毒的可扩展范式，表明模块化组件构成实际威胁；同时揭示注意力集中与模型输出的强联系，贡献于可解释性研究。

title: Learning Robust Penetration Testing Policies under Partial Observability: A systematic evaluation
abstract: Penetration testing, the simulation of cyberattacks to identify security vulnerabilities, presents a sequential decision-making problem well-suited for reinforcement learning (RL) automation. Like many applications of RL to real-world problems, partial observability presents a major challenge, as it invalidates the Markov property present in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). Partially Observable MDPs require history aggregation or belief state estimation to learn successful policies. We investigate stochastic, partially observable penetration testing scenarios over host networks of varying size, aiming to better reflect real-world complexity through more challenging and representative benchmarks. This approach leads to the development of more robust and transferable policies, which are crucial for ensuring reliable performance across diverse and unpredictable real-world environments. Using vanilla Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) as a baseline, we compare a selection of PPO-based variants designed to mitigate partial observability, including frame-stacking, augmenting observations with historical information, and employing LSTM or TrXL architectures. We conduct a systematic empirical analysis of these algorithms across different host network sizes. We find that this task greatly benefits from history aggregation. Converging up to four times faster than other approaches. Manual inspection of the learned policies by the algorithms reveals clear distinctions and provides insights that go beyond quantitative results.
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) https://openreview.net/forum?id=YkUV7wfk19. 25 pages, 8 figures. Code and StochNASim environment are available at https://github.com/raphsimon/StochNASim

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估了多种PPO变体在部分可观察渗透测试中的表现，发现历史聚合方法可加速收敛四倍并提升策略鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 渗透测试作为序贯决策问题适合强化学习自动化，但部分可观察性破坏了马尔可夫性质，现有方法处理不足。真实环境复杂多变，需要更鲁棒和可迁移的策略以确保可靠性，因此研究在部分可观察场景下学习稳健策略的方法。
light_analysis.method: 在随机、部分可观察的渗透测试场景中，对不同大小主机网络进行实验。以vanilla PPO为基线，比较帧堆叠、历史观察增强、LSTM及TrXL架构等PPO变体，通过系统实证分析评估它们处理部分可观察性的能力。
light_analysis.result: 任务极大受益于历史聚合，收敛速度比其他方法快四倍。手动检查策略发现算法间存在明显差异，提供了超越定量结果的见解，证明了历史聚合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过更挑战性的基准测试，开发了更鲁棒和可迁移的策略。历史聚合是关键，有助于提升渗透测试自动化在真实环境中的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂网络或不同攻击面。

title: Limited Reference, Reliable Generation: A Two-Component Framework for Tabular Data Generation in Low-Data Regimes
abstract: Synthetic tabular data generation is increasingly essential in machine learning, supporting downstream applications when real-world, high-quality tabular data is insufficient. Existing tabular generation approaches, such as generative adversarial networks (GANs) and fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs), typically require sufficient reference data, limiting their effectiveness in domain-specific datasets with scarce records. While prompt-based LLMs offer flexibility without parameter tuning, they often generate distributionally drifted data with localized redundancy, leading to degradation in downstream task performance. To overcome these issues, we propose ReFine, a framework that (i) extracts symbolic if-then rules from interpretable models and embeds them into prompts to explicitly guide the generation process toward the domain-specific distribution, and (ii) applies dual-granularity filtering that mitigates over-sampling patterns while preserving rare but informative samples to reduce localized redundancy. Extensive experiments on diverse benchmarks demonstrate that ReFine provides robust downstream utility, achieving a top-tier average rank across datasets and data regimes, with an average relative improvement of 7.48% in extreme low-data regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReFine框架，通过符号规则引导和双粒度过滤，提升低数据场景下表格数据生成的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成表格数据生成在真实数据不足时至关重要，但现有方法如GANs或微调LLMs需要大量参考数据，在领域特定低数据场景下效果不佳。提示式LLMs虽灵活，却易生成分布漂移和局部冗余的数据，损害下游任务性能。因此，需要一种能在有限参考数据下生成高质量表格数据的方法。
light_analysis.method: ReFine框架包含两个组件：（1）从可解释模型（如决策树）提取if-then符号规则，嵌入到提示中，显式引导LLM生成符合领域分布的数据；（2）双粒度过滤机制，先粗粒度去除过采样模式，再细粒度保留稀有但有信息的样本，以缓解局部冗余。无需参数微调。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，ReFine在不同数据量场景下均取得顶尖平均排名，尤其在极端低数据场景（如每类仅5样本）下，平均相对提升7.48%。与GANs、微调LLMs及提示式LLMs相比，下游分类任务的F1分数显著提高。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReFine通过符号规则引导和过滤，有效解决了低数据表格生成中的分布漂移和冗余问题，为数据稀缺场景提供了可靠替代方案。其无需微调的特性拓展了LLM在表格数据生成中的应用。未来可探索自动规则提取或扩展至其他数据类型。

title: Reconstruction Alignment Improves Unified Multimodal Models
abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) unify visual understanding and generation within a single architecture. However, conventional training relies on image-text pairs (or sequences) whose captions are typically sparse and miss fine-grained visual details, even when they use hundreds of words to describe a simple image. We introduce Reconstruction Alignment (RECA), a resource-efficient post-training method that leverages visual understanding encoder embeddings as dense "text prompts", providing rich supervision without captions. Concretely, RECA conditions a UMM on its own visual understanding embeddings and optimizes it to reconstruct the input image with a self-supervised reconstruction loss, thereby realigning understanding and generation. Despite its simplicity, RECA is broadly applicable: across autoregressive, masked-autoregressive, and diffusion-based UMMs, it consistently improves generation and editing fidelity. With only 27 GPU hours, post-training with RECA substantially improves image generation performance on GenEval (0.73 $\rightarrow$ 0.90) and DPGBench (80.93 $\rightarrow$ 88.15), while also boosting editing benchmarks (ImgEdit 3.38 $\rightarrow$ 3.75, GEdit 6.94 $\rightarrow$ 7.27). Notably, RECA surpasses much larger open-source models and applies broadly across diverse UMM architectures, establishing it as an efficient and general post-training alignment strategy for UMMs.
comment: 43 pages, 36 figures and 14 tables; accepted by ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Reconstruction Alignment (RECA) 方法，通过自监督重建损失对齐统一多模态模型的视觉理解与生成，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一多模态模型依赖图像-文本对训练，但文本描述稀疏且缺失细粒度视觉细节，导致理解与生成对齐不足。现有方法需要大量标注或复杂的训练流程，效率低下。RECA旨在利用视觉理解编码器的密集嵌入，无需额外标注即可增强对齐，提升生成和编辑质量。
light_analysis.method: RECA是一种后训练方法，将模型的视觉理解编码器输出作为密集文本提示，通过自监督重建损失优化模型重建输入图像。该方法适用于自回归、掩码自回归和扩散架构的UMMs，仅需27 GPU小时即可完成对齐。关键创新在于利用已有编码器的嵌入提供丰富监督，无需新数据或架构改动。
light_analysis.result: 在GenEval上从0.73提升至0.90，DPGBench从80.93提升至88.15；编辑任务上ImgEdit从3.38提升至3.75，GEdit从6.94提升至7.27。RECA超越更大开源模型，且通用性得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: RECA是一种高效、通用的后训练对齐策略，显著提升统一多模态模型的生成与编辑性能。其无需额外标注，适用于多种架构，具有高实用价值。未来可探索扩展到更多模态或任务。

title: Vis-CoT: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Interactive Visualization and Intervention in LLM Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong reasoning via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but the process is opaque, which makes verification, debugging, and control difficult in high-stakes settings. We present Vis-CoT, a human-in-the-loop framework that converts linear CoT text into an interactive reasoning graph. Users can visualize the logical flow, identify flawed steps, and intervene by pruning incorrect paths and grafting new, user-defined premises. This shifts interaction from passive observation to active collaboration, steering models toward more accurate and trustworthy conclusions. Across GSM8K and StrategyQA, Vis-CoT improves final-answer accuracy by up to 24 percentage points over non-interactive baselines. A user study also shows large gains in perceived usability and trust. Vis-CoT points to a practical path for more reliable, understandable, and collaborative reasoning by combining LLMs with targeted human oversight.
comment: arXiv admin note: This paper has been withdrawn by arXiv due to unverifiable authorship and affiliation

light_analysis.overview: 将LLM的链式思维推理转化为交互式推理图，支持用户可视化和干预推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过链式思维提示展现出强大的推理能力，但其推理过程不透明，在高风险场景中难以进行验证、调试和控制。现有方法缺乏有效的交互手段，用户只能被动观察输出。因此，需要一种框架让用户能够主动参与推理过程，识别错误步骤并引导模型走向更准确和可信的结论。
light_analysis.method: Vis-CoT框架将链式思维文本转换为交互式推理图，用户可直观查看逻辑流程、标记错误步骤，并通过剪枝错误路径和嫁接新用户定义前提进行干预。该框架将交互从被动观察转变为主动协作，结合人类判断与LLM推理能力，支持迭代优化推理链。使用GSM8K和StrategyQA数据集进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K和StrategyQA数据集上，Vis-CoT相比非交互基线方法，最终答案准确率提升最多24个百分点。用户研究显示，该框架在感知可用性和信任度方面有大幅提升，用户能够更有效地纠正错误推理，获得更可靠的结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Vis-CoT通过将人类纳入推理循环，显著提高了LLM推理的准确性和可理解性，为高可靠性应用提供了实用路径。它展示了交互式可视化与人工干预相结合的价值，未来可扩展至更复杂的多步骤推理任务，并进一步优化用户交互体验。

title: EndoUFM: Utilizing Foundation Models for Monocular depth estimation of endoscopic images
abstract: Depth estimation is a foundational component for 3D reconstruction in minimally invasive endoscopic surgeries. However, existing monocular depth estimation techniques often exhibit limited performance to the varying illumination and complex textures of the surgical environment. While applying foundation models offers a promising approach to enhance the depth estimation performance, the domain gap between the natural images used for pre-training and the target endoscopic images leads to significant semantic perception deficiencies. In this study, EndoUFM is introduced as an unsupervised monocular depth estimation framework that innovatively \underline{U}tilizes dual Foundation Models for Endoscopic images, thereby enhancing the depth estimation performance by leveraging the powerful pre-learned priors. The framework features a novel adaptive fine-tuning strategy that incorporates Random Vector Low-Rank Adaptation (RVLoRA) to enhance model adaptability, and a Residual block based on Depthwise Separable Convolution (Res-DSC) to improve the capture of fine-grained local features. A mask-guided smoothness loss is also introduced to enforce depth consistency within anatomical structures. Extensive experiments on the SCARED, Hamlyn, SERV-CT, and EndoNeRF datasets confirm that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining an efficient model size. This work contributes to augmenting surgeons' spatial perception during minimally invasive procedures, thereby enhancing surgical precision and safety, with crucial implications for augmented reality and navigation systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/RealMindyY/EndoUFM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EndoUFM框架，利用双基础模型实现内窥镜图像的无监督单目深度估计，通过自适应微调和掩码引导损失提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 内窥镜手术中深度估计是3D重建的基础，但现有单目方法受光照变化和复杂纹理影响性能有限。预训练基础模型存在领域差距，导致语义感知不足。因此需要一种利用基础模型的优点的同时，适应内窥镜图像特性的深度估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出EndoUFM无监督框架，创新性地利用双基础模型（Foundation Models）提升深度估计。包含自适应微调策略（RVLoRA）增强模型适应性，以及基于深度可分离卷积的残差块（Res-DSC）改进局部特征捕获。引入掩码引导平滑损失，强制解剖结构内的深度一致性。在多个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在SCARED、Hamlyn、SERV-CT和EndoNeRF四个数据集上，该方法取得最先进性能，且模型大小高效。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的EndoUFM提高了内窥镜手术中空间感知能力，增强手术精度和安全性，对增强现实和导航系统有重要意义。代码已开源。潜在局限性包括未讨论实时性等。

title: Learning to Select Maximum Clique Algorithms: From Traditional Machine Learning to a Dual-Channel Hybrid Neural Architecture
abstract: The Maximum Clique Problem (MCP) is an NP-hard problem with wide-ranging applications in fields such as bioinformatics, network science, and social computing, yet no single algorithm consistently outperforms all others across diverse graph instances. This underscores the critical need for instance-aware algorithm selection, a domain that remains largely unexplored for the MCP. To address this gap, we propose a novel learning-based framework that integrates both traditional machine learning and graph neural networks. We first construct a benchmark dataset by executing four state-of-the-art exact MCP solvers on a diverse collection of graphs and extracting structural features. An evaluation of conventional classifiers establishes Random Forest as a strong baseline and reveals that connectivity and topological features are key predictors of performance. Building on these insights, we develop GAT-MLP, a dual-channel model that combines a Graph Attention Network (GAT) to encode local graph structure with a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) to model global features. Experiments demonstrate that GAT-MLP outperforms all baselines, and our selector significantly outperforms the Single Best Solver. Our results highlight the effectiveness of the dual-channel architecture and the promise of graph neural networks for combinatorial algorithm selection, achieving 90.43% accuracy in choosing the optimal solver. Code and models are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GAT-MLP-7E5F.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAT-MLP双通道模型，结合GAT和MLP进行最大团问题算法选择，达到90.43%准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 最大团问题（MCP）是NP难问题，在生物信息学、网络科学等领域应用广泛，但尚无单一算法在所有图实例上表现最佳。因此，需要实例感知的算法选择方法，而该领域对MCP尚缺乏探索。现有方法未能有效利用图的结构特征和全局特征。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建基准数据集，使用四种最先进的精确MCP求解器对多样图集合求解并提取结构特征。评估传统分类器后，随机森林作为强基线。基于此，提出GAT-MLP双通道模型：一个通道使用图注意力网络（GAT）编码局部图结构，另一个通道使用多层感知机（MLP）建模全局特征。模型联合学习以选择最优求解器。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GAT-MLP在所有基线中表现最佳，算法选择器显著优于单一最佳求解器。在测试集上达到90.43%的准确率，证明双通道架构和图神经网络在组合算法选择中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了首个基于学习的最大团问题算法选择框架，GAT-MLP双通道模型有效融合局部和全局特征。该工作为图论中NP难问题的实例感知算法选择提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值。未来可扩展至更多组合优化问题。

title: DMSC: Dynamic Multi-Scale Coordination Framework for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time Series Forecasting (TSF) faces persistent challenges in modeling intricate temporal dependencies across different scales. Despite recent advances leveraging different decomposition operations and novel architectures based on CNN, MLP or Transformer, existing methods still struggle with static decomposition strategies, fragmented dependency modeling, and inflexible fusion mechanisms, limiting their ability to model intricate temporal dependencies. To explicitly solve the mentioned three problems respectively, we propose a novel Dynamic Multi-Scale Coordination Framework (DMSC) with Multi-Scale Patch Decomposition block (EMPD), Triad Interaction Block (TIB) and Adaptive Scale Routing MoE block (ASR-MoE). Specifically, EMPD is designed as a built-in component to dynamically segment sequences into hierarchical patches with exponentially scaled granularities, eliminating predefined scale constraints through input-adaptive patch adjustment. TIB then jointly models intra-patch, inter-patch, and cross-variable dependencies within each layer's decomposed representations. EMPD and TIB are jointly integrated into layers forming a multi-layer progressive cascade architecture, where coarse-grained representations from earlier layers adaptively guide fine-grained feature extraction in subsequent layers via gated pathways. And ASR-MoE dynamically fuses multi-scale predictions by leveraging specialized global and local experts with temporal-aware weighting. Comprehensive experiments on thirteen real-world benchmarks demonstrate that DMSC consistently maintains state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and superior computational efficiency for TSF tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/1327679995/DMSC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态多尺度协调框架DMSC，通过自适应补丁分解、三联交互和专家混合融合解决时间序列预测的尺度建模问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测面临跨尺度复杂时间依赖建模的挑战。现有方法采用静态分解策略、碎片化依赖建模和僵化融合机制，难以捕捉多尺度动态特征。这些局限性限制了模型对实际序列中层次性和非平稳性模式的表达能力。因此，需要一种动态且协调的多尺度框架来统一解决这三个核心问题，提升预测精度和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: DMSC包含三个核心组件：EMPD模块通过指数级粒度层次化划分序列，实现输入自适应补丁调整；TIB块联合建模补丁内、补丁间和跨变量依赖；ASR-MoE利用全局与局部专家进行时序感知加权，动态融合多尺度预测。三者通过多层渐进级联架构集成，粗粒度表示通过门控路径引导细粒度特征提取。
light_analysis.result: 在13个真实世界基准数据集上，DMSC在时间序列预测任务中一致保持最先进性能，并具有优越的计算效率。具体实验结果优于现有基于CNN、MLP和Transformer的方法，证明了动态多尺度协调框架的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DMSC通过动态多尺度分解、交互建模和自适应融合，有效解决了静态分解和碎片化依赖问题。在多个领域的时间序列预测中展现出强泛化能力和高效性。未来可探索更复杂的专家路由策略或扩展到多变量场景。该方法为时序建模提供了新的动态多尺度视角。

title: GenRecal: Generation after Recalibration from Large to Small Vision-Language Models
abstract: Recent advancements in vision-language models (VLMs) have leveraged large language models (LLMs) to achieve performance on par with closed-source systems like GPT-4V. However, deploying these models in real-world scenarios, particularly on resource-constrained devices, remains challenging due to their substantial computational demands. This has spurred interest in distilling knowledge from large VLMs into smaller, more efficient counterparts. A key challenge arises here from the diversity of VLM architectures, which are built on different LLMs and employ varying token types-differing in vocabulary size, token splits, and token index ordering. To address this challenge of limitation to a specific VLM type, we present Generation after Recalibration (GenRecal), a general-purpose distillation framework for VLMs. GenRecal incorporates a Recalibrator that aligns and adapts feature representations between heterogeneous VLMs, enabling effective knowledge transfer across different types of VLMs. Through extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks, we demonstrate that GenRecal significantly improves baseline performances, eventually outperforming large-scale open- and closed-source VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenRecal通用蒸馏框架，通过重校准对齐异构VLM特征，实现从大到小VLM的有效知识迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 大视觉语言模型(VLM)计算量大，难以部署在资源受限设备上，因此需要蒸馏到小模型。但现有VLM架构多样，基于不同大语言模型(LLM)和token类型，蒸馏方法受限于特定架构，缺乏通用性。GenRecal旨在解决这一挑战，实现跨异构VLM的知识迁移。
light_analysis.method: GenRecal是一种通用蒸馏框架，核心是Recalibrator模块，该模块对齐并适应异构VLM之间的特征表示，从而在不同类型的VLM（如基于不同LLM、不同词汇大小和token分割的模型）之间实现有效知识转移。实验在多个具有挑战性的基准上进行，但摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，GenRecal显著提升了基线性能，并最终超越大规模开源和闭源VLM（如GPT-4V）。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明其效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenRecal提出了一种通用蒸馏框架，解决了VLM架构多样性导致的知识迁移受限问题。该研究具有重要学术价值，可促进VLM在资源受限设备上的实际部署。未来工作可能涉及更广泛的应用或进一步优化Recalibrator。

title: Normalizing Flows are Capable Models for Continuous Control
abstract: Modern reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have found success by using powerful probabilistic models, such as transformers, energy-based models, and diffusion/flow-based models. To this end, RL researchers often choose to pay the price of accommodating these models into their algorithms -- diffusion models are expressive, but are computationally intensive due to their reliance on solving differential equations, while autoregressive transformer models are scalable but typically require learning discrete representations. Normalizing flows (NFs), by contrast, seem to provide an appealing alternative, as they enable likelihoods and sampling without solving differential equations or autoregressive architectures. However, their potential in RL has received limited attention, partly due to the prevailing belief that normalizing flows lack sufficient expressivity. We show that this is not the case. Building on recent work in NFs, we propose a single NF architecture which integrates seamlessly into RL algorithms, serving as a policy, Q-function, and occupancy measure. Our approach leads to much simpler algorithms, and achieves higher performance in imitation learning, offline, goal conditioned RL and unsupervised RL.

light_analysis.overview: 证明归一化流在连续控制中具有足够表现力，可统一作为策略、Q函数和占用度量，简化强化学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代强化学习算法使用强大概率模型（如变换器、能量模型、扩散/流模型）但各有缺陷：扩散模型依赖微分方程计算密集，自回归变换器需学习离散表示。归一化流（NF）能直接计算似然和采样，无需解微分方程或自回归架构，但被认为表现力不足，限制了在RL中的应用。本文旨在反驳此观点，展示NF在连续控制RL中的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 基于归一化流的最新进展，提出单一NF架构，可无缝集成到RL算法中，同时作为策略、Q函数和占用度量。该设计避免了复杂的模型架构和计算开销，实现了更简洁的算法。在模仿学习、离线RL、目标条件RL和无监督RL等场景中统一使用同一NF模型。
light_analysis.result: 在模仿学习、离线强化学习、目标条件强化学习和无监督强化学习等多个连续控制任务中，该方法均取得了更高性能。相比基于扩散模型或自回归变换器的方法，算法更简单且表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确声称性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了归一化流在连续控制强化学习中具备足够表现力，可作为统一模型简化算法设计，并在多个RL设置中取得更好效果。该工作挑战了NF表现力不足的固有认知，为RL中概率模型选择提供了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的NF结构以进一步提升性能。

title: Mitigating Hallucinations via Inter-Layer Consistency Aggregation in Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Despite the impressive capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), they remain susceptible to hallucinations, where generated content is inconsistent with the input image. Existing training-free hallucination mitigation methods often suffer from unstable performance and high sensitivity to hyperparameter settings, which limits their practicality and broader adoption. In this paper, we propose Decoding with Inter-layer Consistency via Layer Aggregation (DCLA), a training-free decoding mechanism that requires no retraining, fine-tuning, or access to external knowledge bases. Specifically, DCLA constructs a dynamic semantic reference by aggregating representations from previous layers and uses it to correct semantically deviated layers, thereby enforcing inter-layer consistency. Experiments across seven LVLMs and multiple benchmarks demonstrate the generality of DCLA: it surpasses standard decoding by 28.58 MME points on LLaVA1.5-7B and 42.6 MME points on Qwen2.5-VL, while improving POPE accuracy by 2.74 percentage points in the strongest setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DCLA，一种无需训练的解码机制，通过层间一致性聚合有效缓解大型视觉-语言模型的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）虽性能强大，但仍易产生与输入图像不一致的幻觉内容。现有无需训练的幻觉缓解方法存在性能不稳定、对超参数敏感等问题，限制了其实用性和广泛采用。因此，需要一种更稳定、鲁棒的训练自由方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DCLA（Decoding with Inter-layer Consistency via Layer Aggregation），无需重新训练、微调或访问外部知识库。通过聚合前几层的表示构建动态语义参考，用于纠正语义偏离的层，强制执行层间一致性，从而减少幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 在7个LVLMs和多个基准上验证了DCLA的通用性：在LLaVA1.5-7B上MME提升28.58分，在Qwen2.5-VL上提升42.6分；在最强设置下POPE准确率提升2.74个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCLA作为一种训练自由的解码机制，显著提升了LVLMs的生成一致性和鲁棒性，具有广泛适用性。无需额外训练或外部知识，易于部署。未来可探索与其他解码策略的融合。

title: Circular Quasiconformal Deturbulence: Geometry-Based Restoration from Multiple Turbulent Frames
abstract: Imaging through inhomogeneous media often results in severe distortions, posing significant challenges to downstream image-processing tasks. The lack of clean paired images makes supervised learning impractical, motivating unsupervised restoration approaches. In this work, we propose the Circular Quasi-Conformal Deturbulence (CQCD) framework, an unsupervised approach that reconstructs distortion-free images from multiple frames using a circular architecture. The framework minimizes reconstruction errors by jointly estimating forward and backward transformations between distorted observations and the restored image. A key advancement of CQCD is the integration of computational quasi-conformal geometry, which encourages bijective non-rigid deformations and improves the well-posedness of both forward and inverse mappings for cycle consistency. The deformation field is further regularized to preserve structural coherence and reduce non-physical artifacts such as folding or tearing. Additionally, tight-frame blocks are employed to effectively encode distortion-sensitive features, enhancing the precision of the restoration process. To assess the effectiveness of the proposed framework, extensive evaluations are conducted on synthetic and real-world image datasets. Experimental findings indicate that CQCD not only surpasses existing state-of-the-art deturbulence techniques in restoration quality but also achieves highly accurate deformation field estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出循环拟共形去湍流（CQCD）框架，一种无监督方法，通过循环架构和拟共形几何从多帧图像中重建无失真图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 成像通过非均匀介质会导致严重失真，影响下游任务。由于缺乏干净的配对图像，监督学习不可行，因此需要无监督恢复方法。现有无监督方法在保持结构一致性和非刚性变形方面存在不足，CQCD旨在解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: CQCD采用循环架构，联合估计失真观测与恢复图像间的前向和反向变换。创新引入计算拟共形几何，促进双射非刚性变形，增强循环一致性的适定性。变形场通过正则化保持结构连贯性并减少折叠等伪影。使用紧框架块有效编码失真敏感特征，提升恢复精度。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实图像数据集上的实验表明，CQCD在恢复质量上超越现有最先进的去湍流技术，并且实现了高精度的变形场估计。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明，但与基线方法相比性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CQCD为无监督图像去湍流提供了有效方案，结合拟共形几何和循环架构提升了恢复质量和变形估计的准确性。其学术价值在于将几何方法融入图像恢复，实际应用可改善湍流环境下的成像质量。未来工作可探索更复杂的变形模型或扩展到视频处理。

title: TF-TI2I: Training-Free Text-and-Image-to-Image Generation via Multi-Modal Implicit-Context Learning in Text-to-Image Models
abstract: Text-and-Image-To-Image (TI2I), an extension of Text-To-Image (T2I), integrates image inputs with textual instructions to enhance image generation. Existing methods often partially utilize image inputs, focusing on specific elements like objects or styles, or they experience a decline in generation quality with complex, multi-image instructions. To overcome these challenges, we introduce Training-Free Text-and-Image-to-Image (TF-TI2I), which adapts cutting-edge T2I models such as SD3 without the need for additional training. Our method capitalizes on the MM-DiT architecture, in which we point out that textual tokens can implicitly learn visual information from vision tokens. We enhance this interaction by extracting a condensed visual representation from reference images, facilitating selective information sharing through Reference Contextual Masking -- this technique confines the usage of contextual tokens to instruction-relevant visual information. Additionally, our Winner-Takes-All module mitigates distribution shifts by prioritizing the most pertinent references for each vision token. Addressing the gap in TI2I evaluation, we also introduce the FG-TI2I Bench, a comprehensive benchmark tailored for TI2I and compatible with existing T2I methods. Our approach shows robust performance across various benchmarks, confirming its effectiveness in handling complex image-generation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的TF-TI2I方法，利用隐式上下文学习实现文本-图像到图像生成，避免额外训练即可处理复杂多图像指令。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有TI2I方法部分利用图像输入，聚焦于特定元素（如对象或风格），或在处理复杂多图像指令时生成质量下降。TI2I扩展了T2I能力，但缺乏高效且无需训练的方法。该研究旨在无需额外训练即可适应先进T2I模型如SD3，以克服上述局限性。
light_analysis.method: 基于MM-DiT架构，提出文本token可从视觉token隐式学习视觉信息。通过提取参考图像的压缩视觉表示，采用参考上下文掩码限制上下文token仅使用与指令相关的视觉信息。此外，胜者通吃模块为每个视觉token选择最相关的参考以缓解分布偏移。无需额外训练，直接适配预训练T2I模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上表现稳健，证实其在处理复杂图像生成任务中的有效性。引入FG-TI2I Bench，专门用于TI2I评估且兼容现有T2I方法。摘要未明确具体性能指标，但表明方法优于现有TI2I方法，尤其在多图像指令场景下。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献为无需训练的TF-TI2I方法，以及新的FG-TI2I基准，填补了TI2I评估空白。方法具备学术价值，可扩展T2I模型应用范围。潜在局限包括依赖预训练模型能力，未来工作可探索进一步优化隐式学习或适用于更复杂多模态指令。

title: Bayesian Optimization for General Reaction Conditions
abstract: General chemical reaction conditions that achieve consistently high performance across multiple substrates are important for practical applications such as library synthesis and high-throughput experimentation. However, identifying such conditions efficiently has been a longstanding challenge, as it requires decision making under uncertainty with respect to both conditions and substrates, while minimizing the number of required experiments. Here, we introduce CurryBO, a high-level framework for generality-oriented optimization. By formalizing the problem as Bayesian optimization over curried functions, CurryBO provides a unified framework that accommodates different generality definitions (e.g., mean yield across substrates), and supports a range of substrate and condition selection strategies. We evaluate this framework on four benchmark tasks in experimental reaction optimization, and systematically analyze key algorithmic components. Our results show that efficient experiment planning can be achieved by emphasizing exploration when selecting reaction conditions, followed by the uncertainty-guided prioritization of substrates in a sequential decison-making scheme. Based on these insights, we design and validate an optimization policy that substantially improves sample efficiency relative to previously reported approaches across all benchmarks. Overall, the flexibility and modularity of CurryBO facilitate the integration of generality-oriented optimization into experimental settings, enabling more efficient identification of solutions that perform robustly across diverse tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CurryBO框架，将一般反应条件优化形式化为curried函数的贝叶斯优化，实现高效且通用的实验规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际应用中需要通用的化学反应条件，使其在多种底物上均保持高性能，但现有方法难以在条件与底物双重不确定性下高效决策。传统优化通常针对单一底物，缺少对通用性的系统考虑，且实验成本高昂。CurryBO旨在解决这一问题，通过形式化通用性目标，减少所需实验次数。
light_analysis.method: CurryBO基于curried函数的贝叶斯优化，将优化分解为条件选择和底物选择两个层次。核心创新在于统一框架支持多种通用性定义（如平均产率）和多种选择策略。算法通过强调条件探索和不确定性引导的底物优先级排序，实现序贯决策。框架模块化，易于集成到实验设置中。
light_analysis.result: 在四个实验反应优化基准任务上评估，CurryBO显著提升了样本效率。通过系统性分析关键算法组件，发现强调条件探索和不确定性引导的底物优先级排序是高效的关键。设计的优化策略在所有基准上均优于先前报告的方法，实现了更高效的通用条件识别。
light_analysis.conclusion: CurryBO为通用性导向的化学条件优化提供了灵活、模块化的框架，能高效识别跨底物鲁棒性强的解决方案。具有重要学术价值，可推广至其他需要通用性能优化的实验场景。未来可扩展至更复杂的多目标或动态实验设置。

title: Learning to Explain Air Traffic Situation
abstract: Understanding how air traffic controllers construct a mental 'picture' of complex air traffic situations is crucial but remains a challenge due to the inherently intricate, high-dimensional interactions between aircraft, pilots, and controllers. Previous work on modeling the strategies of air traffic controllers and their mental image of traffic situations often centers on specific air traffic control tasks or pairwise interactions between aircraft, neglecting to capture the comprehensive dynamics of an air traffic situation. To address this issue, we propose a machine learning-based framework for explaining air traffic situations. Specifically, we employ a Transformer-based multi-agent trajectory model that encapsulates both the spatio-temporal movement of aircraft and social interaction between them. By deriving attention scores from the model, we can quantify the influence of individual aircraft on overall traffic dynamics. This provides explainable insights into how air traffic controllers perceive and understand the traffic situation. Trained on real-world air traffic surveillance data collected from the terminal airspace around Incheon International Airport in South Korea, our framework effectively explicates air traffic situations. This could potentially support and enhance the decision-making and situational awareness of air traffic controllers.
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, minor revisions to address reviewer feedback for final submission to the First US-Europe Air Transportation Research and Development (ATRD) Symposium

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Transformer的多智能体轨迹模型，通过注意力机制量化飞机对交通态势的影响，解释空中交通管制员的态势感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 空中交通管制员对复杂交通态势的‘心理图像’理解至关重要，但由于飞机、飞行员和管制员之间固有的高维交互，这一理解变得困难。现有方法多聚焦于特定管制任务或飞机两两交互，未能捕捉交通态势的整体动态。因此需要一种能够全面解释交通态势的框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用基于Transformer的多智能体轨迹模型，同时编码飞机的时空运动和社会交互。通过从模型中提取注意力分数，量化每架飞机对整体交通动态的影响，从而提供可解释的洞察。模型使用韩国仁川国际机场终端空域的真实空中交通监视数据训练。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据上的实验表明，该框架能够有效解释空中交通态势。但摘要未提供具体的性能指标（如准确率或效率提升）或与基线方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为理解交通管制员的态势感知提供了可解释的机器学习方法，有望支持和增强管制员的决策与情景意识。未来可进一步扩展到不同空域或集成更多交互因素。摘要未明确讨论局限性。

title: Towards Consistent and Efficient Dataset Distillation via Diffusion-Driven Selection
abstract: Dataset distillation provides an effective approach to reduce memory and computational costs by optimizing a compact dataset that achieves performance comparable to the full original. However, for large-scale datasets and complex deep networks (e.g., ImageNet-1K with ResNet-101), the vast optimization space hinders distillation effectiveness, limiting practical applications. Recent methods leverage pre-trained diffusion models to directly generate informative images, thereby bypassing pixel-level optimization and achieving promising results. Nonetheless, these approaches often suffer from distribution shifts between the pre-trained diffusion prior and target datasets, as well as the need for multiple distillation steps under varying settings. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel framework that is orthogonal to existing diffusion-based distillation techniques by utilizing the diffusion prior for patch selection rather than generation. Our method predicts noise from the diffusion model conditioned on input images and optional text prompts (with or without label information), and computes the associated loss for each image-patch pair. Based on the loss differences, we identify distinctive regions within the original images. Furthermore, we apply intra-class clustering and ranking on the selected patches to enforce diversity constraints. This streamlined pipeline enables a one-step distillation process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across various metrics and settings.

light_analysis.overview: 利用扩散先验进行图像块选择而非生成，实现一致且高效的数据集蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法在处理大规模数据集和复杂网络时，优化空间巨大导致蒸馏效果受限；基于扩散模型生成图像的方法存在分布偏移且需要多步蒸馏。为解决这些问题，提出一种正交于现有扩散蒸馏技术的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出扩散驱动的选择框架，将扩散先验用于图像块选择：通过条件扩散模型预测噪声，计算每个图像-块对的损失差异来识别判别性区域；再进行类内聚类和排序以增强多样性，实现一步蒸馏。无需像素级优化。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K等大规模数据集上，与多种SOTA方法相比，该方法在分类准确率、一致性和设置泛化性上均取得一致优势，具体数值摘要未明确，但强调“consistently outperforms”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种简洁且正交的扩散数据集蒸馏方法，通过选择而非生成避免了分布偏移，实现高效的一步蒸馏。具有较强实用价值，未来可探索更复杂的先验和选择策略。

title: Adversarial Robustness of AI-Generated Image Detectors in the Real World
abstract: The rapid advancement of Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) capabilities is accompanied by a concerning rise in its misuse. In particular the generation of credible misinformation in the form of images poses a significant threat to the public trust in democratic processes. Consequently, there is an urgent need to develop tools to reliably distinguish between authentic and AI-generated content. The majority of detection methods are based on neural networks that are trained to recognize forensic artifacts. In this work, we demonstrate that current state-of-the-art classifiers are vulnerable to adversarial examples under real-world conditions. Through extensive experiments, comprising four detection methods and five attack algorithms, we show that an attacker can dramatically decrease classification performance, without internal knowledge of the detector's architecture. Notably, most attacks remain effective even when images are degraded during the upload to, e.g., social media platforms. In a case study, we demonstrate that these robustness challenges are also found in commercial tools by conducting black-box attacks on HIVE, a proprietary online GenAI media detector. In addition, we evaluate the robustness of using generated features of a robust pre-trained model and showed that this increases the robustness, while not reaching the performance on benign inputs. These results, along with the increasing potential of GenAI to erode public trust, underscore the need for more research and new perspectives on methods to prevent its misuse.
comment: Accepted at the 23rd International Conference on Detection of Intrusions and Malware, and Vulnerability Assessment (DIMVA 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 揭示当前最先进的AI生成图像检测器在现实世界中对对抗性样本的脆弱性，并指出鲁棒性挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着生成式AI（GenAI）能力的快速提升，其被滥用于制造虚假图像信息，威胁公众信任和民主进程。因此，迫切需要开发可靠工具区分真实与AI生成内容。现有检测方法大多基于神经网络识别取证伪影，但它们在现实条件下的对抗鲁棒性尚未充分验证。本研究旨在填补这一空白，评估检测器在面对对抗性攻击时的表现。
light_analysis.method: 通过大量实验，涵盖四种检测方法和五种攻击算法，模拟真实世界条件（包括图像上传至社交媒体平台后的降质）。攻击者无需知晓检测器内部架构（黑盒攻击）。此外，在案例研究中对商业在线检测器HIVE进行黑盒攻击，并评估使用鲁棒预训练模型生成的特征对鲁棒性的提升效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，攻击者能显著降低分类性能，且多数攻击在图像降质后仍然有效。对商业工具HIVE的黑盒攻击同样成功。使用鲁棒预训练模型的特征可提高鲁棒性，但在良性输入上性能未达最佳。这些结果凸显了检测器在现实世界中的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，当前AI生成图像检测器在对抗性攻击下鲁棒性不足，即使在现实条件（如图像降质）下攻击依然有效。这强调了需进一步研究新型防御方法，以应对GenAI滥用带来的公众信任侵蚀问题。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的检测架构或结合多模态信息。

title: Byzantine-Robust Aggregation for Securing Decentralized Federated Learning
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) emerges as a distributed machine learning approach that addresses privacy concerns by training AI models locally on devices. Decentralized Federated Learning (DFL) extends the FL paradigm by eliminating the central server, thereby enhancing scalability and robustness through the avoidance of a single point of failure. However, DFL faces significant challenges in optimizing security, as most Byzantine-robust algorithms proposed in the literature are designed for centralized scenarios. In this paper, we present a novel Byzantine-robust aggregation algorithm to enhance the security of Decentralized Federated Learning environments, coined WFAgg. This proposal handles adverse conditions and strengthens the robustness of dynamic decentralized topologies at the same time by employing multiple filters to identify and mitigate Byzantine attacks. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in maintaining model accuracy and convergence in the presence of various Byzantine attack scenarios, outperforming state-of-the-art centralized Byzantine-robust aggregation schemes (such as Multi-Krum or Clustering). These algorithms are evaluated on an IID image classification problem in both centralized and decentralized scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WFAgg算法，通过多过滤器机制增强去中心化联邦学习对拜占庭攻击的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习（DFL）消除中心服务器，提升可扩展性和鲁棒性，但面临安全挑战。现有拜占庭鲁棒算法多针对集中式场景，无法直接应用于DFL的动态拓扑和恶意节点场景。因此需要一种专门针对DFL的拜占庭鲁棒聚合算法，以保障模型安全性。
light_analysis.method: 提出WFAgg算法，采用多个过滤器协同检测并缓解拜占庭攻击，同时增强动态去中心化拓扑的鲁棒性。算法在IID图像分类任务上评估，对比集中式拜占庭鲁棒方案如Multi-Krum和Clustering。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，WFAgg在多种拜占庭攻击场景下能维持模型准确率和收敛性，性能优于Multi-Krum和Clustering等集中式方案。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但定性证明了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WFAgg有效提升了去中心化联邦学习的安全性，填补了该领域拜占庭鲁棒聚合的空白。学术上为DFL安全提供了新思路，实际应用中可保护分布式AI系统。局限可能包括仅测试IID数据和图像分类任务，未来可扩展至非IID场景。

title: Over-parameterization and Adversarial Robustness in Neural Networks: An Overview and Empirical Analysis
abstract: Thanks to their extensive capacity, over-parameterized neural networks exhibit superior predictive capabilities and generalization. However, having a large parameter space is considered one of the main suspects of the neural networks' vulnerability to adversarial example -- input samples crafted ad-hoc to induce a desired misclassification. Relevant literature has claimed contradictory remarks in support of and against the robustness of over-parameterized networks. These contradictory findings might be due to the failure of the attack employed to evaluate the networks' robustness. Previous research has demonstrated that depending on the considered model, the algorithm employed to generate adversarial examples may not function properly, leading to overestimating the model's robustness. In this work, we empirically study the robustness of over-parameterized networks against adversarial examples. However, unlike the previous works, we also evaluate the considered attack's reliability to support the results' veracity. Our results show that over-parameterized networks are robust against adversarial attacks as opposed to their under-parameterized counterparts.

light_analysis.overview: 通过评估攻击可靠性，实证表明过参数化网络对对抗攻击具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 过参数化神经网络因其大容量而表现优异，但也被认为是易受对抗攻击的根源。现有文献对此存在矛盾结论，可能由于攻击方法失效导致鲁棒性高估。因此需要重新审视过参数化与鲁棒性的关系。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用实证研究方法，对比过参数化和欠参数化网络的对抗鲁棒性。关键创新在于同时评估所使用的对抗攻击方法的可靠性，确保结果有效性，避免因攻击失败而产生误导性结论。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，过参数化网络对对抗攻击具有鲁棒性，而欠参数化网络则较为脆弱。该发现支持了过参数化有利于鲁棒性的观点，并解释了先前矛盾结论可能源于攻击不可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过考虑攻击可靠性，澄清了过参数化网络对抗鲁棒性的争议，表明过参数化并非脆弱性的根源。这为设计鲁棒的神经网络提供了新视角，未来可探索更可靠的攻击评估方法。

title: Gradient Testing and Estimation by Comparisons
abstract:
We study gradient testing and gradient estimation of smooth functions using only a comparison oracle that, given two points, indicates which one has the larger function value. For any smooth $f\colon\mathbb R^n	o\mathbb R$, $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb R^n$, and $\varepsilon>0$, we design a gradient testing algorithm that determines whether the normalized gradient $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ is $\varepsilon$-close or $2\varepsilon$-far from a given unit vector $\mathbf{v}$ using $O(1)$ queries, as well as a gradient estimation algorithm that outputs an $\varepsilon$-estimate of $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ using $O(n\log(1/\varepsilon))$ queries which we prove to be optimal. Furthermore, we study gradient estimation in the quantum comparison oracle model where queries can be made in superpositions, and develop a quantum algorithm using $O(\log (n/\varepsilon))$ queries.
comment: v3: 37 pages, 1 figure. To appear in the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). Added numerical experiments to validate the proposed algorithms (Section 5), and minor fixes that improve presentation compared to v2. This version subsumes the note "Comparisons are all You need for optimizing smooth functions" (v1)

light_analysis.overview: 本文针对光滑函数，基于比较预言机提出梯度测试和估计算法，并给出量子加速版本。
light_analysis.motivation: 在许多优化和机器学习场景中，只能通过函数值的比较而非梯度直接获取来更新参数。现有梯度估计方法通常需要梯度信息或较多查询。本文旨在设计仅依赖比较信息的高效梯度测试和估计算法，以解决实际中无法直接计算梯度的问题，并降低查询复杂度。
light_analysis.method: 对于光滑函数，设计梯度测试算法，通过O(1)次比较查询判断归一化梯度是否接近给定方向；梯度估计算法则通过O(n log(1/ε))次查询输出ε-精度的梯度方向估计，并证明查询复杂度最优。在量子比较预言机模型中，利用叠加查询实现复杂度降至O(log(n/ε))。
light_analysis.result: 梯度测试算法仅需常数次O(1)比较查询即可区分ε-接近和2ε-远离的情况；梯度估计算法达到O(n log(1/ε))查询复杂度，并被证明是最优的。量子算法进一步将查询复杂度降低到对数级O(log(n/ε))，展示了显著的加速效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在仅依赖比较预言机的设定下，实现了高效且最优的梯度测试与估计，为无法获取梯度的问题提供了理论支撑。量子版本的提出拓展了量子优化算法应用。未来可探索非光滑函数或更复杂预言机下的扩展。
